The parietal bone *(os parietale)* (Figs 50, 51, 57, 58) is a paired bone forming the superior and lateral parts of the skull cap (calvaria). It is a quadrangular plate convex on the outer surface. Two surfaces, external and internal, and four borders, superior, inferior, anterior, and posterior, are distinguished in it.

> 顶骨（os parietale）（图50、51、57、58）是一对骨，构成颅盖（calvaria）的上部和侧部。顶骨为一四方形板状结构，外表面凸起。其可区分出两个面（外侧面和内侧面）以及四个缘（上缘、下缘、前缘和后缘）。

The external surface *(fades externa)* is even and convex. The most convex part is called the parietal eminence, or tuber *(tuber parietale).* Below the tuber is a rough horizontal arched superior temporal Hue *(linca temporalis superior)* which arises from the anterior border of the bone and, being a continuation of the superior temporal line of the frontal bone, stretches along the entire surface of the parietal bone to its posteroinferior angle. Below this line and parallel to the inferior border of the parietal bone stretches another, more defined line, the inferior temporal line *(linca temporalis inferior).* The superior line gives attachment to the temporal fascia, the inferior line is the site of insertion of the temporal muscle.

> 外侧表面（外侧面）平整且凸起。最凸起的部分称为顶骨隆起，或称顶骨突（tuber parietale）。顶骨突下方有一条粗糙的水平弓形的上颞线（linea temporalis superior），该线起自骨的前缘，并作为额骨上颞线的延续，沿顶骨的整个表面延伸至其后下方角。此线下方并与顶骨下缘平行，还有一条更为明显的线，称为下颞线（linea temporalis inferior）。上颞线附着于颞筋膜，下颞线则是颞肌的附着点。

The internal surface *(fades intcrna)* is concave and bears poorly defined depressions corresponding to the gyri of the brain which are called impressions for the cerebral gyri *(impressiones digitatae),*  cerebral ridges and dendriform branching arterial sulci *(sulri arteriosi)* which are marks of the branches of the middle meningeal artery.

> 内部面（fades intcrna）呈凹陷状，并带有不明确的凹陷，对应于大脑的脑回，称为脑回压迹（impressiones digitatae）、脑回嵴和树状分支动脉沟（sulri arteriosi），这些是硬脑膜中动脉分支的标志。

On the superior border of the cerebral surface of the bone passes an incomplete sagittal groove *(sulcus sinus sagittalis superioris)*  and, together with the groove on the coutralateral parietal bone, forms a complete groove (the sickle-shaped process of the dura *maicr, falx ccrebri,* is attached to the margins of the groove).

> 在颅骨脑面的上缘，有一条不完整的冠状沟（上矢状窦沟），并与对侧顶骨上的沟共同形成一条完整的沟（硬脑膜镰，falx cerebri，附着于该沟的边缘）。

In the posterior part of the superior border of the bone is a small parietal foramen *(foramen parietale)* which is an emissary *(emissarium)* transmitting a branch of the occipital artery to the dura mater and the parietal emissary vein. Deep in the sagittal groove and next to it (particularly on the parietal bones at an elderly age) can be seen most of the small granular pits *(foveolae granulares)* (granulations of the arachnoid mater of the brain project here).

> 在骨的上缘后部有一小的顶孔（顶孔），它是连通孔，通过该孔，枕动脉的分支进入硬脑膜，并且顶孔静脉也由此进入。在矢状沟深处，其附近（尤其在老年时可见于顶骨）可见多数小颗粒状凹陷（颗粒状凹陷），这些是脑蛛网膜的颗粒在此处投射形成。

A small deep siginoid groove *(sulcus sinus sigmoidei),* an impres-

> 一个小而深的窦汇沟（窦汇沟，sinus sigmoidei sulcus），一个印象 /no_think

sion of the venous sigmoid sinus of the dura mater, is found on the cerebral surface at the posteroinferior angle. It is continuous with the sigmoid groove on the temporal bone anteriorly and with the groove for the transverse sinus on the occipital bone posteriorly.

> 硬脑膜窦汇（dural sinus confluence）位于脑表面的后下方角处。其前方与颞骨上的乙状窦沟相连，后方与枕骨上的横窦沟相连。

The superior, sagittal border *(margo sagittalis)* runs straight and is strongly serrated. It is longer than the other borders and articulates with the sagittal border of the coutralateral parietal bone by means of the sagittal suture *(sutura sagittalis).*

> 上缘（矢状缘，margo sagittalis）呈直线状，并且具有明显的锯齿状边缘。它比其他缘更长，并通过矢状缝（矢状缝，sutura sagittalis）与对侧顶骨的矢状缘相接。

The inferior, squamous border *(margo squamosa)* is tapered and arched and its anterior area is covered by the posterior part of the upper border of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone. Further to the back, the parietal border of the squamous part of the temporal bone is superimposed on it; the extreme posterior area articulates by means of notches with the mastoid process of the temporal bone. According to these three areas, the following three sutures form: the squamous suture *(sutura squamosa),* the parietomastoid suture *(sutura parietomastoidea),* and the sphenoparietal suture *(sutura sphenoparictalis).*

> 下颌骨的下缘（squamous border，即鳞部边缘）呈锥形并呈拱状，其前方区域被蝶骨大翼上缘的后部所覆盖。向后方，颞骨鳞部的顶骨边与之重叠；最后方区域则通过凹陷与颞骨的乳突过程相接。根据这三个区域，形成以下三条缝：鳞缝（sutura squamosa）、顶乳缝（sutura parietomastoidea）以及蝶顶缝（sutura sphenoparictalis）。

The anterior, frontal border *(margo frontalis)* is serrated. It articulates with the parietal border of the squama of the frontal bone to form the coronal suture *(sutura coronalis).*

> 前方、额缘（margo frontalis）呈锯齿状。它与额骨鳞部的顶缘形成冠状缝（sutura coronalis）。[!note]- 术语说明
“margo frontalis” 通常译作“额缘”，是颅骨额骨的一部分，与顶骨形成冠状缝。

The posterior, occipital border *(margo oedpitalis)* is serrated and articulates with the lambdoid border of the occipital bone to form the lambdoid suture *(sutura lambdoidea).*

> 后部、枕部边缘（margo occipitalis）呈锯齿状，并与枕骨的 lambdoid 边缘相接，形成 lambdoid 矢状缝（sutura lambdoidea）。

In accordance with the four borders, the parietal bone has four angles.

> 根据四界，额骨有四个角。

The anterosuperior, frontal angle *(angulus frontalis)* is almost straight (it is bounded by the coronal and sagittal sutures).

> 前上方的额角（额角）几乎呈直线（由冠状缝和矢状缝共同构成）。[!note]- 术语说明 “frontal angle” 通常译作“额角”，是颅骨的骨缝交界处。

The anteroinferior, sphenoidal angle *(angulus spkenoidalis)* is acute (it is bounded by the coronal and sphenoparietal sutures).

> 前下颌角（sphenoidal angle，angulus sphenoidalis）为锐角（由冠状缝和蝶顶缝构成）。[!note]- 术语说明
“sphenoidal angle” 通常译作“蝶颌角”或“蝶骨角”，此处指颅骨蝶骨与下颌骨交界处的角，具体翻译可根据上下文判断。

The posterosupcrior, occipital angle *(angulus oedpitalis)* is obtuse (it is bounded by the lambdoid and sagittal sutures).

> 后上方、枕部角（angulus occipitalis）为钝角（由人字缝和矢状缝共同构成）。[!note]- 术语说明
“angulus occipitalis” 通常译作“枕部角”，是颅骨缝的一种。

The posteroinferior, mastoid angle *(angulus mastoideus)* is more obtuse than the posterosupcrior angle (it is bounded by the lambdoid and parietomastoid SUtures). Its anterior par! fits into the parietal notch *(inrisura parietalis)* of the temporal bone.

> 后下方乳突角（angulus mastoideus）比后上方角（由枕骨大孔和顶枕缝界定）更钝。其前缘嵌入颞骨的顶骨凹陷（infraspinous fossa）中。

![](_page_58_Picture_2.jpeg)

57. *Right parietal bone (os parietale);* outer aspect (%).

> 右侧顶骨（os parietale）；外侧表面（%）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_59_Picture_2.jpeg)

58. *Right parietal bone (os parietale);* inner aspect (%).

> 右侧顶骨（os parietale）；内侧表面（%）

## 5 THE FRONTAL BONE

> 5 额骨

The frontal bone *(os frontale)* (Figs 48-53, 59-61) of a human adult forms the anterior part and partly the base of the skull cap. It consists of four parts: frontal squama *(squama frontalisf* two orbital plates *(paries orbitales),* and the nasal part *(pars nasalis).*

> 人类成人的额骨（os frontale）（图48-53，59-61）构成颅骨的前部及颅盖的一部分。额骨由四个部分组成：额鳞（squama frontalis）、两个眶板（paries orbitales）以及鼻部（pars nasalis）。

The frontal squama *(squama jrontalis)* is convex to the front and has the following surfaces: an external (frontal), two lateral (temporal) surfaces, and an internal (cerebral surface).

> 额骨鳞部（frontal squama）向前凸出，其表面包括：一个外侧表面（额面），两个侧表面（颞面）以及一个内侧表面（脑面）。

The frontal surface *(fades externa)* is smooth, convex anteriorly and has an eminence on the median line. This eminence is not detectable in some cases. This is the line of the frontal suture *(sutura mctopica)* marking the union of the halves of the frontal bone in early childhood. In the anterior parts, the frontal surface of the squama is continuous with the orbital surface *(fades orbitalis)* and forms the supraorbital margin *(margo supraorbitalis)* on both sides. Above and parallel to this margin is a more or less defined arched eminence, the superciliary arch *(arms superdliaris).* Above each arch is a rounded frontal eminence *(tuber frontale).* Between and slightly above the superciliary arches the surface of the squama has a depressed area, the glabella. The supraorbital margin has a small

> 额面（fades externa）表面光滑，向前凸出，并在中线处有一个隆起。在某些情况下，这一隆起可能不明显。这是额缝（sutura metopica）的位置，标志着儿童早期额骨两半的愈合线。在前部，额面的骨板部分与眶面（fades orbitalis）连续，并在两侧形成额上缘（margo supraorbitalis）。在额上缘上方并与之平行处，有一个较明显或较不明显的弓状隆起，称为眉间弓（arcus superciliaris）。在每一弓上方，有一个圆形的额隆（tuber frontale）。在眉间弓之间及略高于其位置处，骨板表面有一个凹陷区域，称为眉间区（glabella）。额上缘处有一个小的

supraorbital notch *(indsura supraorbitalis)* in its medial third. This notch varies greatly and may be present as a supraorbital foramen *(foramen supraorbitale).* Nearer to the median line, i.e. medially, is located a no less defined frontal notch *(indsura Jrontalis).* The supraorbital notch transmits the lateral branch of the supraorbital nerve and vessels, the frontal notch transmits the medial branch of this nerve and vessels. A frontal foramen *(foramen frontale)* may be found in place of the notch.

> 眶上沟（indsura supraorbitalis）位于其内侧三分之一处。该沟变异较大，可能表现为眶上孔（foramen supraorbitale）。更靠近中线，即内侧，有一个同样明确的额沟（indsura frontalis）。眶上沟传递眶上神经的外侧支及血管，而额沟则传递该神经的内侧支及血管。额孔（foramen frontale）可能取代额沟的位置。

The supraorbital margin is continuous laterally with a blunt triangular zygomatic process *(processus zygomaticus),* whose serrated edge unites with the frontal process of the zygomatic bone by means of the frontozygomatic suture *(sutura frontozygomatica).*

> 眉弓的外侧与一个钝三角形的颧骨突（processus zygomaticus）相连，其锯齿状边缘通过颧额缝（sutura frontozygomatica）与颧骨的额突（processus frontalis ossis zygomatici）相接。

An arched temporal line *(tinea temporalis)* ascends posteriorly from the zygomatic process. It separates the frontal surface of the squama from its temporal surface *(fades temporalis)* which is the anterosupcrior area of the temporal fossa where part of the temporal muscle arises.

> 一条弓形颞线（颞筋膜）从颧突向后上方延伸。它将骨板的额面与颞面（颞筋膜）分隔开，后者是颞窝的前上方区域，颞肌的一部分由此起始。

The cerebral surface *(fades interna)* of the frontal squama (Fig. 60) is concave. It has poorly defined impressions for the gyri

> 额叶骨面（内侧面）（图60）呈凹陷状。其上可见边界不清的脑回压迹。

![](_page_60_Picture_10.jpeg)

59. *Frontal bone (os frontale);* outer aspect (%).

> 额骨（os frontale）；外侧表面（外侧方面）%。

*(impressiones girorum),* cerebral ridges *(juga cerebralia),* and inconstantly present and indistinct arterial sulci *(sulci arteriosi)* which are markings for the brain and vessels lodged here.

> （沟回印象）、脑回（大脑沟回）、以及不恒定存在且不清晰的动脉沟（动脉沟），这些是脑和血管在此处的标记。

The sagittal groove *(sulcus sinus sagittalis superioris)* runs in the middle of the superior parts of the internal surface. Both its edges pass upwards and to the back to unite with the sagittal groove of the parietal bone, while downwards they join to form a single sharp frontal crest *(crista frontalis)* (to which the process of the dura mater, falx cerebri, is attached). At its lowest part the crest together with the ala of the crista gatli *(ala cristae galli ossis etkmoidalis)* form the foramen caecum *(foramen cecum)y* a blind opening occupied by a process of the dura mater.

> 矢状沟（窦汇沟）位于内侧表面的上部中央。其两侧缘向上并向后延伸，与顶骨的矢状沟相会合；向下则汇合成一条尖锐的额 crest（额 crest，crista frontalis），该 crest 附着于硬脑膜的突起（dura mater 的突起，falx cerebri 的突起）。在该 crest 的最低部分，其与额 crest 的翼状突（crista galli 的翼状突，ala cristae galli ossis etmoidalis）共同形成盲孔（caecum 孔，foramen caecum），该孔被硬脑膜的突起所占据。

The superior, or posterior, thickened border of the frontal squama is called the parietal margin *(margo parietalis).* Its serrated border unites with the frontal border of the parietal bone to form the coronal suture *(sutura coronalis).* The inferior triangular areas of the squama unite with the frontal border of the greater wings of the sphenoid bone.

> 额鳞的上缘（或后缘）增厚部分称为顶缘（margo parietalis）。其锯齿状边缘与顶骨的额缘相连，形成冠状缝（sutura coronalis）。鳞部的下部三角区域与蝶骨大翼的额缘相连。

Each orbital plate *(pars orbitalis)* (Fig. 61) of the frontal bone contributes to the formation of the superior wall of the orbit. It

> 每块额骨的眶板（眶部）（图61）均参与构成眶的上壁。

stretches posteriorly and horizontally from the supraorbital margin of the squama. Inferior (orbital) and superior (cerebral) surfaces are distinguished in it.

> 从鳞部的 supraorbital 边缘向后方和水平方向延伸。其下表面（眶面）和上表面（脑面）可加以区分。

The orbital surface *(fades orbitalis)* faces the cavity of the orbit and is smooth and concave. In its lateral part at the base of the zygomatic process it has a small shallow fossa for the lacrimal gland *(fossa glandulae laenmalis).*

> 眶面（fades orbitalis）朝向眶腔，表面光滑且凹陷。在颧突基部的外侧部分，有一个小而浅的窝，容纳泪腺（fossa glandulae lacrimalis）。

I In medial pan ol the orbital surface bears ;i poorly defined trochlear fossa *(fovta trochUaris),* near to which a cartilaginous trochlcar spine *(spina trochlearis)* is often found (it serves for attachment of a cartilaginous ring which is a pulley, the trochlea, for the tendon of the superior oblique muscle of the eyeball).

> I 在眶内面的内侧部分，可见一个边界不清的滑车窝（fossa trochlearis），在其附近常可发现一个软骨性滑车突（spina trochlearis）（它作为附着点，供一个软骨性滑车（trochlea）使用，该滑车作为眼球上斜肌肌腱的滑轮）。[!note]- 术语说明
“trochlea” 通常译作“滑车”，在眼科中指眼球上斜肌肌腱的滑轮结构，属于眼球运动相关解剖结构。

The cerebral surface *(fades interna)* of the orbital part has clearly defined markings for the frontal lobes of the brain in the form of impressions for the gyri *(impressiones girorum)* and cerebral ridges of the cranium *(juga cerebralia).*

> 眶部的脑表面（内侧面）有清晰的标记，显示大脑额叶的轮廓，表现为脑回的压迹（gyri impressiones）和脑沟的颅骨嵴（juga cerebralia）。

The orbital plates are separated from one another by the ethmoidal notch *(indsura ethmoidalis)* into which fits the cribriform plate *(lamina cribrosaj* of the ethmoid bone. The notch is bounded on the sides by a border lateral of which are a series of small pits

> 眶板被筛骨筛孔（indsura ethmoidalis）分隔开，筛孔中容纳筛骨筛板（lamina cribrosa of the ethmoid bone）。筛孔的两侧由边界构成，该边界外侧有一系列小凹陷。

![](_page_61_Picture_11.jpeg)

60. *Frontal bone (osfrontale);* inner aspect

> 额骨（os frontale）；内侧表面

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_62_Picture_2.jpeg)

61. *Frontal bone (osfrontale);* inferior aspect (%).

> 额骨（os frontale）；下缘（inferior aspect）。

(Fig. 61). They roof in the open ethmoidal cells of the superior part of the ethmoid bone to form their superior wall. Two ethmoidal grooves, anterior and posterior, stretch transversely between the ethmoidal cells and together with the ethmoidal grooves of the labyrinth of the ethmoid bone form small canals which have small openings on the medial wall of the orbit: the anterior ethmoidal foramen *(foramen ethmoidale anterius)* (see Figs 106 and 109) which transmits the anterior ethmoidal vessels and nerve, and the posterior ethmoidal foramen *(foramen ethmoidale posterius)* which transmits the nerves and posterior ethmoidal vessels. The margin of the ethmoidal notch articulates with the superior margin of the orbital plate *(lamina orbitalis)* of the ethmoid bone to form the frontoelhmoid suture *(sutura Jrontoethmoidalis).* Anteriorly the notch unites with the lacrimal bone by means of the frontolacrimal suture *(sutura frontolacrimalis).*

> （图61）。它们覆盖筛骨上部的开放筛窦孔，形成其上壁。两个筛窦沟，前沟和后沟，横向延伸于筛窦孔之间，并与筛窦迷路的筛窦沟共同形成小的通道，这些通道在眼眶内侧壁上有小开口：前筛孔（foramen ethmoidale anterius）（见图106和109），其传递前筛血管和神经；后筛孔（foramen ethmoidale posterius），其传递神经和后筛血管。筛窦凹的边缘与筛骨眼眶板（lamina orbitalis）的上缘相接，形成额筛缝（sutura frontoethmoidalis）。前方，凹与泪骨通过额泪缝（sutura frontolacrimalis）相连。

T h e posterior border of the orbital plate is thin and serrated, and articulates with the lesser wing of the sphenoid bone to form the internal part of the sphenofrontal suture *(sutura spkenofrontalis).*

> 眼眶板的后缘较薄且呈锯齿状，与蝶骨小翼相接，形成蝶额缝（sutura spheno-frontalis）的内侧部分。

The lateral border of the orbital plate is rough, triangular, and articulates with the frontal border of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone to form the external part of the sphenofrontal suture. Still laterally the border terminates at the zygomatic process.

> 眶板的外侧缘粗糙，呈三角形，并与蝶骨大翼的眶缘形成蝶额缝的外侧部分。更靠外侧，该缘终止于颧突。

The nasal part *(pars nasalis)* of the frontal bone closes the ethmoidal notch anteriorly in an arch-like fashion. In the middle of its anterior part, the nasal spine *(spina nasalis)* (sometimes a double one) projects obliquely downwards and forwards. It has a tapering end and flattened sides and is surrounded in front and on the sides by a serrated nasal margin *(margo nasalis).* The anterior parts of the margin unite with the superior border of the nasal bone to form the frontonasal suture *(sutura Jrontonasalis),* the posterior parts join the frontal process of the maxilla *(processus Jrontalis)* by means of the frontomaxillary suture *(sutura Jrontomaxillaris).* Posteriorly, the inferior surface of the nasal part bears shallow ethmoidal pits which, as pointed out above, roof in the cells of the ethmoidal labyrinths.

> 额骨的鼻部（pars nasalis）以拱形方式封闭筛骨切迹的前方。在其前部中部，鼻突（spina nasalis）（有时为双突）斜向下前方突出。鼻突呈锥形末端，两侧扁平，其前方和侧方被锯齿状的鼻缘（margo nasalis）包围。鼻缘的前部与鼻骨的上缘相连，形成前鼻缝（sutura frontonasalis）；鼻缘的后部则通过前额缝（sutura frontomaxillaris）与上颌骨的额突（processus frontalis）相连。在鼻部的后方，其下表面具有浅表的筛骨窝，如上所述，这些窝覆盖筛骨迷路的空腔。

On either side of the nasal spine is the aperture of the frontal sinus *(apertura sinus Jrontalis).* It stretches upwards and forwards and leads into the cavity of the respective frontal sinus.

> 鼻骨的两侧为额窦开口（apertura sinus frontalis）。其开口向上并向前方延伸，通向相应的额窦腔。

The frontal sinus *(sinus Jrontalis)* (see Figs 94 and 103) is a paired cavity lodged between both plates of the frontal bone in its anteroinferior parts. It is an air paranasal sinus *(sinus paranasalis).*  T h e right and left sinuses are separated by a vertical septum of the frontal sinuses *(septum sinuum Jrontalium).* The septum deviates to one or the other side as a result of which the sinuses differ in size. T h e borders of the sinuses vary considerably. Sometimes they reach upwards to the frontal eminence, downwards to the supraorbital margin, backwards to the lesser wings of the sphenoid bone, and laterally to the zygomatic processes. By means of its aperture the frontal sinus communicates with the middle meatus of the nose *(meatus nasi medius).* The cavity of the sinus is lined with a mucous membrane.

> 额窦（sinus frontalis）（见图94和图103）是位于额骨前下方两层之间的成对腔隙。它是一个鼻旁窦（sinus paranasalis）。左右额窦之间由额窦垂直隔（septum sinuum frontalium）分隔。由于该隔向一侧或另一侧偏移，导致左右额窦大小不一。额窦的边界差异较大。有时其上界可达额隆，下界可达额上缘，后界可达蝶骨小翼，侧界可达颧突。额窦通过其开口与鼻腔中鼻道（meatus nasi medius）相通。窦腔内衬以黏膜。

## 6 THE SPHENOID BONE

> 6 筛骨

The sphenoid bone *(os spkenoidale)* (Figs 62-64, 94, 96, 102) is unpaired and forms the central part of the base of the skull.

> 蝶骨（sphenoid bone，os sphenoidale）（图62-64、94、96、102）为不成对骨，构成颅底的中央部分。

The body *(corpus ossis spkenoidalis)* is the middle part of the sphenoid bone, it is cuboid in shape and has six surfaces.

> 主体（蝶骨体）是蝶骨的中部，呈立方体形，具有六个面。

In its middle part the superior surface facing the cranial cavity has a depression, the sella turcica, in the centre of which is the hypophyseal fossa *(fossa hypopkysialis)* (Fig. 62) in which the hypophysis is lodged. The size of the fossa is determined by the size of the hypophysis. The sella turcica is bounded by the tuberculum sellae anteriorly. To the back of it, on the lateral surface of the sella is an inconstantly present middle clinoid process *(processus clinoideus medius).*

> 在蝶骨体中部的上面，朝向颅腔的一面有一个凹陷，称为蝶骨上沟（sella turcica），其中央为垂体窝（fossa hypophysealis）（图62），垂体即位于其中。垂体窝的大小由垂体的大小决定。蝶骨上沟前方由蝶骨上突界定。在蝶骨上沟的后方，其侧面上存在一个不恒定存在的中蝶骨嵴（processus clinoideus medius）。

A shallow transverse optic groove *(sulcus chiasmatis)* passes to the front of the sella and lodges the optic chiasma *(chiasma opticum).* On both sides the groove is continuous with the optic foramen *(canalis opticus).* In front of the groove is a smooth surface, jugum sphenoidale, that connects the lesser wings of the sphenoid bone. The anterosuperior border of the body is serrated, projects forwards slightly, and unites with the posterior border of the cribriform plate *(lamina cribrosa)* of the ethmoid bone to form the sphenoethmoidal suture *(sutura spkenoethmoidalU).* The sella turcica is bounded posteriorly by the dorsum sellae terminating on both sides by a small posterior clinoid process *(processus clinoideus posterior).*

> 一个浅表的横行视沟（视交叉沟，sulcus chiasmatis）位于蝶骨体前上方，向前延伸至蝶骨体的前方，并容纳视交叉（视交叉，chiasma opticum）。该沟的两侧与视神经孔（视孔，canalis opticus）相连续。视沟前方为一光滑表面，即蝶骨大翼（小翼，jugum sphenoidale），连接蝶骨的小翼。蝶骨体的前上方边界呈锯齿状，向前稍突出，并与筛骨筛板（筛孔板，lamina cribrosa）的后缘相连接，形成蝶筛缝（蝶筛缝，sutura sphenoethmoidalis）。蝶骨体后方为蝶骨嵴（蝶鞍，sella turcica），其后界为蝶骨体的蝶鞍嵴（蝶鞍嵴，dorsum sellae），两侧各有一个小的后床突（后床突，processus clinoideus posterior）。

The carotid groove *(sulcus caroticus)* stretches laterally from front to back of the sella (it is an impression of the internal carotid artery and the attendant nerve plexus which are lodged here). A sharp process called the lingula of the sphenoid bone *(lingula spkenoidalis)* projects at the posterior edge of the groove on its lateral side.

> 颈动脉沟（sulcus caroticus）从前向后横向延伸于蝶骨体（sella）的表面（它是内颈动脉及其伴随神经丛的凹陷处）。在沟的外侧缘后缘处，有一个尖锐的突起，称为蝶骨体的舌突（lingula sphenoidealis）。

The posterior surface of the dorsum sellae is continuous with the superior surface of the basilar part of the occipital bone to form the clivus (on which the pons, the medulla oblougata, the basilar artery and its branches are lodged). The posterior surface of the body is rough. It is joined to the anterior surface of the basilar part of the occipital bone by means of a cartilaginous layer to form the spheno-occipital joint *(synckondrosis spkenooccipitalis).* The cartilage is replaced by bony tissue with age and both bones fuse.

> 蝶骨体的后表面与枕骨基底部的上表面相连，形成斜坡（clivus），斜坡上容纳脑桥、延髓、基底动脉及其分支。蝶骨体的后表面粗糙。蝶骨体的前表面与枕骨基底部的前表面通过软骨层相连，形成蝶枕关节（synchondrosis sphenooccipitalis）。随着年龄增长，软骨被骨组织取代，两骨逐渐融合。

![](_page_63_Picture_10.jpeg)

62. *Sphenoid bone (os sphenoidale)* and *occipital bone (os occipitale);* superior aspect (%).

> 蝶骨（os sphenoidale）和枕骨（os occipitale）；上部（superior aspect）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_64_Picture_2.jpeg)

63. *Sphenoid bone (os spkenoidale);* posterior aspect *(<sup>l</sup> /i).*

> 蝶骨（sphenoid bone）；后侧面（<sup>l</sup>/i）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_64_Picture_4.jpeg)

64. *Sphenoid bone (os spkenoidale);* anterior aspect ('/).

> 蝶骨（sphenoid bone）；前方（anterior aspect）

The anterior and part of the inferior surface of the body face the nasal cavity. A vertical crest of the sphenoid *(crista sphenoidatis)*  projects into the middle of the anterior surface. Its anterior edge adjoins the perpendicular plate *(lamina perpendicularis)* of the ethmoid bone. The lower segment of the crest is tapered and stretches downwards to form the rostrum of the sphenoid *(rostrum spkenoidale)* which is wedged in-between the alae of the vomer *(alae vomeris).* To both sides of the crest is a thin curved plate called the sphenoidal concha *(concha sphenoidatis)* (Fig. 64) which forms the anterior and partly the inferior walls of the sphenoidal sinus *(sinus enoidatis)* and has a small aperture of the sphenoidal sinus *(apertura sinus sphenoidatis).* Lateral to the aperture are small pits which roof in the cells of the posterior part of the ethmoid bone labyrinth. The external margins of these pits unite partially with the orbital plate of the ethmoid bone to form the sphenocthmoidal suture *(sutura spkenoethmoidatis),* while the inferior margins unite with the orbital process *(processus orhitalis)* of the palatine bone.

> 筛骨体的前面及部分下表面朝向鼻腔。筛骨有一垂直的嵴（筛骨嵴，crista sphenoidatis），并向筛骨前表面中部延伸。其前缘与筛骨的垂直板（垂直板，lamina perpendicularis）相连。筛骨嵴的下段逐渐变细并向下方延伸，形成筛骨的鼻突（筛骨鼻突，rostrum sphenoidale），该鼻突被鼻中隔的翼状突（鼻中隔翼，alae vomeris）夹在中间。筛骨嵴两侧有一薄而弯曲的板状结构，称为筛骨气房（筛骨气房，concha sphenoidatis）（图64），该结构构成筛窦（筛窦，sinus sphenoidalis）的前壁及部分下壁，并具有筛窦开口（筛窦开口，apertura sinus sphenoidalis）。筛窦开口的外侧有小凹陷，这些凹陷覆盖着筛骨迷路后部的气房。这些凹陷的外缘部分与筛骨的眶板（眶板，lamina orbitalis）相连，形成筛颧缝（筛颧缝，sutura sphenopethmoidalis）；其下缘则与腭骨的眶突（眶突，processus orbitalis）相连。

The sphenoidal sinus *(sinus sphenoidatis)* (see Fig. 94) is a paired cavity, occupies a large part of the body of the sphenoid bone, and is a paranasal air cavity. Both the right and left cavities are separated by the septum of the sphenoidal sinuses *(septum sinuum sphenoidalium)* which is anteriorly continuous with the crest of the sphenoid. Just like in the case of the frontal sinuses, the septum sometimes deviates to one side as a result of which the sinuses may differ in size. Each sinus communicates with the nasal cavity by means of its aperture described above. The cavity of the sinus is lined with a mucous membrane.

> 蝶窦（sinus sphenoidatis）（见图94）是一个成对的腔隙，占据蝶骨体的大部分，是一种鼻旁窦。左右两个窦腔由蝶窦中隔（septum sinuum sphenoidalium）分隔，该中隔前方与蝶骨嵴连续。与额窦类似，蝶窦中隔有时会偏向一侧，导致两侧窦腔大小不一。每个窦腔通过上述所述的开口与鼻腔相通。窦腔内衬以黏膜。

The lesser wings *(alae minores)* of the sphenoid bone arise from the anterosuperior angles of the body and project laterally as two horizontal plates at the base of which is a small round opening leading into a bony 5-6 mm long optic foramen *(canalis opticus).* It transmits the optic nerve and the ophthalmic artery. The lesser wings have a superior surface facing the cranial cavity and an inferior surface which faces the orbital cavity and forms the superior border of the superior orbital fissure *(fissura orbitalis superior).*

> 蝶骨小翼（alae minores）起源于蝶骨体的前上角，并向两侧延伸为两个水平板。在这些板的基部有一个小的圆形孔，通向一个长约5-6毫米的视孔（canalis opticus）。该孔内通过视神经和眼动脉。蝶骨小翼的上表面朝向颅腔，下表面则朝向眶腔，并构成上颌突裂（fissura orbitalis superior）的上缘。

The anterior border of the lesser wing is thick and serrated and unites with the orbital plate of the frontal bone. The posterior concave and smooth border projects into the cranial cavity freely and is the border between the anterior and middle cranial fossae *(fossae cranii anterior* et *media)* (see Figs 101 and 102). The posterior border terminates medially by a projecting well-defined anterior clinoid process *(processus clinoideus anterior)* to which part of the dura mater is attached, forming the diaphragma sellae.

> 蝶骨小翼前缘厚而呈锯齿状，并与额骨眶板相接。后缘凹陷且光滑，向颅腔内自由延伸，是前颅窝与中颅窝（fossae cranii anterior et media）的分界线（见图101和图102）。后缘向内终止于一个突出且界限分明的前床突（processus clinoideus anterior），部分硬脑膜附着于此，形成蝶窦隔（diaphragma sellae）。

The greater wings *(alae majores)* arise from the lateral surfaces of the body of the sphenoid bone and stretch laterally.

> 大翼（alae majores）起源于蝶骨体的外侧表面，并向外侧延伸。

The greater wing has five surfaces and three borders.

> 大翼有五个面和三个缘。

The superior, cerebral surface *(fades cerebralis)* is concave and faces the cranial cavity. It forms the anterior part of the middle cranial fossa and bears impressions for the gyri *(impressiones digitatae),* cerebral juga, or ridges *(juga cerebralia),* and arterial sulci *(suld arteriosi)* which are markings for the brain surface and middle meningeal arteries lodged here.

> 上表面、大脑面（fades cerebralis）呈凹陷状，朝向颅腔。它构成中颅窝的前部，并承载沟回（impressiones digitatae）、大脑缘（cerebral juga）或脑回（juga cerebralia）、动脉沟（sulci arteriosi）等标记，这些结构为大脑表面和位于此处的脑膜中动脉提供了定位标志。

There are three openings at the base of the wing: the foramen rotundum (Figs 63 and 64) transmitting the maxillary nerve is situated medially and anteriorly; laterally and posteriorly of the foramen rotundum is the foramen ovale transmitting the mandibular nerve and the vascular network of the foramen ovale; still more laterally and to the back of the foramen ovale is the foramen spinosiim transmitting the middle meningeal artery, vein, and nerve.

> 翼部基底有三个孔：圆孔（图63和图64）位于内侧和前方，通过此孔穿行上颌神经；圆孔的外侧和后方是卵圆孔，通过此孔穿行下颌神经及卵圆孔的血管网络；更外侧且位于卵圆孔后方的是棘孔，通过此孔穿行脑膜中动脉、静脉和神经。

The anterosuperior, orbital surface *(fades orbitalis)* is smooth, rhomboid, and faces the orbital cavity. It forms the greater part of the lateral wall of the orbit. A gap is left between the inferior border of this surface and the posterior border of the orbital surface of the maxillary body to form the inferior orbital fissure *(fissura orbitalis inferior)* (Figs 48 and 49).

> 前外侧表面（眶面，fades orbitalis）光滑，呈菱形，朝向眶腔。它构成了眶的大部分外侧壁。此表面的下缘与上颌体眶面的后缘之间留有间隙，形成下眶裂（下眶裂，fissura orbitalis inferior）（见图48和图49）。

The anterior, maxillary surface *(fades maxillaris)* is a small triangular surface bounded by the orbital surface superiorly and by the root of the pterygoid process of the sphenoid bone laterally and inferiorly. It contributes to the formation of the posterior wall of the pterygopalatinc fossa *(fossa pterygopalatina)* (see Figs 109 and 110) in which the foramen rotundum is located.

> 前方、上颌面（上颌面）是一个小三角形表面，其上方由眶面边界，外下方则由蝶骨翼突根部界定。它参与构成翼腭窝（翼腭窝）的后壁（翼腭窝），其中包含圆孔（圆孔）。（见图109和图110）

The superolateral, temporal surface *(fades temporalis)* is slightly concave and participates in the formation of the wall of the temporal fossa *(fossa temporalis)* from which the temporal muscle arises. This surface is bounded inferiorly by the infratemporal crest *(crista infiatemporalis)* below which is an area with the foramen ovale and the foramen spinosuin. This area forms the superior wall of the infratemporal fossa *(fossa infralemporalis)* in which part of the lateral pterygoid muscle originates. The superior, frontal border *(margo frontalis)* is widely serrated and articulates with the orbital plate of the frontal bone by means of the sphenofrontal suture *(sutura sphenofrontalis).* The lateral parts of the frontal border terminate as a sharp parietal border *(margo parietalis)* which unites with the sphenoid angle of the parietal bone to form the sphenoparietal suture *(sutura sphenoparietalis).* The medial parts of the frontal border are continuous with a thin free border which binds the superior orbital fissure *(fissura orbitalis superior)* inferiorly because of a gap left between this border and the inferior surface of the lesser wing.

> 上外侧、颞面（颞肌面）稍凹陷，参与构成颞窝（颞窝）的壁，颞肌由此面发出。该面下方由颧弓（颧骨嵴，crista infratemporalis）所界，其下方区域包含卵圆孔（foramen ovale）和棘孔（foramen spinosum）。该区域构成翼腭窝（翼腭窝）的上壁，部分翼内肌由此起始。上、前缘（额缘，margo frontalis）广泛呈锯齿状，并通过蝶额缝（蝶额缝）与额骨的眶面相接。额缘的外侧部分终止为锐利的顶缘（顶缘，margo parietalis），与顶骨的蝶骨嵴相接形成蝶顶缝（蝶顶缝）。额缘的内侧部分则与一薄而自由的边缘相连，由于与蝶骨小翼下表面之间留有间隙，该边缘向下连接至上颌窦裂孔（上颌窦裂孔）。

The anterior, zygomatic border *(margo Qigomaticus)* is serrated and articulates with the frontal process of the zygomatic bone to form the sphenozygomatic suture *(sutura sphenojygomatica).*

> 前方的颧缘（zygomatic margin，margo zygomaticus）呈锯齿状，并与颧骨的额突形成蝶颧缝（sphenozygomatic suture，sutura sphenozygomatica）。

The posterior, squamous border *(margo squamosus)* unites with the sphenoidal border *(margo sphenoidalis)* of the temporal bone by means of the sphenosquamous suture *(sutura sphenosquamosa).* Posteriorly and laterally the squamous border terminates as the spine of the sphenoid *(spina ossis sphenoidalis)* to which are attached the sphenomandibular ligaments and a bunch of muscles tensing the soft palate, the tensor palati muscle.

> 颞骨的后方、鳞部（margo squamosus）通过鳞颧缝（sutura sphenosquamosa）与颞骨的蝶骨部（margo sphenoidalis）相连。在后外侧方向，鳞部终止于蝶骨脊（spina ossis sphenoidalis），此处附着有蝶下颌韧带（ligamentum sphenomandibulare）以及一组紧张软腭的肌肉，包括腭 tensor 肌（musculus tensor palati）。

Medially of the spine of the sphenoid, the posterior border of the greater wing stretches anteriorly of the petrous part *(pars petrosa)* of the temporal bone and binds the sphenopetrosal fissure *(fissura sphenopetrosa)* which is medially continuous with the foramen lacerum (see Figs 96 and 102). In a nonmaccrated skull this fissure is filled with cartilaginous tissue to form the sphenopetrous joint *(synchondrosis sphenopetrosa).*

> 蝶骨嵴的内侧为蝶骨大翼的后缘，该缘向前延伸至颞骨岩部（岩部段）并形成蝶岩裂（蝶岩裂），该裂与破裂孔（破裂孔）在内侧连续（见图96和图102）。在未钙化的颅骨中，此裂隙被软骨组织填充，形成蝶岩关节（蝶岩软骨连接）。

The pterygoid processes *(processus pterygoidei)* (Figs 63 and 64) spring downwards from the junction of the greater wings and the body of the sphenoid bone. They arc formed of two plates, lateral

> 翼突（processus pterygoidei）（图63和图64）自蝶骨大翼与蝶骨体的连接处向下延伸。它们由两片骨板构成，分别位于外侧和内侧。

and medial. The lateral pterygoid plate *(lamina laleralis proussus pterygoidei)* is wider but thinner and shorter than the medial plate (the lateral pterygoid muscle originates from its lateral surface). The medial pterygoid plate *(lamina medialis processus pterygoidei)* is narrower, thicker and slightly longer than the lateral plate. Both plates fuse by means of their anterior borders and diverge to the back to form the pterygoid fossa *(fossa pterygoidea)* in which the medial pterygoid muscle arises. In the inferior parts, the plates do not fuse but bind the pterygoid notch *(incisura pterygoidea)* into which ihe pyramid process, or tubercle *(processus pyramidaHs)* of the palatine bone fits. The free end of the medial plate terminates as the pterygoid hamulus *(hamulus pterygoideus)* which projects downwards and laterally and has on its lateral surface the sulcus of the pterygoid hamulus *(sulcus kamuli pterygoidei)* (this sulcus lodges the tendon of the tensor veli palatini muscle).

> 其外侧翼突板（lamina lateralis processus pterygoidei）较宽，但更薄且较短（外侧翼突肌起源于其外侧表面）。内侧翼突板（lamina medialis processus pterygoidei）则较窄、更厚且稍长。两块板通过前缘融合，并向后分开形成翼突窝（fossa pterygoidea），内侧翼突肌即由此发出。在下方部分，两块板并不融合，而是将翼突窝（incisura pterygoidea）固定在一起，该窝接纳腭骨的锥形突（processus pyramidalis）或突起（tubercle）。内侧翼突板的自由端形成翼突钩（hamulus pterygoideus），其向下并向外突出，并在其外侧面上有翼突钩沟（sulcus hamuli pterygoidei）（此沟容纳腭 tensor 软腭肌的肌腱）。

The posterosuperior border of the medial plate becomes wider at the base to form an elongated scaphoid fossa *(fossa scapkoidca)* in which the tensor veli palatini muscle originates.

> medial plate 的后上缘在基底部变宽，形成一个延长的舟状窝（fossa scapoida），该处为腭 tensor veli palatini 肌的起始点。

Laterally of the scaphoid fossa is a shallow groove for the pharyngotympanic tube *(sulcus tubae auditivae)* (Fig. 63) which passes onto the greater wing laterally to reach the spine of the sphenoid *(spina ossis sphenoidalis).* This groove lodges the cartilaginous part of the auditory tube. Above and medially of the scaphoid fossa is an opening leading into the pterygoid canal *(canalis pterygoideus)*

> 舟状窝的外侧是一个浅沟，为咽鼓管（听管沟，sulcus tubae auditivae）（图63），该沟向蝶骨大翼的外侧延伸，最终到达蝶骨体的蝶骨嵴（蝶骨嵴，spina ossis sphenoidalis）。此沟内容纳咽鼓管的软骨部。舟状窝的上方和内侧有一个开口，通向翼管（翼管，canalis pterygoideus）。

which transmits vessels and nerves. The canal stretches sagittally in the depth of the pterygoid process and opens on the maxillary surface of the greater wing on the posterior wall of the ptcrygopalatine fossa.

> 其内传递血管和神经。该管在翼突窝的深处呈矢状方向延伸，并在翼腭窝后壁的上颌面的翼突大翼处开口。

Under the opening along the anterior edge of the fossa is the pterygopalatine groove.

> 在窝的前缘开口处下方是翼腭窝。

From the base of the medial plate a flat horizontal vaginal process *(processus vaginalis)* projects medially, it is situated below the body of the sphenoid bone and covers the ala of the vomer *(ala vomeris)* from the lateral side. As a result the groove of the vaginal process, the vomerovaginal sulcus *(sulcus vomerovaginalis)y* which faces the wing is transformed into the vomerovaginal canal *(canalis vomerooaginalis)*.

> 从中板的基底部，向外侧方向伸出一个扁平的水平阴道突起（processus vaginalis），其位于蝶骨体的下方，并从外侧覆盖筛骨鼻突（ala vomeris）。因此，阴道突起的沟槽（vaginalis sulcus），即筛骨鼻突沟（sulcus vomerovaginalis），其朝向翼状突，转变为筛骨鼻突管（canalis vomerovaginalis）。

A small palatinovaginal sulcus *(sulcus palatinovaginalis)* sometimes stretches sagittally lateral of the process, in which case the sphenoid process of the palatine bone lying directly below the sulcus closes it to form the palatinovaginal canal *(canalis palatinovaginalis)* (both canals transmit nerves arising from the pterygopalatine ganglion, while the palatinovaginal canal transmits in addition branches of the sphenopalatine artery).

> 一个小型的腭鼻沟（palatinovaginal sulcus）有时会向矢状面方向延伸至突起的外侧，此时位于沟下方的腭骨蝶突（sphenoid process of the palatine bone）封闭该沟，形成腭鼻管（palatinovaginal canal，canalis palatinovaginalis）（两种管道均传递来自翼腭神经节的神经，而腭鼻管还传递来自蝶腭动脉的分支）。

The pterygospinous process *(processus pterygospinosus)* extends sometimes from the posterior border of the lateral plate towards the spine of the sphenoid which it may reach to form an opening.

> 翼突棘突（processus pterygospinosus）有时从外侧板的后缘延伸至蝶骨翼突的脊部，可能到达并形成一个开口。

#### 6.1.1 T H E TEMPORA L BON E

> 6.1.1 颞骨

The temporal bone *(os temporale)* (Figs 51-53, 65-71, 102) is a paired bone which contributes to the formation of the base of the skull and the side of the skull. The organ of hearing and equilibrium is lodged in it. The temporal bone articulates with the mandible and is a support for the masticatory apparatus.

> 颞骨（os temporale）（图51-53、65-71、102）是一对骨骼，参与构成颅底和颅侧部。听觉和平衡器官位于其中。颞骨与下颌骨相接，并作为咀嚼装置的支撑结构。

On the external surface of the bone is the lateral orifice of the external auditory meatus *(porus acusticus externus)* around which the three parts of the temporal bone are arranged: the squamous part *(pars squamosa)* superiorly, the petrous part (pyramid) *(pars petrosa)*  medially and posteriorly, and the tympanic part *(pars tympanica)*  anteriorly and inferiorly.

> 在骨的外表面是外耳道（porus acusticus externus）的外侧口，围绕该口排列着颞骨的三个部分：鳞部（pars squamosa）位于上方，岩部（pyramid，pars petrosa）位于内侧和后方，鼓部（pars tympanica）位于前方和下方。

The squamous part *(pars squamosa)* has the shape of a plate situated almost sagittally. Its outer temporal surface *(fades temporalis)*  is rather rough and slightly convex. In its posterior part it bears a vertical groove for the middle temporal artery *(sulcus arteriae temporalis mediae),* which is a mark of the artery of the same name.

> 鳞部（pars squamosa）呈近矢状位的板状结构。其外侧颞面（facies temporalis externa）较为粗糙且略呈凸起。在该部的后方，有一条垂直的沟槽，为中颞动脉（sulcus arteriae temporalis mediae），这是同名动脉的标记。

In the posteroinferior portion of the squamous part is an arched line which is continuous with the inferior temporal line of the parietal bone.

> 在颞骨鳞部的后下方有一条弧形线，与顶骨的下颞线相连。

Above and slightly in front of the external acoustic meatus, the squamous part gives rise to a horizontally projecting zygomatic process *(processus zygomaticus)* which has a wide root but becomes gradually narrower. The process has a medial and a lateral surfaces

> 在耳郭外耳道的上方且稍前处，鳞部发出一个水平方向突出的颧突（processus zygomaticus），其基部较宽，逐渐变窄。该突具有内侧和外侧表面。

and two margins, a longer superior and a shorter inferior margin. The anterior end of the zygomatic process is serrated and joins the temporal process of the zygomatic bone *(processus temporalis)* to form the zygomatic arch *(arcus zygomaticus)* (see Figs 50 and 51).

> 并具有两条边缘，一条较长的上缘和一条较短的下缘。颧突的前端呈锯齿状，与颧骨的颞突（processus temporalis）相连，形成颧弓（arcus zygomaticus）（见图50和图51）。

On the inferior surface of the root is a transversely-oval articular fossa *(fossa mandibularis)* for articulation with the head of the mandible. The fossa is bounded anteriorly by the eminentia articularis *(tuberculum articulare)* (Fig. 65).

> 在根部的下方有一个横椭圆形的关节窝（下颌窝，fossa mandibularis），与下颌头形成关节。该关节窝前方由关节结节（articular tubercle，tuberculum articulare）界（图65）。

The outer surface of the squamous part contributes to the formation of the temporal fossa *(fossa temporalis)* in which bundles of the temporal muscle originate.

> 颧突的外侧表面参与构成颞窝（fossa temporalis），颞肌的肌束由此起始。

The inner, cerebral surface of the squamous part *(fades cerebralis)* is slightly concave and carries impressions for the gyri *(impressiones digitatae),* cerebral juga *(juga cerebralia),* and an arterial sulcus *(sulcus arteriosus)* lodging the middle meningeal artery.

> 鳞部（fades cerebralis）的内侧、脑面稍凹陷，表面有沟回（impressiones digitatae）、脑沟（juga cerebralia）和动脉沟（sulcus arteriosus），后者容纳脑膜中动脉。[!note]- 术语说明  
“fades cerebralis” 是“鳞部”的拉丁学名，此处指颅骨的鳞部，即颅盖的一部分。  
“impressiones digitatae” 通常译作“沟回”或“回状沟”，是脑表面的凹陷结构。  
“juga cerebralia” 译作“脑沟”，是脑表面的沟状结构。  
“sulcus arteriosus” 译作“动脉沟”，是容纳血管的沟状结构。  
“middle meningeal artery” 译作“脑膜中动脉”，是颅骨内面的动脉，供应硬脑膜。

The squamous part of the temporal bone has two free borders, sphcnoidal and parietal.

> 颞骨鳞部有两个自由缘，即蝶骨缘和顶骨缘。

The anteroinferior, sphenoidal border *(margo sphenoidalis)* is wide, serrated and articulates with the squamous border of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone to form the sphenosquamous suture *(sutura sphenosquamosa).* The superoposterior, parietal border *(margo parietalis)* is sharp and is longer than the sphenoidal border; it articulates with the squamous border of the parietal bone.

> 前下缘（sphenoidal border，margo sphenoidalis）宽而锯齿状，与蝶骨大翼的鳞部边界形成蝶鳞缝（sphenosquamous suture，sutura sphenosquamosa）。上后缘（parietal border，margo parietalis）较锐利，且比蝶骨缘长；它与顶骨的鳞部边界相接。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_67_Picture_2.jpeg)

## 7 *Right temporal bone (os temporale);* outer surface (\*/)

> 7 右颞骨（os temporale）；外侧表面（\*）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_67_Picture_4.jpeg)

66. *Right temporal bone (os temporale);* inner surface, superior aspect (\*/).

> 右侧颞骨（os temporale）；内侧表面，上部（\*/）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_68_Picture_2.jpeg)

## 8 Right temporal bone (os temporale); inner surface, posterior aspect (1/1).

> 8 右颞骨（os temporale）；内侧表面，后部（1/1）

The petrous part (pars petrosa), or pyramid, of the temporal bone consists of the posterolateral and anteromedial parts.

> 岩部（pars petrosa），或称锥体，是颞骨的组成部分，包括后外侧部和前内侧部。

The posterolateral part is the mastoid process (processus mastoideus) situated to the back of the external acoustic meatus. Outer and inner surfaces are distinguished in it. The outer surface is convex, rough, and provides for muscle attachment. The mastoid process is continuous downwards with a conical projection which is easily palpated through the skin.

> 后外侧部为鼓窦突（processus mastoideus），位于外耳道的后方。该部分可分为外侧面和内侧面。外侧面上凸、粗糙，并提供肌肉附着点。鼓窦突向下延续为一个锥形突起，可通过皮肤轻易触及。

On the inner surface, the process is bounded by a deep mastoid notch (incisura mastoidea) from which the posterior belly of the digastric muscle (venter posterior musculi digastrici) arises. The occipital groove (sulcus arteriae occipitalis) for the occipital artery is parallel to and slightly behind the notch. A mastoid foramen (foramen mastoideum) is often found at the base of the mastoid process on its lateral surface. Sometimes it is in the suture joining the mastoid process and the occipital bone and is a venous emissarium.

> 在内侧表面，该突起被一个深部的乳突凹（incisura mastoidea）所界定，该凹处为二腹肌后腹（venter posterior musculi digastrici）的起始点。枕动脉沟（sulcus arteriae occipitalis）位于乳突凹的后方并与之平行。在乳突突的外侧表面，其基底部常可见乳突孔（foramen mastoideum）。有时该孔位于乳突突与枕骨连接的缝合处，并作为静脉孔（venous emissarium）。[!note]- 术语说明  
“venous emissarium” 通常译作“静脉孔”，是指静脉血管穿出颅骨的孔道。

On the inner, cerebral surface of the mastoid process is a wide S-shaped sigmoid groove (sulcus sinus sigmoidei) which is continuous upwards with the sigmoid groove of the parietal bone and then with the groove for the transverse sinus of the occipital bone (it lodges the transverse venous sinus of the dura mater). Downwards the sigmoid sinus is continuous with the similar sinus of the occipital bone.

> 在乳突的内侧、脑面有一条宽大的S形乙状窦沟（乙状窦沟），其向上与顶骨的乙状窦沟相连，继而与枕骨横窦沟相连（该沟内容纳硬脑膜横静脉窦）。向下，乙状窦与枕骨的类似窦相连。

The mastoid process is bounded posteriorly by a serrated occipital border (margo occipitalis) which articulates with the mastoid border of the occipital bone to form the occipitomastoid suture (sutura occipitomastoidea). In this suture, in its middle part or occipital edge is the mastoid foramen (foramen mastoideum) (sometimes more than one) which, as it is pointed out above, lodges the mastoid emissary veins (venae emissariae mastoideae) connecting the subcutaneous veins of the head with the sigmoid venous sinus and mastoid branch of the occipital artery.

> 乳突突起的后界为锯齿状的枕骨缘（margo occipitalis），它与枕骨的乳突缘相接，形成乳突枕缝（sutura occipitomastoidea）。在该缝的中部或枕骨边缘处有乳突孔（foramen mastoideum）（有时为多个），如上所述，该孔容纳乳突导静脉（venae emissariae mastoideae），这些静脉连接头部皮下静脉与乙状窦以及枕动脉的乳突支。

Superiorly the mastoid process is bounded by the parietal border (margo parietalis) which at the junction with the parietal border of the squamous part of the temporal bone forms the parietal notch (incisura parietalis); the mastoid angle of the parietal bone is wedged into it to form the parietomastoid suture (sutura parietomastoidea).

> 上方，乳突由顶边（margo parietalis）所界定，该顶边与颞骨鳞部的顶边相交形成顶窝（incisura parietalis）；顶骨的乳突角嵌入其中，形成顶骨与乳突的缝（sutura parietomastoidea）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_69_Picture_2.jpeg)

68. *Right temporal bone (os temporale);* inferior aspect *(Y^).*

> 右侧颞骨（os temporale）；下部（Y^）

At the junction of the outer surface of the mastoid process and the outer surface of the squamous part the remnants of the squamomastoid suture *(sutura squamosomastoidea)* can be detected; it is well defined on a child's skull.

> 在乳突突起外侧面与鳞部外侧面的交界处，可观察到鳞乳缝（sutura squamosomastoidea）的残余部分；在儿童头骨上，该缝线轮廓清晰。

Bony air sinuses called the mastoid air cells *(cellulae mastoideae)*  (Fig. 69) located in the mastoid process and separated from one another by bony walls are demonstrated on a cross-section of the process. The tympanic antrum *(antrum mastoideum)* is a cavity always found in the central part of the process; the mastoid cells open into it and it communicates with the tympanic cavity. The mastoid cells and the tympanic antrum arc lined with a mucous membrane.

> 称为乳突气房（cellulae mastoideae）的骨性空腔（图69）位于乳突突起内，彼此由骨壁分隔，在突起的横断面上可见。鼓室窦（antrum mastoideum）是位于突起中央部位的一个腔隙；乳突气房开口于鼓室窦内，并与鼓室相通。乳突气房和鼓室窦均被粘膜膜所覆盖。

The anteromedial part of the pars petrosa is medial of the squamous part and the mastoid process. It has the shape of a trihedral pyramid whose long axis runs medially and from back to front. The base of the petrous part faces laterally and to the back; the apex of the petrous part *(apex partis petrosae)* is directed medially and forwards.

> 岩部的前内侧部分位于鳞部和乳突突起的内侧。其形状为一个三棱锥体，其长轴向内并从前向后延伸。岩部的基底面向外并朝向后方；岩部的尖端（岩部尖端）则指向内侧并向前方。

Three surfaces (anterior, posterior, and inferior) and three bor-

> 三个面（前、后和下）和三个边

ders (superior, anterior, and posterior) are distinguished in the petrous part.

> 岩部内可区分出三个方向（上、前、后）的结构。

The anterior surface *(fades anterior partis petrosae)* (Fig. 66) faces the cranial cavity. It is smooth and wide and stretches obliquely downwards and forwards and is continuous with the cerebral surface of the squamous part from which it is sometimes separated by the petrosquamous fissure *(fissura petrosquamosa).* Almost in the middle of the anterior surface is an arcuate eminence *(eminentia arcuata)* formed by the underlying anterior semicircular canal of the labyrinth. A small area called the roof of tympanum, or tegmen tympani is situated between the eminence and the petrosquamous fissure; under it is the tympanic cavity *(cavum tympani).* Close to the apex of the petrous part the anterior surface bears a small trigeminal impression *(impressio trigemini)* which is a mark for the trigeminal nerve ganglion.

> 前表面（岩骨前部）（图66）面向颅腔。其表面光滑且宽阔，呈斜向下前方延伸，与鳞部的脑面连续，有时被岩鳞裂（岩鳞裂）所分隔。在前表面近中部处有一个弧形隆起（弧形隆起），由下方的前庭前半规管形成。在隆起与岩鳞裂之间有一小区域称为鼓室盖（鼓室盖），其下方为鼓室（鼓室）。在岩部尖端附近，前表面有一小的三叉神经压迹（三叉神经压迹），为三叉神经节的位置标志。

Lateral of the impression is the hiatus for the greater superficial petrosal nerve *(hiatus canalis nervi petrosi majoris)* from which a narrow groove for the greater superficial petrosal nerve *(sulcus nervi petrosi majoris)* branches off medially. A small hiatus for the lesser

> Impressions 的外侧是岩大浅神经孔（hiatus canalis nervi petrosi majoris），从该孔向外侧发出一条细小的沟槽，即岩大浅神经沟（sulcus nervi petrosi majoris）。此外，还有一个小孔，为岩小浅神经孔（hiatus canalis nervi petrosi minoris）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_70_Picture_2.jpeg)

69. *Right temporal bone (os temporale)* (%). (Vertical section made parallel to the axis of the petrous part.)

> 右侧颞骨（颞骨）（%）。 （沿岩部轴线方向作垂直切面）

superficial petrosal nerve *(hiatus canalis nervi petrosi minoris)* is found in front and a little laterally of the opening; it gives rise to the groove for the lesser superficial pclrosal nerve *(sulcus nervi petrosi minoris).*

> 浅面岩上神经（小岩管孔）位于开口的前方并稍偏外侧；它形成浅面小岩上神经沟（小岩上神经沟）。

The posterior surface of the petrous part *(fades posterior partis petrosae)* (Fig. 67), like the anterior surface, faces the cranial cavity but stretches upwards and backwards where it is continuous with the mastoid process. Almost in the middle of this surface is a round poms acusticus internus which leads into the internal auditory meatus *(meatus acusticus internus)-* The porus transmits the facial, intermediate, and vestibulocochlcar nerves and the artery and vein of the labyrinth. A shallow subarcuate fossa *(fossa subarcuata)*  is present a little above and lateral to the porus acusticus internus. It is well defined in the newborn; it lodges a process of the dura mater.

> 岩部的后表面（后岩部，fades posterior partis petrosae）（图67），如同前表面一样，面对颅腔，但向上并向后延伸，与乳突突起相连续。在该表面几乎中央处有一个圆形的内耳道口（内耳门，porus acusticus internus），其通向内耳道（内耳道，meatus acusticus internus）。内耳道口传递面神经、前庭神经和蜗神经，以及迷路的动脉和静脉。在内耳道口稍上方和外侧处有一个浅凹的弧状窝（弧状窝，fossa subarcuata）。该凹窝在新生儿中尤为明显，容纳硬脑膜的突起。

Still laterally to porus acusticus internus is a slit-like external opening of the aqueduct of the vestibule *(apertura externa aquedudus vestibuli)* transmitting the cndolymphatic duct from the cavity of the internal ear.

> 在内耳道孔（porus acusticus internus）的更外侧，有一个呈裂隙状的外开口（apertura externa aqueductus vestibuli），该开口通连前庭导水管，传递前庭导水管的内耳淋巴管（colump lymphatic duct）。

The inferior surface of the petrous part *(fades inferior partis petrosae)* (Fig. 68) is rough and uneven; it lies on the inferior aspect of the cranial base. It carries a round or oval jugular fossa *(fossa jugularis)* lodging the upper bulb of the internal jugular vein.

> 岩部的下表面（下部岩部，fades inferior partis petrosae）（图68）粗糙不平；它位于颅底的下部。其上有一个圆形或椭圆形的颈静脉窝（颈静脉窝，fossa jugularis），容纳颈内静脉的上部膨大。

The floor of this fossa has a small groove for the auricular branch of the vagus nerve. The groove leads into the orifice of the mastoid canaliculus *(canaliculus mastoideus)* which opens into the tympanomastoid fissure *(fissura tympanomastoidea).*

> 此窝底部有一小沟，为迷走神经耳支所经过。该沟通向乳突管的开口（乳突管，canaliculus mastoideus），后者开口于鼓乳裂（鼓乳裂，fissura tympanomastoidea）。

The posterior margin of the jugular fossa is bounded by the jugular notch *(incisura jugularis)* which is divided into two parts, an anteromedial part and a posterolateral part, by a small intrajugular process *(processus intrajugularis).* To the front of the jugular fossa is a round orifice leading into the carotid canal *(canalis caroticus)*  which has another orifice on the apex of the petrous part.

> 颈动脉窝的后缘由颈静脉切迹（incisura jugularis）构成，该切迹被一个小的颈内窝突（processus intrajugularis）分为前内侧部和后外侧部。颈静脉窝的前方有一个圆形孔口通向颈动脉管（canalis caroticus），而颈动脉管在岩部顶端还有一个孔口。

A small petrosal fossa *(fossula petrosa)* lies between the anterior circumference of the jugular fossa and the external orifice of the carotid canal; the inferior ganglion of the glosso-pharyngeal nerve is lodged in it. Deep in the fossa is an opening into the canaliculus for the tympanic nerve *(canaliculus tympanicus)* in which the inferior

> 一个小的岩上窝（fossula petrosa）位于颈静脉窝的前缘与颈动脉管外口之间；舌咽神经的下神经节位于其中。在该窝深处有一孔通向鼓神经管（canaliculus tympanicus），鼓神经由此进入。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_71_Picture_2.jpeg)

70. Right temporal bone (os temporale) (2/1). (Vertical section made through external auditory meatus.)

> 右侧颞骨（颞骨）（2/1）。 （经外耳道所作的矢状断面）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_72_Picture_2.jpeg)

71. *Right temporal bone (os temporale) (%)*  (Horizontal section through external auditory tneatus.)

> 右侧颞骨（颞骨）（%）（外耳道横断面）

tympanic artery also passes. The canaliculus opens into the middle ear *(auris media)* or the tympanic cavity *(cavum tympani).*

> 鼓室动脉也通过此管。管的开口位于中耳（auris media）或鼓室（cavum tympani）。

The styloid process *(processus styloideus)* projects downwards and slightly forwards lateral of the jugular fossa. It varies in length and is the site of origin of muscles and ligaments.

> 茎突（processus styloideus）向下并略向前方突出于颈动脉窝（jugular fossa）的外侧。其长度存在个体差异，并是肌肉和韧带的起始部位。

A bony projection of the tympanic part, called the sheath of the styloid process *(vagina processus styloidei)* descends in front of and lateral to the root of the process.

> 鼓部的一个骨性突起，称为 styloid process 的鞘（vagina processus styloidei），位于突起根部的前方和外侧。

To the back of the root of the process is the stylomastoid foramen *(foramen stylomastoideus)* which is the external opening of the canal for the facial nerve *(canalis farialis).*

> 在茎突根部的后方是茎乳孔（foramen stylomastoideus），它是面神经（canalis facialis）穿过颅骨的外开口。

The superior border of the petrous part *(margo superior partis petrosae)* separates the anterior surface from the posterior surface. It carries the groove for the superior petrosal sinus *(sulcus sinus petrosi superioris)* (a mark of the superior petrosal venous sinus); the tentorium cerebelli which is a part of the dura mater is also attached to the groove. The groove is continuous posteriorly with the

> 岩部（petrous part）的上缘（margo superior partis petrosae）将前表面与后表面分开。其表面有岩上窦沟（sulcus sinus petrosi superioris）（为岩上窦静脉的标记）；小脑镰（tentorium cerebelli），为硬脑膜的一部分，也附着于该沟。该沟向后与... 连续。

sigmoid groove of the mastoid process of the temporal bone.

> 颞骨乳突过程的乙状窦沟。

The posterior border of the petrous part *(margo posterior partis petrosae)* is the junction of its posterior and inferior surfaces. It carries on its cerebral surface the groove for the inferior petrosal sinus *(sulcus sinus petrosi inferioris)* (a mark of the inferior petrosal venous sinus). A triangular funnel-like depression bearing the external opening of the cochlear canaliculus *(apertura externi canaliculi cochleae)* is almost in the middle of the posterior border near the jugular notch.

> 岩部（petrosa partis）的后缘（margo posterior partis petrosae）是其后表面与下表面的交界处。其脑面带有岩下窦沟（sulcus sinus petrosi inferioris）（为岩下窦静脉的标志）。一个三角形的漏斗状凹陷，承载着耳蜗管通孔（apertura externi canaliculi cochleae），位于后缘近颈静脉切迹处的中部附近。

The anterior border of the petrous part *(margo anterior partis petrosae)* is on the lateral side of its anterior surface and is shorter than either the superior or posterior border. It is separated from the squamous part of the temporal bone by the petrosquamous fissure *(fissura petrosquamosa).* Lateral of the internal opening of the carotid canal the anterior border carries the orifice of the musculotubal canal *(canalis musculotubarius)* which opens into the tympanic cavity (see *The Musculotubal Canal).*

> 岩部（partis petrosae）的前缘（margo anterior partis petrosae）位于其前表面的外侧，且比上缘或后缘短。该前缘与颞骨鳞部之间由岩鳞裂（fissura petrosquamosa）分隔。在颈动脉管内口的外侧，前缘处有肌管管口（orifice of the musculotubal canal，canalis musculotubarius），该管口开口于鼓室（tympanic cavity，见肌管管）。

#### 8.1.1 CANALS AND CAVITIES OF TH E PETROUS PART O F TH E TEMPORAL BONE

> 8.1.1 颞骨岩部的孔道与腔隙

- 1. The carotid canal *(canalis earoticus)* (Figs 68 and 69) originates in the middle of the inferior surface of pars petrosa as an external orifice. At first it ascends anteriorly of the cavity of the middle ear, then, curving, it passes forwards and medially and opens on the apex of the petrous part by means of an internal orifice. The carotid canal transmits the internal carotid artery and the attendant veins and plexus of sympathetic nerve fibres.
- 2. The caroticotympanic canaliculi *(canaliculi carolicotympanici)*  are two small canaliculi branching off from the carotid canal and leading into the tympanic cavity. They transmit the caroticotympanic nerves.
- 3. The canal for the facial nerve *(canalis facialis)* (Fig. 69) originates on the floor of the internal auditory meatus *(meatus acusticus internus)* in the facial nerve area *(area nervi facialis);* (sec Vol. III. *The Organ of Hearing).* It stretches laterally almost at a right angle to the axis of the petrous part and passes to the anterior surface of this part to the hiatus for (he greater superficial petrosal nerve *(hiatus canalis newt petrosi majoris).* It bends here at a right angle to form the geniculum of the canal for the facial nerve *(geniculum canalis facialis)* and passes over to the posterior part of the medial wall of the tympanic cavity which bears a corresponding prominence of the facial nerve canal *(prominentia canalis facialis).* Further the canal stretches posteriorly along the axis of the petrous part till it reaches the pyramid of the tympanum *(eminentia pyramidalis)* and then descends vertically to form the stylomastoid foramen *(foramen stylomastoideum).* The canal transmits the facial and intermediate nerves, arteries, and veins.
- 4. The anterior canaliculus for the chorda tympani *(canaliculus chordae tympani)* runs off the lateral wall of the canal for the facial nerve a few millimetres above the stylomastoid foramen. It stretches forwards and upwards and enters the tympanic cavity by an opening on the posterior wall. The canaliculus transmits a

> 颈动脉管（canalis carotidus）（图68和69）起始于岩部下表面中部的外口。起初它向上行于中耳腔的前方，然后弯曲向前内方向，通过内口开口于岩部的顶端。颈动脉管内通过颈内动脉、伴行静脉以及交感神经纤维网。

颈动脉鼓室管（canaliculi caroticotympanici）是两条从颈动脉管分出的小管，通向鼓室腔。它们传递颈动脉鼓室神经。

面神经管（canalis facialis）（图69）起始于内耳道（meatus acusticus internus）底部的面神经区域（area nervi facialis）；（参见第三卷《听觉器官》）。它向侧方延伸，几乎以直角偏离岩部的轴线，延伸至岩部的前表面，到达大浅面神经裂孔（hiatus canalis nervi petrosi majoris）。此处它以直角弯曲，形成面神经管的膝状突（geniculum canalis facialis），并延伸至鼓室腔的内侧壁后部，此处有相应的面神经管突出（prominentia canalis facialis）。随后，面神经管沿岩部轴线向后延伸，直到鼓室的锥体（eminentia pyramidalis），然后垂直向下形成茎乳孔（foramen stylomastoideum）。面神经管内通过面神经、中间神经、动脉和静脉。

鼓索神经前管（canaliculus chordae tympani）从面神经管的外侧壁，在茎乳孔上方几毫米处分出。它向前上方延伸，并通过鼓室腔后壁的开口进入鼓室腔。鼓索神经管内通过鼓索神经。

branch of the intermediate nerve called the chorda tympani which leaves the tympanic cavity through the petrotympanic fissure.

> 称作鼓管支的中间神经分支，通过岩鼓裂离开鼓室。

- 5. The canaliculus for the tympanic nerve *(canaliculus tympanicus)* originates on the inferior surface of the petrous part deep in the petrosal fossa *(fossula petrosa).* It then passes to the inferior wall of the tympanic cavity, perforates it, and enters the cavity. The canaliculus stretches on the medial wall of the cavity in the groove of the promontory *(sulcus promontorii)* and then passes to the superior wall of the cavity where it opens by means of the hiatus for the lesser petrosal superficial nerve *(hiatus canalis nervi petrosi minoris).*
- 6. The musculotubal canal *(canalis musculotubarius)* (see Figs 68, 69 and 71) is a continuation of the anterosuperior part of the tympanic cavity. Its external opening originates at the notch between the petrous and squamous parts of the temporal bone at the anterior end of the petrosquamous fissure and reaches the superior part of the anterior wall of the tympanic cavity. It stretches laterally and slightly to the back of the horizontal part of the carotid canal, almost on the axis of the petrous part. The horizontal septum of the musculotubal canal *(septum canalis musculotubarii)* separates the canal into a superior, smaller canal for the tensor tympani *(semicanalu musculi tensoris tympani)* and an inferior, larger canal of the pharyngotympanic tube *(semicanolis tubae auditivae)*  connecting the tympanic cavity with the pharyngcal cavity (see Vol. III. *The Organ of Hearing).*
- 7. The mastoid canaliculus *(canaliculus mastoideus)* (see Fig. 68) originates deep in the jugular fossa, crosses the inferior part of the canal for the facial nerve, and opens into the tympanomastoid fissure. The canaliculus transmits the auricular branch of the vagus nerve.
- 8. The tympanic cavity *(cavum tympani)* (see Fig. 69) is elongated, compressed OP the sides, and lined with a mucous membrane. Inside it are three auditory ossicles: the malleus, incus, and

> 鼓室神经管（canaliculus tympanicus）起源于岩部深部的岩窝（fossula petrosa）的下表面。然后它延伸至鼓室的下壁，穿出鼓室壁，进入鼓室腔。该神经管在鼓室腔的内侧壁上沿着耳蜗隆起的沟（sulcus promontorii）延伸，然后到达鼓室腔的上壁，并通过小岩神经浅支孔（hiatus canalis nervi petrosi minoris）开口。

肌管管（canalis musculotubarius）（参见图68、69和71）是鼓室前上部的延续。其外口起源于颞骨岩部与鳞部交界处的前端岩鳞裂的凹陷处，延伸至鼓室前壁的上部。该管向后方和稍偏外侧延伸，几乎位于颈动脉管的水平段轴线上。肌管管的水平隔膜（septum canalis musculotubarii）将该管分为上部较小的鼓膜张肌管（semicanalu musculi tensoris tympani）和下部较大的咽鼓管管（semicanolis tubae auditivae），后者连接鼓室腔与咽腔（参见第三卷《听觉器官》）。

乳突管（canaliculus mastoideus）（参见图68）起源于颈静脉窝深处，穿过面神经管的下部，开口于鼓室乳突裂。该管传递迷走神经的耳支。

鼓室腔（cavum tympani）（参见图69）呈椭圆形，两侧受压，腔内衬有粘膜。腔内有三块听小骨：锤骨（malleus）、砧骨（incus）和镫骨（stapes）。

stapes which articulate with one another to form a chain. (The structure of the canals listed and of the tympanic cavity, auditory ossicles and labyrinth is described in detail in Vol. **III.** *The Organ of Hearing.)*

> 镫骨相互连接形成一串。 （第三卷《听觉器官》中详细描述了听小骨、鼓室、耳道结构以及前庭系统。）

The tympanic part *(pars tympanica)* (Figs 65 and 68) is the smallest part of the temporal bone. It is a slightly bent annular plate forming the anterior, inferior, and partly the posterior walls of the external auditory meatus *(meatus acusticus externus).* The lateral edge of the tympanic part is limited superiorly by the squama of the temporal bone and borders the poms acusticus externus. A suprameatal spine *(spina suprameatum)* is found at the posterosuperior lateral margin of the porus. The tympanic groove *(sulcus tympanicus)* is at the junction of the larger, medial and smaller, lateral parts of the external acoustic meatus. It gives attachment to the tympanic membrane. Superiorly the tympanic groove terminates as two projections: the greater tympanic spine *(spina tympanica major)* in front and the lesser tympanic spine *(spina tympanica minor)*  at the back. Between these spines is the tympanic notch *(incisura*

> 鼓室部（pars tympanica）（图65和图68）是颞骨最小的部分。它是一个略呈弯曲的环形板，构成外耳道（meatus acusticus externus）的前壁、下壁以及部分后壁。鼓室部的外侧缘被颞骨鳞部所限制，与外耳道相邻。在孔的后上方外侧缘处可见一上鼓室突（spina suprameatum）。鼓室沟（sulcus tympanicus）位于外耳道较大、内侧部分与较小、外侧部分的交界处，鼓室膜由此附着。鼓室沟向上终止于两个突起：前方为大鼓室突（spina tympanica major），后方为小鼓室突（spina tympanica minor）。这两突之间为鼓室切迹（incisura tympanica）。

*tympanica)* which opens into the epitympanic recess *(recessus epitympanicus)* (see Vol. **III.** *The Organ of Hearing).*

> （鼓膜管）开口于鼓上隐窝（epitympanic recess）（见第三卷《听觉器官》）。

The inferior process of the tegmen tympani is wedged in between the medial portion of the tympanic and the squamous parts of the temporal bone. To both sides of the process stretch, respectively, the petrosquamous fissure *(fissura petrosquamosa)* and the squamotympanic fissure *(jissura petrotympanica)* which transmits the chorda tympani and small vessels.

> 鼓室盖的下部突起位于鼓部的内侧部分与颞骨鳞部之间。该突起的两侧分别延伸出岩鳞裂（fissura petrosquamosa）和鳞鼓裂（fissura petrotympanica），后者传递鼓索神经和小血管。

The lateral part of the pars tympanica is continuous with a bony crest whose elongated portion forms the sheath of the styloid process *(vagina processus styloidei).* The external auditory meatus is absent in the newborn and the tympanic part is represented by the tympanic ring *(anulus tympanicus)* (see Fig. 99).

> 鼓部的外侧部分与一条骨性嵴相连，该嵴的延长部分形成茎突的包裹层（茎突囊鞘，vagina processus styloidei）。新生儿的外耳道不存在，鼓部则由鼓环（鼓环，anulus tympanicus）所代表（见图99）。

The medial surface of the greater tympanic spine carries a clearly defined spinous crest on the ends of which are an anterior and posterior tympanic processes; along the crest passes a groove for the malleus.

> 鼓室大突的内侧表面有一条清晰的棘嵴，其末端分别有前鼓室突和后鼓室突；棘嵴上行有一沟槽，容纳锤骨。

## 9 THE ETHMOID BONE

> 9 筛骨

The ethmoid bone *(os ethmoidale)* (Figs 72-74a, 74b, 103-106) is an unpaired bone. Its larger part is situated in the superior portions of the nasal cavity, the smaller part is in the anterior areas of the base of the skull.

> 筛骨（ethmoid bone）（图72-74a，74b，103-106）为不成对的骨。其较大的部分位于鼻腔的上部，较小的部分位于颅底的前部。

It is shaped like an irregular cube and is formed of air cells and is therefore a pneumatic bone *(ossa pneumatica).*

> 其形状呈不规则立方体，由气房构成，因此属于含气骨（ossa pneumatica）。

A cribriform or horizontal plate, a perpendicular or vertical plate, and two labyrinths, one on each side of the perpendicular plate, are distinguished.

> 筛板可分为筛孔板（cribriform plate）和水平板（horizontal plate），以及垂直板（perpendicular plate）和两个迷路（labyrinth），分别位于垂直板的两侧。[!note]- 术语说明  
“cribriform plate” 通常译作“筛孔板”，是筛骨的一部分，具有许多小孔；“labyrinth” 在此处译为“迷路”，指筛骨中的复杂空腔结构。

The cribriform plate *(lamina cribrosa)* is the superior wall of the nasal cavity and fits horizontally into the cthmoidal notch of the frontal bone to form the frontocthmoid suture *(sulura jrontoetkmoidalis).* It is pierced by 30-40 small openings transmitting nerves (fibres of the olfactory nerves) and vessels.

> 筛板（筛孔板）是鼻腔的上壁，水平嵌入额骨的筛骨凹陷处，形成额筛缝（额筛缝，sutura frontoethmoidalis）。筛板上有30～40个细小孔隙，通过这些孔隙传递神经（嗅神经纤维）和血管。

The perpendicular plate *(lamina perpendicularis)* (Figs 73 and 74) is separated into two parts, a smaller, superior part above the cribriform plate, and the other larger, inferior part below this plate. The superior part forms the crista galli and faces the cranial cavity; the falx cerebri, a process of the dura mater, attaches to it.

> 垂直板（lamina perpendicularis）（图73和图74）可分为两部分：一部分为较小的上部，位于筛板上方；另一部分为较大的下部，位于筛板下方。上部形成鸡冠，朝向颅腔；大脑镰（falx cerebri），为硬脑膜的突起，附着于其上。

The anteroinferior margin of the crista galli is bounded on each side by an inconstantly found projection, the ala of crista galli *(ala cristae galli).* Both projections border the foramen caecum of the frontal bone posteriorly and superiorly. The lower part of the perpendicular plate has an irregular quadrangular shape and descends vertically into the nasal cavity to form the anterosuperior part of the nasal septum. Superiorly it meets the nasal spine *(spina nasalis)* of the frontal bone, anteriorly the bones of the nose, posteriorly the crest of the sphenoid *(crista spkenoidalis),* inferiorly the vomer, and anteroinferiorly the cartilaginous part of the nasal sep-

> 筛骨垂直板的前下缘两侧由一个不恒定存在的突起——筛骨嵴（crista galli ala，ala cristae galli）所界定。这两个突起在筛骨垂直板的后上方分别与额骨的嗅孔（foramen caecum）相邻。筛骨垂直板的下部呈不规则四边形，垂直向下延伸进入鼻腔，形成鼻中隔的前上部。其上方与额骨的鼻突（spina nasalis）相接，前方与鼻骨相连，后方与蝶骨嵴（crista spenoidalis）相连，下方与犁骨相连，前下方则与鼻中隔的软骨部分相连。

turn. The whole perpendicular plate or only part of it often deviates to the side.

> 扭转。整个椎体或仅其部分常向一侧偏离。

The ethmoidal labyrinth *(labyrinthus ethmoidalis)* is a paired structure situated on each side of the perpendicular plate and adjoining the inferior surface of the cribriform plate. Each labyrinth consists of a great number of air ethmoidal cells *(cellulae ethmoidales)* (Fig. 72) communicating with one another as well as with the nasal cavity through a series of openings. The cells arc lined with a mucous membrane which is a continuation of the nasal mucosa.

> 筛窦迷路（labyrinthus ethmoidalis）是一个成对结构，位于垂直板的两侧，并与筛板的下表面相邻。每个迷路由大量空气性筛窦气房（cellulae ethmoidales）组成（图72），这些气房通过一系列开口相互连通，并与鼻腔相连。这些气房的内壁被黏膜覆盖，该黏膜是鼻黏膜的延续。

The cells are divided into anterior ethmoidal cells *(cellulae ethmoidales anteriores)* opening into the middle meatus of the nose and middle and posterior ethmoidal cells *(cellulae ethmoidales mediae* et *posleriores)* communicating with the superior meatus of the nose.

> 这些细胞分为前筛窦细胞（cellulae ethmoidales anteriores），开口于鼻腔的中鼻道；以及中筛窦细胞和后筛窦细胞（cellulae ethmoidales mediae et posteriores），与鼻腔的上鼻道相通。

The lateral wall of the labyrinth is a thin, smooth orbital plate *(lamina orbitalis)* (Figs 51, 72, 73, 109) forming the greater part of the medial orbital wall. The plate joins the frontal bone superiorly to form the frontocthmoid suture *(sutura frontoethmoidalis),* the maxilla and orbital process of the palatine bone inferiorly to form, respectively, the ethmoidomaxillary suture *(sutura etkmoideomaxiUaris)* and the palatoethmoidal suture *(sutura palatoethmoidalis),* with the lacrimal bone anteriorly to form the lacrimoethmoidal suture, and with the sphenoid bone posteriorly to form the sphenoethmoidal suture *(sutura sphenoethmoidalis)* (see Fig. 109). The superior border of the labyrinth carries two small ethmoidal grooves, anterior and posterior, which join similar grooves of the frontal bone to form canals opening by means of the anterior and posterior ethmoidal foramina *(foramina ethmoidalis anterius* et *posterius)* which transmit, respectively, the anterior and posterior ethmoidal nerves and vessels.

> 迷路的外侧壁是一块薄而光滑的眶板（lamina orbitalis）（图51、72、73、109），构成了眶内侧壁的大部分。该板在上方与额骨相连，形成额筛缝（sutura frontoethmoidalis）；在下方与上颌骨和腭骨的眶突相连，分别形成筛颌缝（sutura ethmoidomaxillaris）和腭筛缝（sutura palatoethmoidalis）；在前方与泪骨相连，形成泪筛缝；在后方与蝶骨相连，形成蝶筛缝（sutura sphenoethmoidalis）（见图109）。迷路的上缘有两条小的筛状沟，前、后各一条，它们分别与额骨上的相似沟相连，形成向前、向后开放的前筛孔和后筛孔（foramina ethmoidalis anterius et posterius），分别传递前筛神经和血管以及后筛神经和血管。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_75_Picture_2.jpeg)

72. Ethmoid bone (os ethmoidale); superior aspect (\%).

> 筛骨（ethmoid bone）；上面观（superior aspect）（%）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_75_Picture_4.jpeg)

73. Ethmoid bone (os ethmoidale); from the right side ( $\frac{3}{2}$ ).

> 筛骨（筛骨）；从右侧（  ）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_76_Picture_2.jpeg)

74a. *Ethmoid bone (os ethmoidale);* inferior aspect

> 74a. 筛骨（筛骨）；下部表面

The medial wall of the labyrinth (Figs 74, 103, and 104) is a rough grooved plate forming the greater part of the lateral wall of the nasal cavity. Its surface facing the perpendicular plate bears two thin laterally curled processes with slightly curved margins; the upper process is called the superior nasal concha *(concha nasalis superior)* and the lower one is the middle nasal concha *(concha nasalis media).* A rudimentary process is occasionally found above the superior concha; this is the highest nasal concha *(concha nasalis suprema).* A slit-like space called the superior meatus of the nose *(meatus nasi superior)* is found in the superoposterior part of the medial wall between the superior and middle nasal conchae.

> 迷路的内侧壁（图74、103和104）是一块粗糙的沟状板，构成了鼻腔侧壁的大部分。其面向垂直板的一面，有两枚薄而向侧卷曲的突起，边缘略呈弧形；上方的突起称为上鼻甲（上鼻甲，concha nasalis superior），下方的突起称为中鼻甲（中鼻甲，concha nasalis media）。有时在上鼻甲上方还可见到一个原始的突起，称为最高鼻甲（最高鼻甲，concha nasalis suprema）。在上鼻甲与中鼻甲之间的内侧壁上部后方，有一个狭长的空间，称为鼻的上鼻道（上鼻道，meatus nasi superior）。

The passage under the middle nasal concha is known as the middle meatus of the nose *(meatus nasi medius)* (see Figs 103 and 105).

> 中鼻甲下方的区域称为鼻中隔的中鼻道（meatus nasi medius）（见图103和图105）。

A posteriorly and inferiorly curved uncinale process *(processus*

> 一个向后下方弯曲的钩突（钩突过程，processus uncinatus）

*uncinatus)* projects from the inferoanterior surface of each labyrinth in front of and below the middle nasal concha. On the intact skull it joins the ethmoidal process *(processus ethmoidalis)* of the inferior nasal concha.

> （uncinatus）从每个迷路的inferoanterior面延伸出来，位于中鼻甲的前方和下方。在完整的颅骨上，它与下鼻甲的筛突（processus ethmoidalis）相连。

To the back of and above the uncinate process (Figs 73 and 74) is one of the largest cells which is bulged and called the ethmoidal bulla *(bulla ethmoidalis).*

> 在钩突（uncinate process）的后上方，有一个较大的气房，呈膨隆状，称为筛板气房（ethmoidal bulla，bulla ethmoidalis）。（见图73和图74）

Between the uncinate process inferiorly and anteriorly and the ethmoidal bulla superiorly is a passage known as the infundibulum of the ethmoid *(infundibulum ethmoidale)* whose upper end communicates with the aperture of the frontal sinus. The hiatus semilunaris (see Fig. 104) forms between the posterior margin of the uncinate process and inferior surface of the ethmoidal bulla, by means of which the maxillary sinus communicates with the middle meatus of the nose.

> 在钩突的下方和前方，以及筛骨体部的上方之间，有一条通道称为筛板漏斗（筛漏斗，infundibulum ethmoidale），其上端与额窦开口相交通。半月裂孔（见图104）位于钩突后缘与筛骨体部下表面之间，通过此孔，上颌窦与鼻中隔的中鼻道相交通。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_77_Picture_2.jpeg)

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_77_Picture_3.jpeg)

![](_page_77_Picture_4.jpeg)

![](_page_77_Picture_5.jpeg)

74b. *Ethmoidal labyrinth (labyrinthus ethmoidalis). (Plastic models of ethmoidal cells. N. Skripnikov's preparation.)*

> 74b. 筛窦迷路（labyrinthus ethmoidalis）。（筛窦气房塑料模型。N. Skripnikov 的标本。）

2—middle cells 5 —frontal sinus 2 —middle cells 5 —maxillary sinus 2 —middle cells 5 — maxillary sinus 2—middle cells 5—maxillary sinus

> 2—中细胞 5—额窦 2—中细胞 5—上颌窦 2—中细胞 5—上颌窦 2—中细胞 5—上颌窦

3 — posterior cells 6 —maxillary sinus 3 —posterior cells 3 —posterior cells 3—posterior cells 6 —frontal sinus

> 3 — 后组细胞 6 — 上颌窦 3 — 后组细胞 3 — 后组细胞 3—后组细胞 6 — 额窦

I. Ethmoidal cells, *left side:* II. Ethmoidal cells, *right side:* III. Ethmoidal cells, *left side;* IV. Ethmoidal cells, *right side:*  1—anterior cells 4—sphenoidal sinus 1—anterior cells 4 —frontal sinus I—anterior cells 4 —sphenoidal sinus I—anterior cells 4—sphenoidal sinus

> I. 筛窦，左侧： II. 筛窦，右侧： III. 筛窦，左侧； IV. 筛窦，右侧： 1—前组筛窦 4—蝶窦 1—前组筛窦 4—额窦 I—前组筛窦 4—蝶窦 I—前组筛窦 4—蝶窦

## 10 THE BONES OF THE FACE

> 10 面部骨骼

## 11 THE INFERIOR NASAL CONCHA

> 11 下鼻甲

The inferior nasal concha *(concha nasalis inferior)* (Figs 75, 103 and 104) is a paired curved bony plate with three processes: maxillary, lacrimal, and ethmoidal.

> 下鼻甲（下鼻甲）（图75、103和104）为一对呈弯曲状的骨板，具有三个突起：上颌突、泪突和筛突。

The maxillary process *(processus maxillaris)* projects from the bone at an acute angle into which fits the inferior border of the hiatus of the maxillary sinus. The process is seen distinctly from the opened maxillary sinus.

> 上颌突（processus maxillaris）以锐角从骨体突出，嵌入上颌窦孔的下缘。该突在打开的上颌窦中可清晰显示。

The lacrimal process *(processus lacrimalis)* joins the inferior concha to the lacrimal bone.

> 泪滴状突（processus lacrimalis）连接下鼻甲与泪骨。

The ethmoidal process *(processus eikmoidalis)* arises at the junc-

> 筛骨突（processus ethmoidalis）起源于筛骨的关节处（junctio）

tion of the maxillary process and the body of the bone and projects into the maxillary sinus. It is often fused with the uncinate process of the ethmoid bone.

> 上颌突与骨体相连，并向鼻窦延伸。它通常与筛骨的uncinate突融合。  
[!note]- 术语说明  
“uncinate process” 通常译作“uncinate突”，是筛骨的一部分，具有重要的解剖学意义。

The anterior part of the superior border of the inferior concha articulates with the conchal crest of the maxilla, the posterior part of the concha articulates with the conchal crest of the perpendicular plate of the palatine bone. Th e longitudinal slit-like space beneath the inferior nasal concha is called the inferior meatus of the nose *(meatus nasi inferior).*

> 下鼻甲的上缘前部与上颌骨的鼻甲嵴相接，后部则与腭骨垂直板的鼻甲嵴相接。下鼻甲下方的纵行裂隙状空间称为鼻的下鼻道（meatus nasi inferior）。

## 12 THE NASAL BONE

> 12 鼻骨

The nasal bone *(os nasale)* (Figs 76, 49-51) is paired, quadrangular, slightly elongated and slightly convex anteriorly. The superior margin of each bone articulates with the nasal part of the frontal bone, the lateral margin articulates with the anterior margin of the frontal process of the maxilla *(processus frontalis maxillae).*

> 鼻骨（os nasale）（图76，49-51）为成对的四边形骨块，略呈延长状，前侧略呈凸起。每块鼻骨的上缘与额骨的鼻部相接，外侧缘与上颌骨的额突（processus frontalis maxillae）的前缘相接。

The anterior surface of the bone is smooth and perforated by one or more openings transmitting vessels and nerves. The poste-

> 骨的前表面光滑，并被一个或多个开口所穿通，这些开口允许血管和神经通过。

rior surface is slightly concave and bears the ethmoidal groove *(sulcus etkmoidalis)* lodging the anterior ethmoidal nerve. Both nasal bones articulate by mildly serrated medial borders to form the internasal suture *(sutura internasalis)* which is grooved longitudinally. The inner surfaces of both bones adjoin the nasal spine *(spina nasalis)* of the frontal bone and the perpendicular plate *(lamina perpendicularis)* of the ethmoid bone.

> 前表面略凹陷，有筛骨沟（sulcus ethmoidalis），容纳前筛神经（nervus ethmoidalis anterior）。两侧鼻骨通过轻微锯齿状的内侧缘相接，形成鼻中缝（sutura internasalis），该缝纵向沟状。两侧鼻骨的内侧表面与额骨的鼻脊（spina nasalis）以及筛骨的垂直板（lamina perpendicularis）相接。

## 13 THE IACRIMAL BONE

> 13 泪骨

The lacrimal bone *(os lacrimale)* (Figs 77, 49-51) is a paired elongated quadrangular plate situated in the anterior part of the medial orbital wall. Its superior border articulates with the orbital part of the frontal bone to form the frontolacrimal suture *(sutura frontolacrimalis),* the posterior border with the anterior border of the orbital plate of the ethmoid bone; the inferior border meets the orbital surface of the maxilla posteriorly to form the lacrimomaxillary suture *(sutura lacrimomaxillaris)* and the lacrimal process of the inferior concha anteriorly to form the lacrimoconchal suture *(sutura lacrimoconchalis).* Anteriorly the bone articulates with the frontal process of the maxilla to form the la cri mo maxillary suture *(sutura lacrimomaxillaris).*

> 泪骨（os lacrimale）（图77，49-51）是一对位于眶内侧壁前部的细长四方形骨板。其上缘与额骨的眶部相接，形成额泪缝（sutura frontolacrimalis）；下缘与筛骨眶板的前缘相连；其下缘在后方与上颌骨的眶面相接，形成泪颌缝（sutura lacrimomaxillaris），在前方与下鼻甲的泪突相接，形成泪鼻缝（sutura lacrimoconchalis）。前方，泪骨与上颌骨的额突相接，形成泪颌缝（sutura lacrimomaxillaris）。

The bone covers the anterior cells of the ethmoid bone and

> 骨覆盖筛骨的前群细胞

carries on its lateral surface the crest of the lacrimal bone *(crista lacrimalis posterior)* which separates it into a larger posterior and a smaller anterior parts. The crest terminates as a projection called the lacrimal hamulus *(hamulus lacrimalis)* which reaches the lacrimal groove on the frontal process of the maxilla. The anterior part is flat, while the posterior part is concave to form the lacrimal groove *(sulcus lacrimalis).* Inferiorly the groove adjoins the lacrimal groove of the maxillary frontal process *(sulcus lacrimalis processus frontalis maxillae)* to form the fossa of the lacrimal sac *(fossa sacci lacrimalis).* The fossa is continuous downwards with the nasolacrimal canal *(canalis nasolacrimalis)* which drains into the inferior meatus of the nose.

> 其外侧面上有泪骨嵴（crista lacrimalis posterior），该嵴将其分为较大的后部和较小的前部。该嵴终止于一个称为泪骨钩（hamulus lacrimalis）的突起，该突起延伸至上颌骨额突上的泪沟。前部为扁平，而后部凹陷形成泪沟（sulcus lacrimalis）。泪沟向下与上颌骨额突的泪沟（sulcus lacrimalis processus frontalis maxillae）相连，形成泪囊窝（fossa sacci lacrimalis）。泪囊窝向下延续为鼻泪管（canalis nasolacrimalis），该管最终引流至鼻腔的下鼻甲。

## 14 THE VOMER

> 14 犁骨

The vomer (Figs 78, 79, and 94) is an unpaired, elongated rhomboid plate forming the posterior part of the nasal septum.

> 鼻中隔的后部由犁骨（图78、79和94）构成，犁骨为不成对的、呈菱形的板状结构。

It is usually slightly curved (except for the posterior edge).

> 通常呈轻微弯曲状（除后缘外）。

The superior edge of the votner is thicker than the other edges

> 椎体的上缘比其他缘更厚。[!note]- 术语说明 “votner” 可能为“vertebra”（椎体）的拼写错误，根据上下文推测应译为“椎体”。

and is split into two everted processes called the alae of the vomer *(alae vomeris).* They adjoin the inferior surface of the body of the sphenoid bone and embrace its rostrum.

> 并分为两个外翻的突起，称为筛骨蝶骨板（alae vomeris）。它们连接于蝶骨体的下表面，并环绕其鼻突。

The posterior edge of the bone is free, slightly tapered, and

> 骨的后缘游离，稍呈锥形，/no_think

![](_page_79_Figure_2.jpeg)

75. *Right inferior nasal concha (concha nasalis inferior)* (%). A—inner aspect; B—outer aspect.

> 右侧下鼻甲（下鼻甲）(%). A—内侧；B—外侧。

![](_page_79_Picture_4.jpeg)

76. *Right nasal bone (os nasalis)* (J/j). A—outer aspect; B — inner aspect.

> 右侧鼻骨（鼻骨）（J/j）。A—外侧；B—内侧。

![](_page_79_Picture_6.jpeg)

77. *Right lacrimal bone (os lacrimale)* ('/). A—outer aspect; B — inner aspect.

> 右泪骨（os lacrimale）('/). A—外侧表面；B—内侧表面。

![](_page_79_Picture_8.jpeg)

78. *Vomer;* from the right side (%).

> 鼻中隔软骨；右侧（%）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_80_Picture_2.jpeg)

79. *Vomer;* superior aspect (%).

> 鼻中隔；上表面（%）

separates the posterior apertures of the nose *(choanac)* one from the other.

> 分隔鼻后孔（choana）彼此之间。

The anterior and inferior edges are rough; the inferior one articulates with the nasal crests *(crista nasalis)* of the maxilla and

> 前缘和下缘粗糙；下缘与上颌的鼻突（鼻嵴，crista nasalis）相接。

palatine bone, while the anterior edge is bevelled and articulates with the perpendicular plate *(lamina perpendicularis)* of the ethmoid bone superiorly and with the cartilaginous nasal septum inferiorly.

> 舌骨，其前缘呈斜面状，并与筛骨垂直板（垂直板）上方及软骨性鼻中隔下方相接。

## 15 THE MAXILLA

> 15 上颌骨

The maxilla (Figs 80-83, 49 and 51) is a paired bone situated in the supcroantcrior part of the visceral cranium. It is a pneumatic bone *(ossa pneumatica)* because it contains a large cavity, the maxillary sinus *(sinus maxillaris)* which is lined by mucous membrane.

> 上颌骨（图80-83、49和51）是一对位于内脏颅骨上部的骨骼。它是一块含气骨（含气骨，ossa pneumatica），因为其内部含有一个较大的腔隙，即上颌窦（上颌窦，sinus maxillaris），该窦腔被黏膜膜覆盖。

A body and four processes arc distinguished in the bone.

> 骨体及四个突起可区分出来。

The body of the maxilla *(corpus maxillae),* in which the maxillary sinus is lodged, has four surfaces: superior, or orbital; anterior; medial, or nasal; posterior, or infratemporal.

> 上颌体（maxilla body，corpus maxillae），即容纳上颌窦的部位，具有四个面：上部（或称眶面）、前部、内侧（或称鼻面）和后部（或称颞下窝面）。

The processes of the bone are as follows: frontal, zygomatic, alveolar, and palatine

> 骨的突起包括以下部分：额突、颧突、牙槽突和腭突。

The orbital surface *(fades orbitalis)* is smooth, triangular, and slightly inclined forwards, laterally, and downwards. It forms the inferior wall of the orbit *(orbita).*

> 眶面（fades orbitalis）光滑，呈三角形，略微向前、向外及向下倾斜。它构成眶（orbita）的下壁。

The medial border of the orbital surface articulates anteriorly

> 眶面的内侧缘向前与...相接

with the lacrimal bone to form the lacrimomaxillary suture *(sutura lacrimomaxillaris);* posteriorly of the lacrimal bone it articulates with the orbital plate of the ethmoid bone to form the ethmoidomaxillary suture *(sutura ethmoidomaxillaris),* and still further posteriorly, il joins the orbital process of the palatine bone to form the palatomaxillary suture *(sutura palatomaxillaris).*

> 与泪骨形成泪颧缝（sutura lacrimomaxillaris）；泪骨后方，它与筛骨眶板形成筛颧缝（sutura ethmoidomaxillaris）；更后方，它与腭骨眶突形成腭颧缝（sutura palatomaxillaris）。
