The anterior border of the orbital surface is smooth and forms the free infraorbital margin *(margo infraorbitalis).* It is serrated laterally and is continuous with the zygomatic process *(processus zygomaticus).* Medially the infraorbital margin curves upwards, tapers, and is continuous with the frontal process on which stretches longitudinally the lacrimal crest *(crista lacrimalis anterior).*

> 眶面的前方边界平滑，形成自由的下颌缘（infraorbital margin，margo infraorbitalis）。其外侧缘呈锯齿状，并与颧突（zygomatic process，processus zygomaticus）相连。内侧的下颌缘向上弯曲，逐渐变细，并与额突（frontal process）相连，额突上纵向延伸着泪嵴（lacrimal crest，crista lacrimalis anterior）。

The posterior border of the superior (orbital) surface, together with the inferior border of the orbital surface of the greater wings of the sphenoid bone, which runs parallel with it, forms the infc-

> 眶顶面的后缘，与蝶骨大翼眶面的下缘（二者平行）共同构成眶顶面的后界。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_81_Picture_2.jpeg)

80. Right maxilla; anterolateral aspect  $(\frac{1}{1})$ .

> 右侧上颌骨；前外侧方面

![](_page_81_Picture_4.jpeg)

81. Right maxilla; medial aspect  $(\frac{1}{1})$ .

> 右侧上颌骨；内侧面

rior orbilal fissure *(fissura orbitalis inferior).* In the middle of its distance the inferior wall of the fissure bears a small infraorbital groove *(sulcus infraorbitalis)* which stretches forwards and becomes deeper to be gradually continuous with the infraorbital canal *(canalis infraorbitalis).* The groove and the canal transmit the infraorbital nerve, arteries, and veins. The canal describes an arch and opens on the anterior surface of the body of the maxilla. The inferior wall of the canal has small openings of the anterior dental canals which are called anterior dental foramina (Fig. 82); they transmit nerves to the anterior maxillary teeth.

> 下眶裂（fissura orbitalis inferior）。在裂孔的中部，其下壁有一个小的 infraorbital 沟（sulcus infraorbitalis），该沟向前延伸并逐渐加深，最终与 infraorbital 管（canalis infraorbitalis）连续。该沟和管内通过 infraorbital 神经、动脉和静脉。infraorbital 管呈弓形，开口于上颌骨体的前表面。管的下壁有若干小孔，称为前牙孔（foramina dentaria anterioria）（见图82）；这些孔传递神经至前牙。

The posterior surface *(fades infratemporalis)* faces the infratemporal and plerygopalatine fossae. It is uneven, often convex, and forms the maxillary tubcrosity *(tuber maxillae).* Two or three small openings of the dental canals, the dental foramina *(foramina alveolaria)* (Figs 80 and 82), can be seen on it; they transmit nerves to the posterior maxillary teeth.

> 后表面（颊下颌窝）朝向颊下颌窝和咽腭窝。该表面不平整，常呈凸起状，形成上颌突起（上颌突）。在其上可见两个或三个小孔，即牙孔（牙槽孔，foramina alveolaria）（见图80和图82），这些孔传递神经至后牙。

The anterior surface *(fades anterior)* is slightly curved. A rather large infraorbital foramen *(foramen infraorbitale)* opens on it below the infraorbital margin and still further below is a small depression called the canine fossa *(fossa caninaj* which is the site of origin of the levator anguli oris muscle.

> 前面（前侧）（fades anterior）略呈弧形。一个较大的眶下孔（foramen infraorbitale）位于其下方，位于眶下缘下方更远处是一个小凹陷，称为尖牙窝（fossa canina），是提口角肌（levator anguli oris muscle）的起始部位。

The anterior surface is continuous downwards with the anterior (buccal) surface of the alveolar process *(processus alveolaris).*  The alveolar process has a series of depressions between ridges, which are called the alveolar juga *(juga alveolaria).*

> 前表面向下延续至牙槽突（processus alveolaris）的前方（颊侧）表面。牙槽突表面有若干位于嵴之间的凹陷，称为牙槽沟（juga alveolaria）。

McdialU and forward\*, towards the IIOM\ (IK- anterioi [5Urfa.CC](http://5Urfa.CC) of the body of the maxilla continues as a sharp edge of the nasal notch *(incisura nasalis).* The notch terminates below as the anterior nasal spine *(spina nasalis anterior).* The nasal notches of both maxillae limit the anterior bony aperture of the nose *(apertura piriformis)*  which leads into the nasal cavity.

> McDialU 朝向前方，朝向 IIOM（IK- 面部前侧）。上颌骨体的前表面继续为鼻凹（incisura nasalis）的锐边。鼻凹向下终止于前鼻突（spina nasalis anterior）。两侧上颌骨的鼻凹共同限定了鼻部的前部骨性孔口（apertura piriformis），该孔口通向鼻腔。

The nasal surface *(fades nasalu)* of the maxilla (Fig. 81) has a more complex structure. In its superoposterior angle is the hiatus of the maxillary sinus *(hiatus sinus maxillaris)* leading into the sinus maxillaris. To the back of the hiatus the rough nasal surface articulates with the perpendicular plate of the palatine bone bv means of a suture and carries a vertical greater palatine groove *(sulcus pa latinus major)* contributing to the formation of the walls of the greater palatine canal *(canalis palatinus major).* In front of the hiatus of the maxillary sinus stretches the nasolacrimal groove *(sulcus lacrimalis)* which is limited by the posterior border of the frontal process anteriorly. The groove closes to form the nasolacrimal canal *(canalis nasolacrimalis);* the groove meets the lacrimal bone superiorly and the lacrimal process of the inferior concha inferiorly. Still further to the front the nasal surface carries a horizontal eminence called the conchal crest *(crista conchalis)* to which the inferior nasal concha is attached.

> 上颌骨的鼻面（nasal surface of maxilla）（图81）具有更为复杂的结构。在其上后角处有上颌窦开口（hiatus sinus maxillaris），通向上颌窦。在该开口的后方，粗糙的鼻面通过一条缝合线与腭骨的垂直板相接，并带有垂直的较大腭沟（sulcus palatinus major），参与构成较大的腭管（canalis palatinus major）的壁。在上颌窦开口前方，延伸出鼻泪沟（sulcus lacrimalis），其前方由额骨的前突后缘所界定。该沟闭合形成鼻泪管（canalis nasolacrimalis）；鼻泪沟上方与泪骨相连，下方与下鼻甲的泪突相连。更前方的鼻面则有一个水平的隆起，称为下鼻甲嵴（crista conchalis），下鼻甲附着于此。

From the superior border of the nasal surface at its junction with the anterior surface projects upwards the frontal process *(processus frontalis).* It has a medial (nasal) and lateral (facial) surfaces. The lateral surface is separated into an anterior and posterior parts by the lacrimal crest *(crista lacrimalis anterior).* The posterior part is continuous downwards with the nasolacrimal groove *(sulcus lacrimalis).* The inner, lacrimal border *(margo lacrimalis)* of the frontal

> 从鼻面的上缘与前表面交界处向上突出的是额突（processus frontalis）。其具有内侧（鼻侧）和外侧（面部）表面。外侧表面被泪嵴（crista lacrimalis anterior）分为前部和后部。后部向下延续为鼻泪沟（sulcus lacrimalis）。额突的内侧、泪侧缘（margo lacrimalis）为...

process articulates with the lacrimal bone *u>* form the lacrimomaxillary suture *(sutura lacrimomaxillaris).* The cthmoidal crest *(crista etkmoidalis)* stretches from front to back on the medial surface. The superior border of the frontal process is serrated and articulates with the nasal part of the frontal bone to form the frontomaxillary suture *(sutura frontomaxillaris).* The anterior border of the frontal process unites with the nasal bone to form the nasomaxillary suture *(sutura nasomaxillaris).*

> 额突与泪骨相连，形成泪颧缝（sutura lacrimomaxillaris）。筛骨 crest（crista ethmoidalis）位于内侧面上，从前向后延伸。额突的上缘呈锯齿状，并与额骨的鼻部形成额颧缝（sutura frontomaxillaris）。额突的前缘与鼻骨相连，形成鼻颧缝（sutura nasomaxillaris）。

The zygomatic process *(processus zygomaticus)* projects from the laterosuperior angle of the body. Its rough end unites with the zygomatic bone *(os zygomaticum)* to form the zygomaticomaxillary suture *(sutura zygomaticomaxillaris).*

> 颧突（processus zygomaticus）从体的后上方角向外侧上方突出。其粗糙末端与颧骨（os zygomaticum）相连，形成颧颌缝（sutura zygomaticomaxillaris）。

The palatine process *(processus palatinus)* (Figs 81 and 83) is a horizontal bony plate extending medially from the inferior border of the nasal surface of the body of the maxilla and together with the horizontal plate of the palatine bone forms the bony septum between the nasal cavity and the cavity of the mouth. Both maxillae unite by means of the rough medial borders of their palatine processes to form the median palatine suture *(sutura palatina mediana).*

> 腭突（processus palatinus）（图81和图83）是一块水平的骨板，从上颌骨体鼻面的下缘向内侧延伸，与腭骨的水平板共同构成鼻腔与口腔之间的骨性隔板。两侧上颌骨通过其腭突的粗糙内侧缘相接，形成中线腭缝（sutura palatina mediana）。

The palatine processes form a sharp marginal projection facing the nasal cavity; this is the nasal crest *(crista nasalis)* which adjoin\* the inferior border of the vomer and the cartilaginous nasal septum. The posterior border of the palatine process meets the anterior border of the horizontal part of the palatine bone to form the transverse palatine suture *(sutura palatina transversa).* The superior surface of the palatine processes is smooth and slightly concave. The inferior surface is rough and carries two palatine grooves *(suld palatini)* close to its posterior end; the sulci are separated from one another by small palatine spines *(spinae palatinae);* both transmit vessels and nerves. An incisive canal *(canalis indsivus)* forms between the right and left palatine processes at the anterior border. The incisive foramen *(foramen indsivum)* may be found on one of the processes, in which case an incisive groove is seen on the contralateral process.

> 腭突形成一个朝向鼻腔的锐利边缘突起，称为鼻嵴（鼻 crest，crista nasalis），其与筛骨垂直板的下缘及软骨性鼻中隔相接。腭突的后缘与腭骨水平部的前缘相接，形成横腭缝（横腭缝，sutura palatina transversa）。腭突的上表面光滑且略凹陷。下表面粗糙，并具有两条靠近其后端的腭沟（腭沟，sulci palatini）；这两条沟由小的腭棘（腭棘，spinae palatinae）分隔开；这两条沟内均通过血管和神经。右侧和左侧腭突在前缘之间形成切牙管（切牙管，canalis incisivus）。切牙孔（切牙孔，foramen incisivum）*可能位于其中一个腭突上，此时在对侧的腭突上可见切牙沟。

The alveolar process *(processus alveolaris)* (Figs 80 and 83) whose development is associated with the development of the teeth, projects downwards from the inferior border of the body of the bone and describes an arch which is convex anteriorly and laterally. The inferior surface of this region, the alveolar arch *(arcus alveolaris),* has a row of tooth sockets *(alveoli dentales)* for the roots of eight teeth on both sides. Th e sockets arc separated from one another by interalveolar septa *(septa interalveolaria).* Some of the sockets are in turn divided by interradicular septa *(septa interradicularia)* into smaller sockets according to the number of roots which the tooth has.

> 牙槽突（processus alveolaris）（见图80和图83）其发育与牙齿的发育相关，从骨体的下缘向下延伸，并形成一个前侧方向凸出的弓状结构。该区域的下表面称为牙槽弓（arcus alveolaris），其上排列着一侧八颗牙齿的牙根窝（alveoli dentales）。这些牙根窝之间由牙间隔（septa interalveolaria）分隔。部分牙根窝又被牙根间隔（septa interradicularia）根据牙齿所具有的根数进一步分隔为更小的窝。

The anterior surface of the alveolar process bears longitudinal ridges called alveolar juga *(juga alveolaria)* corresponding to the five anterior sockets. In the foetus, part of the alveolar process with the sockets for the two anterior incisors is a separate incisive bone *(os indsivum)* which fuses early with the rest of the maxillary alveolar process. Both alveolar processes meet in the middle to form the intermaxillary suture *(sutura intermaxillaris).*

> 牙槽突的前表面具有纵向的隆起，称为牙槽突隆起（alveolar juga），与五个前牙窝相对应。在胎儿期，包含两个前牙窝的部分牙槽突形成一个独立的切牙骨（os incisivum），该骨会较早与其余的上颌牙槽突融合。两侧的牙槽突在中部相会形成牙间缝（intermaxillary suture）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_83_Picture_2.jpeg)

82. *Right maxilla;*  anterolateral aspect (\*/), (The dental canals are opened.)

> 右上颌骨；前外侧部（\*/），（牙槽管已开放）

![](_page_83_Picture_4.jpeg)

83. *Maxillae;* inferior aspect (J^).

> 上颌骨；下侧（J^）

#### 15.1.1 THE PALATINE BONE

> 15.1.1 硬腭骨

The palatine bone (os palatinum) (Figs 84-86; 108) is a paired bone. It is a curved plate situated in the back of the nasal cavity. The bone forms part of the floor (the hard palate) and the lateral wall of the nasal cavity. A horizontal plate (lamina horizontalis) and a perpendicular plate (lamina perpendicularis) are distinguished in the palatine bone. The horizontal plates of both palatine bones meet on the midline of the hard palate to form the posterior part of the median palatine suture (sutura palatina mediana) and articulate with the two palatine processes of the maxillae, which are located in front of them, to form the transverse palatine suture (sutura palatina transversa).

> 腭骨（os palatinum）（图84-86；图108）是一对成对的骨。它位于鼻腔后部，呈弯曲板状。该骨构成硬腭（口腔底部）的一部分以及鼻腔的侧壁。腭骨可区分出水平板（lamina horizontalis）和垂直板（lamina perpendicularis）。两侧腭骨的水平板在硬腭中线处相接，形成中腭缝（sutura palatina mediana）的后部，并与位于其前方的上颌骨腭突（palatine processes of the maxillae）相接，形成横腭缝（sutura palatina transversa）。

The horizontal plate carries a posterior nasal spine (spina nasalis posterior) on the posteromedial end and a nasal crest (crista nasalis) on the medial border. The superior surface of the horizontal plate is slightly concave and smooth, the inferior surface is rough.

> 水平板在后内侧端具有一个后鼻突（spina nasalis posterior），在内侧缘具有一个鼻 crest（crista nasalis）。水平板的上表面略呈凹陷且光滑，下表面则较为粗糙。

A thick tubercle (processus pyramidalis) projects backwards from the lateral part of the base of the perpendicular plate. It is wedged into the notch between the plates of the pterygoid process of the sphenoid bone and limits the pterygoid fossa (fossa pterygoidea) from below.

> 从垂直板基底部的外侧部向后突出一个厚的隆起（锥体突，processus pyramidalis）。它嵌入蝶骨翼突板之间的凹陷处，从下方界定了翼突窝（翼突窝，fossa pterygoidea）。

The inferior surface of the tubercle carries one or two lesser

> 椎体结节的下表面承载一个或两个小的 /no_think

palatine foramina (foramina palatina minora) (see Fig. 108). In front of them, on the inferior surface of the lateral border of the horizontal plate is the greater palatine foramen (foramen palatinum majus) which is lodged in the suture between the palatine bone and the maxilla.

> 腭大孔（palatine foramina, foramina palatina minora）（见图108）。在它们的前方，位于水平板侧缘的下表面是腭大孔（greater palatine foramen, foramen palatinum majus），该孔位于腭骨与上颌骨骨缝的交界处。

The thin bony perpendicular plate of the palatine bone arises at a right angle and adjoins the anterior margin of the medial surface of the pterygoid process and the posterior part of the nasal surface of the body of the maxilla. Its lateral surface carries the greater palatine groove (sulcus palatinus major) which together with the palatine groove of the maxilla and the pterygoid process forms the greater palatine canal (canalis palatinus major). The canal opens on the hard palate by the greater palatine foramen (foramen palatinum majus).

> 腭骨的薄而垂直的骨板呈直角起源于腭骨体，与翼突的前缘及上颌骨体鼻面的后部相连。其外侧面有上颌骨大腭沟（sulcus palatinus major），该沟与上颌骨的腭沟及翼突共同构成上颌骨大腭管（canalis palatinus major）。此管在硬腭处开口，称为上颌骨大腭孔（foramen palatinum majus）。

The medial surface of the perpendicular plate bears the conchal crest (crista conchalis) which is a marking of fusion of the plate with the posterior part of the inferior nasal concha.

> 垂直板的内侧表面有鼓突嵴（crista conchalis），这是垂直板与下鼻甲后部融合的标记。[!note]- 术语说明
“conchal crest” 通常译作“鼓突嵴”，是颞骨岩部的一部分，标志着垂直板与下鼻甲后部的融合。

Slightly above it is the ethmoidal crest (crista ethmoidalis) for attachment of the middle nasal concha of the ethmoid bone.

> 其稍上方为筛骨嵴（crista ethmoidalis），为筛骨中鼻甲的附着处。

The superior border of the perpendicular plate terminates as two processes: one is the orbital process (processus orbitalis) (Fig. 85)

> 垂直板的上缘终止为两个突起：一个是眶突（processus orbitalis）（图85）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_84_Picture_12.jpeg)

![](_page_84_Picture_13.jpeg)

84. Right palatine bone (os palatinum); medial and posterior aspect  $(\frac{5}{3})$ .

> 右侧腭骨（os palatinum）；内侧及后方表面

85. Right palatine bone (os palatinum); lateral aspect  $(\frac{5}{3})$ .

> 右侧腭骨（os palatinum）；侧方视图

![](_page_85_Picture_2.jpeg)

86. *Right palatine bone (os palatinum);*  posterior aspect (%).

> 右侧腭骨（os palatinum）；后侧（%）

and the other is the sphenoidal process *(processus sphenoidalis).* The processes are separated by the sphenopalatine notch *(incisura spkenopalatina).* The notch with the body of the sphenoid bone adjacent to it forms the sphenopalatine foramen *(foramen spkenopalati-Hum).*

> 其中一个为蝶骨突（processus sphenoidalis）。这些突起由蝶腭凹（incisura spheno-palatina）分隔开。蝶腭凹与相邻的蝶骨体共同构成蝶腭孔（foramen sphenopalatinum）。

The orbital process *(processus orbitalis)* adjoins the orbital sur-

> 眶突（processus orbitalis）毗邻眶面（orbital sur-）

face of the maxilla; it often carries an air cell which is connected with the posterior cells of the ethmoid bone.

> 上颌骨的面部；其常携带一个气房，该气房与筛骨的后部气房相连。

The sphenoidal process *(processus sphenoidalis)* reaches the inferior surface of the body of the sphenoid bone, its concha, and the wings of the vomer.

> 蝶骨翼突（processus sphenoidalis）到达蝶骨体的下表面、其蝶窦以及鼻中隔的翼部。

## 16 THE ZYGOMATIC BONE

> 16 颧骨

The zygomatic bone *(os zygomaticum)* (Figs 49-52 and 87) is a paired bone and a component of the lateral parts of the visceral cranium. Three surfaces are distinguished on it. Its lateral surface *(fades lateralis)* is shaped like an irregular quadrangle and is convex, particularly in the region of the protuberance.

> 颧骨（os zygomaticum）（图49-52和87）是一块成对的骨，属于颅骨的侧部结构。其表面可分为三个部分。其外侧表面（fades lateralis）呈不规则四边形，表面凸起，尤其在隆起区域更为明显。

The orbital surface *(fades orbitalis)* stretching medially and forwards is concave. It forms part of the lateral and inferior walls of the orbit and meets the lateral surface by means of a sharp and curved margin which contributes inferiorly to the infraorbital margin *(margo infraorbitalis).*

> 眶面（fades orbitalis）向内侧和前方延伸呈凹陷状。它构成眼眶的外侧和下壁的一部分，并通过一个锐利且弯曲的边缘与外侧表面相连，该边缘向下构成眶下缘（margo infraorbitalis）。

The temporal surface *(fades temporalis)* faces the temporal fossa.

> 颞面（颞肌）朝向颞窝。

The frontal process *(processus frontalis)* arises from the superior angle of the body of the bone. It articulates with the zygomatic process of the frontal bone to form the frontozygomatic suture *(su-* *tura frontozygomatica)* and with the greater wing of the sphenoid bone to form the sphenozygomatic suture *(sutura sphenozygomatica).*

> 额突（processus frontalis）起源于骨体的上角。它与额骨的颧突形成颧额缝（sutura frontozygomatica），并与蝶骨大翼形成蝶颧缝（sutura sphenozygomatica）。

The zygomatic bone unites with the maxilla to form the zygomaticomaxillary suture *(sutura zygomaticomaxillaris).*

> 颧骨与上颌骨相连形成颧上颌缝（zygomaticomaxillary suture）。

The orbital surface of the bone bears the zygomatico-orbital foramen *(foramen zygomaticoorbitale)* leading into a canal which bifurcates in the bone. One branch of the canal opens on the anterior surface of the bone as the zygomaticofacial foramen *(foramen zygomaticofadaU),* the other—on the temporal surface as the zygomaticotemporal foramen *(foramen zygomaticotemporale).* These canals transmit nerves.

> 骨的眶面承载着颧眶孔（foramen zygomaticoorbitale），该孔通向一个在骨内分叉的管状通道。其中一个分支在骨的前表面开口，形成颧面孔（foramen zygomaticofacialis），另一个分支则在骨的颞面开口，形成颧颞孔（foramen zygomaticotemporale）。这些管道传递神经。

The posterior angle of the bone gives rise to the temporal process *(processus temporalis)* which meets the zygomatic process of the temporal bone to form the zygomatic arch *(arcus zygomalicus).*

> 骨的后角形成颞突（processus temporalis），与颞骨的颧突相接，共同构成颧弓（arcus zygomalicus）。

![](IMG-20251206045832254.jpeg)

87. *Right zygomatic bone (os zygomaticum);* ([/!). A—lateral aspect; B —medial aspect.

> 右颧骨（zygomatic bone）；([/!). A—外侧方面；B—内侧方面。

## 17 THE MANDIBLE

> 17 下颌骨

The mandible *(mandibula)* (see Figs 48-53; 88-91) is an unpaired bone forming the lower part of the visceral skull. A body *(corpus mandibulae)* and two processes called rami *(rami mandibulae)*  projecting upwards from its posterior end are distinguished.

> 下颌骨（mandibula）（见图48-53；88-91）是不成对的骨骼，构成颅骨的下部。下颌骨可分为一个主体（corpus mandibulae）和两个称为下颌支（rami mandibulae）的突起，这两个突起从下颌骨的后端向上延伸。

The body *(corpus)* is formed from two halves of the bone which fuse on the midline to form a single bone during the first year of life. The outer surface of each half is convex, and the height of the body is greater than its width. A lower margin, or the base of the mandible *(basis mandibulae)* and an upper margin formed by the alveolar part *(pars alveolaris)* are distinguished in the lower jaw.

> 躯干（corpus）由两部分骨组成，这些骨在生命第一年期间在中线融合形成一块单一的骨。每部分骨的外表面呈凸面，躯干的高度大于其宽度。在下颌中，可区分出下缘，即下颌体（basis mandibulae），以及由牙槽部（pars alveolaris）形成的上缘。

On the outer surface of the middle part of the body is the mental protuberance *(protuberantia mentalis)* directly lateral of which on each side is the mental tubercle *(tuberculum mentale).* The mental foramen *(foramen mentale)* transmitting vessels and nerves is above and lateral of the tubercle. This foramen corresponds to the position of the root of the second premolar. To the back of the mental foramen is the oblique line *(linea obliqua)* which runs upwards and is continuous with the anterior border of the ramus of the mandible.

> 在面部中段的外侧面上，可见颏隆突（protuberantia mentalis）。在颏隆突的两侧各有一个颏突（tuberculum mentale）。颏孔（foramen mentale）位于颏突的上方和外侧，通过颏孔有血管和神经通过。该孔的位置对应于第二前磨牙的根部。颏孔的后方为颏嵴（linea obliqua），该嵴向上延伸，并与下颌骨髁突的前缘相连。

The development of the alveolar part *(pars alveolaris)* is determined by the teeth which it carries; it is bounded superiorly by the alveolar arch *(arcus alveolaris).* This border bears 16 (8 on each side) tooth sockets *(alveoli dentales)* (sec Fig. 89) separated from one another by interalveolar septa *(septa interalveolaria).* A multi-rooted socket lodging a tooth with two roots is divided by an inter-radicular septum *(septum interradicularia).*

> 牙槽部（pars alveolaris）的发育由其所承载的牙齿决定；其上方由牙槽弓（arcus alveolaris）界定。此边界上有16个牙槽窝（alveoli dentales）（参见图89），每侧各有8个，彼此由牙间隔（septa interalveolaria）分隔。对于容纳两根牙根的多根牙槽窝，其内部由根间隔（septa interradicularia）分隔。

The superior margin of the outer surface of the body has a

> 身体外侧表面的上缘有 /no_think

series of ridges and depressions called alveolar juga *(juga alveolaria).*

> 一系列称为牙槽突（alveolar juga）的嵴和凹陷。

A solitary or double mental spine, or genial tubercle *(spina mentalis)* is located on the inner surface of the body of the mandible near the midline; the geniohyoideus and gcnioglossus muscles originate here. On the lower margin is a depression called the digastric fossa *(fossa digastrica)* which serves for attachment of the digastric muscle. A mylohyoid line *(linea mylokyoidea)* passes obliquely on each side of the inner surface of the body towards the ramus; the mylohyoid muscle and part of the superior constrictor muscle of the pharynx arise here.

> 下颌体的内侧近中线处可见单一或双侧的颏棘（spina mentalis），亦称颏突，颏舌骨肌（geniohyoideus）和颏舌肌（genioglossus）起源于此处。下颌体下缘处有一凹陷称为二腹肌窝（fossa digastrica），为二腹肌附着处。一条斜行的颏舌骨肌线（linea mylohyoidea）自下颌体的内侧向两侧延伸至髁突；颏舌骨肌（mylohyoid muscle）和咽上缩肌的一部分（superior constrictor muscle of the pharynx）起源于此处。

Above this line in its anterior parts is the sublingual fossa *(fovea sublingualis)* lodging the sublingual gland; under the posterior part of the line is the submandibular fossa *(fovea submandibularis)*  which is often poorly defined; it lodges the submandibular gland. Under the posterior part of the mylohyoid line also stretches the mylohyoid groove *(sulcus mylohyoideus)* which lodges the mylohyoid vessels and nerves.

> 该线的前部上方为舌下窝（舌下凹陷，fovea sublingualis），容纳舌下腺；该线后部下方为下颌下窝（下颌下凹陷，fovea submandibularis），通常边界不清晰；其容纳下颌下腺。此外，该线后部下方还延伸出舌骨会厌襞（舌骨会厌沟，sulcus mylohyoideus），容纳舌骨会厌血管和神经。

The ramus of the mandible *(ramus mandibulae)* (Figs 88 and 91) is a wide bony plate arising from the posterior end of the body obliquely and posteriorly to form the angle of the mandible *(angulus mandibulae)* with the lower margin of the body.

> 下颌支（ramus mandibulae）（图88和图91）是一块宽大的骨板，从下颌体的后端斜向后上方延伸，与下颌体的下缘共同形成下颌角（angulus mandibulae）。

A rough area called the masseteric tuberosity *(tuberositas masseterica)* is located on the outer surface of the ramus in the region of the angle; it serves for attachment of the masseter muscle. In line with this tuberosity but on the inner surface is a smaller, pterygoid

> 一个称为咬肌粗隆（masseteric tuberosity，tuberositas masseterica）的粗糙区域位于下颌支的角区外侧表面；它为咬肌的附着提供部位。与该粗隆呈一线但位于内侧表面的是一个较小的翼外肌附着区（pterygoid）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_87_Picture_0.jpeg)

## 18 *The mandible (mandibula);* outer aspect (%).

> 18 下颌骨（mandibula）；外侧表面（%）

(The external lamina of the compact bone substance is removed; a probe is introduced into the mandibular canal.)

> （去除密质骨的外层骨板；将探针引入下颌管内。）

![](_page_87_Picture_3.jpeg)

89. *Mandible (mandibula);* superior aspect (%).

> 下颌骨（mandibula）；上部（superior aspect）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_88_Picture_2.jpeg)

90. *Mandible (mandibula);* inner aspect (%).

> 下颌骨（mandibula）；内侧面（%）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_88_Picture_4.jpeg)

91. *Mandible (mandibula)* of an old man (%). (The locth and alveolar part of the mandible are absent.)

> 一位老人的下颌骨（下颌）（%）。（下颌骨的下部及牙槽部缺失。）

luberosity *(tuberositas pterygoidea)* which is the site of origin of the middle pterygoid muscle.

> 翼肌粗隆（tuberositas pterygoidea），为中翼内肌的起始点。[!note]- 术语说明
“tuberositas pterygoidea” 通常译作“翼肌粗隆”，是位于翼突上的粗隆结构，为中翼内肌的起始部位。

The mandibular foramen *(foramen mandibulae)* is located in the middle of the inner surface of the ramus; it is bounded medially and anteriorly by a small bony projection called the lingula of the mandible *(lingula mandibulae).* The foramen leads into the mandibular canal *(canalis mandibulae)* (Fig. 88) transmitting vessels and nerves. The canal is lodged in the spongy substance of the bone; it curves downwards and to the front and reaches almost the middle of the mandible and opens on the anterior surface of its body by means of the mental foramen *(foramen mentale).*

> 下颌孔（foramen mandibulae）位于下颌支内面的中部；其内侧和前方被一小块骨性突起所界，称为下颌舌突（lingula mandibulae）。下颌孔通向下颌管（canalis mandibulae）（见图88），管内有血管和神经通过。下颌管位于骨的松质物质内，向下并向前弯曲，到达下颌体的近中部，并通过颏孔（foramen mentale）在下颌体的前表面开口。

On the superior end of the ramus are two processes which are separated by the mandibular notch *(incisura mandibulae).* The anterior process, called the coronoid process *(processus eoronoideus)* often has a rough area giving attachment to the temporal muscle; the posterior, condyloid process *(processus condylaris)* articulates with the skull by means of the head of the mandible *(caput mandibulae)*  which is covered by cartilage.

> 在下颌支的上端有两个突起，二者被下颌孔（下颌骨切迹，incisura mandibulae）分隔。前突称为冠突（冠状突，processus coronoides），常有一个粗糙区域供颞肌附着；后突称为髁突（髁状突，processus condylaris），通过下颌头（下颌骨头，caput mandibulae）与颅骨关节连接，下颌头表面覆盖有软骨。

The head is continuous with the neck of the mandible *(collum mandibulae)* on whose inner surface is seen a pterygoid pit *(fovea pterygoidea)* which gives attachment to the lateral pterygoid muscle.

> 头与下颌骨的下颌颈（下颌骨颈）连续，下颌颈的内表面可见翼突窝（翼突窝），此窝为翼内肌的附着点。

## 19 THE HYOID BONE

> 19 下颌骨

The hyoid bone *(os hyoideum)* (Fig. 92) is situated below the tongue. It is shaped like a horse-shoe and can be felt through the skin in a lean person. It is attached to other bones by means of ligaments. The hyoid bone consists of a body *(corpus)* and greater and lesser horns *(cornua tnajora* et *minora).*

> 会厌骨（os hyoideum）（图92）位于舌头下方。其形状像马蹄，瘦人可通过皮肤触摸到。会厌骨通过韧带与其他骨骼相连。会厌骨由一个主体（corpus）和一对大角与小角（cornua majora et minora）组成。

The body is a convex plate and carries a transverse and a vertical crests. The superior border of the plate is sharp, the inferior border is thickened. The lateral borders of the body are joined to the greater horns by means of articular surfaces or fibrous or hyaline cartilage.

> 椎体呈凸起的板状结构，其上具有横嵴和纵嵴。板状结构的上缘锐利，下缘增厚。椎体的两侧缘通过关节面或纤维软骨或透明软骨与上关节突相连。

The greater horns project from the body to the back and laterally. They are thinner and longer than the body and arc slightly thickened on the ends.

> 肋骨的肋角从肋体向后方和外侧突出。它们比肋体更薄且更长，在末端略微增厚。

The lesser wings arise at the junction of the body and the greater wings. In some cases they remain cartilaginous. They are joined to the body either by means of a joint with a weakly tightened capsule or by means of connective tissue. Their ends are cmbraced by the stylohyoid ligament *(ligamentum stylohyoideum)* which sometimes contains one or more small bones.

> lesser wings（小翼）起源于体部与大翼交界处。在某些情况下，它们仍保持软骨状态。小翼与体部通过一个囊膜松弛的关节或通过结缔组织相连。其末端被舌骨茎突韧带（ligamentum stylohyoideum）包裹，该韧带有时包含一个或多个小骨。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_89_Picture_11.jpeg)

92. *Hyoid bone (os hyoideum);*  superior and outer aspect (%).

> 会厌骨（hyoid bone）；上外侧面（superior and outer aspect）。

## 20 THE SKULL AS A WHOLE

> 20 整体颅骨

The skull *(cranium)* (see Figs 48-53; 93-96) is separated into two large parts which arc continuous with one another. The upper part is the skull cap, or calvaria *(fornix cranii)y* the lower part is called the base *(basis).*

> 头骨（颅骨）（见图48-53；93-96）可分为两个主要部分，二者相互连续。上部称为颅盖，或称顶骨（fornix cranii），下部称为颅底（basis）。

The border separating these two large parts passes on a conventional line through the following structures: (1) external occipital protuberance; (2) superior nuchal line; (3) base of the mastoid process; (4) superior margin of the porus acusticus externus; (5) root of the zygomatic process of the temporal bone; (6) infratemporal crest of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone; (7) sphenozygomatic suture; (8) zygomatic process of the frontal bone; (9) supra-orbital margin, and (10) nasal margin of the frontal bone. Above this line drawn through (he structures named is the calvaria, below the line is the base of the skull.

> 分隔这两大部分的界线是一条常规线，穿过以下结构：(1) 外枕突；(2) 上项线；(3) 乳突基部；(4) 外耳道上缘；(5) 颞骨颧突根部；(6) 筛骨大翼的颞下嵴；(7) 筛骨颧缝；(8) 额骨颧突；(9) 眶上缘，以及(10) 额骨鼻缘。此线以上为颅盖，线以下为颅底。

![](_page_90_Picture_6.jpeg)

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_91_Picture_2.jpeg)

94. *Skull (cranium);* medial aspect (represented semischemati cally).

> 颅骨（颅腔）；内侧面（以半示意方式表示）。

![](_page_92_Picture_2.jpeg)

95. Skull (cranium); inferior aspect (2/3). (Lower surface of base of skull, basis cranii externa.)

> 颅骨（颅腔）；下部（2/3）。 （颅底下表面，颅底外侧）

![](_page_93_Picture_2.jpeg)

96. *Skull (cranium);* inferior aspect (semischematical representation).

> 颅骨（头骨）；下部（半示意性表现）。

## 21 THE SKULL CAP

> 21 头骨骨膜

On examining the convex (external) surface of the skull cap, or calvaria (Figs 97 and 98) one can easily see that it is formed of bones joined by means of sutures *(suturae).*

> 观察颅顶骨（颅盖）的凸面（外侧表面）（见图97和图98），可以清楚地看到其由通过骨缝（suturae）相连的骨块构成。

They articulate by means of connective tissue *(syndesmosis).*

> 它们通过结缔组织相接（骨连结）。

Sutures are one of the types of bone union. The bones contributing to the formation of the skull cap are joined by various types of sutures, some forming a serrated line, others an even line. A suture with a serrated line is called a serrated suture *(sutura serrata).*  One in which the bones unite to form an even line may be called cither a squamous suture *(sutura squamosa),* when the edges of one bone overlap the edge of the other bone (like the scales of fish), or a flat suture *(sutura plana)* when the edges of the united bones are even and in simple apposition.

> 骨缝是骨连接的一种类型。构成颅盖的各骨通过不同类型的骨缝相连，有些形成锯齿状的线，有些则形成平直的线。形成锯齿状线的骨缝称为锯齿状骨缝（sutura serrata）。当各骨连接形成平直线时，可根据具体情况称为鳞状骨缝（sutura squamosa），当其中一块骨的边缘覆盖另一块骨的边缘（如同鱼鳞一样），或称为平面骨缝（sutura plana），当连接的骨边缘平齐且呈简单贴合状态。

The sutures fanned between the bones are usually named after the articulating bones.

> 骨缝通常以参与关节的骨名称命名。

Some sutures of the calvaria are named according to direction or shape: the coronal suture *(sutura coronalis)* is the union between the frontal and parietal bones; the sagittal suture *(sutura sagittalis)*  is that between the parietal bones; the lambdoid suture *(sutura Uimbdoidea)* is the junction between the occipital and parietal bones.

> 头骨的一些缝合线根据方向或形状命名：冠状缝（sutura coronalis）是额骨与顶骨之间的连接；矢状缝（sutura sagittalis）是顶骨之间的连接；枕骨大孔缝（sutura lambdoidea）是枕骨与顶骨之间的连接。

On the lateral surface of the skull cap, below the inferior temporal line *(linea temporalis inferior)* is the temporal area which is continuous downwards with the temporal fossa *(fossa temporalis)*  bounded laterally by the zygomatic process of the temporal bone *(processus zygomaticus ossis temporalis).*

> 在颅顶骨的外侧面上，位于下颞线（linea temporalis inferior）下方的是颞区，该区向下与颞窝（fossa temporalis）相连续，颞窝的外侧由颞骨的颧突（processus zygomaticus ossis temporalis）所界。

![](_page_94_Picture_9.jpeg)

97. *Skull (cranium);* posterior aspect (%). (Without the mandible.)

> 头骨（颅骨）；后侧（%）。 （不包括下颌骨。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_95_Picture_2.jpeg)

98. *Skull cap* or *calvaria;* internal aspect (%)•

> 头骨顶骨或颅顶骨；内面 (%)

The anterior convexity of the calvaria is the forehead *(frons).*  The posterior part of the calvaria has three eminences: the two lateral ones are called parietal eminences *(tubera parietalia),* the posterior eminence is the occiput. Between these three eminences is the utmost upwardly projecting point of the roof, the top or crown of the skull *(vertex). %*

> 颅顶的前凸部分为额头（额部，frons）。颅顶的后部有三个隆起：两侧的称为顶骨隆起（parietal eminences，tubera parietalia），后方的隆起称为枕骨（occiput）。这三处隆起之间的最高点为颅顶最上方的突出点，称为颅顶或颅顶点（vertex）。

The cerebral surface of the skull cap bears grooves and ridges which reflect the relief of the brain and are its markings.

> 头骨顶骨的脑面具有沟和隆起，这些结构反映了脑的起伏形态，并作为其标志。

In addition, the cerebral surface of the calvaria carries the

> 此外，颅顶的脑面还承载着

markings of vessels and grooves of the venous sinuses. The largest groove stretches on the midline of the calvaria and is called the sagittal groove for the superior sagittal sinus *(sulcus sinus sagittalis superioris).* On the margins of the groove are seen small but deep granular pits *(foveolae granulares)* occupied by arachnoidal outgrowths. In addition to these pits, two or three nutrient foramina *(foramina nutricia)* are seen in the posterior parts of the sagittal groove, usually not in the groove itself but at some distance from its edges.

> 血管的痕迹和静脉窦的沟槽。最大的沟槽位于颅顶正中线，称为上矢状窦沟（sulcus sinus sagittalis superioris）。在沟槽边缘可见到一些小而深的颗粒状凹陷（foveolae granulares），这些凹陷内有蛛网膜突起。除了这些凹陷外，在上矢状窦沟的后部还可见到两个或三个营养孔（foramina nutricia），这些孔通常不位于沟槽本身，而是在其边缘一定距离处。

#### 21.1.1 T H E FONTANELLES

> 21.1.1 骨缝（囟门）

One of ihe specific features of the skull of a newborn are fontanelles *(fonticuli cranii)* (see Figs 3, 99 and 100). These are unossified areas of the membranous cranium *(desmocranium)* which are located in places of future sutures.

> 新生儿头骨的一个特有特征是囟门（fonticuli cranii）（见图3、99和100）。这些是膜性颅骨（desmocranium）中尚未骨化的区域，位于未来骨缝的位置。

It is general knowledge that the calvaria undergoes structural changes during intrauterine life, i.e. it is a membranous structure covering the top of the brain at first but is gradually replaced by bony tissue later without going through the stage of cartilage. This period is characterized by the appearance of bone nuclei (in the second or the beginning of the third intrauterine month) as islets in this or that bone. These islets merge later to form large bony plates which are the bony framework of the various bones of the calvaria.

> 众所周知，颅顶骨在胎儿期会发生结构上的变化，即最初它是一个覆盖在大脑顶部的膜性结构，但随后逐渐被骨组织取代，而并不经历软骨阶段。这一时期的特点是在胎儿期的第二个月或第三个月初出现骨核，这些骨核如同岛屿般分布在不同的骨组织中。随后这些骨核逐渐融合，形成较大的骨板，构成了颅顶骨各骨的骨性支架。

By the time of birth, however, areas of the membranous skull remain between the bones as narrow bands and wider spaces called fontanelles. Due to their elasticity they may retract or protrude depending on the intracranial pressure; hence their name (dim. of Fr. *fontaine* fountain). Six fontanelles are distinguished on the skull of a newborn; among them two are paired and two unpaired. The unpaired arc the anterior and posterior fontanelles, the paired —the • sphenoidal and mastoid fontanelles.

> 然而，到出生时，头骨的膜性部分仍以狭窄的带状结构或较宽的空间（称为囟门）存在于各骨之间。由于其具有弹性，它们会根据颅内压的变化而回缩或突出，因此得名（源自法语“fontaine”意为“喷泉”）。新生儿头骨上可区分出六个囟门；其中两个为成对的，两个为不成对的。不成对的为前囟和后囟，而成对的则为蝶骨囟和乳突囟。

The anterior fontanelle *(fonticulus anterior)* (Fig. 100) is usually

> 前囟（fonticulus anterior）（见图100）通常

diamond-shaped and located at the junction of the sagittal, coronal, and frontal sutures. It is normally ossified by the age of about two years.

> 菱形，位于矢状缝、冠状缝和额缝的交界处。通常在约两岁时已骨化。

The posterior fontanelle *(fonticulus posterior)* is triangular and is found at the junction of the sagittal and lambdoid sutures. It ossifies at the beginning of the first year of life.

> 后囟（后囟）呈三角形，位于矢状缝与人字缝交界处。其骨化通常始于生命的第一年之初。

The paired sphenoidal, or anterolatcral fontanelle *(fonticulus Sphenoidalis)* is situated on the anterolateral surface of the skull and is bounded anteriorly and superiorly by the frontal and parietal bones and inferiorly by the greater wing of the sphenoid bone and the squamous part of the temporal bone. It closes soon after birth, sometimes by the end of the intrauterine period.

> 成对的蝶骨大翼前外侧囟（蝶骨大翼前外侧囟，fonticulus Sphenoidalis）位于颅骨的前外侧表面，其前方和上方由额骨和顶骨构成，下方则由蝶骨大翼和颞骨鳞部构成。该囟通常在出生后不久即闭合，有时甚至在宫内期结束时就已经闭合。

The other paired fontanelle, the mastoid, or posterolateral fontanelle *(fonticulus mastoideus)y* is to the back of the sphenoidal one at the articulation of the occipital squama with the mastoid process of the temporal bone. It ossifies in the same period as the sphenoidal fontanelle.

> 另一个对称的囟门，即乳突囟门（或称后外侧囟门，fonticulus mastoideus），位于蝶骨囟门的后方，在枕骨鳞部与颞骨乳突之间的连接处。它在与蝶骨囟门相同的时期骨化。

The remnants of the membranous skull permit considerable displacement of the cranial bones during delivery of the infant, as a result of which passage of the head in the narrow parts of the birth canal is easier.

> 膜性颅骨的残余部分允许婴儿颅骨在分娩过程中发生较大的位移，因此头通过产道狭窄部位时更为容易。

## 22 THE BASE OF THE SKULL

> 22 颅底

The base of the skull *(basis cranii)* (Figs 95, 96, 99, 101, 102) is the part of the skull located below the horizontal line which passes in front at the level of the supraorbital margin *(margo supraorbitalis)* and at the back in the middle between the lambda and the external occipital protuberance *(protuberantia occipitalis externa).*

> 颅底（basis cranii）（图95、96、99、101、102）是颅骨位于水平线以下的部分，该水平线从前方向上经过眶上缘（margo supraorbitalis），并向后位于 lambda 点与外枕突（protuberantia occipitalis externa）之间的中点处。

The external and the internal base (surface) of the skull are distinguished.

> 颅骨的外侧基底（面）与内侧基底（面）相区分。

The external, or lower surface of the base of the skull *(basis cranii externa)* (Figs 95, 96) together with the bony palate is covered by the facial bones. Here, to the back of the bony palate, project the pterygoid processes *(processus pterigoidei)* whose medial plates together with the perpendicular plates of the palatine bones form the outer borders of the choanac which are divided by the vomer.

> 颅底的外侧或下方表面（basis cranii externa）（见图95、96）与骨性口 palate 一起被面骨覆盖。此处，骨性口 palate 的后方伸出蝶骨翼突（processus pterigoidei），其内板与腭骨的垂直板共同构成 choana 的外侧边界，这些边界被犁骨（vomer）分隔。

Between the pterygoid processes, lateral and to the back of them, the external surface of the base is formed by the body and greater wings of the sphenoid bone, the inferior surface of the petrous and tympanic parts and an area of the squamous part of the temporal bone, and by the basilar part of the occipital bone and anterior segment of its squama.

> 在翼突之间，其外侧及后方，基底部的外表面由蝶骨体和大翼构成，下表面则由岩部和鼓部以及颞骨鳞部的一部分组成，并由枕骨基底部及其鳞部的前段构成。

The scaphoid fossa *(fossa scaphoidea)* is at the base of the medial plate of the pterygoid process, to the back of which is the foramen lacerum which has irregular edges and is filled by cartilaginous tis- >IK i»n ,i mm-macerated skull. The foramen ovale and the foramen spinosum open in the regicyi of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone. Lateral of them is the articular fossa *(fossa mandibularis)* with an articular surface *(fades articularis)*a bounded anteriorly by the cminentia articularis *(tuberculum articulare).* The carotid canal *(cana-*

> 舟状窝（scaphoid fossa，fossa scaphoidea）位于翼突 medial 板的基部，其后方为破裂孔（foramen lacerum），该孔边缘不规则，并由软骨化骨质（cartilaginous tissue）填充。卵圆孔（foramen ovale）和棘孔（foramen spinosum）开口于蝶骨大翼的内侧部（regio greater wing）。它们的外侧为下颌关节窝（articular fossa，fossa mandibularis），其关节面（articular surface，facies articularis）前缘由关节结节（cminentia articularis，tuberculum articulare）界定。颈动脉管（carotid canal，canalis carotidus）位于...

*lis caroticus)* opens on the inferior surface of the petrous part of the temporal bone. Lateral and to the back of the canal is the jugular fossa *(fossa jugularis)* leading into the jugular foramen *(foramen jugularis)* which is formed from union of the jugular notches of the petrous part of the temporal bone and the condylar part of the occipital bone. Lateral of the jugular foramen is the styloid process *(processus styloideus)* and still further laterally the mastoid process *(processus mastoideus).* Between these two processes is the stylomastoid foramen *(foramen stylomastoideum).*

> 颈动脉管（canalis caroticus）开口于颞骨岩部的下表面。颈动脉管的外侧及后方为颈静脉窝（fossa jugularis），其通向颈静脉孔（foramen jugularis）。颈静脉孔是由颞骨岩部的颈静脉切迹与枕骨髁部的颈静脉切迹共同构成。颈静脉孔的外侧为茎突（processus styloideus），更外侧为乳突（processus mastoideus）。这两者之间为茎乳孔（foramen stylomastoideum）。

The body of the sphenoid bone articulates with the basilar part of the occipital bone by means of the sphcno-occipital joint *(synchondrosis spkenooccipitalis).* Another two synchondroses arc distinguished in the base of the skull. One is the sphenopetrous joint *(synckondrosis sphenopetrosa)* and the other the petro-occipital joint *(synchondrosis petrooceipitalis)* which on a macerated skull are represented, respectively, by the sphenopetrosal fissure *(fissura sphenopetrosa)* and the petro-occipital fissure *(fissura petrooceipitalis)*  (Fig. 102).

> 蝶骨体通过蝶枕关节（synchondrosis sphenooccipitalis）与枕骨基底部相接。在颅底还存在另外两个软骨连接。一个是蝶枕关节（synchondrosis sphenopetrosa），另一个是岩枕关节（synchondrosis petrooccipitalis）。在干尸头标本中，蝶枕关节分别表现为蝶枕裂（fissura sphenopetrosa），岩枕关节则表现为岩枕裂（fissura petrooccipitalis）（图102）。

To the back, in the centre of the base of the skull is the foramen magnum, to the front of which on the basilar part of the occipital bone is the pharyngeal tubercle *(tuberculum pharyngeum).*  The foramen is embraced on both sides by the occipital condyles *(condyli oecipitales).* Posteriorly, almost on the inidhne, stretches the external occipital crest *(crista occipitalis externa)* and reaches the external occipital protuberance *(protuberantia occipitalis externa).* The inferior and superior nuchal lines *(linea nuckae inferior* et *linea nuchae superior)* arise from the crest.

> 向后，在颅底的正中是枕骨大孔（foramen magnum），在其前方，枕骨基底部有咽突（tuberculum pharyngeum）。枕骨大孔两侧被枕骨髁（condyli occipitales）所环绕。在后方，几乎在枕外隆起处，延伸出枕外嵴（crista occipitalis externa），并向枕外隆起（protuberantia occipitalis externa）延伸。枕外嵴上、下颈线（linea nuchae inferior et linea nuchae superior）由此嵴发出。

![](_page_97_Figure_0.jpeg)

99. *Skull of a newborn;* from the right side (J/J).

> 新生儿颅骨；右侧视图（J/J）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_97_Picture_2.jpeg)

100. *Skull of a newborn;* superior aspect ('/).

> 新生儿颅骨；上方面（'）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_98_Picture_2.jpeg)

101. *Upper surface of base of skull (basis cranii interna);*  superior aspect (%).

> 颅底内面的上部（颅底内面）；上部（方面）[!note]- 术语说明
“superior aspect” 在解剖学中通常指结构的上部或上方区域，此处指颅底内面的上部区域。

The internal, or upper surface of the base of the skull *(basis cranii interna)* (Figs 101 and 102) is a concave irregular surface reflecting the pattern of the brain lodged on it. It has three depressions, called the anterior, middle, and posterior cranial fossae.

> 颅底的内侧或上表面（颅底内面）（图101和图102）是一个凹陷不规则的表面，反映了位于其上的脑组织的形态。其上有三个凹陷区，分别称为前颅窝、中颅窝和后颅窝。

The anterior cranial fossa *(fossa cranii anterior)* is the most shallow. Its floor is formed by the orbital plate *(pars orbitalis)* of the frontal bone, the lesser wings *(alae minores)* of the sphenoid bone, and the cribriform plate *(lamina cribrosa)* of the ethmoid bone. Posteriorly it is bounded by the edge of the lesser wings and the tuberculum sellae. The region of the cribriform plate is the deepest part. The crista galli projects here. In front of the crista galli is the foramen caecum *(foramen cecum).*

> 前颅窝（fossa cranii anterior）是最浅的。其底由额骨的眶板（pars orbitalis）、蝶骨的蝶骨小翼（alae minores）以及筛骨的筛板（lamina cribrosa）构成。其后界由蝶骨小翼的边缘和蝶骨体的蝶骨嵴（tuberculum sellae）构成。筛板区域是前颅窝最深的部分，此处有筛骨垂直板的鸡冠（crista galli）突出。鸡冠前方为嗅沟（foramen caecum）。

The middle cranial fossa *(fossa cranii media)* is the deepest in the lateral parts; in its central part projects the sella turcica which

> 中颅窝（fossa cranii media）在侧部最为深陷；其中央部分隆起为蝶骨体（sella turcica）[!note]- 术语说明
“sella turcica” 通常译作“蝶骨体”，是蝶骨中的一个窝状结构，容纳垂体。

bears the hypophyseal fossa *(fossa kypopkysialis)* in the centre. The edge of the lesser wings of the sphenoid bone limits the middle cranial fossa anteriorly, while the dorsum sellae and the superior border of the petrous part *(margo superior partis petrosae)* limit it posteriorly. The floor of the middle fossa is formed by the body *(corpus)* and the greater wings *(alae majores)* of the sphenoid bone, the anterior surfaces of the petrous part *(fades anteriores partis petrosae)* and the cerebral surface *(fades cerebralis)* of the squamous part of the temporal bone. The carotid grooves *(suld carotid)* are located on the floor of the fossae to both sides of the base of the sella turcica; each groove runs backwards, downwards, and laterally to the apex of the petrous part and leads into the carotid canal *(canalis caroticus).* Trie following structures open into the lateral parts of the middle cranial fossa: optic foramen *(canalis opticus),* superior orbi-

> 中央有蝶窦窝（fossa hypophysealis）。蝶骨小翼的边缘在前方向限制了中颅窝，蝶骨体的蝶鞍嵴（dorsum sellae）和岩部上缘（margo superior partis petrosae）则在后方向限制中颅窝。中颅窝的底由蝶骨体（corpus）、蝶骨大翼（alae majores）、岩部前表面（facies anteriores partis petrosae）以及颞骨鳞部的脑面（facies cerebralis）构成。颈动脉沟（sulcus carotidus）位于蝶鞍底部两侧的颅窝底部；每条沟向后、向下和向外延伸至岩部尖端，并进入颈动脉管（canalis caroticus）。以下结构开口于中颅窝的外侧部分：视神经孔（canalis opticus）、眶上孔（foramen superior orbis）/

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_99_Picture_2.jpeg)

102. *Upper surface of base of skull (basis cranii interna);*  superior aspect (semischematical representation).

> 颅底内面（basis cranii interna）；上部（半解剖图示）。

(al fissure *(fissura orbitalis superior),* foramen lacerum, foramen roiundum, foramen ovale, and foramen spinosum. The anterior surface of the petrous part bears the trigcminal impression *(imprcssio trigemina),* legmen tympani, arcuate eminence *(eminentia arcuata),*  and the grooves for the greater and lesser petrosal nerves.

> (上颌裂（fissura orbitalis superior）、裂孔（foramen lacerum）、圆孔（foramen rotundum）、卵圆孔（foramen ovale）以及棘孔（foramen spinosum）。岩部的前表面有三叉神经压迹（impressio trigemina）、鼓膜神经（legmen tympani）、弓状隆起（eminentia arcuata）以及大岩神经沟和小岩神经沟。)

The posterior cranial fossa *(fossa cranii posterior)* is limited anteriorly by the dorsum sellae and superior border of the petrous part; the posterior border of the fossa passes along the groove for the transverse sinus *(sulcus sinus transversus)* and the internal occipital protuberance *(protuberantia occipitalis interna).* The posterior cranial fossa is the deepest and its floor is formed by almost the whole of the occipital bone {except for the upper part of the squama), by part of the body of the sphenoid bone {a small area to the back of (he dorsum sellae), posterior surface of the petrous part, and the occipital angle of the parietal bone. In the centre of the fossa is the foramen magnum in front of which is the clivus formed by the body of the sphenoid bone and the basilar part of the occipital bone. The anterior condylar canal *(canalis kypoglossi)* opens at tlic lateral semicircumfercnce of the foramen magnum. The posterior condylar canal *(canalis condylaris)* lying lateral of the anterior condylar canal and to the back of the jugular foramen *(foramen jugularis)* is found occasionally. The internal occipital crest *(crista occipitalis interna)* ascends on the midline from the posterior border of the foramen magnum to the internal occipital protuberance. A little above the crest, on both sides of the eminentia cruciata *(eminentia cruciformis)* arise grooves for the transverse sinus *(sulci sinus transversi)* and are continuous with the sigmoid groove *(sulcus sinus sigmoidei)* which terminates at the jugular foramen.

> 后颅窝（后颅窝，fossa cranii posterior）前方由蝶骨体的蝶鞍嵴（dorsum sellae）和岩部上缘所界定；后颅窝的后缘沿横窦沟（sulcus sinus transversus）和内 occipital 峙（protuberantia occipitalis interna）延伸。后颅窝是最深的颅窝，其底由几乎整个枕骨（除鳞部上部外）构成，还包括蝶骨体的一部分（蝶鞍嵴后方的小区域）、岩部的后表面以及顶骨的枕角。在颅窝中心是枕骨大孔（foramen magnum），其前方是由蝶骨体和枕骨基底部形成的斜坡（clivus）。前枕骨大孔管（canalis condylaris anterior，即舌下管）开口于枕骨大孔的侧半周。后枕骨大孔管（canalis condylaris posterior）位于前枕骨大孔管的外侧，并位于颈静脉孔（foramen jugularis）的后方，偶尔可见。内枕骨嵴（crista occipitalis interna）沿中线从枕骨大孔的后缘延伸至内 occipital 峙。在嵴的上方，位于十字隆起（eminentia cruciata，即十字形隆起）两侧，有横窦沟（sulci sinus transversi），这些沟与 sigmoid 沟（sulcus sinus sigmoidei）相连，最终终止于颈静脉孔。

#### 22.1.1 T H E CAVITY OF THE NOSE

> 22.1.1 鼻腔 /no_think

The cavity of the nose *(cavum nasi)* (see Figs 93, 94, 103-107) is located in the middle of the superior part of the visceral cranium. Its elements are the nasal cavity proper and the paranasal sinuses situated superiorly, laterally, and to the back of it. The frontal sinuses *(sinus jrontaUs)* are above and in front of the cavity, (he ethinoidal cells *(cdiulae ethmoidales),* or the ethmoidal labyrinths *(labyrintki ethmoidales).* **are** situated on each side of the cavity, the maxillary sinuses *(sinus maxillares)* are slightly below, and the sphenoidal sinuses *(sinus sphenoidahs)* are situated to the back and above.

> 鼻腔（cavum nasi）（见图93、94、103-107）位于颅腔前部的中部。其结构包括鼻腔本身以及位于其上方、外侧和后方的鼻旁窦。额窦（sinus frontales）位于鼻腔的上方和前方，筛窦（sinus ethmoidales）或称筛窦迷路（labyrinthus ethmoidales）位于鼻腔的两侧，上颌窦（sinus maxillares）位于稍下方，蝶窦（sinus sphenoidales）则位于鼻腔的后方和上方。

The cavity of the nose is divided by the osseous nasal septum *(septum nasi osseum)* into the right and left halves. The paranasal sinuses and the cells of the ethmoidal labyrinth open into each half. The cavity of the nose is located in the sagittal plane and its anterior opening is called the anterior (or piriform) bony aperture of the nose *(apertura piriformis),* the posterior openings arc called the posterior apertures of the nose *(choanae).*

> 鼻腔被骨性鼻中隔（septum nasi osseum）分为左右两半。筛骨迷路的气房和鼻旁窦均开口于每一半鼻腔中。鼻腔位于矢状面上，其前部开口称为鼻前孔（或称梨状孔）（apertura piriformis），后部开口则称为鼻后孔（choanae）。

The piriform aperture *(apertura piriformis)* (see Figs 48 and 49) is bounded above by the free borders of the nasal bones, laterally by the nasal notches *(incisurae nasales)* of the maxillae, and inferiorly by the anterior nasal spine *(spina nasalis anterior).*

> 梨状孔（apertura piriformis）（见图48和图49）上方由鼻骨的游离缘构成，外侧由上颌骨的鼻切迹（incisurae nasales）构成，下方则由前鼻棘（spina nasalis anterior）构成。

The choanae are openings almost oval in shape which are separated by the posterior border of the vomer. They are formed below by the posterior border of the horizontal plates of the palatine bones, on both sides by the medial plates of the pterygoid processes of the sphenoid bone, and above by the body of this bone, the wings of the vomer, and the vaginal processes of the pterygoid processes of the sphenoid bone.

> 鼻中隔孔为近似椭圆形的开口，由犁骨的后缘分隔。其下方由腭骨水平板的后缘形成，两侧由蝶骨翼突的内板构成，上方则由蝶骨体、犁骨翼及蝶骨翼突的阴道突组成。

The osseous nasal septum *(septum nasi osseum)* (see Figs 93 and 94) is situated in the cavity of the nose and is usually curved to the right or left side. It is formed by the perpendicular plate of the ethmoid bone above and by the vomer below and at the back; the inferior border of the vomer unites with the nasal crests of the maxillae and palatine bones.

> 骨性鼻中隔（septum nasi osseum）（见图93和图94）位于鼻腔内，通常向右或向左弯曲。其上部由筛骨垂直板构成，下部及后部由犁骨构成；犁骨的下缘与上颌骨及腭骨的鼻突相连接。

![](_page_100_Picture_8.jpeg)

103. *Right lateral wall of skeleton of the cavity of the nose (cavum nasi) Q/\).*  (Sagittal section made to the right of osseous nasal septum.)

> 鼻腔（cavum nasi）骨性腔室的右侧侧壁（Q/\）。 （在骨性鼻中隔右侧所作的矢状断面。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_101_Picture_2.jpeg)

104. *Right lateral wall of skeleton of the cavity of the nose* (J/J).

> 鼻腔腔体骨架右侧侧壁（J/J）

(Sagittal section made to the right of osseous nasal septum. The superior, middle, and inferior nasal conchae are partly removed.)

> （在骨性鼻中隔右侧所作的矢状断面。上鼻甲、中鼻甲和下鼻甲部分被移除。）

The inferior wall of the nasal cavity is formed by the bony palate *(palatum osseum)* (see Fig. 107).

> 鼻腔的下壁由骨性腭（palatum osseum）构成（见图107）。

The superior wall (or roof) of the cavity of the nose is formed by the inner surface of the bones of the nose, the nasal parts of the frontal bones, and the cribriform plate of the ethmoid bone through which the cavity communicates with the anterior cranial fossa *(fossa cranii anterior).* The anterior surface of the body of the sphenoid bone forms the posterior part of the superior wall.

> 鼻腔的上壁（或称顶壁）由鼻骨的内表面、额骨的鼻部以及筛骨的筛孔板构成，通过筛孔板，鼻腔与前颅窝（前颅窝）相通。蝶骨体的前表面形成上壁的后部。

The lateral wall is formed by me Surfaces of the frontal process and body of the maxilla facing the cavity of the nose, the lacrimal bone, by the labyrinth of the ethmoid bone with its uncinate process, the perpendicular plate of the palatine bone, and the medial plate of the pterygoid process of the sphenoid bone. Three nasal conchae extend from the lateral wall towards the nasal septum: the superior nasal concha *(concha nasalis superior),* the middle nasal concha *(concha nasalis media)* and the inferior nasal concha *(concha nasalis inferior).* Three longitudinal passages form between the conchae and the lateral wall of the nasal cavity (Figs 103 and 104). These are the superior meatus of the nose located under the superior concha, the middle meatus of the nose under the middle concha, and the inferior meatus of the nose under the inferior concha.

> 侧壁由以下结构形成：额突和上颌体面向鼻腔的表面、泪骨、筛骨迷路及其钩突、腭骨垂直板，以及蝶骨翼突的内板。三条鼻甲从侧壁向鼻中隔延伸：上鼻甲（上鼻甲，concha nasalis superior）、中鼻甲（中鼻甲，concha nasalis media）和下鼻甲（下鼻甲，concha nasalis inferior）。三条纵向通道在鼻甲与鼻腔侧壁之间形成（图103和图104）。这些通道分别位于上鼻甲下方的上鼻道、中鼻甲下方的中鼻道，以及下鼻甲下方的下鼻道。

The superior meatus of the nose *(meatus nasi superior)* is shorter and narrower than the other two and occupies only the posterior parts of the nasal cavity. It is inclined slightly to the back and downwards and its posterior end reaches the sphenopalatine foramen *(foramen sphcnopalaiinum).* The posterior ethmoidal cells *(cellulae ethmoidaUs posteriores)* open into the anterior part of the superior meatus. Above the superior nasal concha is the sphenoethmoidal recess *(recessus sphenoethmoidalis)* in the region of which the sphenoidal sinus *(sinus sphenoidalis)* opens.

> 鼻腔的上鼻道（meatus nasi superior）较其他两个鼻道短而窄，仅占据鼻腔的后部。它略微向后下方倾斜，其后端到达蝶腭孔（foramen sphenopalatinum）。后筛窦气房（cellulae ethmoidales posteriores）开口于上鼻道的前部。上鼻甲上方为筛蝶隐窝（recessus sphenoethmoidalis），该区域为筛窦（sinus sphenoidalis）的开口处。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_102_Picture_2.jpeg)

105. Skeleton of the cavity of the nose and orbits; posterior aspect  $(\frac{2}{3})$ .

> 鼻腔及眶腔骨架；后侧视图

(Frontal section through base of temporal processes of zygomatic bones.)

> （经颧骨颞突基底部的矢状断层）

The middle meatus of the nose (meatus nasi medius) runs parallel to the superior meatus on the whole, but is much longer and wider. The maxillary sinus (sinus maxillaris) opens into it. On an intact skull the opening of the sinus is markedly narrowed by the neighbouring bones, namely, by the perpendicular plate of the palatine bone posteriorly, and by the maxillary and ethmoidal processes of the inferior nasal concha and the uncinate process of the ethmoid bone inferiorly.

> 鼻中隔的中鼻道（中鼻甲）整体上与上鼻道平行，但明显更长且更宽。上颌窦（上颌窦）开口于此。在完整的头骨中，窦口被邻近的骨骼显著地狭窄化，具体包括：后方为腭骨的垂直板，下方则为下鼻甲的上颌突和筛突，以及筛骨的嗅裂突。

The uncinate process (processus uncinatus) descending slightly to the back divides the opening of the maxillary sinus into an anteroinferior part and a posterosuperior part. The posterosuperior part is located between the large ethmoidal bulla (bulla ethmoidalis) and the uncinate process. The opening into the maxillary cavity is seen on a non-macerated skull; it is called the hiatus semilunaris. The superior, wider, part of the hiatus is called the infundibulum of the ethmoid (infundibulum ethmoidale). The middle nasal meatus communicates with the openings of the anterior ethmoidal cells by means of the hiatus and superiorly through the aperture of the frontal sinus (apertura sinus frontalis), with the frontal sinus (sinus frontalis).

> 钩突（processus uncinatus）略微向后下方延伸，将上颌窦的开口分为前下方部分和后上方部分。后上方部分位于大筛泡（bulla ethmoidalis）与钩突之间。在未钙化（non-macerated）的颅骨上，可以看到进入上颌窦腔的开口，称为半月裂孔（hiatus semilunaris）。半月裂孔的上方较宽部分称为筛板漏斗（infundibulum ethmoidale）。中鼻道与前筛窦孔通过半月裂孔以及上方的额窦开口（apertura sinus frontalis）与额窦（sinus frontalis）相通。

The inferior meatus of the nose (meatus nasi inferior) is the longest and widest. Near its anterior end is the inferior opening of the nasolacrimal canal (canalis nasolacrimalis) (Fig. 104). The inferior nasal concha is the superior wall of the inferior meatus, while the inferior wall is formed by the palatine process of the maxilla and the horizontal plate of the palatine bone. The space on both sides of the nasal septum, between it and the conchae, is a narrow slit called the common meatus of the nose. To the back of the conchae it is continuous with a very short posterior naris (meatus nasopharyngeus) opening by means of the choanae into the pharynx.

> 鼻的下鼻道（meatus nasi inferior）是最长且最宽的。在其前端附近是鼻泪管的下口（canalis nasolacrimalis）（见图104）。下鼻甲是下鼻道的上壁，而下壁则由上颌骨的腭突和腭骨的水平板构成。鼻中隔两侧的间隙，位于鼻中隔与鼻甲之间，是一个狭窄的缝隙，称为鼻的共同鼻道。在鼻甲的后方，该共同鼻道与一个非常短的后鼻孔（meatus nasopharyngeus）相连，通过鼻咽孔（choanae）开口进入咽部。

![](_page_103_Figure_2.jpeg)

**106.** *Skeleton of the cavity of the nose and orbits;*  **inferior** aspect (%).

> 鼻腔及眼眶的骨架；下壁（%）。

(Horizontal section through median parts of orbital openings.)

> （水平断层通过眼眶中份）

![](_page_103_Figure_5.jpeg)

## 23 **107.** *Skeleton of the cavity of the nose;* **superior** aspect (\*/).

> 23 107. 鼻腔骨性结构；上部（*\/）。

(Inferior wall of nasal cavity. Horizontal section through zygomatic processes of maxillae.)

> （鼻腔下壁。上颌骨颧突水平断面。）

106 T H E ORBIT

> 106 眼眶

#### 23.1.1 T H E BONY PALATE

> 23.1.1 骨性腭

The bony palate *(palatum osseum)* (Fig. 108) is the floor of the cavity of the nose *(cavum nasi)* and the roof of the cavity of the mouth *(caoum oris).*

> 骨性腭（palatum osseum）（图108）是鼻腔（cavum nasi）的底壁，也是口腔腔（cavum oris）的顶壁。

The anterior two thirds of the skeleton of the bony palate are formed by the palatine processes of the maxilla, the posterior part by the horizontal plates of the palatine bones and their pyramidal processes.

> 骨性腭的前三分之二由上颌骨的腭突形成，后三分之一则由腭骨的水平板及其锥形突构成。

Anteriorly and laterally the bony palate is bounded by the alveolar processes of the maxilla. The median palatine suture *(sutura palatina mediana)* stretches from front to back (sagittally) on the midline of the palate. It forms from the union of both palatine processes of the maxilla and of both horizontal plates of the palatine bone. The posterior parts of this suture are crossed frontally by the transverse palatine suture *(sutura palatina transversa)* formed from union of the palatine processes of the maxilla with the horizontal plates of the palatine bones. On the anterior end of the me-

> 在前方和外侧，骨性腭由上颌骨的牙槽突所界定。中隔腭缝（中隔腭缝）从前方延伸至后方（矢状方向），位于腭的中线上。它由上颌骨两侧的腭突以及腭骨两侧的水平板融合形成。此缝的后部被横腭缝（横腭缝）所横跨，该横腭缝由上颌骨的腭突与腭骨的水平板融合形成。在中隔腭缝的前端，即腭的前部，...

dian palatine suture to the back of the incisor alveoli are the incisive foramina *(foramina incisiva)* transmitting nerves and vessels and leading into the incisive canals *(canales indsioi).* Each incisive canal has two openings on the superior (nasal) surface of the hard palate which are located to both sides of the nasal crest *(crista nasalis).* To each side of the incisive foramen the skull of a child, and sometimes that of an adult, carries a poorly defined incisive suture *(sutura incisiva)* (Fig. 108) which forms from articulation of the inconstantly found incisive bone *(os incisivum)* with the palatine process of the maxilla. In the posterolateral parts of the bony palate, on each side, is a greater palatine foramen *(foramen palatinum majus)* to the back of which lies one or two lesser palatine foramina *(foramina palatina minora).* Two palatine grooves *(sulci palatini)* are located on each side of the bone palate in front of the greater palatine foramen; these are markings of vessels and nerves.

> 腭中缝至切牙牙槽窝后方的区域为切牙孔（incisive foramina，foramina incisiva），这些孔道内有神经和血管通过，并延伸进入切牙管（incisive canals，canales incisivi）。每个切牙管在其硬腭的上（鼻侧）表面有两个开口，位于鼻嵴（crista nasalis）的两侧。在每个切牙孔的两侧，儿童的颅骨（有时成人颅骨也存在），携带有不明确的切牙缝（incisive suture，sutura incisiva）（图108），该缝由不常存在的切牙骨（os incisivum）与上颌骨的腭突相接形成。

在骨性腭的后外侧部分，每侧有一个较大的腭大孔（foramen palatinum majus），其后方则为一个或两个较小的腭小孔（foramina palatina minora）。在每个较大的腭大孔前方，骨性腭的两侧各有一个腭沟（sulcus palatinus），这些沟为血管和神经的标记。[!note]- 腭沟的术语说明  
“palatine grooves” 通常译作“腭沟”，是腭部重要的解剖标志，常用于临床诊断和手术定位。

#### 23.1.2 'I I IK ORBIT

> 23.1.2 眼眶

The eye socket, or orbit *(orbita)* (Figs 48, 49, and 109) is a cavity whose four sides form an irregular pyramid. It lodges the eyeball with its muscles, vessels and nerves, as well as the lacrimal gland and fatty tissue. It opens in front by a large orbital opening *(aditus orbitae)* which forms the base of the pyramid as it were. The orbital cavity becomes slightly wider immediately at the aditus, but gradually narrows to the back. The longitudinal axes of both orbits, drawn from the middle of the aditus to the middle of the optic canal, meet in the region of the sella turcica. The orbit borders upon the lateral wall of the nasal cavity medially, the corresponding part of the anterior cranial fossa superiorly, the temporal fossa laterally, and the superior wall of the maxillary sinus inferiorly.

> 眼眶（orbita），又称眼窝（Figs 48、49 和 109），是一个呈不规则四棱锥形的腔隙。其四壁共同构成该锥体。眼眶内容纳眼球及其肌肉、血管和神经，以及泪腺和脂肪组织。眼眶前方通过一个较大的眶口（aditus orbitae）开口，该开口相当于锥体的底面。眶腔在眶口处略微扩大，但向后逐渐变窄。两侧眼眶的纵轴自眶口中部延伸至视神经管中部，二者在蝶骨体区域相交。眼眶内侧与鼻腔的侧壁相邻，上方与前颅窝的相应部分相邻，外侧与颞窝相邻，下方则与上颌窦的上壁相邻。

The orbital opening has a quadrangular contour with rounded angles. The superior border is bounded by the supraorbital margin *(margo supraorbitalis)* and zygomatic process of the frontal bone. On the medial side the aditus is limited by the nasal part of the frontal bone and the frontal process of the maxilla. The inferior border is formed by the infraorbital margin *(margo infraorbitalis)* of the maxilla and the adjoining part of the zygomatic bone.

> 眼眶开口呈四边形，角部圆钝。上缘由额骨的眶上缘（margo supraorbitalis）和颧骨的颧突构成。内侧由额骨的鼻部及上颌骨的额突构成。下缘由上颌骨的眶下缘（margo infraorbitalis）及相邻的颧骨部分构成。

The lateral border of the aditus is formed by the zygomatic bone. All the orbital walls are smooth. Th e **superior wall,** or roof *(paries superior orbitae)* is formed by the orbital part of the frontal bone and, at the back, by the lesser wings of the sphenoid bone. Between these two bones stretches the sphcnofrontal suture *(sutura spkenofrontalis).* The optic canal *(canalis opticus)* transmitting the optic nerve and ophthalmic artery is located at the root of each lesser wing. At the anterior border of the superior wall, closer lo the lateral angle, is the fossa for the lacrimal gland *(fossa glandulae lacrimalis)* and in front of and medially to the border are the trochlear fossa *(fovea trochlearis)* and the trochlear spine *(spina trochlearis).*

> 腺样窝的外侧边界由颧骨形成。所有眼眶壁表面光滑。上壁（眼眶顶壁，paries superior orbitae）由额骨的眼眶部构成，在其后方则由蝶骨小翼构成。这两块骨之间为筛眶缝（sutura sphenofrontalis）。视神经和眼动脉通过的视神经孔（canalis opticus）位于每个蝶骨小翼的根部。在上壁的前缘，靠近外侧角处为泪腺窝（fossa glandulae lacrimalis），在该边界前方且内侧为滑车窝（fovea trochlearis）和滑车嵴（spina trochlearis）。

The lateral wall of the orbit *(paries lateralis orbitae)* is formed

> 眶的外侧壁（orbital paries lateralis）由以下结构构成：

posteriorly by the orbital surface of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone and anteriorly by the orbital surface of the zygomatic bone. The sphenozygomatic suture *(sutura spheno^ygomatica)* passes between these bones. The roof is separated from the lateral wall by the superior orbital fissure *(fissura orbitalis superior)* which is between the greater and lesser wings of the sphenoid bone. The orbital surface of the zygomatic bone carries the zygomatico-orbital foramen *(foramen zygomatieoorbitale).*

> 由蝶骨大翼的眶面 posteriorly，由颧骨的眶面 anteriorly。蝶颧缝（sutura sphenozygomatica）位于这两块骨之间。眶顶与眶外侧壁之间由眶上裂（fissura orbitalis superior）分隔，该裂位于蝶骨大翼与小翼之间。颧骨的眶面承载颧眶孔（foramen zygomaticoorbitale）。

The inferior wall, or floor of the orbit *(paries inferior orbitae)* is formed for the most part by the orbital surface of the maxilla. The lateral part of the orbital surface of the zygomatic bone and, posteriorly, the orbital process of the palatine bone also contribute to the formation of the floor of the orbit. Between the inferior border of the orbital surface of the greater wing and the posterior border of the orbital surface of the maxilla is the inferior orbital fissure *(fissura orbitalis inferior)* whose anterior end reaches the zygomatic bone. Through this fissure the orbital cavity communicates with the pterygopalatine and infratemporal fossae. The infraorbital groove *(sulcus infraorbitalis)* arises on the lateral border of the inferior surface of the maxilla and is continuous with the infraorbital canal *(canalis infraorbitalis)* passing deep in the anterior parts of the inferior orbital wall.

> 眼眶的下壁（眶下壁，paries inferior orbitae）主要由上颌骨的眶面构成。颧骨的眶面的外侧部分以及后方的腭骨眶突也参与构成眶下壁。在上颌骨大翼的下缘与上颌骨眶面的后缘之间为眶下裂（眶下裂，fissura orbitalis inferior），其前缘延伸至颧骨。通过该裂孔，眶腔与翼腭窝及颞下窝相交通。眶下沟（眶下沟，sulcus infraorbitalis）起自上颌骨下表面的外侧缘，并与穿过眶下壁前部深处的眶下管（眶下管，canalis infraorbitalis）相连通。

The medial wall of the orbit *(paries medialis orbitae)* (Fig. 109) is formed (from front to back) by the lacrimal bone, the orbital plate of the ethmoid bone, and lateral surface of the body of the sphenoid bone. In the anterior part of the wall is the lacrimal groove *(sulcus lacrimalis)* which is continuous with the fossa of the lacrimal sac *(fossa sacci lacrimalis),* which in turn is continuous downwards with the nasolacrimal canal *(canalis nasolacrimalis).*

> 眼眶内侧壁（orbitae paries medialis）（图109）由前至后依次由泪骨、筛骨眶板以及蝶骨体的外侧表面构成。在内侧壁的前部有泪沟（sulcus lacrimalis），它与泪囊窝（fossa sacci lacrimalis）相连，而泪囊窝则向下与鼻泪管（canalis nasolacrimalis）相连。

The superior border of the medial wall of the orbit bears two openings: the anterior ethmoidal foramen *(foramen ttkmoidale ante-*

> 眶内侧壁的上缘有两个孔：前筛孔（foramen ethmoidale anterius）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_105_Picture_2.jpeg)

108. *Bony palate (palatum osseum);* inferior aspect

> 骨性腭（palatum osseum）；下部面

![](_page_105_Figure_4.jpeg)

109. *Right orbit (orbita) and pterygopalatine fossa (fossa pterygopalatina)* (%),

> 右侧眶（眶）和翼腭窝（翼腭窝）（%）

(Medial **wall** of right orbit. Th e **lateral** wall of maxillary sinus is removed by vertical section.)

> （右眼眶内侧壁。通过垂直切开法已去除上颌窦的外侧壁。）

*rius)* which opens at the anterior end of the fronloethmoidal suture, and the posterior ethmoidal foramen *(foramen ethmoidale posterior)* found close to the posterior end of this suture. The optic canal *(canalis opticus)* is in the posterior angle of the medial wall; the cavity of the orbit communicates with the cavity of the skull by means of it.

> (前筛孔) 开口于前筛缝的前端，后筛孔(后筛孔)则位于该缝的后端附近。视神经孔(视神经管)位于内侧壁的后角；眼窝腔通过此孔与颅腔相通。

The walls of the orbit are covered by a fine periosteum which is called the periorbit *(periorbitaj.*

> 眼眶的壁被一层细薄的骨膜覆盖，这种骨膜被称为眶周骨膜（periorbita）。

#### 23.1.3 T H E TEMPORAL FOSSA

> 23.1.3 颞窝

The temporal fossa *(fossa temporalis)* (see Figs 50, 51, and 110) is situated on each side on the outer lateral surface of the skull. Superiorly and posteriorly it is separated from the other areas of the calvaria by the superior temporal line *(tinea temporalis superior)* of the parietal and frontal bones, which is in essence a conventional boundary line. The medial wall of the temporal fossa is formed by the inferior part of the external surface of the parietal bone in the region of the sphcnoidal angle, the temporal surface of the squamous part of the temporal bone, and the external surface of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone. The anterior wall is formed by the zygomatic bone and part of the frontal bone posterior to the superior temporal line. Laterally the fossa is bounded by the zygomatic arch.

> 颞窝（fossa temporalis）（见图50、51和110）位于颅骨外侧面上的两侧。其上方和后方由顶骨和额骨的上颞线（tinea temporalis superior）与颅顶的其他区域分隔，该线本质上是一条人为划定的常规边界线。颞窝的内侧壁由顶骨外侧面的蝶骨嵴区的下部、颞骨鳞部的颞面，以及蝶骨大翼的外侧面构成。前壁由颧骨和位于上颞线后方的额骨部分构成。颞窝的外侧由颧弓所界定。

The inferior margin of the temporal fossa is bounded by the infratemporal crest *(erista infratemporalis)* of the sphenoid bone.

> 颞窝的下缘由蝶骨的翼突上颌突（erista infratemporalis）构成。[!note]- 术语说明 “infratemporal crest” 通常译作“翼突上颌突”，是蝶骨上的一个骨性突起，位于颞窝的下缘。

The zygomaticotemporal foramen *(foramen ^ygomaticotemporale)*  opens on the anterior wall of the temporal fossa. The fossa is occupied by the temporal muscle, fascia, fat, vessels, and nerves.

> 颧颞孔（foramen zygomaticotemporale）开口于颞窝的前壁。颞窝内有颞肌、筋膜、脂肪、血管和神经。

983490 Int ■ Sinelnikow Bd. I (span.). - rh. 7/7p, Tn/4, Z/ 7 - Bild 110,

> 983490 Int ■ Sinelnikow Bd. I (span.). - rh. 7/7p, Tn/4, Z/ 7 - 图片 110

![](_page_106_Figure_11.jpeg)

110. *Right temporal fossa (fossa temporalis), infratemporal fossa (fossa infratemporalis), and pterygopalatine fossa (fossa pterygopalatina)* (%).

> 右侧颞窝（fossa temporalis）、颞下窝（fossa infratemporalis）和蝶腭窝（fossa pterygopalatina）（%）

(The zygomatic arch is removed.)

> （颧弓被切除。）

## 24 T HE INFRATEMPORAL FOSSA

> 24 颧下窝

The infratemporal fossa *(fossa injratemporalis)* (Fig. 110) is shorter and narrower than the temporal Fossa but its transverse dimension is larger. Its superior wall is Formed by part of the greater wing oF the sphenoid bone medial to the inFratemporal crest.

> 下颌下窝（infratemporal fossa）（图110）比颞窝短而窄，但其横径更大。其上壁由蝶骨大翼的颞下嵴内侧部分构成。

The anterior wall is formed by the posterior part of the maxillary tuberosity. The lateral plate of the pterygoid process of the sphenoid bone is the medial wall of the infratemporal fossa. Externally and downwards the fossa has no bony wall. Laterally it is limited by the ramus of the mandible. At the junction of the anterior and medial walls the infratemporal fossa becomes deeper and is continuous with a funnel-like slil known as the pterygopalatine fossa *(fossa pterygopalatina).*

> 前壁由上颌 tuberosity 的后部形成。蝶骨翼突的外侧板是翼腭窝的内侧壁。翼腭窝向外下方无骨性壁。其外侧由下颌骨的支构成。在前壁与内侧壁的交界处，翼腭窝加深并与一个呈漏斗状的腔隙——翼腭窝（pterygopalatine fossa，fossa pterygopalatina）相连。

Anteriorly the infratemporal fossa communicates with the cavity of the orbit through the inferior orbital fissure. The fossa contains the lower portion of-the temporal muscle, the lateral pterygoid muscle, some vessels and nerves.

> 在前方，颞下窝通过下颌骨眶裂与眶腔相通。该窝内包含颞肌的下部、翼外肌、一些血管和神经。

## 25 T H E PTERYGOPALATINE FOSSA

> 25 腭突窝

The pterygopalatine fossa *(fossa pterygopalatina)* (sec Figs 109 and 110) is formed by parts of the maxilla, the sphenoid and palatine bones. It is connected with the infratemporal fossa through the pterygomaxillary fissure *(fissura pterygomaxiUaris)* which is wide upwards and narrow downwards. The pterygopalatine fossa is bounded anteriorly by the infratemporal surface of the maxilla (or, to be more precise, the maxillary tuberosity), posteriorly by the pterygoid process of the sphenoid bone, medially by the lateral surface of the perpendicular plate of the palatine bone, and superiorly by the maxillary surface of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone.

> 翼腭窝（fossa pterygopalatina）（见图109和110）由上颌骨、蝶骨和腭骨的部分构成。它通过翼腭裂（fissura pterygomaxillaris）与颞下窝相连，该裂孔向上较宽，向下变窄。翼腭窝前方由上颌骨的颞下表面（或更准确地说，上颌骨的颧突）构成，后方由蝶骨翼突构成，内侧由腭骨垂直板的外侧面构成，上方由蝶骨大翼的上颌面构成。

In its upper part the pterygopalatine Fossa communicates in Front with the orbit through the inferior orbital fissure *(fissura orbitalis inferior),* medially with the cavity of the nose through the sphenopalatine foramen *(foramen spkenopalatinum),* to the back with the cranial cavity through the foramen rotundum and with the lower surface of the base of the skull through the pterygoid canal *(canalis pterygoideus).* The pterygopalatine fossa is continuous laterally with the infratemporal fossa.

> 在翼腭窝的上部，其前部通过下眶裂（fissura orbitalis inferior）与眶腔相交通，内侧通过筛骨筛板孔（foramen spenopalatinum）与鼻腔相通，后方通过圆孔（foramen rotundum）与颅腔相通，并通过翼管（canalis pterygoideus）与颅底下表面相连。翼腭窝在侧方与颞下窝连续。

On a non-macerated skull the sphenopalatine foramen *(foramen spkenopalatinum)* is closed by the mucous membrane of the nasal cavity; it transmits nerves and arteries into the cavity of the nose.

> 在未软化的颅骨上，蝶腭孔（foramen sphenopalatinum）被鼻腔的黏膜膜封闭；它将神经和动脉传导至鼻腔内。

In the lower part, the pterygopalatine fossa is continuous with a narrow canal the superior part of which is formed by the maxilla, the sphenoid and palatine bones, and the inferior part by only the inaxilla and the palatine bone. The canal is called the greater palatine canal *(canalis palatinus major)* and opens on the hard palate by means oF the greater palatine foramen and lesser palatine foramen *(foramen palatinum majus el foramina palatina minora);* it transmits nerves and vessels.

> 在下方，翼腭窝与一个狭窄的通道相连，该通道的上部由上颌骨、蝶骨和腭骨共同形成，下部则仅由上颌骨和腭骨构成。该通道称为腭大管（canalis palatinus major），通过腭大孔（foramen palatinum majus）和腭小孔（foramina palatinum minora）开口于硬腭，其内传递神经和血管。

# DEVELOPMENT AND AGE FEATURES OF THE BONES OF THE HEAD

> 头骨的发育与年龄特征

Two parts are distinguished in the skull, the cerebral and the facial, or visceral (extracerebral). The cerebral part consists of the skull cap (calvaria) and base which are formed by several bones. The bones of the calvaria develop in connective tissue and pass through two stages, the membranous and osseous (primary bones), by-passing the cartilaginous stage. The bones of the base also develop in connective tissue but go through three stages, the membranous, cartilaginous (secondary bones), and osseous. The development of the bones of the visceral skull is associated with the development of the branchial arches (first and second) which are the foundation of the facial part of the head. Some of the bones pass through three and the others through two (connective-tissue and osseous) developmental stages (see Figs 3, 99, 100, and 110a).

> 头骨可分为两部分：脑部（颅腔）和面部（内脏部，即非脑部）。脑部部分由颅盖（颅顶）和颅底组成，均由多块骨构成。颅盖的骨是在结缔组织中发育，并经历两个阶段：膜性阶段和骨性阶段（初生骨），跳过了软骨阶段。颅底的骨也在结缔组织中发育，但经历三个阶段：膜性阶段、软骨阶段（次生骨）和骨性阶段。内脏部头骨的发育与第一、第二鳃弓的发育有关，这些鳃弓是头部面部部分的基础。一些骨经历三个阶段（结缔组织和骨性阶段），另一些则经历两个阶段（结缔组织和骨性阶段）（见图3、99、100和110a）。

The occipital bone (except for the upper portion of the squamous part) is a secondary bone and has four enchondral ossification centres (points) which are all concentrated around the foramen magnum (one on each side, one in front and the other at the back). The upper portion of the squamous part is a primary bone and has two ossification points (one on each side of the median plane). Complete fusion of all parts occurs on the 4-6th year of life.

> 枕骨（除鳞部上部外）为次级骨，具有四个软骨内成骨中心（点），这些中心均集中于枕大孔周围（每侧一个，前方一个，后方一个）。枕骨鳞部上部为原发骨，具有两个成骨中心（中线两侧各一个）。所有部分完全融合发生在生命第4-6年。

The parietal bone is a primary bone. Its points of ossification appear in the region of the future parietal eminence in the end of the 10th intrauterine week. The bone tissue grows radially in relation to the eminence. The superior and inferior temporal Lines start forming by the age of 12-15 years.

> 顶骨是主要骨。其骨化中心出现在胚胎第10周末未来顶骨隆起的区域。骨组织以放射状方式向隆起生长。顶骨的上颞线和下颞线在12-15岁开始形成。

The frontal bone is a primary bone and develops from two points of ossification; each point appears in the region of the future supraorbital margin in the end of the 9th week of the intrauterine period. The frontal bone of the newborn consists of two halves whose fusion on the midplane begins in the 6th month after birth and is completed by the end of the 3rd year to form the frontal (metopic) suture which disappears by the age of 8 years. The frontal sinuses begin appearing in the first year of life.

> 额骨是主要的颅骨之一，来源于两个成骨中心；每个成骨中心出现在胎儿宫内发育第9周末的未来上颌骨缘区域。新生儿的额骨由两个半骨组成，其在中线处的融合始于出生后第6个月，并在3岁末完成，形成额缝（额部冠状缝），通常在8岁前消失。额窦在婴儿出生后第一年内开始出现。

The sphenoid is a secondary bone (except for the medial plate of the pterygoid process and the superolateral areas of the greater wings). It develops from enchondral nuclei which appear symmetrically in the following order: in the region of the lesser wings, in the region of the greater wings, and in the body of the botie below the hypophyseal fossa in the 3rd month of the intrauterine period; in the region of the carotid groove and the lingula in the beginning of the 4th intrauterine month; in the region of the anterior part of the body in the end of the 4th intrauterine month; two pairs of endcsmal nuclei give rise to the bone in the region of the medial plates of the pterygoid processes in the 3rd month and in the region of the superolateral areas of the greater wings in the end of the 3rd intrauterine month. The sphenoid bone ossifies completely in the 10th year of life. The sinuses begin developing at the age of 3 years.

> 蝶骨为次级骨（除翼突的内板和大翼的上外侧区外）。它由软骨内成骨核形成，这些核在以下顺序中对称出现：在第3个月的宫内期，出现在小翼区域、大翼区域以及垂体窝下方蝶骨体区域；在第4个月初的宫内期，出现在颈动脉沟和舌突区域；在第4个月末的宫内期，出现在蝶骨体前部区域；在第3个月时，两对软骨内成骨核形成翼突内板区域的骨组织；在第3个月末，形成大翼上外侧区的骨组织。蝶骨在10岁左右完全骨化。窦腔在3岁左右开始发育。

The temporal bone develops from the following points of ossification: cndcsmal centres of the squama appear in the beginning of the 3rd month, those of the tympanic cavity at the end of the 3rd month of the intrauterine period; enchondral points appear in the 5th month of the intrauterine period for the petrous part and at the end of the first year of life for the styloid process. The tympanic part as such is absent in the newborn and is represented by a ring whose ossification begins in the 3rd month of the intrauterine period (see Fig. 99). As to the mastoid air cells, these are formed completely by the age of 5-6 years. Complete ossification of the temporal bone occurs by the age of 6 years.

> 颞骨的发育来源于以下骨化中心：鳞部的骨化中心在胚胎第3个月初出现，鼓室的骨化中心则在胚胎第3个月末出现；岩部的软骨内成骨中心在胚胎第5个月出现，茎突的软骨内成骨中心则在出生后第一年末出现。鼓部本身在新生儿中并不存在，仅表现为一个环状结构，其骨化过程始于胚胎第3个月（见图99）。至于乳突气房，它们在5-6岁时完全形成。颞骨的完全骨化通常在6岁时完成。

The ethmoid is a secondary bone, it develops in cartilage and its ossification begins in several points. The points of ossification appear earliest for the middle nasal concha (4th month of the intrauterine development) and the superior nasal concha (5th intrauterine month). Two nuclei appear in the 9th month for the cribriform plate. The ossification nucleus of the orbital plate forms in the 6th month after birth and the plate ossifies rapidly. At the age of 2 years an ossification nucleus appears on each side for the future crista galli which forms from their fusion later. The perpendicular plate ossifies at the age of 6-8 years, and the ethmoid cells of the labyrinth are completely formed by the age of 12-14 years.

> 筛骨是次级骨，其发育起源于软骨，骨化过程始于多个部位。骨化中心最早出现在中鼻甲（胎儿发育第4个月）和上鼻甲（胎儿发育第5个月）。筛板的骨化中心在胎儿发育第9个月时出现两个。眶板的骨化中心在出生后第6个月形成，并迅速骨化。2岁时，两侧未来筛骨垂直板的骨化中心出现，以后通过融合形成筛骨垂直板。筛骨垂直板在6-8岁时骨化，筛骨迷路的筛窦腔在12-14岁时完全形成。

The inferior nasal concha is a secondary bone; it has a single

> 下鼻甲是次级骨；它具有一个单一的[!note]- 术语说明
“inferior nasal concha” 通常译作“下鼻甲”，是鼻腔内的一个骨性结构，属于鼻中隔的组成部分。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_109_Picture_2.jpeg)

110a. *Bones of skull (ossa cranii)* of a newborn.

> 110a. 新生儿头骨（头骨骨）

- 1—occipital bone (os occipiule), external surface
- 2— occipital bone (os occipitale), internal surface
- 3—sphenoid bone (os sphenoidale)
- 4 —temporal bone (os temporale)
- 5 maxilla
- 6-mandibl e (inandibula)

> 1—枕骨（os occipitale），外侧表面  
2—枕骨（os occipitale），内侧表面  
3—蝶骨（os sphenoidale）  
4—颞骨（os temporale）  
5—上颌骨（maxilla）  
6—下颌骨（mandibula）

ossification nucleus which appears al the beginning of the 3rd month of the intrauterine period.

> 形成核在宫内期第三个月初出现。

The lacrimal bone is a primary bone. It develops from a single point of ossification appearing on the 3rd intrauterine month.

> 泪骨是主要的骨。它起源于胚胎第3个月时出现在颅骨内的一个骨化中心。

The vomer is a primary bone developing from two endosteal centres of ossification appearing in the 2nd month of the intrauterine period. Each centre is situated parallel to the median plane. The right and left plates fuse later, while the cartilage of the nasal septum located between them resorbs after birth.

> 筛骨是起源于胚胎期第2个月出现的两个内骨痂中心的原始骨。每个中心均位于中线平面的平行位置。左右板随后融合，而位于二者之间的鼻中隔软骨在出生后被吸收。

The maxilla is a primary bone developing from five cndesmal centres of ossification, namely superolateral, inferolateral, anteromedian, posteromedian, and middle centre. The superolateral centre forms the medial part of the orbital floor. The inferolateral centre gives rise to the lateral part of the orbital floor, the zygomatic process, anterolateral part of the body, and the posterolateral wall of the alveolar process. The middle nucleus develops into the frontal process and part of the body below it. The posterior two thirds of the palatine process and the internal wall of the alveolar process corresponding to the canine tooth and molars arise from the posteromedian nucleus. The anteromedian ossification point gives origin to the incisal part of the bone, i.e. part of the alveolar process corresponding to the incisors, and the anterior third of the palatine process. In the 5th month the nuclei fuse but the incisive suture uniting the incisive bone with the other part of the maxilla persists in the newborn. The maxillary sinuses appear in the 6th month of the intrauterine period and develop fully by the age of 12-14 years.

> 上颌骨是由五个软骨中心形成的初级骨，分别为上外侧中心、下外侧中心、前中线中心、后中线中心和中间中心。上外侧中心形成眶底的内侧部分。下外侧中心发育为眶底的外侧部分、颧突、体部的前外侧部分以及牙槽突的后外侧壁。中间中心发育为鼻突和其下方的部分体部。腭突的后2/3以及对应尖牙和磨牙的牙槽突内侧壁来源于后中线中心。前中线中心则发育为骨的切牙部分，即对应切牙的牙槽突部分以及腭突的前1/3。在第5个月时，各个中心融合，但连接切牙骨与上颌其余部分的切牙缝在新生儿中仍存在。上颌窦在胎儿期的第6个月开始出现，并在12-14岁时完全发育成熟。

The palatine bone is a primary bone. It develops from a single point of ossification which appears in the 2nd month of the intrauterine life at the junction of the perpendicular and horizontal plates.

> 腭骨是一块主要的骨。它由一个 ossification 点发育而来，该 ossification 点在胎儿宫内生活第二个月时出现在垂直板与水平板交界处。
