The zygomatic bone is a primary bone. It forms from a single point of ossification appearing at the end of the 2nd month of the intrauterine period.

> 颧骨是一块主要的骨。它由一个 ossification 的点形成，该点在胚胎期第 2 个月末出现。

The mandible develops as a paired bone and, according to its development, is a mixed bone; its condylar and coronoid processes which pass through the stage of cartilage are secondary bones, whereas the other part undergoes the stage of membranous ossification and is a primary bone. Each half of the mandible grooves the cartilage of the first branchial arch; the cartilage resorbs by the 5th month of the intrauterine period and its distal segment forms

> 下颌骨作为一对骨发育，根据其发育过程，属于混合骨；其髁突和冠突在发育过程中经历了软骨阶段，属于次级骨，而其余部分则经历膜性骨化阶段，属于初级骨。下颌骨的每一半都会侵蚀第一鳃弓的软骨；该软骨在胎儿期第五个月时被吸收，其远端部分形成

the mental ossicle while the proximal end gives rise to the auditory ossicles. The osseous union of both halves begins in the 3rd month after birth and is completed at the age of 2 years.

> 下颌骨的远端形成下颌骨体，而近端则形成听小骨。两侧骨体的骨性融合始于出生后第3个月，至2岁时完成。

The hyoid bone is a secondary bone. It develops from five points, one point giving rise to the body, one on each side for the greater horns, and another on either side for the lesser horns. In the body and greater horns the points of ossification appear at the end of the intrauterine period or soon after birth; the lesser horns are ossified by the age of 13-15 years. The greater horns fuse with the body quite late, by 30-40 years of age and sometimes later; the lesser horns fuse in old age.

> 会厌骨是一种次级骨。它由五个点发育形成，其中一点形成会厌体，两侧各一点形成大角，两侧各一点形成小角。在会厌体和大角处，骨化中心在胎儿期末或出生后不久出现；小角则在13-15岁左右开始骨化。大角与会厌体的融合发生得较晚，通常在30-40岁甚至更晚才完成；小角则在老年时期才融合。

The age distinctions of the skull as a whole, of its topographic areas and of the separate bones are expressed firstly by the different ratio of the cerebral to the visceral part. These differences, as well as the thickness of the bones, the size of the fossae and cavities of the skull, the presence of the fontanelles, the cranial synostoses, etc. are determined by the growth and development of the skull during five periods. The first period, from birth to the age of 7 years, is characterized by active growth of the skull, particularly in size; the sutures become slightly narrower, the fontanelles gradually reduce in size, the cavities of the nose and orbits grow and acquire the proper shape; the relief of the mandible changes noticeably. In the second period, lasting to the age of 14 years, the size and shape of the skull and its parts change less actively than in the first period, but the fossae, mastoid process and the cavities of the orbits and nose grow noticeably larger. The third period lasts from puberty to the age of 25 years. The frontal parts (forehead) are shaped in this period, the visceral skull becomes longer, the region of the zygomatic arches grows markedly, and the eminences become more prominent. The fourth period, lasting to the age of 45 years, is firstly characterized by the ossification of sutures, which had started at the age of 20-30 years, being completed at its end. It has been noted that premature ossification of the sagittal suture leads to the formation of a short skull, premature ossification of the coronal suture results in the formation of a long skull. The fifth period lasts from the age of 45 to old age and is characterized by atrophy first of the visceral and then of the cerebral skull and gradual loss of teeth, which has an effect on the shape of the jaws. Later, the alveolar processes are smoothed out and the whole skull becomes smaller.

> 整个头骨的年龄差异、其各个区域以及各骨块的差异，首先表现在脑部与面部部分的比例不同。这些差异，包括骨块的厚度、颅腔和窦腔的大小、囟门的存在、颅缝的骨性融合等，均是由头骨在五个发育时期中生长发育所决定的。第一时期从出生到7岁，头骨处于活跃生长阶段，特别是体积增大；颅缝逐渐变窄，囟门逐渐缩小，鼻腔和眼眶腔逐渐增大并获得正常的形态；下颌骨的轮廓发生明显变化。第二时期持续至14岁，头骨及其各部分的大小和形态变化较第一时期活跃程度降低，但鼻腔、筛窦、眼眶和鼻腔的腔体明显增大。第三时期从青春期持续到25岁，此时期形成额部（额头）的形态，面部颅骨变得较长，颧弓区域显著增大，而隆起部分更加突出。第四时期持续至45岁，首先表现为颅缝的骨化，这种骨化始于20-30岁，到45岁时完成。已注意到，矢状缝过早骨化会导致头颅短颅畸形，冠状缝过早骨化则会导致头颅长颅畸形。第五时期从45岁持续到老年，表现为首先面部颅骨的萎缩，随后是脑部颅骨的萎缩，以及牙齿逐渐脱落，这会影响颌骨的形态。随后，牙槽突逐渐平滑，整个头骨逐渐变小。

# THE BONES OF THE UPPER LIMB

> 上肢的骨胳

*Ossa membri superioris*

> 上肢骨

The skeleton of the upper limb *(skeleton membri superioris)* is divided into the bones of the girdle of the superior extremity, or shoulder girdle *(ossa cinguli membri superioris)* which includes the collar bone or clavicle *(clavicula)* and the scapula or shoulder blade, and the bones forming the skeleton of the free upper extremity *(skeleton membri superioris Uberi);* these include the humerus, bones of the forearm *(ossa antebrackii),*  and bones of the hand *(ossa manus).*

> 上肢骨（skeleton membri superioris）可分为上肢带骨（ossa cinguli membri superioris），即肩带骨，包括锁骨（clavicula）和肩胛骨（scapula 或肩胛）；以及构成自由上肢骨（skeleton membri superioris Uberi）的骨，这些包括肱骨（humerus）、前臂骨（ossa antebrackii）和手骨（ossa manus）。

## 1 THE BONES OF THE SHOULDER GIRDLE

> 1 肩胛骨的骨骼结构

## 2 THE SCAPULA

> 2 肩胛骨

The shoulder blade *(scapula)* (Figs 111-114 and 119) is a flat bone. It is located between the muscles of the back over the second to seventh ribs. It is triangular, in accordance with which three borders (upper, medial, and lateral) and three angles (superior, inferior, and lateral) are distinguished in it.

> 肩胛骨（scapula）（图111-114和119）是一块扁平骨。它位于背部肌肉之间，覆盖第二至第七肋骨的区域。肩胛骨呈三角形，因此在其上可区分出三条边（上缘、内侧缘和外侧缘）以及三个角（上角、下角和外侧角）。

T h e upper border of the scapula *(margo superior scapulae)* is thin and bears in its lateral part the suprascapular notch *(ineisura scapulae);* on a non-macerated bone the notch is bridged by the superior transverse ligament of the scapula or the suprascapular ligament *(ligamentum transversum scapulae superius)* as a result of which an opening transmitting the suprascapular nerve is formed.

> 肩胛骨的上缘（scapulae margo superior）较薄，在其外侧部分有肩胛上切迹（ineisura scapulae）；在未钙化骨上，该切迹由肩胛骨的上横韧带或肩胛上韧带（ligamentum transversum scapulae superius）所跨越，从而形成一个穿行肩胛上神经的孔道。

The lateral parts of the upper border of the scapula are continuous with the coracoid process *(frrocessus coracoideus)* which first projects upwards but then curves at an angle and extends forwards and slightly laterally.

> 肩胛骨上缘的外侧部分与喙突（coracoid process，frrocessus coracoideus）相连，喙突最初向上突出，随后在一定角度处弯曲，向前并略向侧方延伸。

The medial border *(margo medialis scapulae)* is longer and thin-

> 肩胛骨的内侧缘（scapulae margo medialis）较长且较薄。

ner than the upper border. It faces the vertebral column and is easily palpated through the skin.

> 其下缘比上缘更靠下。它面对椎骨列，可通过皮肤轻易触及。

The lateral border *(margo lateralis scapulae)* is thick and faces the axillary region.

> 肩胛骨的外侧缘（肩胛骨外侧缘）较厚，朝向腋窝区域。

The superior angle *(angulus superior)* is rounded and faces upwards and medially.

> 上角（angulus superior）呈圆形，朝向上方和内侧。

The inferior angle *(angulus inferior)* is rough, thick, and faces downwards.

> 下角（angulus inferior）粗糙、厚实，朝向下方。

The lateral angle *(angulus lateralis)* is thickened. Its lateral surface bears a thickened shallow articular glenoid cavity *(cavitas glenoidalis)* for articulation with the articular surface of the head of the humerus.

> 外侧角（angulus lateralis）增厚。其外侧表面具有一个增厚的浅凹关节窝（cavitas glenoidalis），与肱骨头的关节面相接。

The lateral angle is separated from the rest of the scapula by a small narrowed part called the neck of the scapula *(collum scapulae).*

> 外侧角由一小段狭窄的部分与肩胛骨其余部分分隔，这一部分称为肩胛骨颈（collum scapulae）。

In the region of the neck, above the superior margin of the glenoid cavity is the supraglenoid tubercle *(tuberculum supraglenoidalc).*

> 在颈部区域，肩胛骨关节盂上缘上方是肩胛骨上盂突（tuberculum supraglenoidale）。

![](_page_112_Picture_2.jpeg)

111. *Bones of right upper limb (ossa membri superioris);*  anterior aspect (%).

> 右上肢骨（ossa membri superioris）；前面观（anterior aspect）

and below the glenoid cavity is the infraglenoid tubercle *(tubercuturn mfraglenoidaU).* These are sites of the origin of muscles.

> 在肩胛骨关节盂下方是关节盂下结节（tuberculum infraglenoidale）。这些是肌肉的起始部位。

The anterior, costal surface *(fades costalis)* is concave. It is occupied by the subscapular muscle and is called the subscapular fossa *(fossa subscapularis).*

> 前外侧面（肋面，fades costalis）呈凹陷状。该区域被肩胛下肌占据，称为肩胛下窝（肩胛下窝，fossa subscapularis）。

The posterior, dorsal surface *(fades dorsalis)* is divided by the spine of the scapula *(spina scapulae)* into two parts. The smaller part is situated above the spine and is called the supraspinous fossa *(fossa supraspinata);* the other, larger part occupies the rest of the dorsal surface and is called the infraspinous fossa *(fossa infra-* *spinata).* They are the sites of origin of the supraspinatus and infraspinatus muscles, respectively.

> 肩胛骨的背侧（背侧表面，fades dorsalis）被肩胛骨脊（spina scapulae）分为两部分。较小的部分位于脊的上方，称为肩胛上窝（fossa supraspinata）；另一部分较大，占据背侧表面的其余部分，称为肩胛下窝（fossa infra-spinata）。这两部分分别是肩胛上肌和肩胛下肌的起始部位。

The spine of the scapula *(spina scapulae)* is a well developed projection crossing the dorsal surface from the medial border towards the lateral angle.

> 肩胛骨的脊（spina scapulae）是一个发育良好的突起，从内侧缘向外侧角延伸，跨越肩胛骨的背侧表面。

The lateral part of the spine of the scapula is strongly developed and is continuous with the acromion stretching laterally and slightly forwards and carrying on its anterior edge the articular facet of the acromion *(fades articularis acromii)* for articulation with the clavicle.

> 肩胛骨脊柱的外侧部分发育明显，与向外侧和略向前方延伸的肩峰相连，并在其前缘承载肩峰关节面（肩峰关节面），与锁骨形成关节。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_113_Picture_8.jpeg)

112. *Right scapula;* anterior aspect (%

> 右肩胛骨；前面（%

![](_page_114_Picture_2.jpeg)

113. Right scapula; posterior aspect  $(\frac{4}{5})$ .

> 右肩胛骨；后侧表面

THE SCAPULA

> 肩胛骨

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_115_Picture_2.jpeg)

114. Right scapula; lateral aspect ( $\frac{3}{4}$ ).

> 右肩胛骨；外侧方面（  ）

## 3 THE CLAVICLE

> 3 锁骨

The clavicle *(clavicula)* (Figs 111, 115, 116, 119) is a small tubular S-shaped bone, h has a body and two ends, the sternal end facing the inanubrium sterni and the acromial end articulating with the acromion of the scapula. The sternal end and the adjoining part of the body of the clavicle are convex forwards, the rest of the clavicle is concave forwards.

> 锁骨（clavicula）（图111、115、116、119）是一块细长的S形骨，具有一个主体和两个末端，其中胸骨端朝向胸骨柄，肩峰端与肩胛骨的肩峰形成关节。锁骨的胸骨端及其邻近的主体部分向前凸出，而锁骨其余部分则向前凹陷。

The middle part of the clavicle located between its ends is somewhat compressed from top to bottom. On its inferior surface it has a relatively large nutrient foramen. The sternal end bears an impression for the costociavicular ligament *(impressio ligamenti costodavicularis),* the acromial end carries the conoid tubercle *(tubercu-*

> 锁骨中部位于其两端之间部分，自上而下略呈压缩状。其下表面有一个相对较大的营养孔。胸骨端具有肋锁韧带的凹陷（impressio ligamenti costodavicularis），而肩峰端则有锥状突（tuberculum conoidale）。

*lum conoideum)* and the irapezoid line *(linea trapezoidea);* they give attachment to the conoid and trapezoid parts of the coracoclavicular ligament.

> 椎骨锥体（lum conoideum）和梯形线（linea trapezoidea）；它们为喙锁韧带的锥状部和梯形部提供附着点。

The superior surface of the clavicle is smooth. The sternal end *(extremitas sternalis)* is thick and carries on its internal surface the sternal articular facet *(fades articularis sternalis)* for articulation with the clavicular notch of the manubrium sterni.

> 锁骨上表面光滑。胸骨端（sternal end）较厚，在其内侧面上具有与胸骨柄锁骨切迹相接的胸骨关节面（sternal articular facet）。

The acromial end *(extremitas acromialis)* is wider bul slightly thinner than ihe sternal end. On its inferolateral surface is the acromial articular facet *(fades articularis acromialis)* for articulation with the acromion of the scapula.

> 锁骨的肩峰端（extremitas acromialis）比胸骨端更宽，但略薄。其下外侧面上有肩峰关节面（facies articularis acromialis），与肩胛骨的肩峰形成关节。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_116_Picture_8.jpeg)

115. *Right clavicle (clavicula);* superior aspect (/j).

> 右锁骨（clavicula）；上外侧方面（/j）

![](_page_116_Picture_10.jpeg)

116. *Right clavicle (clavicula);* inferior aspect

> 右锁骨（clavicula）；下侧

## 4 THE SKELETON OF THE FREE UPPER LIMB

> 4 自由上肢的骨骼

## 5 THE HUMERUS

> 5 尺骨

The humerus (see Figs 111, 117-122) is a long tubular bone. A body, or shaft, and two ends, upper and lower, are distinguished in it.

> 肱骨（见图111、117-122）是一根长管状骨。其结构可分为一个骨干（体）和两个端部，即上端和下端。

The body, or shaft *(corpus humeri)* is rounded superiorly, while the lower part is trihedral. A posterior and an anterior surfaces are distinguished in the lower part of the shaft. The posterior surface *(fades posterior)* is bounded by a lateral and medial borders *(margo lateralis* et *margo medialis).* The anterior surface *(faaes anterior)* is separated by a poorly defined border into an anteromedial surface *(fades anterior medialis)* and anterolateral surface *(fades anterior lateralis).* Slightly below the middle of its length the anteromedial surface bears a nutrient foramen *(foramen nutridum)* leading into a distally running nutrient canal *(amalis nutridus).*

> 肱骨体（corpus humeri）上端呈圆形，下端为三棱形。肱骨体的下部可区分出前后两个表面。后表面（fades posterior）由外侧缘（margo lateralis）和内侧缘（margo medialis）界定。前表面（fades anterior）则由一条边界不清晰的线分为前内侧表面（fades anterior medialis）和前外侧表面（fades anterior lateralis）。在肱骨长度中部略下方，前内侧表面处有一个营养孔（foramen nutridum），其内通向向远端延伸的营养管（canalis nutridus）。

A little above this foramen, the anterolateral surface of the body carries the deltoid tuberosity *(tuberositas deltoidea)* for insertion of the deltoid muscle.

> 该孔上方稍处，椎体的前外侧表面有三角肌粗隆（tuberositas deltoidea），为三角肌的附着点。

A spiral groove lodging the radial nerve *(sulcus neroi radialis)* is on the posterior surface of the shaft behind the deltoid tuberosity. It runs downwards and laterally.

> 位于三角肌粗隆后方肱骨体后侧的螺旋沟（sulcus neroi radialis）容纳桡神经。该沟向下并向外延伸。

The upper end, or the proximal epiphysis *(extremitas superior* s. *tpiphyns proximalis)* is thickened and carries a semispherical head of the humerus *fcaput humeri)* whose surface faces medially, upwards, and slightly backwards.

> 上端，即近侧端（extremitas superior s. epiphysis proximalis）增厚，并承载肱骨头（caput humeri），其表面朝向内侧、上方和略微后方。

The head is separated from the rest of the bone by a shallow annular constriction called the anatomical neck *(eollum anatomieum).* On the anterolateral surface of the bone below the anatomical neck are the greater tuberosity *(tuberculum majus)* located laterally and the lesser tuberosity *(tuberculum minus)* situated medially and a little to the front.

> 头骨与其余部分之间由一个浅表的环形狭窄处分隔，称为解剖颈（anatomical neck）。在解剖颈下方的骨的前外侧面上，有位于外侧的大结节（tuberculum majus）和位于内侧且稍向前的小结节（tuberculum minus）。

•

> •

The lower periphery of each tuberosity is continuous with a similarly named crest: the lateral lip of the bicipital groove or the crest of the greater tuberosity *(crista tuberculi majoris)* and the medial lip of the bicipital groove or the crest of the lesser tuberosity *(crista tuberculi minoris).* Descending, both crests reach the upper parts of the shaft and together with the tuberosities form the borders of the well defined bicipital or intertubercular groove *(sulcus intertubercularis)* lodging the tendon of the long head of the biceps brachii muscle *(tendo capitis longi musculus bidpitis brachii).*

> 每个结节的下缘与同名的嵴相连：外侧唇为肱二头肌沟的外侧唇或大结节嵴（crista tuberculi majoris），内侧唇为肱二头肌沟的内侧唇或小结节嵴（crista tuberculi minoris）。向下延伸，这两条嵴到达骨干的上部，并与结节共同形成界限清晰的肱二头肌沟（sulcus intertubercularis），该沟容纳肱二头肌长头肌腱（tendo capitis longi musculus biceps brachii）。

Below the tubercles at the junction of the upper end and body of the bone is a small constriction called the surgical neck *(eollum chirurgicum)* corresponding to the zone of the epiphyseal cartilage.

> 在骨的上端与骨干连接处的骨棘下方，有一个称为手术颈（surgical neck，collum chirurgicum）的小凹陷，对应于骨骺软骨的区域。

The lower end, or the distal epiphysis *(extremitas inferior* s. *epiphysis distalis)* is flattened in the anteroposterior direction.

> 下端，即远端骨骺（extremitas inferior s. epiphysis distalis），在前后方向上呈扁平状。

The distal segment of this part of the bone bears in its lateral part a rounded eminence called the capitulum of the humerus *(capitulum humeri)* for articulation with the head of the radius. Next to this eminence is the- trochlea of the humerus *(trochlea humeri)*  which articulates with the trochlear notch of the ulna.

> 该骨部的远端段在其外侧部分有一个圆形的隆起，称为肱骨小头（capitulum humeri），与桡骨头形成关节。此隆起的旁边是肱骨滑车（trochlea humeri），与尺骨滑车切迹形成关节。

The coronoid fossa *(fossa coronoidea)* is on the anterior surface of the inferior end of the humerus above the trochlea, the radial fossa *(fossa radialis)* is above the capitulum, and the olecranon fossa *(fossa olecrani)* lies on the posterior surface.

> 冠突窝（fossa coronoidea）位于肱骨下端前侧，处于滑车上方；桡窝（fossa radialis）位于肱骨 capitulum 上方；尺骨窝（fossa olecrani）则位于肱骨后侧表面。

The lower end of the humerus terminates distallv as the lateral and medial epicondyles *(epicondylus laterally* et *epicondylus medialis).*

> 肱骨下端终末于远端为肱骨内上髁和肱骨外上髁（epicondylus medialis 与 epicondylus lateralis）。

The medial cpicondyle is more prominent. Its posterior surface carries the groove for the ulnar nerve *(sulcus nervi ulnaris).* The groove and the epicondyles are easily palpated under the skin.

> 内上髁更为突出。其后表面有尺神经沟（尺神经沟）。该沟及内外上髁在皮肤下均可触及。

![](_page_118_Picture_2.jpeg)

117. *Right kumerus;*  anterior aspect (%

> 右尺骨；前方（%

118. *Right humerus;* posterior aspect *x*

> 右肱骨；后侧方面

## 7 THE BONES OF THE FOREARM

> 7 前臂的骨胳

The bones of the forearm *fossa antebrackii)* (Figs 123-131) are the ulna and the radius. When the limb is hanging freely and in supination (with the forearm and palm turned forward) the ulna is located medially and the radius laterally.

> 前臂骨沟（antebrachial fossa）的骨骼包括尺骨（ulna）和桡骨（radius）。当肢体自然下垂且前臂处于旋前位（前臂和手掌向前）时，尺骨位于内侧，桡骨位于外侧。

#### 7.1.1 T H E ULNA

> 7.1.1 尺骨

The ulna (see Figs 111, 123-125, 129-131) is a long tubular bone. It has a shaft (body) and two ends, upper and lower.

> 尺骨（见图111、123-125、129-131）是一根长管状骨。其结构包括骨干（体）和两个端部，即上端和下端。

The shaft of the ulna *(corpus ulnae)* is trihedral. It has three borders: anterior (palmar), posterior (dorsal), and interosseous (lateral). Its three surfaces are the anterior (palmar), posterior (dorsal) and medial surface.

> 尺骨体（ulnae corpus）呈三棱柱状。其有三个缘：前缘（掌侧）、后缘（背侧）和骨间缘（外侧）。其三个面分别为前面（掌侧）、后面（背侧）和内侧面。

The anterior border *(margo anterior)* is rounded, the posterior border *(margo posterior)* faces to the back, and the interosseous border *(margo interosseus)* is sharp and faces the radius.

> 前缘（margo anterior）呈圆形，后缘（margo posterior）朝向后方，骨间缘（margo interosseus）锐利且朝向桡骨。

The anterior surface *(fades anterior)* is slightly concave. It bears a nutrient foramen *(foramen nutricium)* which is continuous proxirnally with a nutrient canal *(eanalis nutricius).* In the upper part of the anterior surface of the junction of the shaft and the upper end of the bone is the tubcrosity of the ulna *(tuberositas ulnae).* The posterior surface *(fades posterior)* faces to the back, while the medial surface *(fades medialis)* faces the medial border of the forearm.

> 前表面（前部）略呈凹陷。其上有一个营养孔（营养孔，foramen nutricium），该孔在近端与营养管（营养管，canalis nutricius）相连。在骨干与骨上端连接处的前表面的上部有尺骨粗隆（尺骨粗隆，tuberositas ulnae）。后表面（后部）朝向后方，而内侧表面（内侧部）朝向前臂的内侧边界。

The upper end, or proximal epiphysis *(extremitas superior* s. *epipkysis proximalis)* is thick and continuous upwards with the olecranon. The anterior surface of the olecranon bears the trochlear notch *(indsura trochlearis)* which is bounded below by the coronoid process *(proeessus coronoideus).* The lateral surface of the coronoid process carries the radial notch *(indsura radialis)* for articulation of the ulna with the articular circumference of the head of the radius. The supinator crest *(crista musculi supmaioris)* arises behind the radial notch and descends to the upper parts of the shaft.

> 上端，即近端骺（extremitas superior s. epiphysis proximalis），较厚，向上与尺骨鹰嘴（olecranon）连续。尺骨鹰嘴的前表面有滑车切迹（fossa trochlearis），其下方为冠突（processus coronoides）。冠突的外侧面有桡骨切迹（fossa radialis），用于尺骨与桡骨头关节面的关节。旋前肌嵴（crista musculi supinatoris）位于桡骨切迹后方，并向下延伸至骨体的上部。

The lower end, or distal epiphysis *(extremitas inferior* s. *epiphysis distalis)* of the ulna is rounded. The head *(caput ulnae)* is distinguished on it. The lower periphery of the head carries an articular surface which faces the wrist and bears a fossa. The lateral periphery of the head carries for a considerable distance the articular circumference of the ulna *(drcumferentia articularis ulnae)* for articulation with the radius. The posteromedial surface of the head is continuous with the medial styloid process *(proeessus styloideus medialis)* which is easily felt through the skin.

> 尺骨的下端，或称远端骨骺（extremitas inferior s. epiphysis distalis），呈圆形。其上可见尺骨头（caput ulnae）。尺骨头的下缘具有一个关节面，朝向腕部，并形成一个凹陷（fossa）。尺骨头的外侧缘则延伸出一段尺骨关节周缘（circumferentia articularis ulnae），与桡骨形成关节。尺骨头的后内侧表面与内侧尺骨茎突（processus styloideus medialis）相连，该茎突可通过皮肤轻易触及。

![](_page_121_Picture_11.jpeg)

123. *Right ulna;*  anterior surface (%).

> 右尺骨；前表面（%）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_122_Picture_2.jpeg)

124. *Right ulna;*  posterior surface

> 右尺骨；后侧表面

125. *Right ulna;*  surface facing the radius (%).

> 右尺骨；朝向桡骨的表面 (%)

#### 7.1.2 T H E RADIUS

> 7.1.2 尺骨

The radius (see Figs 111, 126-131) is located laterally and a little anteriorly to the ulna. It has a shaft (body) and two ends, upper and lower.

> 桡骨（见图111、126-131）位于尺骨的外侧和稍前方。桡骨具有一个骨干（体）和两个末端，即上端和下端。

The shaft of the radius *(corpus radii)* is triangular. It has three borders (anterior, posterior, and interosseous, or medial) and three surfaces (anterior, or palmar, posterior, or dorsal, and lateral, or outer).

> 桡骨体（radius shaft）呈三角形。其有三个边（前缘、后缘和内侧缘）和三个面（前面或掌面、后面或背侧面、侧面或外侧面）。

The anterior border *(margo anterior)* and the posterior border *(margo posterior)* are rounded.

> 前缘（前缘）和后缘（后缘）呈圆形。

The medial border of the bone is sharp, faces the ulna, and is called the interosseous border *(margo interosseus).*

> 骨的内侧缘锐利，朝向尺骨，称为骨间缘（margo interosseus）。

The anterior surface *(fades anterior)* is slightly concave. It bears a nutrient foramen *(foramen nutricium)* which is continuous proximally with a nutrient canal *(eanalis nutrieius).*

> 前表面（前侧）略呈凹陷状。其上有一个营养孔（营养孔，foramen nutricium），该孔在近端与营养管（营养管，canalis nutricius）相连。

The posterior surface *(fades posterior)* faces to the back, the lateral surface *(fades lateralis)* faces the lateral border of the forearm.

> 后表面（fade posterior）朝向背部，外侧表面（fade lateralis）朝向前臂的外侧缘。

The upper end, or proximal epiphysis *(extremitas superior* s. *epiphysis proximalis)* carries at its junction with the shaft a well defined tuberosity of the radius *(tuberositas radii)* facing medially. Superiorly to the tuberosity is an evenly constricted area of bone called the neck of the radius *(collum radii).* Above the neck is a cylindrical head of the radius *(caput radii).* The superior surface of the head is concave. The lateral part of the head carries a surface for articulating with the radial notch of the ulna; it is called the articular circumference of the radius *(drcumferentia articularis radii)* and can be partly felt through the skin.

> 桡骨上端，或近端骨骺（extremitas superior s. epiphysis proximalis），在其与骨干连接处有一个明确的桡骨结节（tuberositas radii），朝向内侧。在结节上方，骨质均匀变窄的区域称为桡骨颈（collum radii）。在桡骨颈上方是一个圆柱形的桡骨头（caput radii）。桡骨头的上表面是凹陷的。桡骨头的外侧部分有一个与尺骨桡切迹相接的关节面，称为桡骨关节周缘（drcumferentia articularis radii），可通过皮肤部分触及。

The lower end, or distal epiphysis *(extremitas inferior* s. *epiphysis distalis)* is thick and wide in the frontal plane. The lateral periphery of the lower end is continuous with the lateral styloid process *(processus styloideus lateralis)* which is easily felt through the skin. On the medial surface of the lower end is the ulnar notch *(ineisura ulnaris)* which bears an articular surface for articulation with the articular circumference of the ulna.

> 下端，或远端骺（extremitas inferior s. epiphysis distalis）在冠状面上较厚且宽。下端的外侧边缘与外侧尺骨茎突（processus styloideus lateralis）相连，该茎突可通过皮肤轻易触及。下端的内侧表面有尺骨窝（incisura ulnaris），其上具有关节面，与尺骨的关节周缘形成关节。

The anterior surface of the lower end of the radius is smooth, the posterior surface carries small ridges separating small grooves which lodge the tendons of muscles. The lower surface is concave from side to side and from front to back. It serves for articulation with the carpal bones and is called the carpal articular surface *(fades articularis carpea).* It carries a small ridge which runs anteroposteriorly and separates it into two parts corresponding to the two carpal bones articulating with the radius.

> 尺骨下端的前表面光滑，后表面有小隆起，将小沟分隔开，这些小沟容纳肌腱。下表面从侧向和前后方向均呈凹陷状，与腕骨形成关节，称为腕关节面（腕关节面）。该表面有一条小隆起，呈前后方向延伸，将腕关节面分为两部分，分别对应与尺骨形成关节的两块腕骨。

## 9 THE BONES OF THE HAND

> 9 手部骨骼

The bones of the hand *(ossa manus)* (see Figs 111, and 132-142) are divided into the carpal bones *(ossa carpi),* the metacarpal bones *(ossa metacarpalia),* and the bones of the fingers or phalanges of digits of the hand *(ossa digitorum mantis),* i.e. the phalanges of the fingers *(phalanges digitorum).*

> 手部的骨骼（ossa manus）（见图111及图132-142）可分为腕骨（ossa carpi）、掌骨（ossa metacarpalia）以及手指或手指的指骨（ossa digitorum manus），即手指的指骨（phalanges digitorum）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_127_Picture_4.jpeg)

132. *Bones of right hand (ossa manus);* palmar surface (%).

> 右手骨（ossa manus）；掌面（palmar surface）%。

## 10 THE CARPAL BONES

> 10 掌骨

rows, superior and inferior. The superior (or proximal) or first row bone *(os scaphoideum),* the lunate bone *(as lunatum),* the triquctral adjoins the distal part of the forearm bones. The inferior row is bone *(os triquetrum),* and the pisiform bone *(os pisiforme).*  known as the distal, or second row. Some of the carpal bones face the metacarpus.

> 行，可分为上行和下行。上行（或近侧）的第一行骨为舟骨（os scaphoideum），月骨（os lunatum），三角骨（os triquetrum）与前臂远端骨骼相连。下行则为三角骨（os triquetrum）和豌豆骨（os pisiforme），也称为远端，或第二行。部分腕骨面向掌骨。

The carpal bones *(ossa carpi)* (sec Figs 111, 132-142) form two from the radial to the ulnar border of the hand): the scaphoid

> 腕骨（ossa carpi）（见图111、132-142）从桡侧至尺侧构成手的两部分：月骨 /no_think

The distal row is made up of the trapezium bone *(os trapezium*  s. *os multangulum majus),* the trapezoid bone *(os traptzpideum),* the The proximal row is formed by the following bones (named capitate bone *(os capitatum),* and the hamate bone *(os hamatum).*

> 远侧行由舟骨（os trapezium，s. os multangulum majus）、月骨（os trapezoides）和三角骨（os trapezoideum）组成。近侧行由以下骨骼构成：头状骨（os capitatum）和钩骨（os hamatum）。

#### 11.1.1 T HE SCAPHOID BONK

> 11.1.1 楔骨骨突 /no_think

The scaphoid bone *(os scapkoidcum)* (Fig. 135) occupies the extreme lateral ('radial') position in the proximal row of carpal bones. It^ palmar surface is concave and continuous in the inferolaieral part with the tubercle of the scaphoid *(tuberculum ossis scaphoidei).*

> 舟骨（os scaphoideum）（图135）占据腕骨近排中最为外侧（桡侧）的位置。其掌面凹陷，并在下外侧部分与舟骨结节（tuberculum ossis scaphoidei）连续。

The dorsal surface occupies a narrow strip which is continuous proximalfy with a superiorly convex facet articulating with the carpal articular surface of the radius. The inferomedial part of the bone carries a concave articular facet for articulation with the capitate bone. Above it on the medial side of the bone is a facet for articulating with the lunate bone. The inferolatcral periphery of the scaphoid bone bears an articular facet for articulation with the trapezium and trapezoid bones.

> 骨的背侧表面占据一条狭窄的带状区域，该区域向近端连续并与一个向上方凸起的关节面相连，此关节面与尺骨的腕关节面相接。骨的下内侧部分有一个凹陷的关节面，与月骨相接。骨的内侧上方还有一个关节面，与三角骨相接。舟骨的下外侧周边有一个关节面，与大多角骨和小多角骨相接。

## 12 I H E LUXATE BONE

> 12 I H E LUXATE BONE

The lunate bone *(os lunatum)* (Fig. 136) is medial to the scaphoid bone. Its superior (proximal) surface is convex and articulates with the carpal articular surface of the radius.

> 月骨（os lunatum）（图136）位于舟骨的内侧。其上部（近端）表面呈凸面，并与桡骨的腕关节面形成关节。

The inferior (distal) surface of the lunate bone is concave and bears an articular facet on its lateral part for articulation with the

> 月骨的下（远端）面凹陷，并在其外侧部分具有一个关节面，与下尺骨关节面形成关节。

capitate bone and another facet on its medial part for articulation with the hamate bone.

> 头骨与另一关节面在 medial 部分相接，以与月骨形成关节。

The lateral surface of the bone has an articular facet for articulation with the scaphoid bone. The medial surface of the lunate bone articulates with the triquetral bone.

> 骨的外侧表面有一个关节面，与舟骨形成关节。月骨的内侧表面与三角骨形成关节。

#### 12.1.1 T HE TRIQUETRAL BONK

> 12.1.1 三角骨突（Triquetral Bone）

The triquetral bone *(os triquetrum)* (Fig. 137) occupies the extreme medial ('ulnar') position in the proximal row of the carpal bones. Its superior surface is convex and carries an articular facet for articulation with the distal part of the forearm.

> 三角骨（os triquetrum）（图137）位于腕骨近排的最内侧（尺侧）位置。其上表面呈凸起状，并具有一个关节面，与前臂远端形成关节。

The lateral part of the triquetral bone has a Mat articular facet for articulation with the lunate bone; the inferior slightly concave surface articulates with the hamate bone, the palmar surface unites with the pisiform bone.

> 三角骨的外侧部分有一个月状骨关节面，用于与月骨关节；下方稍凹的表面与钩骨关节，掌侧表面与豌豆骨相连。

#### 12.1.2 PIS1KORM BONK

> 12.1.2 PIS1KORM BONK

I IK pisiform bone *(ospisifonne)* (Fig. 138) is ovoid. It is related to the sesamoid bones *(ossa sesamoidea)* and is situated within the tendon of the flexor carpi ulnaris muscle. On the dorsal surface the pisiform bone carries a small articular facet by means of which it articulates with the triquetral bone.

> 尺骨钩（pisiform bone）（图138）呈卵圆形。它与籽骨（ossa sesamoidea）相关联，位于尺侧腕屈肌腱内。在尺骨钩的背侧表面，有一个小的关节面，通过该关节面与三角骨形成关节。[!note]- 术语说明
“sesamoid bones” 通常译作“籽骨”，是位于肌腱内的骨性结构，常见于手和足部。

#### 12.1.3 T H E TRAPEZIUM BONE

> 12.1.3 梨骨

The trapezium bone *(os trapezium* s. *multangulum)* (Fig. 139) is distal to the scaphoid bone and occupies the extreme lateral ('radial') position in the distal row of the carpal bones. Its superior surface bears an articular facet for articulation with the scaphoid bone. The inferior surface of the trapezium bone has a saddleshaped articular facet which articulates with the base of the first mctacarpal bone. Tin medial part of the trapezium carries two

> 舟骨（scaphoid bone）远侧的骨块为月骨（trapezium bone，又称多角骨，os trapezium s. multangulum）（图139）。月骨位于腕骨远行列的最外侧（“桡侧”）位置。其上表面有一个关节面，与舟骨形成关节。月骨的下表面有一个马鞍形关节面，与第一掌骨底形成关节。月骨的内侧部分有两处[!note]- 术语说明  
“Tin medial part of the trapezium carries two” 可能为原文输入错误，根据上下文推测应为 “The medial part of the trapezium carries two”，即“月骨的内侧部分有两处”。

s concave articular facets: a superior, larger, and an inferior, smaller. - The first is for articulation with the trapezoid bone, and the second r for union with the base of the second metacarpal bone.

> 凹陷的关节面：一个位于上方、较大的，一个位于下方、较小的。- 上方的关节面与梯形骨形成关节，下方的关节面与第二掌骨基底部相连。

I On the anterior (palmar) surface of the trapezium, in the lateral part, is a small ridge called the tubercle, or crest of the trat pezium bone *(tuberculum ossis trapezii* s. *multanguli).* Medially to it is *j* a groove lodging the tendon of the flexor carpi radialis muscle.

> I 在腕骨舟骨的前侧（手掌侧），外侧部分有一小隆起，称为舟骨结节（tuberculum ossis trapezii s. multanguli）。其内侧为一沟槽，内有桡侧腕屈肌腱通过。

#### 12.1.4 UlKTKAPE/.OIl) BONE

> 12.1.4 脊椎骨 /no_think

The trapezoid bone *(os trapezoideum)* (Fig. 140) is located next to the trapezium. Its inferior saddle-shaped articular surface unites with the second mctacarpal bone.

> 梯形骨（os trapezoideum）（图140）位于舟骨的旁边。其下部呈鞍形的关节面与第二掌骨相接。

The superior surface of the trapezoid bone is concave and arti-

> 梯形骨的上表面凹陷，并与相邻的骨形成关节面。

eulates with the scaphoid bone; the lateral, slightly convex surface unites with the trapezium bone, and the medial, concave surface articulates with the capitate bone.

> 与舟骨形成关节；外侧稍凸面与腕骨（trapezium）相连，内侧凹面与头状骨（capitate）形成关节。

#### 12.1.5 THE CAPITATE BONK

> 12.1.5 桡骨小头骨突

The capitate bone *(os capitatum)* (Fig. 141) is the largest of the carpal bones and carries a spherical head in the proximal part. The remaining part of the bone is rather thick. Its medial surface articulates with the hamate bone; the lateral, slightly convex surface articulates with the trapezoid bone. The inferior surface of the cap-

> 头骨（capitate bone，os capitatum）（图141）是腕骨中最大的一块，其近端部分具有一个球形的头。骨的其余部分较为致密。其内侧表面与钩骨（hamate bone）形成关节；外侧稍凸的表面与舟骨（trapezoid bone）形成关节。头骨的下表面...

hate bone articulates with the base of the third metacarpal bone by means of a flat articular facet; the lateral surfaces bear small articular facets for articulating with the bases of the second and fourth metacarpal bones.

> 掌骨基底与第三掌骨的基底部通过一个扁平的关节面相接；侧面上方有小的关节面，用于与第二和第四掌骨的基底部相接。

## 13 T H E HAMATE BOM .

> 13 豌豆骨

The hamate bone *(os kamatum)* (Fig. 142) is located next to the capitate bone and occupies the extreme medial fuluar') position in the distal row of the carpal bones. On its anterior (palmar) surface is a well-developed projection which is slightly curved laterally (in the 'ulnar' direction); it is called the hook of the hamate bone *(hamulus ossis hamati).* The proximal surface of the hamate bone articulates with the lunate bone, the lateral surface with the capitate bone, and the medial, slightly convex surface articulates with the triquetral bone. Th e distal surface of the bone carries two articular facets for articulation with the fourth and fifth metacarpal bones.

> 钩骨（os hamatum）（图142）位于月骨的内侧，占据腕骨远行列中最内侧的位置。其前侧（掌侧）表面有一个发育良好的突起，略微向侧方（即“尺侧”方向）弯曲，称为钩骨的钩（hamulus ossis hamati）。钩骨的近侧表面与月骨形成关节，外侧表面与月骨形成关节，而内侧稍凸的表面则与三角骨形成关节。骨的远侧表面有两块关节面，分别与第四和第五掌骨形成关节。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_133_Picture_5.jpeg)

141. *Right capitate bone (os capitatum)* (%). A—palmar surface; B—dorsal surface.

> 右月骨（月骨）(%). A—掌侧；B—背侧。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_133_Picture_7.jpeg)

142. *Right hamate bone (os hamatum)* (%). A—palmar surface; B—dorsal surface; C—distal surface.

> 右侧钩骨（钩骨）(%). A—掌侧；B—背侧；C—远端面。

#### 13.1.1 T H E CARPUS

> 13.1.1 腕骨

The carpus is formed by the bones described above and the articulations and ligaments which join them.

> 腕骨由上述所描述的骨块以及连接它们的关节和韧带构成。

The superior, or proximal border of the carpus faces the forearm bones and is more convex transversely.

> 腕骨的上缘（或近端边界）面向前臂骨，其横断面更为凸出。[!note]- 术语说明
“carpus” 指腕骨，是前臂与手之间的骨性结构，由多个小骨组成。

The superior, or distal border is relatively flat. The posterior, or dorsal surface of the carpus is convex.

> 上缘或远端边界相对平坦。腕骨的后缘或背侧表面呈凸起状。

The anterior (palmar) surface of the carpus is concave and is called the carpal sulcus *(sulcus carpi).* The sulcus is bounded laterally by the radial carpal eminence formed by the tubercles of the scaphoid and trapezium bones and medially by the ulnar carpal eminence consisting of the pisiform bone and the hook of the hamate bone.

> 腕骨的前侧（掌侧）表面呈凹陷状，称为腕骨沟（腕沟）。该沟的外侧由桡骨腕突构成，该腕突由舟骨和月骨的结节形成；内侧则由尺骨腕突构成，该腕突包括豌豆骨和钩骨钩部。

Some of the carpal bones are easily felt through the skin. The scaphoid bone, for instance, is felt a little below and to the back of the lateral styloid process; the lunate bone is fell next to the scaphoid on the dorsal surface of the carpus; the pisiform bone can be palpated when the hand is partly flexed at the wrist joint; the capitate bone is felt on the dorsal surface of the carpus, better in flexion at the wrist.

> 一些腕骨可通过皮肤轻易触及。例如，舟骨位于桡骨远端茎突的稍下方和后方；月骨位于腕骨的背侧，紧邻舟骨；当腕关节部分屈曲时，豌豆骨可被触及；头状骨则在腕骨的背侧被触及，腕关节屈曲时更为明显。

#### 13.1.2 T H E METACARPAL BONES

> 13.1.2 掌骨

The metacarpal bones *(ossa metacarpalia)* (Figs 111, 132-134) are five small tubular bones. They are numbered in sequence from the lateral (radial) to the medial (ulnar) border of the hand.

> 掌骨（ossa metacarpalia）（图111，132-134）是五块小的管状骨。它们按从手的外侧（桡侧）至内侧（尺侧）的顺序进行编号。

A shaft (body) and two ends, upper and lower, are distinguished in each bone.

> 每块骨均可区分出一个骨干（体）和两个端部，即上端和下端。

The shaft *(corpus)* has three surfaces: posterior (dorsal), lateral (radial), and medial (ulnar). The lateral and medial surfaces are separated by a small ridge bearing a nutrient foramen *(foramen nutricium)* which is continuous with a nutrient canal *(canalis nutricius).*  The canal in the second to fifth metacarpal bones runs proximally, while the canal in the first metacarpal extends distally.

> 骨干（corpus）有三个面：后方（背侧）、外侧（桡侧）和内侧（尺侧）。外侧和内侧面之间有一条小的隆起，其上有一滋养孔（foramen nutricium），该孔与滋养管（canalis nutricius）相连。第二至第五掌骨中的滋养管向近端延伸，而第一掌骨中的滋养管则向远端延伸。

**The** shaft of the metacarpal bones has a palmar concavity.

> 掌骨体具有掌侧凹陷。

The upper (proximal) end of a metacarpal bone is called the base *(basis)* and is thick. It carries on its sides articular facets by means of which two adjacent bones articulate. The surface facing the carpal bones bears a facet for articulation with the carpal bones forming the distal row. The articular surfaces of the first and fifth metacarpal bones are saddle-shaped.

> 掌骨的近端（上端）称为基底部（basis），较为粗厚。其两侧具有关节面，通过这些关节面，相邻的两骨得以相互连接。面向腕骨的一面具有一个关节面，与构成远侧列的腕骨相连接。第一掌骨和第五掌骨的关节面呈鞍状。

The base of the third metacarpal bone has in its postcrolateral part the styloid process of the third metacarpal bone *(processus styloideus medius* s. *processus styloidcus ossis metacarpalis tertii).*

> 第三掌骨基底部的后外侧部分有第三掌骨的 styloid process（processus styloideus medius s. processus styloidcus ossis metacarpalis tertii）。

The lower (distal) end of a metacarpal bone is the rounded head *(caput).* Its sides are rough.

> 掌骨的远端（下端）是圆形的头（caput）。其两侧粗糙。

The shaft and head of the metacarpal bone are easily felt through the skin on the dorsal surface.

> 掌骨体和近端膨大部可在手背皮肤表面轻易触及。

The spaces between the metacarpal bones are called interosseous spaces of the metacarpus *(spatia interossea metacarpi).*

> 掌骨之间的间隙称为掌骨的骨间间隙（spatia interossea metacarpi）。

#### 13.1.3 T HE BONES OF TH E DIGITS OF TH E HAND

> 13.1.3 手指的骨胳

The bones (phalanges) of the digits of the hand *(ossa digitorum manus)* (Figs 132-134) arc small and tubular. The thumb has two phalanges, proximal *(phalanx proximalis)* and distal *(phalanx distalis).* In addition to the proximal and distal phalanges, all the other fingers have a middle phalanx *(phalanx media).* A shaft and two ends, upper (proximal) and lower (distal), are distinguished in each phalanx.

> 手指的骨（指骨，ossa digitorum manus）（图132-134）是小而管状的。拇指有两块指骨，即近节指骨（phalanx proximalis）和远节指骨（phalanx distalis）。除了近节和远节指骨外，其余各手指还有一块中节指骨（phalanx media）。每块指骨均可区分出一个骨干和两个端部，即上端（近端，proximal）和下端（远端，distal）。

T h e shaft, or body *(corpus)* of a phalanx has a flat palmar surface which is bounded on the sides by small ridges and bears a nutrient foramen *(foramen nutricium)* which is continuous distally with a nutrient canal *(canalis nutricius).*

> 指骨（phalanx）的骨干（corpus）具有一个平坦的掌侧表面，其两侧被小嵴所界限，并承载一个营养孔（foramen nutricium），该孔在远端与营养管（canalis nutricius）连续。

The upper (proximal) end, or the base of the phalanx *(basis*

> 指节（近端）端，或指骨的基底（basis）

*phalangis)* is thick and carries an articular facet. The facets of the proximal phalanges articulate with the carpal bones, those of the middle and distal phalanges are separated by a small ridge into two parts for articulation of one phalanx with the other.

> （指骨）较为粗厚，并具有关节面。近端指骨的关节面与腕骨相接；中段和远端指骨的关节面则被一细小的嵴分为两部分，以便相邻指骨之间进行关节活动。

The lower (distal) end of the proximal and middle phalanges carries a head *(caput phalangis).*

> 近节和中节趾骨的远端（远侧）端携带头（趾骨头）。

The lower (distal) end of the distal phalanx bears on its dorsal surface a tuberosity *(tuberositas phalangis distalis).*

> 远端指骨的远端（远侧）端在其背侧表面有一个隆起（远端指骨隆起）。

Sesamoid bones arc lodged in the muscle tendons on the palmar surface in the region of the metacarpophalangeal joints of the thumb and index and little fingers and the interphalangcal joint of the thumb.

> 籽骨位于手掌面，嵌于拇指、食指和小指的掌指关节以及拇指的指骨间关节处的肌腱内。

# DEVELOPMENT AND AGE FEATURES OF THE BONES OF THE UPPER LIMB

> 上肢骨的发育与年龄特征

The bones of the upper limbs, except for the clavicle, develop as secondary bones (see Figs 3 and 142a). The scapula develops from one main or primary ossification nucleus and from 6 or sometimes 8 secondary, or accessory nuclei. The main nucleus appears in the centre of the future scapula at the end of the second month of intrauierine development and gives rise to almost the whole bone. The accessory nuclei appear at different periods between the ages of 11 and 18 years and contribute to the formation of the processes, glenoid cavity, and the inferior angle and medial border of the scapula. All parts of the scapula fuse completely at the age of 20 to 24 years.

> 上肢的骨骼，除锁骨外，均作为次级骨发育（见图3和图142a）。肩胛骨由一个主要的或原始骨化中心以及6个或有时8个次级的或副骨化中心发育而来。主要骨化中心出现在胚胎发育第二个月末的未来肩胛骨中心，最终形成肩胛骨的绝大部分。副骨化中心则在11至18岁之间不同时间出现，并参与形成肩胛骨的突起、肩胛窝、下角及内侧缘。肩胛骨的所有部分在20至24岁之间完全融合。

The clavicle is the first bone to begin ossification and the last lo be completely ossified. It forms from two ossification centres: the main one gives rise to the greater part of the clavicle, the other gives origin to a small segment of the sternal end of the bone. The main ossification centres appear at the end of the first or the beginning of the second month of the intrauierine period, the sternal end of the bone develops later and its ossification begins at the age of 20-21 years. All parts of the clavicle fuse by the age of 23 or 24 years.

> 锁骨是最早开始骨化、最后完全骨化的骨骼。锁骨由两个骨化中心形成：主要的骨化中心发育为锁骨的大部分，另一个则形成锁骨胸骨端的一小段。主要的骨化中心出现在宫内期第一月末或第二月初，而胸骨端的骨化则较晚，通常在20-21岁时开始。锁骨的所有部分一般在23或24岁时完全融合。

The humerus develops from eight ossification centres, one main, primary, and seven accessory, secondary centres. The primary nucleus appears in the second month of the intrauierine period and gives origin to the whole shaft and the medial epicondyle. All secondary nuclei appear after birth, three of them give rise to the proximal epiphysis, and the other four to the distal epiphysis. These secondary ossification nuclei appear in the first year of life or much later (e.g. the nucleus of the lateral epiphysis appears by the age of 11 years), the proximal a little earlier than the distal nuclei; secondary ossification nuclei appear earlier in girls than in boys. The time of complete ossification also differs. The proximal epiphysis and the shaft fuse at 20-25 years of age, the distal epiphysis fuses with the shaft by the age of 20.

> 肱骨由八个骨化中心形成，其中一个是主要的原发性中心，其余七个为次要的继发性中心。原发性中心在胚胎期的第二个月出现，并发育为整个骨干和内上髁。所有继发性中心均在出生后出现，其中三个形成近端骨骺，其余四个形成远端骨骺。这些继发性骨化中心通常在生命的第一年内或更晚出现（例如，外侧骨骺的骨化中心在11岁左右才出现），近端骨骺的骨化中心比远端骨骺的出现时间略早；继发性骨化中心在女孩中出现的时间早于男孩。完全骨化的发生时间也有所不同。近端骨骺与骨干融合发生在20-25岁，远端骨骺与骨干融合则发生在20岁左右。

The ulna develops from three centres. One is the primary ossification centre which appears in the second month of the intrauterine period and gives rise to the shaft of the bone. The other two (sometimes three) are secondary centres. One appears at the age of 8 to 12 years and gives origin to the proximal epiphysis and

> 尺骨的发育来源于三个中心。其中一个为原发性骨化中心，出现在胎儿期的第二个月，形成骨的骨干。另外两个（有时三个）为继发性中心。其中一个在8至12岁出现，形成近端骨骺。

the other appears at 6 to 9 years and gives rise to the distal epiphysis. All parts fuse with the shaft by the age of 18 to 22 years.

> 另一种在6至9岁出现，形成远端骨骺。所有部分在18至22岁之前与骨干融合。

The radius develops from four ossification centres, one is a primary centre for the shaft, two arc secondary centres for the proximal and distal epiphyses, and the fourth is a secondary centre for the tuberosily of the radius. The fourth centre appears at the age of 14 and fuses with the diaphysis by 18 years. The primary nucleus forms in the second month of intrauterine life, the proximal nucleus at the age of 5 or 6 years, and the distal nucleus appears at the age of 2 or 3. The proximal epiphysis joins the shaft between the ages of 16 and 17, the distal epiphysis fuses with the shaft in the second year of life.

> 桡骨发育来自四个骨化中心，其中一个是骨干的原发性中心，两个是近端和远端骨骺的继发性中心，第四个是桡骨结节的继发性中心。第四个中心在14岁左右出现，并在18岁前与骨干融合。原发性中心在胎儿期第二个月形成，近端骨骺中心在5或6岁时出现，远端骨骺中心在2或3岁时出现。近端骨骺在16至17岁之间与骨干融合，远端骨骺则在出生后的第二年与骨干融合。

The bones of the hand develop in the following manner. The eight carpal bones remain cartilaginous until birth. Each develops from its own ossification centre. Ossification of the separate bones occurs in the following order: the capitate bone ossifies from an ossification centre in cartilage in the first year of life, the hamate bone at the beginning of the second year, the triquetral bone at the end of the second year, the lunate bone at the end of the fourth year, the trapezium at the age of 5, the scaphoid in the middle of the fifth year, the trapezoid at the age of 6, and the pisiform bone ossifies between the ages of 8 and 10 years. All metacarpal bones develop in cartilage. Each bone has two ossification centres, one is primary, diaphyseal, and the other is secondary, epiphyseal. The primary centres appear during the third month of intrauierine life and give origin to the shaft and base (except for the first metacarpal bone whose shaft and head arise from the primary centre, while the base forms from the secondary centre). The secondary ossification centres appear ai the age of 3-4-5 years; the epiphyses join ihe shaft at 14-16 years of age.

> 手部骨骼的发育过程如下。八块腕骨在出生时仍呈软骨状态。每块腕骨均来源于其自身的骨化中心。各块腕骨的骨化发生顺序如下：在生命的第一年，月骨（capitate bone）在软骨中的骨化中心开始骨化；在第二年的开始，钩骨（hamate bone）开始骨化；在第二年的末期，三角骨（triquetral bone）开始骨化；在第四年的末期，月骨（lunate bone）开始骨化；在5岁时，舟骨（trapezium）开始骨化；在第五年的中期，舟骨（scaphoid）开始骨化；在6岁时，大小多角骨（trapezoid）开始骨化；而豌豆骨（pisiform bone）则在8至10岁之间开始骨化。所有掌骨均在软骨中发育。每块骨有两个骨化中心，一个为原发性，位于骨干（diaphyseal）；另一个为继发性，位于骨骺（epiphyseal）。原发性骨化中心在胎儿宫内生活第三个月时出现，形成骨干和基底部（除第一掌骨外，其骨干和近端由原发性中心形成，而远端则由继发性中心形成）。继发性骨化中心在3至5岁之间出现；骨骺在14至16岁时与骨干融合。

Each phalanx develops in cartilage from two ossification nuclei: primary and secondary (accessory). The primary, diaphyseal nucleus, gives rise to the shaft and head of the phalanx, the epiphyseal nucleus gives origin to the base. The diaphyseal nucleus appears in all phalanges at the end of the second or beginning of the third month of intrauterine life, the epiphyseal nucleus forms at the age of 2 or 3. The ossification nuclei fuse between the ages of 16 and 20.

> 每一骨形成于软骨，来源于两个骨化中心：原发性与次发性（辅助性）。原发性骨化中心位于骨干部分，形成指骨的骨干和近端关节面；次发性骨化中心形成指骨的基底部。骨干的骨化中心在胎儿宫内生活第二个月末或第三个月初出现，而关节面的骨化中心则在2或3岁时形成。骨化中心通常在16至20岁之间融合。

![](_page_136_Picture_2.jpeg)

142a. *Bones of right upper limb (ossa membri superioris) of the newborn.*

> 142a. 新生儿右侧上肢的骨骼（ossamembri superioris）

I—clavicle 4—radius

> I—锁骨 4—桡骨

2 —scapula 5 —ulna

> 2 —肩胛骨 5 —尺骨

3 — humerus 6—bones of hand (ossa manus)

# THE BONES OF THE LOWER LIMB

> 下肢的骨胳

*Ossa membri inferioris*

> 下肢骨

The bones of the lower limb *fossa membri inferioris)* (Fig. 143) are divided into bones forming the girdle of the lower limb, or the pelvic girdle *(cingulum membri inferioris)* including the hip bones *(ossa coxae),* the skeleton of ihe free lower limb *(skeleton membri inferioris liheri)* which is represented by the femur in the ihigh, the tibia and fibula in the leg, and by the larsal bone *(ossa tarsalia)* and metatarsal bone *(ossa metatarsalia),*  and the phalanges of the digits of the foot *(ossa digttorum pedis).*

> 下肢骨（fossa membri inferioris）（图143）可分为构成下肢带（即骨盆带，cingulum membri inferioris）的骨，包括髋骨（ossa coxae）；自由下肢的骨架（skeleton membri inferioris liheri），由股骨（femur）、小腿的胫骨（tibia）和腓骨（fibula）、足部的跗骨（ossa tarsalia）和跖骨（ossa metatarsalia），以及足趾的指骨（ossa digitorum pedis）组成。

## 1 THE BONES OF THE PELVIC GIRDLE

> 1 骨盆带的骨骼

Both hip bones are joined anteriorly by means of a fibrous cartilage and posteriorly to the sacrum to form a strong ring of bone, the pelvis. Hence the name pelvic girdle.

> 两侧髋骨以前部通过纤维软骨相连，后部与骶骨相连，形成一个坚固的骨环，即骨盆。因此称为骨盆带。

## 2 THE HIP BONE

> 2 髋骨

bone consisting of three separate bones in early childhood; the il- later and the lines of their junction are not seen,

> 骨由三块独立的骨组成，见于儿童早期；髂骨、坐骨和耻骨的骨性结合线及结合线的骨缝在早期尚未显现。

The bodies of these bones unite to form the acetabulum on the *acetabuli).*

> 这些骨体联合形成髋臼（acetabulum）。

the process of development independent ossification points appear the acetabulum. in each of these bones, as a result of which they are joined by

> 独立 ossification 点在髋臼中出现。在这些骨中，由于这种现象，它们通过 [!note]- 术语说明
“ossification” 通常译作“骨化”，指骨骼形成的过程。此处指独立的骨化中心。 /no_break
连接。

The hip bone *(os coxae)* (Figs 143, 144-146) is a composite means of cartilage to the age of 16-17 years. The cartilage ossifies

> 髋骨（os coxae）（图143，144-146）是由软骨组成的复合结构，直到16-17岁左右才骨化。软骨骨化是指软骨逐渐被骨组织取代的过程。

ium *(os ilium),* the ischium *(os ischii),* and the pubis *(os pubis).* In the The acetabulum is bounded by a thick edge which is interadult these three bones fuse to form the single hip bone *(os coxae),* rupted in the anieroinferior part by the acetabular notch *(inasura*

> 髂骨（os ilium）、坐骨（os ischii）和耻骨（os pubis）。在成年个体中，这三块骨融合形成单一的髋骨（os coxae）。髋臼被一个厚边所包围，该厚边在髋臼的前下方被髋臼切迹（incisura acetabularis）所中断。

lateral surface of the hip bone. Medially to this edge the internal surface of the acetabulum The ilium forms the superior part, the ischium the posteroinfe- carries a smooth articular lunate surface *(fanes lunataj* which rior, and the pubis the anieroinferior part of the acetabulum. In bounds the acetabular fossa *(fossa acetabuli)* located on the floor of

> 髋骨的外侧表面。此边缘内侧，髋臼的内表面由髂骨形成髋臼的上部，坐骨形成髋臼的后下方，耻骨形成髋臼的前下方。髋臼窝（acetabular fossa）位于髋臼窝的底部，其表面为光滑的月牙状关节面（lunate surface）。

#### 2.1.1 T H E IUU M

> 2.1.1 黄韧带

*illi);* it forms the upper part of the acetabulum. The medial surface *Hi).*

> 髂骨；它构成髋臼的上部。 medial 面 Hi)。

The ilium *(os ilium)* (Figs 144-149) is the largest hip bone. Its of the body bears the arcuate line *(linea arcuata)* above which is the lower end is thick and is called the body of the ilium *(corpus ossis* wide flat part of the bone known as the ala of the ilium *(ala ossis il-*

> 髂骨（os ilium）（图144-149）是最大的髋骨。其主体部分承载着弓状线（linea arcuata），弓状线之上为髂骨的下端，该部分较厚，称为髂骨体（corpus ossis ilii）。骨的宽而扁平部分称为髂骨翼（ala ossis ilii）。

> 右下肢骨骼（ossa membri inferioris）；前侧 aspect

THE HIP BONE

> 髋骨

![](_page_139_Figure_2.jpeg)

144. Right hip bone (os coxae); medial aspect (%).

> 右侧髋骨（os coxae）；内侧方面（%）

THE HIP BONE 143

> 髋骨 143

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_141_Picture_2.jpeg)

146. *Right hip bone (os coxae);* anterior aspect

> 右髋骨（os coxae）；前面

The lower parl of the ala adjoining the body is narrow, the upper part is wide. The border of the upper part is thick and carries three rough lines, or lips: the outer Up *(labium externum),* the inner lip *(labium internum)^* and an intermediate area *(linea intermedia)* between them; these lines give attachment to muscles. The upper peripheral border of the ala is called the iliac crest *(crista iliaca).* It is S-shaped and terminates anteriorly as a projection which is easily felt through the skin and is called the anterior superior iliac spine *(spina iliaca anterior superior).* Posteriorly the crest ends as the posterior superior iliac spine *(spina iliaca posterior superior).*

> 髂骨翼与躯干相连的部分下方较窄，上方较宽。上方部分的边界较厚，并带有三条粗糙的线或唇状结构：外侧唇（外唇，labium externum）、内侧唇（内唇，labium internum）以及二者之间的中间区域（中间线，linea intermedia）；这些线状结构为肌肉附着提供位置。髂骨翼的上缘称为髂嵴（髂嵴，crista iliaca）。髂嵴呈S形，向前延伸形成一个容易通过皮肤触及的突起，称为前上棘（前上髂棘，spina iliaca anterior superior）。向后延伸则形成后上棘（后上髂棘，spina iliaca posterior superior）。

Below the anterior superior spine the anterior end of the ala has an iliac, or lunate notch which is limited below by the anterior inferior iliac spine *(spina iliaca anterior inferior).* Below the spine the border of the bone curves to the front and reaches the iliopubic eminence *(eminentia iliopubica)* which marks the junction of the body of the ilium and the pubis. Below the posterior superior iliac spine the posterior border of the ala carries the posterior inferior iliac spine *(spina iliaca posterior inferior)* where the greater sciatic notch *(incisura ischiadica major)* arises; the body of the ilium contributes to its formation.

> 在前上棘下方，骨翼的前端有一个髂窝（或称月状面），其下方由前下髂嵴（spina iliaca anterior inferior）所限制。在棘的下方，骨的边缘向前弯曲，到达髂耻隆起（eminentia iliopubica），该隆起标志着髂骨体与耻骨的交界处。在后上棘下方，骨翼的后缘有后下髂嵴（spina iliaca posterior inferior），此处为大骨盆凹（incisura ischiadica major）的起点；髂骨体参与该凹的形成。

Thc lateral surface of the ala ilii is called the gluteal surface *(fades glutea)* and bears marks of the origin of the gluteus muscles, namely the posterior, anterior, and inferior gluteal lines.

> 髂骨翼的外侧表面称为臀面（facies glutea），其上留有臀大肌起始处的痕迹，即后臀线、前臀线和下臀线。

The posterior gluteal line *(linea glutea posterior)* is in front of the posterior superior iliac spine and runs from the outer lip of the iliac crest to the base of the superior inferior iliac spine.

> 后侧臀线（linea glutea posterior）位于后上髂嵴的前方，自髂嵴的外侧缘延伸至上、下髂嵴结合部的基底部。

The middle gluteal line *(linea glutea anterior)* arises from the anterior superior iliac spine, stretches backwards and curves downwards to reach the superior margin of the greater sciatic notch.

> 中臀线（前臀线）起自前上棘，向后延伸并向下弯曲，到达大粗隆孔上缘。

The inferior gluteal line *(linea glutea inferior)* passes above the superior margin of the acetabulum.

> 臀下横线（inferior gluteal line）位于髋臼上缘的上方。

The medial surface of the ala ilii is smooth and slightly concave in the anterior part and is called the iliac fossa *(fossa iliaca).*  The inferior margin of the fossa is limited by the arcuate line.

> 髂骨翼的内侧表面光滑，在前方稍凹陷，称为髂窝（髂凹，fossa iliaca）。髂窝的下缘由弓状线所限制。

In the posterior part of the medial surface of the ala, above the greater sciatic notch, is the auricular surface *(fades auricularis)*  bounded in front and below by the paraglenoid sulcus. To the back of and above the auricular surface is the iliac tuberosity *(tuberositas iliaca).*

> 在坐骨大切迹上方、坐骨翼内面后部的耳状面（耳状面，fades auricularis）前方和下方由肩胛骨窝沟（paraglenoid sulcus）所界。耳状面后上方为髂骨粗隆（髂骨粗隆，tuberositas iliaca）。

#### 2.1.2 T H E ISCHIUM

> 2.1.2 骨坐骨（Ischium）

The ischium *(os isckii)* (Figs 144-149) is made up of two parts: a body *(corpus ossis ischii)* and a ramus *(ramus ossis isckii)* which is curved at an angle.

> 坐骨（ischium，os ischii）（图144-149）由两部分组成：主体（corpus ossis ischii）和一个呈角度弯曲的支（ramus ossis ischii）。

The body of the bone forms the postcroinferior part of the acetabulum. On the posterior surface of the body is a bony projection called the ischial spine *(spina ischiadica).* Above and to the back of the spine is the greater sciatic notch *(incisura ischiadica major).* The body of the bone is continuous downwards with the upper part of the ramus of the ischium. The lesser sciatic notch *(incisura ischiadica*

> 骨体构成髋臼的后下方部分。骨体的后表面有一骨性突起，称为坐骨棘（spina ischiadica）。坐骨棘的上方和后方为大坐骨切迹（incisura ischiadica major）。骨体向下与坐骨支的上部相连。小坐骨切迹（incisura ischiadica minor）位于坐骨棘的前方。

*minor)* is on the posterior surface of this part below the ischial spine. The anterior border of this portion of the ramus bears in its superior part the posterior obturator tubercle *(tuberculum obturatorium postenus).* A thickened area with a rough surface is located on the posteroinferior aspect of the curved segment of the ramus; it ts called the ischial tuberosity *(tuber ischiadicum).* The inferior part of the ramus fuses anteriorly with the inferior pubic ramus *(ramus inferior ossis pubis).*

> （小）部分位于该部分ischial嵴下方的后表面。该支的前缘在上部有后外侧坐骨结节（后外侧坐骨结节）。在支的弯曲段的后下方有一个表面粗糙的增厚区域，称为坐骨结节（坐骨结节）。支的下部从前方向下与下部耻骨支（下耻骨支）融合。

#### 2.1.3 T H E PUBIS

> 2.1.3 骨盆下部（耻骨）

The pubis *(os pubis)* (Figs 144-149) is made up of three parts: a body *(corpus ossis pubis)* and two rami: superior *(ramus superior ossis pubis)* and inferior *(ramus inferior ossis pubis).*

> 耻骨（os pubis）（图144-149）由三部分组成：耻骨体（corpus ossis pubis）、耻骨上支（ramus superior ossis pubis）和耻骨下支（ramus inferior ossis pubis）。

The body of the pubis forms the anterior part of the acetabulum and is continuous directly with the superior ramus extending forwards, downwards, and medially.

> 耻骨体构成髋臼的前部，并直接与向前、向下及向内延伸的耻骨上支相连。

The superior edge of this ramus is sharp and is called the pectineal line *(pecten ossis pubis).* Its anterior end is the pubic tubercle *(tuberculum pubicum).* The inferior edge of the superior ramus is sharp and is called the obturator crest *(crista obturatoria).* In its anterior part it carries the anterior obturator tubercle *(tuberculum obturatorium anterius).* The superior ramus is continuous anteriorly with the inferior ramus at an angle.

> 此骨枝的上缘锐利，称为耻骨梳（耻骨梳）。其前端为耻骨结节（耻骨结节）。上骨枝的下缘也锐利，称为闭孔嵴（闭孔嵴）。在它的前部，有前闭孔突（前闭孔突）。上骨枝在前方向下与下骨枝以一定角度相连。

On the medial surface of the pubis is a rough symphyseal surface *(fades sympkysialis).*

> 耻骨内侧面上有一个粗糙的耻骨联合面（symphysis pubis）。

The pubic rami together with the ischium limit the obturator foramen *(foramen obturatum).* The superior edge of this foramen is grooved from back to front and medially by a wide obturator groove *(sulcus obturatorius)* lodging the obturator vessels and nerve.

> 耻骨支与坐骨共同构成闭孔（foramen obturatum）。该孔的上缘自后向前及内侧方向有一个宽阔的闭孔沟（sulcus obturatorius），容纳闭孔血管和神经。

The pelvis (see Figs 147-149, 150-153) is formed by the two hip bones, the sacrum, the coccyx, and the interpubic cartilage. They are joined by joints, ligaments, and two obturator membranes to form a strong bony ring. A greater (or false) and a lesser (or true) pelvis are distinguished.

> 骨盆（见图147-149、150-153）由两侧髋骨、骶骨、尾骨和耻骨间软骨构成。这些结构通过关节、韧带以及两层闭孔膜连接，形成一个坚固的骨环。根据解剖学特征，骨盆可分为大骨盆（或假骨盆）和小骨盆（或真骨盆）。

The false (greater) pelvis *(pelvis major)* is bounded on the sides by the alae of the ilium and posteriorly by the lower lumbar vertebrae and the base of the sacrum. The arcuate line of the pelvis *(tinea terminalis)* is the inferior boundary of the false pelvis. It runs on the crest of the pubis, then on the arcuate line of the ilium, and passes on the promontorium to the contralatcral side where it stretches in a like manner.

> 假（大）骨盆（pelvis major）由髂骨翼在两侧和第4、5腰椎及骶骨基底部在后方构成。骨盆的弓状线（tinea terminalis）是假骨盆的下界。该线沿耻骨嵴走行，继而沿髂骨弓状线行进，再延伸至对侧的骨盆突，以类似的方式延伸。

The true (lesser) pelvis *(pelvis minor)* is below the arcuate line. Its lateral walls are formed by the lower part of the bodies of the

> 真骨盆（小骨盆）位于弓状线以下。其侧壁由荐骨体的下部构成。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_143_Picture_7.jpeg)

147. *Male pelvis;* anterior aspect (%).

> 男性骨盆；前方视图（%）。

ilia and the ischia, the posterior wall by the sacrum and coccyx, and ihc anterior wall by the two pubic bones.

> 髂骨和坐骨构成后壁，骶骨和尾骨构成后壁，两耻骨构成前壁。

The inferior pubic rami meet to form the subpubic angle *(angulus subpubicus)* in the male and the pubic arch *(arcus pubis)* in the female.

> 耻骨下支在男性会汇合形成耻骨下角（angulus subpubicus），在女性则形成耻骨弓（arcus pubis）。

The junction of the false pelvis and the true pelvis, marked by the arcuate line, is the superior aperture (inlet) of the pelvis *(apertura pelvis superior).* The inferior aperture (outlet) of the pelvis *(apertura pelvis inferior)* is limited laterally by the ischial tuberosities, posteriorly by the coccyx, and anteriorly by the pubic symphysis and the inferior pubic rami.

> 假骨盆与真骨盆的交界处，以弓状线为标志，为骨盆的上口（骨盆入口，apertura pelvis superior）。骨盆的下口（骨盆出口，apertura pelvis inferior）则由两侧的坐骨结节、后方的尾骨以及前方的耻骨联合和下耻骨支所限制。

The pelvis contains the organs of the alimentary and urogenilal systems, large vessels and nerves. Its shape and dimensions are marked by individual features and sexual differences.

> 骨盆容纳了消化系统和泌尿生殖系统的器官、大血管和神经。其形态和尺寸受到个体特征和性别差异的影响。

The line connecting the middle points of the straight diameters of the pelvic inlet and outlet is called the axis of the pelvis *(axispelvis)* (Fig. 153). It forms an anterior concavity and runs parallel to the pelvic surface of the sacrum.

> 连接骨盆入口和出口直径中点的连线称为骨盆轴（axispelvis）（图153）。它形成向前的凹面，并与骶骨的骨盆面平行。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_144_Picture_7.jpeg)

148. *Female pelvis;* anterior aspect

> 女性骨盆；前面观

## 4 THE SKELETON OF THE FREE LOWER LIMB

> 4 自由下肢的骨骼系统

## 5 THE FEMUR

> 5 股骨

The femur (see Figs 143; 154-157, 159) is the longest and thickest tubular bone in the human skeleton. A body (shaft) and two ends, upper and lower, are distinguished in it.

> 股骨（见图143；图154-157，159）是人体骨骼中最长、最粗的管状骨。其结构可分为一个主体（骨干）和两个端部，即上端和下端。

The body (shaft) of the femur *(corpus femoris)* is cylindrical, slightly twisted about the axis and curved forwards. Its anterior surface is smooth, the posterior surface carries a rough iinca aspera which gives attachment to muscles. The line is divided into two lips, lateral and medial. The lateral lip *(labium laterals)* deviates laterally in the lower third of the bone and passes to the lateral condyle; in the upper third it is continuous with the gluteal tuberosity *(tuberositas glulea).* The medial lip *(labium mediate)* deviates in the lower third of the femur towards the medial condyle and together with the lateral lip limits a triangular popliteal surface *(facie\* poplitca).* In the upper part the media) lip is continuous with the spiral line *(linea pectinea).* Approximately in the middle part of the shaft, to the side of the linea aspcra is a nutrient foramen *(foramen nutricium)* which leads into a proximally running nutrient canal *(canalis nutricius).*

> 股骨体（corpus femoris）呈圆柱形，略呈轴向扭转，并向前弯曲。其前面光滑，后面有一粗糙的粗线（linea aspera），供肌肉附着。该线分为两个唇状突起，即外侧唇（labium laterale）和内侧唇（labium mediale）。外侧唇（labium laterale）在骨的下三分之一处向外侧偏移，并延伸至外侧髁；在上三分之一处，它与臀肌粗隆（tuberositas glutea）相连。内侧唇（labium mediale）在股骨的下三分之一处向内侧髁偏移，并与外侧唇共同形成一个三角形的腘面（facies poplitea）。在上部，内侧唇与螺旋线（linea pectinea）相连。在股骨体的中段附近，粗线的外侧有一营养孔（foramen nutricium），其通向向近端延伸的营养管（canalis nutricius）。

The upper, or proximal end of the femur *(extremitas superior,* s. *epiphysis proximalis jemoris)* carries two rough prominences at the junction with the shaft. These are the greater and lesser trochanters.

> 股骨的上端（即近端，extremitas superior, s. epiphysis proximalis femoris）在与骨干连接处有两个粗糙的突起，称为大转子和小转子。

The greater trochanter *(trochanter major)* projects upwards and backwards and occupies the lateral part of the proximal end of the bone. Its lateral surface can be easily felt through the skin, the medial surface carries the trochanteric fossa *(fossa trockanterica).* The trochanteric line *(linea intertroekanterica)* runs on the anterior sur-

> 大转子（trochanter major）向上、向后突出，占据骨近端的外侧部分。其外侧表面可通过皮肤轻易触及，内侧表面则有转子窝（fossa trochanterica）。转子线（linea intertrochanterica）位于前侧表面，

face of the femur from the tip of the greater trochanter downwards and medially and is continuous with the spiral line. The trochanteric crest *(crista intertroekanterica)* runs in the same direction but on the posterior surface of the proximal end and terminates at the lesser trochanter *(trochanter minor)* situated on the posteromedial surface of the proximal end of the bone. The rest of the proximal end of the femur projects upwards and medially and is called the neck of the femur *(collum femoris) \* it terminates as a spherical head of the femur *(caput femoris).* The neck is slightly flattened in the frontal plane. It meets the shaft of the bone at an angle of about 90° in females and at a larger angle in males. The head carries on its surface a small rough pit called the fossa of the head of the femur *(fovea capitis femoris)* where the ligament of the head is attached; the rest of the surface is smooth.

> 股骨的前面从大粗隆尖端向下并向内延伸，与螺旋线连续。大粗隆嵴（intertrochanteric crest）朝同一方向延伸，但位于近端的后表面，并终止于小粗隆（trochanter minor），小粗隆位于骨近端的后内侧面上。股骨近端其余部分向上并向内延伸，称为股骨颈（collum femoris），其末端形成股骨头（caput femoris），呈球状。股骨颈在矢状面上略呈扁平状。股骨颈与骨干相接处的角度在女性约为90°，而在男性则为更大的角度。股骨头表面有一个小的粗糙凹陷，称为股骨头凹（fovea capitis femoris），此处附着股骨头韧带；其余表面则光滑。

The lower, or distal end of the femur *(extremitas inferior* s. *epiphysis distalis femoris)* is thick and wide and terminates as two condyles, medial and lateral *(condylus medialis* et *condylus lateralis).* The medial condyle is larger than the lateral one. The lateral surface of the lateral condyle and the medial surface of the medial condyle carry, respectively, the lateral epicondyle *(epicondylus lateralis)* and the medial epicondyle *(epicondylus medialis).* The surfaces of the two condyles facing each other are limited by the intcrcondylar notch *(fossa intercondylaris)* which is separated above from the popliteal surface by the intercondylar line *(linea intercondylaris).* The surfaces of both condyles are smooth and fuse to form the patellar surface *(fades patellaris)* for articulation of the patella with the femur.

> 股骨的下端（或远端）（extremitas inferior s. epiphysis distalis femoris）粗大而宽广，终末形成两个髁，即内侧髁和外侧髁（condylus medialis et condylus lateralis）。内侧髁比外侧髁大。外侧髁的外侧面和内侧髁的内侧面分别有外侧髁突（epicondylus lateralis）和内侧髁突（epicondylus medialis）。两个髁相对的面被髁间窝（fossa intercondylaris）所限制，该窝在上方由髁间线（linea intercondylaris）与腘面（popliteal surface）分隔。两个髁的表面光滑并融合形成髌面（fossa patellaris），与髌骨形成关节。

## 6 THE PATELLA

> 6 膝盖骨

The patella knee cap (see Figs 143, 158, 159) is the largest sesamoid bone of the skeleton. It is located in the tendon of the quadriceps femoris muscle and can be easily felt through the skin. When the limb is extended at the knee the patella is easily moved lo the sides, upwards, and downwards.

> 髌骨（见图143、158、159）是骨骼系统中最大的籽骨。它位于股四头肌腱内，可通过皮肤轻易触及。当膝关节伸直时，髌骨可轻易地向两侧、向上及向下移动。

The superior border of the patella is rounded and is called the

> 髌骨上缘呈圆形，称为[!note]- 术语说明
“patella” 通常译作“髌骨”，是膝关节的重要组成部分，位于股四头肌腱下方。

base *(basis patellae).* The inferior border projects slightly to fonn the apex of the patella *(apex patellae).*

> 基底（patellae basis）。下缘略微突出，形成髌骨的顶端（apex patellae）。

The anterior surface *(fades anterior)* of the bone is rough. The posterior, articular surface *(fades articularis)* is divided by a vertical ridge into a smaller medial part and a larger lateral part. This surface articulates with the patellar surface of the femur.

> 骨的前表面（前侧）粗糙。后侧、关节面（关节面）被一条垂直的嵴分为较小的内侧部分和较大的外侧部分。此表面与股骨的髌面相接。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_152_Picture_2.jpeg)

154. *Right femur;*  anterior aspect (%).

> 右股骨；前面（%）

155. *Right femur;*  posterior aspect (%)•

> 右股骨；后侧（%）

![](_page_153_Picture_2.jpeg)

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_153_Picture_3.jpeg)

156. Right femur; medial aspect  $(\frac{1}{3})$ .

> 右股骨；内侧方面

157. Distal end of right femur; inferior aspect  $\binom{1}{2}$ .

> 右股骨远端；下外侧面

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_154_Picture_2.jpeg)

158. *Right patella A*—anterior aspect; B — posterior aspect

> 右髌骨 A—前部；B—后部

![](_page_154_Picture_4.jpeg)

> 7 右股骨远端及右胫骨和腓骨近端（X线片）

- **1—femur**

> 1—股骨  
2 —股骨内上髁  
3—髌骨  
4 股骨内髁

6 —胫骨内髁
