> 肋骨与椎骨的韧带及关节；上部（4/5）。

(Part of eighth thoracic vertebra and right seventh rib removed by horizontal section.)

> （第八胸椎部分及右侧第七肋骨经水平切面切除。）

- *lis)* (see Figs 187; 190-192) is a paired combined joint formed by the superior articular facets of the axis and the inferior articular facets of the atlas. It allows a poor range of movements because the articulating surfaces are flat and even. The articular facets of the atlas make gliding movement in all directions in relation to the axis,
- 2. The median atlantoaxial joint *(articulatio atlantoaxialis mediana)* (see Figs 187, 191, 192) forms between the posterior surface of the anterior arch of the atlas (fovea dentis) and the dens of the axis. Besides, the posterior articular facet of the dens forms a joint with the transverse ligament of the atlas.

> (见图187；190-192) 是一个成对的联合关节，由寰椎的上关节面和枢椎的下关节面共同形成。由于关节面平坦且平齐，此关节允许的活动范围较小。寰椎的关节面相对于枢椎可作各个方向的滑动运动。

中枕关节（articulatio atlantoaxialis mediana）（见图187、191、192）由寰椎前弓的后表面（即齿突窝）与枢椎的齿突形成。此外，齿突的后关节面还与寰椎的横韧带形成关节。

The joints of the dens are related to the gr°»p of trochoid, or pivot joints and allow rotation of the atlas together with the head about the dens of the axis, i.e. turning the head to the right and to the left.

> 齿突关节属于滑车关节（trochoid joints）或旋转关节（pivot joints），允许寰椎与头骨一起围绕轴椎的齿突进行旋转，即头部向左右转动。

The ligaments of the two joints described are as follows.

> 所描述的两个关节的韧带如下。

- 1. The membrana tectoria (see Figs 190, 192) is a broad, rather dense fibrous sheet stretched from the anterior border of the foramen magnum to the body of the axis. It is called so (L *tectum* roof) because it covers posteriorly (from the aspect of the vertebral canal) the dens, the transverse ligament of the atlas, and other structures of this joint. It is regarded as a part of the posterior longitudinal ligament of the vertebral column.
- 2. The cruciate ligament of the atlas *(ligamcntum crueifomu atlantis)* (see Fig. 190) consists of two bands (longitudinal and transverse). The stout connective-tissue transverse band stretches between the inner parts of the lateral mass of the atlas. It adjoins the posterior articular surface of the dens of the axis and reinforces it. This band is called the transverse ligament of the atlas *(Ugamentum transversum atlantis)* (see Figs 190, 192). The longitudinal band *(fasciculus longitudinalis)* is made up of two, upper and lower, bands. The upper band runs from the middle of the transverse ligament

> 膜性韧带（见图190、192）是一片宽阔且较为致密的纤维膜，从枕骨大孔的前缘延伸至寰椎体。由于它在椎管的后方覆盖了齿突、寰椎横韧带及其他相关结构，因此被称为“膜性韧带”（L. tectum roof）。它被认为是脊柱后纵韧带的一部分。

寰椎十字韧带（ligamentum cruciferum atlantis）（见图190）由两条带状结构组成（纵向带和横向带）。粗壮的结缔组织横向带连接于寰椎侧块的内侧部分。它附着于寰椎齿突的后关节面，并加强该关节面。这条带被称为寰椎横韧带（ligamentum transversum atlantis）（见图190、192）。纵向带（fasciculus longitudinalis）由两条带组成，上带和下带。上带起始于寰椎横韧带的中部，[!note]- 术语说明  
“fasciculus longitudinalis” 在此处应译为“纵向带”而非直译为“纵向束”，以符合中文医学术语习惯。

of the atlas to the anterior surface of the foramen magnum. The lower band, which also arises from the middle of the transverse ligament, passes downwards to be attached to the posterior surface of the body of the axis.

> 从寰椎到达枕骨大孔的前表面。下部的韧带也起源于横韧带的中点，向下延伸并附着于枢椎椎体的后表面。

3. The apical ligament of the odontoid process *(ligamentum aptas dentis)* (Figs 187, 191) stretches between the apex of the dens and the middle of the anterior border of the foramen magnum. It is considered a rudiment of the chorda dorsalis.

> 齿状突尖韧带（ligamentum aptas dentis）（图187、191）自齿状突尖延伸至枕骨大孔前缘中部。它被认为是由背神经索（chorda dorsalis）退化的残余结构。

4. The alar ligaments of the odontoid process *(ligamenta alaria)*  (see Figs 190, 191) are formed of bands of connective-tissue fibres stretched between the lateral surfaces of the dens and medial surfaces of the occipital condyles.

> 齿状突的翼状韧带（ligamenta alaria）（见图190、191）由连接齿状突两侧表面与枕骨髁内侧表面的结缔组织纤维束构成。

## 1 ARTICULATIONS OF THE RIBS

> 1 肋骨的关节

The joints formed by the ribs allow movements. The posterior ends of the ribs unite with the bodies and transverse processes of the thoracic vertebrae to form the costovertebral joints *(articulationes costovertebrales),*  the anterior ends unite with the sternum to form the sternocostal joints *(articulatwncs sternocostales).*

> 由肋骨形成的关节允许运动。肋骨的后端与胸椎的椎体和横突相连，形成肋椎关节（articulationes costovertebrales）；肋骨的前端与胸骨相连，形成肋软骨关节（articulationes sternocostales）。

#### 1.1.1 **T HE COSTOVERTEBRAL JOINTS**

> 1.1.1 肋椎关节

The posterior ends of the ribs articulate with the vertebrae by means of two joints.

> 肋骨的后端通过两个关节与椎骨相接。

1. The joint of the head of a rib *(articulatio capitis costae)* {Figs 193-196) is formed by the articular facet of the head of the rib and the costal facets of the vertebral bodies. The heads of the second to tenth ribs are conical and come in contact with the corresponding articular facets of the bodies of two adjacent vertebrae.

> 肋头关节（articulatio capitis costae）{图193-196}由肋头的关节面与椎体的肋凹共同构成。第二至第十肋的肋头呈圆锥形，与相邻两个椎体的对应关节面相接触。

The facets of **the** vertebral bodies are usually formed by a smaller superior costal facet *(fovea costalis superior)* located in the lower part of the body of the next vertebra above and a larger inferior costal facet *(fovea costalis inferior)* at the upper border of the next vertebra below. The first, eleventh, and twelfth ribs articulate with the facet of only one vertebra. The articular facets of the vertebrae and heads of the ribs are covered by fibrous cartilage.

> 椎体的关节面通常由上位椎骨下部的小型上肋关节面（上肋凹）和下位椎骨上缘的大型下肋关节面（下肋凹）共同形成。第一、第十一和第十二肋只与一个椎体的关节面相接。椎体的关节面和肋头均被纤维软骨覆盖。

The intra-articular ligament of the joint of the head of rib *(ligamentum capitis costae intraarticulare)* is lodged in the cavity of the joints of the second to tenth ribs. It runs from the crest of the head to the intervertebral disc and divides the joint cavity into two compartments. The articular capsule is thin and strengthened by the radiant ligament of the joint of the head of the rib *(ligamentum capitis costae radiatum)* which arises from the anterior surface of the head of the rib and is attached fan-wise to two adjacent vertebrae and the intervertebral disc.

> 肋头关节内的韧带（肋头关节内韧带，ligamentum capitis costae intraarticulare）位于第二至第十肋骨关节腔内。该韧带自肋头的嵴部延伸至椎间盘，将关节腔分为两个腔室。关节囊较薄，由肋头关节的放射状韧带（肋头关节放射韧带，ligamentum capitis costae radiatum）加强。该韧带起自肋头的前表面，呈扇形附着于相邻的两个椎骨和椎间盘上。

2. The costotransverse joint *(articulatio costotransversaria)* (see Figs 193, 194, 196) is formed by the articular facet of the tubercle of a **rib** *(fades articularis tuberculis costae)* and the costal facet *(fovea costalis transversalis)* of one of the transverse processes of the thoracic vertebrae. Only the upper ten ribs have such joints. The articular facets are covered by hyaline cartilage. The thin articular capsule is attached to the edges of the facets.

> 肋头横突关节（articulatio costotransversaria）（见图193、194、196）由肋骨头的关节面（fades articularis tuberculis costae）和胸椎横突的肋凹（fovea costalis transversalis）共同构成。仅有前10对肋骨具有此类关节。关节面被透明软骨覆盖。薄层的关节囊附着于关节面的边缘。

**The** joint is strengthened by the following ligaments.

> 关节由以下韧带加强。

- A. The superior costotransverse ligament *(ligamentum costotransversarium superius)* arises from the inferior surface of a transverse process and is attached to the crest of the neck of the next rib below.
- B. The lateral costotransverse ligament *(ligamentum costotransversarium laterale)* is stretched between the bases of the transverse and spinous processes and the posterior surface of the neck of the next rib below.
- C. The inferior costotransverse ligament *(ligamentum costotransversarium)* is lodged between the posterior surface of the neck of a rib and the anterior surface of the transverse process of the corresponding vertebra.

> A. 上方肋横韧带（superior costotransverse ligament / ligamentum costotransversarium superius）起自横突的下表面，并附着于下方肋骨颈部的骨嵴上。  
B. 侧方肋横韧带（lateral costotransverse ligament / ligamentum costotransversarium laterale）位于横突和棘突基底部之间，并连接至下方肋骨颈部的后表面。  
C. 下方肋横韧带（inferior costotransverse ligament / ligamentum costotransversarium）位于肋骨颈部的后表面与相应椎体横突前表面之间。

The articulations of the head and tubercle of the rib are combined (cylindrical or pivot) joints because they are connected functionally: movements occur at both joints during respiration.

> 肋头与肋结节的关节组合为（圆柱形或旋转）关节，因为它们在功能上相互连接：呼吸时两个关节都会发生运动。

![](_page_192_Picture_2.jpeg)

194. *Ligaments and joints of ribs and vertebrae;* posterior aspect (%).

> 肋骨与椎骨的韧带及关节；后侧（%）

![](_page_193_Picture_2.jpeg)

195. Ligaments and joints of ribs and sternum; anterior aspect (\(\frac{2}{3}\)). (Anterior parts of ribs and sternum on left side partly removed by frontal section.)

> 肋骨与胸骨的韧带和关节；前外侧（$\frac{2}{3}$）。(左侧肋骨和胸骨的前部部分被额面剖开移除。)

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_194_Picture_2.jpeg)

196. *Ligaments and joints of ribs, vertebrae, and sternum;* superior aspect (%).

> 肋骨、椎骨和胸骨的韧带与关节；上部（%）

(Union of fifth pair of ribs with fifth thoracic vertebra and corresponding sternal segment. Joint between head of left rib and vertebra is represented semischernatically.)

> （第五对肋骨与第五胸椎及相应的肋骨软骨段相连。左侧肋头与椎体的关节以半解剖方式表示。）

## 2 T H E STERNOCOSTAL JOINTS

> 2 胸骨肋关节

The anterior ends of the ribs terminate as costal cartilages. The costal cartilage of the first rib is fused with the sternum (synchondrosis). Those of the second to seventh ribs articulate with the costal notches of the sternum to form the sternocostal joints *(articulationes sternocostaUs)* (Figs 195, 196). The cavity of these joints is a narrow vertical slit. The cavity of the second sternocostal joint contains the intra-articular sternocostal ligament *(ligamenlum sternoeostale intraarticulare),* which passes from the second costal cartilage to the junction of the manubrium and body of the sternum.

> 肋骨的前端终止为肋软骨。第一肋的肋软骨与胸骨融合（软骨结合）。第二至第七肋的肋软骨与胸骨的肋凹形成胸肋关节（articulationes sternocostales）（见图195、196）。这些关节的腔隙是一个狭窄的垂直裂隙。第二胸肋关节的腔隙内含有关节内胸肋韧带（ligamentum sternocostale intraarticulare），该韧带由第二肋软骨延伸至胸骨柄与胸骨体的连接处。

In the cavities of the other sternocostal joints this ligament is either poorly pronounced or absent.

> 在其他胸肋关节的腔隙中，该韧带要么不明显，要么缺失。

The capsules of these joints are formed by the perichondrium of the costal cartilages and are strengthened by the sternocostal ligaments *(ligamenta sternocostalis radiata)* among which the anterior ligaments are stronger than the posterior ones.

> 这些关节的关节囊由肋软骨的软骨膜形成，并由胸肋韧带（放射状胸肋韧带）加强，其中前方的韧带比后方的更强。

These ligaments fan out from the end of the costal cartilage to

> 这些韧带从肋软骨末端向外扇形展开。

the anterior and posterior surfaces of the sternum and intersect and interlace with those on the opposite side and with ligaments located above and below them. As a result a strong fibrous layer covering the sternum forms. It is called the sternal membrane *(membrana sterni).*

> 胸骨的前后面与对侧的相应面相互交叠并交织，同时与位于其上方和下方的韧带相连接。结果形成一层坚固的纤维层覆盖胸骨。这层结构称为胸骨膜（membrana sterni）。

The bands of fibres descending from the anterior surfaces of the sixth and seventh costal cartilages obliquely and medially to the xiphoid process form the costoxyphoid ligaments *(ligamenta costoxiphoideaj.*

> 从第六和第七肋软骨前表面向下斜行并向胸骨剑突方向延伸的纤维束形成肋胸骨韧带（ligamenta costoxiphoideaj）。

The fifth to ninth costal cartilages are joined to one another by means of dense fibrous tissue to form the interchondral joints *(articulaiiona interckondraUs).*

> 第五至第九对肋软骨通过致密的纤维组织相互连接，形成软骨间关节（articulatio interchondralis）。

The tenth rib is joined to the cartilage of the ninth rib by fibrous tissue, while the cartilages of the eleventh and twelfth ribs end freely between the abdominal muscles.

> 第十肋骨通过纤维组织与第九肋骨软骨相连，而第十一和第十二肋骨的软骨则在腹肌之间自由终止。

![](_page_195_Picture_2.jpeg)

197. *Right mandibular joint (articulatio temporomandibularis);* lateral aspect (%).

> 右侧下颌关节（颞下颌关节）；侧方（%）

## 3 ARTICULATIONS OF THE BONES OF THE SKULL

> 3 颅骨骨连结

to one another by fibrous connective tissue to form syndesmoses. tion *'The Skull as a WhoU.*  The bones of the base of the skull articulate by means of cartilaginous tissue to form synchondroses. Both are replaced with age by bony tissue to form synostoses.

> 通过纤维性结缔组织相互连接形成骨缝（syndesmoses）。头骨（The Skull as a Whole）的颅底骨通过软骨组织连接形成软骨联合（synchondroses）。两者均随年龄增长被骨组织取代，形成骨性联合（synostoses）。

Except for the mandible, the bones of the skull articulate by The fontanelles *(fonticuli)* (see Figs 99, 100) deserve mention means of contiguous joints. The bones of the skull cap are joined among the syndesmoses. They are described in details in the see-

> 除下颌骨外，颅骨各骨之间通过相邻的关节相连接。颅顶部的骨之间通过骨缝（囟门，fonticuli）相连（见图99、100）。骨缝属于骨性联合（syndesmoses），其详细描述见下文。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_196_Picture_2.jpeg)

198. *Right mandibular joint (articulatio temporomandibularis)*; lateral aspect (%) .

> 右下颌关节（颞下颌关节）；侧方（%）

(Joint opened by sagittal section.)

> （通过矢状面切开打开关节。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_197_Picture_2.jpeg)

199. *Right mandibular joint (articulatio temporomandibularis);* medial aspect (%).

> 右下颌关节（颞下颌关节）；内侧面（%）

## 4 THE MANDIBULAR JOINT

> 4 下颌关节

The mandibular joint *(articulatio temporomandibularis)*  (Figs 197-199) is a paired joint formed by the head of the mandible *(caput mandibulae)* and the articular (mandibular) fossa *(fossa mandibularis)* and eminentia articularis *(tuberculum articulare)* of the squamous part of the emporal bone. The heads of the mandible are ellipsoid-shaped and their long converging axes form an obtuse angle at the anterior border of the foramen magnum.

> 下颌关节（articulatio temporomandibularis）（图197-199）是由下颌骨的下颌头（caput mandibulae）与颞骨鳞部的关节窝（fossa mandibularis）和关节结节（eminentia articularis，tuberculum articulare）共同构成的成对关节。下颌头呈椭圆形，其长轴呈汇聚状，形成一个钝角，位于枕骨大孔的前缘。

The articular fossa of the temporal bone is partly included in the cavity of the mandibular joint. Two parts are distinguished in the fossa: extracapsular, located behind the squamotympanic fissure and intracapsular, which lies to the front of it. The intracapsular part of the articular fossa is enclosed in a capsule which also extends to the anterior margin of the articular tubercle. The articular surfaces are covered by a connective-tissue cartilage. A biconcave oval plate of fibrous cartilage is lodged in the joint cavity. This is the articular disc *(discus articularis)* (Fig. 198); it lies horizontally adjoining the articular tubercle above and the head of the mandible below. It is fused on the periphery with the articular capsule and separates the joint cavity into two communicating compartments, superior and inferior. Some tendinous fibres of the lateral pterygoid muscle are attached to the medial edge of the disc.

> 颞骨的关节窝部分位于下颌关节腔内。关节窝可分为两部分：外侧部分位于鳞鼓裂的后方，内侧部分位于其前方。关节窝的内侧部分被一个囊包裹，该囊也延伸至关节突的前缘。关节面被结缔组织软骨覆盖。关节腔内有一块纤维软骨构成的双凹椭圆形板，称为关节盘（discus articularis）（图198）；其上方紧邻关节突，下方紧邻下颌头。关节盘周边与关节囊融合，将关节腔分为上下两个相互连通的室。翼外肌的一些腱性纤维附着于关节盘的内侧缘。

The articular capsule *(capsula articularis)* is attached along the edge of the articular cartilage; on the temporal bone it is fastened anteriorly to the anterior sloping surface of the articular tubercle, posteriorly to the anterior margin of the petrotympanic fissure, and laterally to the base of the zygomatic process. Medially it reaches the spine of the sphenoid bone. The capsule embraces the neck of the mandible and is attached on its posterior aspect somewhat lower than on the anterior aspect.

> 关节囊（capsula articularis）附着于关节软骨的边缘；在颞骨上，它前面附着于关节结节的前斜面，后面附着于岩鼓裂的前缘，侧面附着于颧突的基部。其内侧延伸至蝶骨翼突。囊包裹下颌骨颈部，并在其后方的附着点略低于前方的附着点。

The ligaments of the mandibular joint can be divided into the following three groups.

> 下颌关节的韧带可分为以下三组。

- I. Intracapsular ligaments *(ligamenla intracapsularia).* These are the meniscotemporal ligaments (anterior and posterior) running from the temporal bone to the posterior parts of the disc, and the meniscomandibular ligaments (medial and lateral) stretching from the neck of the mandible to the inferior circumference of the disc.
- II. Extracapsular ligaments *(ligamenla extracapsularia).* This is the lateral ligament *(ligamentum laterals)* (Fig. 197). It arises from the base of the zygomatic process of the temporal bone and stretches to the lateral and posterior surfaces of the neck of the mandible. Some of its bands intertwine with the capsule of the joint. Two parts are distinguished in the ligament, anterior (or lateral) and posterior (or medial).
- III. Ligaments related to the mandibular joint but not connected with the articular capsule.
- 1. Th e sphenomandibular ligament *(ligamentum spkenomandibu\* lare)* (Fig. 199) extends from the spine of the sphenoid bone and is attached to the lingula of the mandible.
- 2. The stylomandibular ligament *(ligamentum stylomandibulart)*  (Figs 197-199) stretches from the styloid process of the temporal bone to the mandibular angle.

> I. 腮关节囊内韧带（ligamenta intracapsularia）。这些包括从颞骨颞部延伸至椎间盘后部的半月韧带（前、后各一），以及从下颌颈延伸至椎间盘下缘的下颌-半月韧带（内侧和外侧各一）。

II. 腮关节囊外韧带（ligamenta extracapsularia）。这是侧韧带（ligamentum laterale）（图197）。它起自颞骨颧突基部，并延伸至下颌颈的外侧和后侧表面。其中一些纤维束与关节囊交织在一起。该韧带可分为前部（或外侧）和后部（或内侧）两部分。

III. 与下颌关节有关但不与关节囊相连的韧带。

蝶下颌韧带（ligamentum sphenomandibulare）（图199）起自蝶骨翼突，并附着于下颌骨舌突。

茎突下颌韧带（ligamentum stylomandibulare）*（图197-199）从颞骨茎突延伸至下颌角。

The mandibular joint is a hinge joint, or ginglymus. The right and left joints form together a single combined articulation. Movements at the joints lower and raise the mandible, displace it forwards, backwards, and to the side (right or left). In movements to the side slight rotation about the vertical axis occurs in one joint, while in the other joint the articular disc is displaced in the direction of the movement of the head of the mandible.

> 下颌关节是一个铰链关节，即“铰链关节”（ginglymus）。左右两侧的关节共同形成一个单一的联合关节。关节的运动使下颌骨向下和向上移动，向前、向后以及向一侧（右侧或左侧）移动。在向一侧移动时，一侧关节发生轻微的垂直轴旋转，而另一侧关节的关节盘则随下颌头的移动方向发生位移。

# ARTICULATIONS OF THE SHOULDER GIRDLE AND FREE UPPER LIMB

> 肩带关节与自由上肢的关节 /no_think

*Jundurae cinguli membri superioiis et membri superioris liberi*

> 肩胛带肌与上肢自由肌 /no_think

## 1 ARTICULATIONS OF THE UPPER LIMB

> 1 上肢关节

The articulations of the upper limb *(jundurae membri superioris)* are subdivided into the articulations of the shoulder girdle *(jundurae anguli membri superioris)* and the articulations of the free upper limb *(jundurae membri superioris liberi).*

> 上肢的关节（jundurae membri superioris）可分为肩带关节（jundurae anguli membri superioris）和自由上肢关节（jundurae membri superioris liberi）。

## 2 ARTICULATIONS OF THE SHOULDER GIRDLE

> 2 肩胛带关节

The bones of ihe upper limb are joined to the skeleton of the trunk by means of one joint, the sternoclavicular joint

> 上肢的骨骼通过一个关节与躯干骨骼相连，即胸骨-锁骨关节。

## 3 T H E STERNOCLAVICULAR JOIN T

> 3 第三节 胸骨锁骨关节

The articular surfaces are covered by a connective-tissue carti- i t lodged in the joint. to the clavicle and limits its movement upwards.

> 关节面被结缔组织软骨覆盖，该软骨位于关节内。韧带连接锁骨并限制其向上运动。

The Hgamentous apparatus of the sternoclavicular joint is re- *ticulatio spheroidea* s. *cotylica).*  presented by the following ligaments.

> 胸锁关节的韧带装置由以下韧带组成（reticulatio spheroidea s. cotylica）。

- The stcrnoclavicular joint *(articulatio sternodavicularis)* 1. The anterior and posterior sternoclavicular ligaments *(liga-* (Fig. 200) is formed by the clavicular notch of ihe sternum and ihe *menta sternoelamculare antenus* el *posterius)* run on the anterior, supcsternal end of the clavicle. - The articular capsule *(capsule articularis)* is strong and is atta- 3. The interclavicular ligament *(ligamentum interclaviculare)*  ched to the margins of the articular surfaces of ihe bones. The arti- stretches between the sternal ends of the clavicles above the su-

> 锁骨-胸骨关节（articulatio sternoclavicularis）（图200）由胸骨的锁骨切迹和锁骨的胸骨端构成。该关节为简单关节（articulatio simplex）。  
1. 前、后锁骨胸骨韧带（ligamenta sternoelavicularia anterius et posterius）位于关节囊的前、上和后表面，加强关节囊。这些韧带在大多数情况下不协调且呈鞍状。关节的不协调由关节盘（discus articularis）加以矫正。  
2. 肋锁韧带（ligamentum costosternoclevarum）是一条从第一肋上缘向上延伸的强韧韧带。  
3. 锁骨间韧带（ligamentum interclaviculare）位于锁骨胸骨端上方，连接两侧锁骨的胸骨端。

200. *Sternoclavicular joints (articulationes sternoclavicular es)\* anterior aspect (%). (Right sternoclavicular joint opened by frontal section.)

## 4 THE ACROMIOCLAVICULAR JOINT

> 4 肩锁关节

The acromioclavicular joint *(articulatio acromiodavicularis)* (see Fig. 204) is formed by the articular facet of the acromial end of the clavicle and the articular facet of the acromion of the scapula. This is a simple joint. The articulating surfaces are flat. An articular disc *(discus articularis)* is sometimes present in ihe joint cavity.

> 肩锁关节（articulatio acromioclavicularis）（见图204）由锁骨肩峰端的关节面和肩胛骨肩峰的关节面构成。这是一个简单的关节。关节面呈扁平状。关节腔内有时存在关节盘（discus articularis）。

This is a multiaxial joint, but the range of movements is strictly limited in view of which it is related to plane joints *(articulatio plana).*

> 这是一个多轴关节，但由于其运动范围受到严格限制，因此与平面关节（articulatio plana）相关。

The articular capsule *(capsula articularis)* is attached along the margin of the articular surfaces and is strengthened by the following ligaments.

> 关节囊（capsula articularis）附着于关节面的边缘，并由以下韧带加固。

1. The acromioclavicular ligament *(ligamenturn acromiodavicularis)* stretches between the acromial end of the clavicle and the acromion of the scapula

> 喙突锁骨韧带（ligamentum acromioclavicularis）连接锁骨的喙突端与肩胛骨的喙突。

2. The coracoclavicular ligament *(ligamentum coracodaviculare)*  (see Fig. 204) is stretched between the inferior surface of the acromial end of the clavicle and the coracoid process of the scapula.

> 锁骨-喙突韧带（ligamentum coracodaviculare）（见图204）被拉伸于锁骨喙突端的下表面与肩胛骨喙突之间。

Two parts arc distinguished in the coracoclavicular ligament: the quadrangular trapczoid part *(ligamentum trapezpideum)* which occupies a lateral position and runs from the trapczoid line of ihe acromial end of the clavicle to the coracoid process of the scapula, and the triangular conoid part *(ligamentum eonoideum)* stretching medial to the trapezoid part between the conoid tubercle of the acromial end of the clavicle and the coracoid process of the scapula.

> 锁骨-喙突韧带可分为两部分：第一部分为四边形的梯形韧带（ligamentum trapezoidale），位于外侧，从锁骨喙突端的梯形线延伸至肩胛骨的喙突；第二部分为三角形的锥形韧带（ligamentum conoidale），位于梯形韧带的内侧，连接锁骨喙突端的锥形结节与肩胛骨的喙突。

Both ligaments meet at the coracoid process at an angle and limit a depression formed above by the clavicle and filled with areolar tissue and sometimes occupied by a synovial bursa.

> 两条韧带在喙突处以一定角度相交，共同限制由锁骨上方形成的凹陷，该凹陷内填充有疏松结缔组织，有时还包含滑膜囊。

#### 4.1.1 LIGAMENTS O F TH E SCAPULA

> 4.1.1 肩胛韧带

The ligaments of the scapula arc fibrous bands which join its separate structures.

> 肩胛骨的韧带是纤维束，将肩胛骨的各个结构连接在一起。

- 1. The coracoacromial ligament *(ligamentum coracoacromiale)*  (Figs 201, 204) is the strongest of the scapular ligaments. It is stretched in the form of a quadrangular plate between the acromion and the coracoid process of the scapula.
- 2. The suprascapular ligament, or superior transverse ligament of the scapula *(ligamentum transversum scapulae superius)*

> 喙肩韧带（ligamentum coracoacromiale）（图201，204）是肩胛骨韧带中最坚强的。它呈四边形板状，被拉伸于肩胛骨的肩峰与喙突之间。  
肩胛上韧带，或称肩胛上横韧带（ligamentum transversum scapulae superius）

(Figs 202, 203) bridges the scapular notch and together with it limits a foramen.

> （图202、203）连接肩胛切迹，并与其共同限定了一个孔。

3. The spinoglcnoid ligament, or inferior transverse ligament of the scapula *(ligamentum transversum scapulae inferius)* (see Fig. 202) is the weakest scapular ligament. It stretches on the posterior surface of the scapula from the root of the acromion, over the neck of the scapula, and to the lateral surface of the glenoid cavity; some of its bands intertwine with those of the capsule of the shoulder joint.

> 锁骨肩胛韧带，或称肩胛下横韧带（ligamentum transversum scapulae inferius）（见图202）是肩胛骨最薄弱的韧带。它从肩峰根部延伸至肩胛骨颈部，并扩展至肩胛骨关节窝的外侧表面；其部分束与肩关节囊的束相互交织。

## 5 **JOINTS OF THE FREE UPPER LIMB**

> 5 自由上肢的关节

## 6 T H E **SHOULDER JOINT**

> 6 肩关节

(Fig. 204) attached to the edge of the glenoid cavity. tween the articulating surfaces of the bones.

> （图204）附着于肩胛骨关节窝边缘。位于骨的关节面之间。

The shoulder joint *(articulatio kumeri)* (Figs 201-206) is formed parts the fibrous layer is strengthened by muscle tendons which by the glenoid cavity of the scapula *(cavitas glenoidalis scapulae)* and are interlaced with it: by the supraspinatus, infraspinatus, and the head of the humerus *(caput kumeri).* The articular surfaces are teres minor muscles in the lateral parts and by the subscapularis covered by hyaline cartilage and do not conform each other in muscle in the medial part. In movement at the shoulder joint these shape. Their congruence is increased by the labrum glenoidale muscles draw out the capsule and prevent its strangulation be-

> 肩关节（articulatio humeri）（图201-206）由锁骨的肩峰端（processus coracoideus clavicularis）和肩胛骨的关节盂（cavitas glenoidalis scapulae）构成。纤维层被肩胛下肌（musculus subscapularis）、冈上肌（musculus supraspinatus）、冈下肌（musculus infraspinatus）和肱骨头（caput humeri）的肌腱加强，并与之交织在一起。关节面在肩关节运动中形成特定的形状。在关节的外侧部分，由小圆肌（musculus teres minor）覆盖，其表面为透明软骨（hyaline cartilage），而在内侧部分则由肩胛下肌覆盖，二者在肌肉作用下并不完全契合。这种契合度在肩关节运动中被增强，肩胛盂唇（labrum glenoidale）的肌肉作用可牵拉关节囊，防止其被挤压。

The articular capsule *(capsula articularis)* is attached on the On the humerus, the articular capsule bridges the biciptal scapula to the periphery of the articular cartilage, the glenoid cav- groove and transmits the tendon of the long head of the biceps ily, and external margin of the labrum glenoidale; on the humerus brachii muscle which arises from the supraglenoid tubercle and the capsule is attached to the anatomical neck. It is spacious and the margin of the labrum glenoidale, passes through the cavity of stretched weakly. Its inferomedial part is thin, but in the other the shoulder joint, and then occupies the bicipital groove. In the

> 关节囊（capsula articularis）附着于肱骨。在肱骨上，关节囊连接肩胛骨的喙突与关节软骨的周边，跨越肩胛骨的关节窝（glenoid cavity/glenoid groove），并传递肱二头肌长头肌腱，穿过肩胛唇（labrum glenoidale）的外缘；关节囊还附着于肱骨的解剖颈。关节囊较为宽敞，其边缘部分较为松弛。其下方内侧部分较薄，但在肩关节中，它则占据喙突沟（bicipital groove）。

cavity of the joint the tendon is covered by a synovial membrane in the bicipital groove around the biceps brachii tendon. It is which is attendant to it to a level 2-5 cm below the anatomical called the intenubcrcular synovial sheath *(oagina synovialis intertu*neck. > 关节腔，肌腱在喙肱沟内被滑膜膜覆盖，该滑膜膜围绕肱二头肌腱。该滑膜膜在解剖学上称为“滑膜鞘”（synovialis intertunica），其范围延伸至肱二头肌腱下方 2-5 cm 处。随后，滑膜膜向上弯曲，并延伸至三角肌筋膜层。关节腔常与肩胛下间隙相通。

the tendon, is continuous with the synovial layer of the articular lar bursa *(bursa musculus subscapularis)* located at the root of the cricapsule. coid process.

A double-wall protrusion of the synovial membrane thus forms The shoulder joint has only one ligament, the coracohumeral

> 因此，滑膜膜层形成双层突出结构。肩关节仅有一条韧带，即喙肱韧带。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_203_Picture_2.jpeg)

203. *Right shoulder joint (articulatio humeri)*  (Joint opened by frontal section.)

> 右肩关节（关节盂肱关节）（通过正中矢状面切开显示。）

ligament *(ligamentum coracohumcralc).* This is a thickened fibrous layer of the capsule, **which** extends from the lateral edge of the cricoid process to the greater tuberosity of the humerus.

> 韧带（喙肱韧带）。这是关节囊的一层增厚的纤维层，从环状软骨突的外侧缘延伸至肱骨大结节。

The coracoacromial ligament *(ligamentum coracoacromialc)* is located above the shoulder joint and together with the acromion and coracoid process of the scapula forms the vault of the shoulder. The vault protects the shoulder joint from above and together with

> 锁骨肩峰韧带（ligamentum coracoacromiale）位于肩关节上方，与肩胛骨的肩峰和喙突共同构成肩部的穹窿。该穹窿从上方保护肩关节，并与...

the tautened articular capsule inhibits abduction and raising of the arm above the shoulder level. Higher raising of the limb is accomplished by concomitant movement of the scapula.

> 紧绷的关节囊抑制了上臂外展和将手臂抬高至肩部水平以上的动作。将肢体抬得更高则需要伴随肩胛骨的运动。

According to shape, the shoulder joint is a ball-and-socket, or spheroid joint *(articulatio spheroidea)* permitting a wide range of movements.

> 根据形态，肩关节是一种球窝关节（articulatio spheroidea），允许广泛的活动范围。

![](_page_204_Picture_2.jpeg)

204. *Right shoulder joint (articulatio humeri) and acromiodavicular joint (articulatio acromiodavkularis)* (%).

## 8 T H E ELBOW JOIN T

> 8 第八章 肘关节

The elbow joini *(articulalio cubiti)* (Figs 207-212) is formed by the articular surface of the inferior humeral epiphysis (its trochlea and capitulum), the articular surfaces of the ulna (trochlear and radial notches), and the head and articular circumference of the radius. This is a compound joint *(articulatio composita).* The articular surfaces are covered by hyaline cartilage.

> 肘关节（articulatio cubiti）（图207-212）由肱骨下端骨骺的关节面（包括滑车和小头）、尺骨的滑车切迹和桡骨切迹的关节面，以及桡骨头和关节周缘构成。这是一个复关节（articulatio composita）。关节面被透明软骨覆盖。

The articular capsule *(capsula articuiaris)* is fastened on the humcrus above the margins of the coronoid and radial fossae in front; on the periphery of the bases of the cpicondylcs (leaving them free) and almost at the margin of the articular surface of the trochlea and head of the humerus on the sides; and a little below the superior margin of the olecranon fossa at the back. On the ulna the articular capsule is attached to the edges of the trochlear and radial notches; on the radius it is fastened to the neck, forming here a sac-like protrusion (Figs 207, 209). The capsule is thill and poorly stretched in front and behind but is strengthened by ligaments at the sides. Its synovia! membrane covers also those parts Of the bones which are in the joint cavity but are not covered by cartilage (the neck of the radius, etc.).

> 关节囊（capsula articularis）在前方附着于尺骨冠突窝和桡骨窝的边缘之上；在两侧附着于肱骨上端的内外髁基部（使其保持自由活动），并几乎达到肱骨滑车关节面及肱骨头的边缘；在后方则附着于尺骨鹰嘴窝的上缘稍下方。在尺骨上，关节囊附着于滑车切迹和桡骨切迹的边缘；在桡骨上，关节囊附着于桡骨颈，此处形成一个囊状突起（图207、209）。关节囊在前后方向上较薄且未被拉伸，但在两侧则由韧带加强。其滑膜层还覆盖了那些位于关节腔内但未被软骨覆盖的骨部分（如桡骨颈等）。

Three joints arc distinguished in the cavity of the elbow joint: the humcroulnar, the humeroradial, and the proximal (superior) radioulnar joints.

> 肘关节腔内可区分出三个关节：肱尺关节、肱桡关节以及近端（上方）桡尺关节。

- 1. The humcroulnar joint *(articulatio humeroulnaris)*  (Figs 209-212) is formed between the trochlea of the humerus and the trochlear notch of the ulna; it is a variant of the hinge joint and is related to the cochlear joints.
- 2. The humeroradial joint *(articulatio humeroradialis)* (Fig. 209) is formed by the head of the humerus and the facet on the head of the radius. It is related to the ball-and-socket or spheroid joints *(articulatio spheroidea)* (actually movements occur about not three but only two axes, frontal and vertical).
  - 3. The superior, or proximal radioulnar joint *(articulatio radi-*

> 肱尺关节（articulatio humeroulnaris）（图209-212）由肱骨的滑车与尺骨的滑车切迹构成；它是铰链关节的一种变型，并与桡骨与尺骨的关节（cochlear joints）相关。  
肱桡关节（articulatio humeroradialis）（图209）由肱骨的头与桡骨头上的关节面构成。它与球窝关节（球形关节，articulatio spheroidea）相关（实际上运动仅围绕两个轴，即冠状轴与垂直轴，而非三个轴）。  
上部的或近侧桡尺关节（articulatio radi-

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_207_Picture_10.jpeg)

207. *Right elbow joint (articulatio cubiti);* anterior aspect *x*

> 右肘关节（关节囊）；前侧视图

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_208_Picture_2.jpeg)

208. *Right elbow joint (articulatio cubiti);* posterior aspect *(%)■*

> 右肘关节（articulatio cubiti）；后侧（%）■

(Extreme (lexion at elbow joint.)

> （肘关节处的极端（lexion））

*oulnarisproximalis)* (Figs 209, 214) is formed by the radial notch of the ulna and ihe articular circumference of the head of the radius and is a typical trochoid, or pivot joint.

> 尺骨近端（ulna proximalis）（图209、214）由尺骨的桡骨切迹和桡骨头的关节面组成，是一个典型的滑车关节（trochoid joint），或称为旋转关节（pivot joint）。[!note]- 术语说明
“trochoid joint” 通常译作“滑车关节”，属于一种单轴关节，允许骨绕单一轴旋转。

The humeroulnar joint permits flexion *(flexto)* and extension *(extensio)* which occur with simultaneous movement of the radius at the radiohumeral joint. Rotation *(rotatio)* of the radius about the longitudinal axis is also possible in the humeroradial joint; medial rotation is called pronation *(pronatio)* and lateral rotation is known as supination *(xupinatio);* mild adduction *(adductio)* and abduction *(abdudio)* occur as well. In the superior radioulnar joint rotation of the radius occurs with simultaneous movement at the humeroradial joint.

> 肱尺关节允许进行屈曲（flexio）和伸展（extensio），这些动作伴随着桡骨在桡骨肱关节中的同时运动。在肱桡关节中，桡骨还可围绕其纵轴进行旋转（rotatio）；向内旋转称为前旋（pronatio），向外旋转称为后旋（supinatio）；同时也可发生轻微的内收（adductio）和外展（abdutio）。在上桡尺关节中，桡骨的旋转也伴随着肱桡关节的同步运动。

The following ligaments are related to the elbow joint.

> 以下韧带与肘关节相关。

1. The ulnar collateral (medial) ligament *(ligamentum collater-*

> 尺侧副韧带（内侧韧带）（尺侧副韧带）

*als ulnare)* (Figs 207, 208) runs downwards from the lateral humeral epicondyle, then expands fan-wise to be attached at the edge of the trochlear notch of the ulna

> （尺骨桡侧副韧带）（图207、208）自桡骨肱骨髁的外侧向下延伸，随后呈扇形展开，附着于尺骨滑车切迹的边缘[!note]- 术语说明 "ulnare" 在此处指尺骨桡侧副韧带，即连接桡骨与尺骨的韧带，是前臂稳定结构的重要组成部分。

- 2. The radial collateral (lateral) ligament *(ligamentum collateral\* radiale)* (Figs 207, 208) arises at the base of the lateral humeral epicondyle, stretches downwards to the lateral surface of the head of the radius, and separates into two bands. These bands run horizontally and then around the head of the radius in front and behind to be attached to the edges of the radial notch of the ulna. The superficial layers of the ligament blend with the flexor tendons, the deep layers are continuous with the annular ligament of the radius.
- 3. The annular ligament of the radius *(ligamentum anulare radii)* (Figs 207, 209) embraces the articular circumference of the radial head from the anterior, posterior, and lateral aspects and, be-

> 桡侧副（外侧）韧带（ligamentum collateral radiale）（图207、208）起自肱骨外上髁的基部，向下延伸至桡骨头的外侧表面，并分为两束。这两束韧带水平走行，然后围绕桡骨头的前侧和后侧，附着于尺骨桡切迹的边缘。韧带的浅层与屈肌腱融合，深层则与桡骨环状韧带连续。

桡骨环状韧带（ligamentum anulare radii）*（图207、209）从桡骨头的前、后及外侧方向包裹其关节周缘，并向……

![](_page_209_Picture_2.jpeg)

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_209_Picture_3.jpeg)

209. Right elbow joint (articulatio cubiti), interosseous membrane of forearm (mem-brana interossea antebrachii), and distal ra-dioulnar joint (articulatio radioulnaris); anterior aspect  $(\frac{1}{2})$ .

> 右肘关节（articulatio cubiti）、前臂骨间膜（membrana interossea antebrachii）以及远端桡尺关节（articulatio radioulnaris）；前侧方面

(Cavity of elbow joint is opened.)

> （肘关节腔被打开。）

210. Right elbow joint. (Radiograph taken with the forearm in pronation.)

> 右肘关节。（前臂旋前位拍摄的X线片。）

- 1-humerus
- 2-cubital fossa
- 3-medial epicondyle

> 1-肱骨  
2-肘窝

5-尺骨冠突  
6-桡骨

13-肱骨桡侧髁  
14-尺骨鹰嘴

ing attached to the anterior and posterior edges of the radial notch of the ulna, holds fast the radius to the ulna.

> 附着于尺骨桡骨切迹的前缘和后缘，将桡骨固定于尺骨。

The strong collateral ligaments check side movements at the elbow joint. On the whole, the elbow joint is a variety of hinge joints (ginglymus) and functions as a cochlear joint.

> 肘关节的强韧侧副韧带限制肘关节的侧向运动。总体而言，肘关节是一种多种类型的铰链关节（ginglymus），其功能类似于蜗状关节。

In addition to the annular ligament of the radius, the interesseous membrane of the forearm contributes to bracing together the radius and the ulna.

> 除了桡骨的环状韧带外，前臂的肌间隔膜还参与将桡骨和尺骨 brace 在一起。

The interosseous membrane of the forearm (membrana interos-

> 前臂骨间膜（membrana interossea antebrachii）

sea antebrachii) (Fig. 209) fills the space between the radius and the ulna and is attached to their interosseous borders.

> 前臂筋膜（sea antebrachii）（图209）填充在桡骨与尺骨之间的间隙，并附着于它们的骨间膜缘。

It is formed of strong fibrous bands descending obliquely from the radius to the ulna. One of the bands runs in the opposite direction, from the tuberosity of the ulna to the tuberosity of the radius and is called the **oblique cord** (chorda obliqua). The membrane has openings transmitting vessels and a nerve. Some forearm muscles arise on its palmar and dorsal surfaces.

> 它由数条强韧的纤维束组成，从桡骨斜向下延伸至尺骨。其中一条纤维束方向相反，从尺骨粗隆延伸至桡骨粗隆，称为斜韧带（oblique cord，chorda obliqua）。该膜上有孔，允许血管和神经通过。一些前臂肌肉起源于其掌侧和背侧表面。

## 9 **T HE DISTAL RADIOULNAR JOINT**

> 9 远端桡骨尺骨关节

The distal, or inferior radioulnar Joint *(afticulatio radioulnaris distalis)* (Figs 209, 210, 213, 216) is formed by the articular circumference of the head of the ulna and the ulnar notch of the radius. Distal to the head of the ulna is the articular disc *(discus artiadaris)*  (Fig. 215). It is a triangular fibrocartilaginous plate attached by its base to the ulnar notch of the radius and by its apex to the medial styloid process of the ulna. The disc separates tin- cavil) o| the distal radioulnar joint from the cavity of the radiocarpal joint.

> 远端（或下端）桡骨尺骨关节（articulatio radioulnaris distalis）（图209、210、213、216）由尺骨头的关节面和桡骨的尺骨切迹共同构成。尺骨头远侧为关节盘（discus articularis）（图215）。它是一个三角形的纤维软骨板，其基底部附着于桡骨的尺骨切迹，其尖端附着于尺骨的近端茎突。该关节盘将远端桡骨尺骨关节的关节腔与桡腕关节的关节腔分隔开。

The articular capsule *(capsula articularis)* is loose. It is attached along the margin of the articular surfaces of the bones to the disc and forms above between the ulna and radius a pouch called recessus sacciformis (Fig. 215).

> 关节囊（capsula articularis）较为松弛。它沿骨的关节面边缘附着于椎间盘，并在尺骨和桡骨之间形成一个称为囊状隐窝（recessus sacciformis）的囊袋（图215）。

The distal radioulnar joint is a variant of the trochoid joint *(articulalio trockoidea).*

> 远端桡尺关节是 trochoid 关节（articulatio trochlearis）的一种变异形式。

Together with the proximal radioulnar joint it forms a combined joint providing rotation of the radius in relation to the ulna.

> 与近侧桡尺关节共同构成一个联合关节，提供桡骨相对于尺骨的旋转运动。

## 10 JOINTS OF THE HAND

> 手部关节 10 个

## 11 T H E RADIOCARPAL JOIN T

> 11 腕骨关节

The radiocarpal joint *(articulatio radiocarpea),* or wrist joint (Figs 213, 217), is formed by the carpal articular surface of the radius and the distal surface of the articular disc (sec *The Distal Radioulnar Joint).* They form a slightly concave articular surface which unites with a convex proximal articular surface provided by the proximal row of the carpal bones (scaphoid, lunate, and trique- *palmate).* It arises from the base of the lateral styloid process of the trum).

> 桡腕关节（articulatio radiocarpea），或腕关节（图213、217），由桡骨的腕关节面和关节盘的远端面（参见远端桡尺关节）构成。它们形成一个略微凹陷的关节面，与腕骨近排骨（舟骨、月骨和三角骨）提供的凸起的近端关节面相接合。该关节面起自尺骨远端的桡侧骨突起基底部。

A thin articular capsule *(capsuhx articularu)* is attached to the margins of the articular surfaces of the bones forming the joint.

> 关节囊（capsula articularis）是一层较薄的结构，附着于构成关节的骨关节面的边缘。

The joint is strengthened by the following ligaments.

> 关节由以下韧带加固。

- 1. The lateral ligament of the wrist *(ligamentum collateralt carpi radiale)* which is stretched between the lateral styloid process and the scaphoid bone. Some of its bands reach the trapezium bone. The ligament checks adduction of the hand.
- 2. The medial ligament of the wrist *(ligamentum collaterals carpi ulnare),* arises from the medial styloid process and is attached to the triquetrum and partly to the pisiform bone. It checks abduction of the hand.
  - 3. The posterior radiocarpal ligament *(ligamentum radiocarpeum*

> 腕关节的外侧韧带（桡侧副韧带，ligamentum collaterale carpi radiale）位于桡骨茎突与舟骨之间。该韧带的一些束纤维延伸至腕骨钩骨。该韧带限制手的内收动作。

腕关节的内侧韧带（尺侧副韧带，ligamentum collaterale carpi ulnare）起自尺骨茎突，附着于三角骨和部分豌豆骨。该韧带限制手的外展动作。

后距骨腕韧带（桡腕后韧带，ligamentum radiocarpeum）

*dorsale).* It turns from the dorsal surface of the distal end of the radius to the carpus where it is attached to the dorsal surfaces of the scaphoid, lunate, and the triquetrum bones. It checks flexion of the hand.

> （背侧）。它从桡骨远端的背侧转向腕骨，在腕骨的背侧附着于舟骨、月骨和三角骨上。它限制手部的屈曲。

4. The anterior radiocarpal ligament *(ligamentum radiocarpeum*  radius and the margin of the carpal articular surface of this bone and runs downwards and medially to be attached to the proximal and distal rows of carpal bones (the scaphoid, lunate, triquetrum, and capitate). The ligament checks extension of the hand.

> 前尺腕韧带（ligamentum radiocarpeum）起自尺骨远端和腕骨关节面的边缘，向下内侧延伸，附着于腕骨近排和远排的腕骨（舟骨、月骨、三角骨和豌豆骨）。该韧带限制手的伸展。

In addition to these ligaments, there are the interosseous intercarpal ligaments *(ligamenta intercarpea interossea)* which connect the proximal carpal bones to one another; some of the carpal bones articulate to form intercarpal joints *(articulationes inlercarpeae).*

> 除了这些韧带外，还有骨间腕骨韧带（ligamenta intercarpea interossea），它们连接近端腕骨之间；部分腕骨相互关节形成腕骨间关节（articulationes intercarpeae）。

The radiocarpal joint is a variant of biaxial joints and is an ellipsoid joint *(articulatio cllipsoidea).* It permits the following movements: flexion, extension, adduction, abduction, and circumduction (Figs 216 and 217).

> 桡腕关节是双轴关节的一种，属于椭圆关节（articulatio ellipsoidea）。它允许以下运动：屈曲、伸展、内收、外展以及环转（图216和图217）。

## 12 T H E PISIFORM JOIN T

> 12 楔骨关节

The pisiform joint *(articulatio ossis pisiformis)* joins the pisiform to the triquetrum bone. The sesamoid pisiform bone carries an articular facet only on the side touching the approximate articular surface of the triquetrum bone.

> pisiform 关节（articulatio ossis pisiformis）连接 pisiform 骨与 triquetrum 骨。 sesamoid pisiform 骨仅在其与 triquetrum 骨近似关节面接触的一侧具有关节面。

The articular capsule *(capsula articularis)* is attached to the margins of the articular surfaces. The joint cavity may communicate with the cavity of the radiocarpal joint. The pisiform joint has the following ligaments.

> 关节囊（capsula articularis）附着于关节面的边缘。关节腔可能与桡腕关节腔相通。豌豆骨关节具有以下韧带。

1. The pisohamate ligament *(ligamentum pisohamatum)*  stretches between the pisiform bone and the hook of the hamate bone.

> pisohamate韧带（pisohamatum韧带）连接豌豆骨与钩骨的钩部。

2. The pisometacarpal ligament *(ligamentum pisometacarpeum)*  runs from the pisiform bone to the bases of the third to fifth metacarpal bones.

> 尺骨-掌骨间韧带（pisometacarpal ligament）自钩骨延伸至第三至第五掌骨基底部。

The ligaments are an extension of the flexor carpi ulnaris tendon within which the large sesamoid pisiform bone is lodged.

> 韧带是尺侧腕屈肌腱的延伸部分，在其中容纳着较大的籽骨——豌豆骨。[!note]- 术语说明
“Ligamentum flavum” 通常译作“黄韧带”，是脊柱韧带之一。

Sesamoid bones are small rounded bony or fibrocartilaginous structures embedded in tendons. They are responsible for raising the respective muscle tendon and creating a favourable angle of its action on the bone.

> 籽骨是嵌入肌腱中的小型圆形骨性或纤维软骨性结构。它们负责提升相应的肌腱，使其在骨上的作用角度更加有利。

## 13 T H E INTERCARPAL JOINTS

> 13 手舟骨间关节

tercarpal joints *(articulationes intercarpea),* while the proximal and distal rows are joined by the midcarpal joint *(articulatio mediocarpea)* (Figs 213-217). The distal surface of the first row of carpal bones forms a large and deep concave articular surface which receives the spherical surface formed by the articular surfaces of the capitate and hamate bones. The lateral part of the first row of carpal bones has a distally facing spherical surface of the scaphoid bone which is received by the corresponding concavity formed by the bones of the second row. The joint cavity is S-shaped. Th e cavity of the midcarpal joint is continuous with the cavities of the

> 腕骨间关节（articulationes intercarpea），而近侧行和远侧行腕骨由中腕关节（articulatio mediocarpea）连接（图213-217）。第一行腕骨的远侧表面形成一个大而深的凹陷关节面，该关节面接受由月骨和钩骨关节面形成的球形表面。第一行腕骨的外侧部分具有朝向远侧的球形表面，该表面由第二行腕骨形成的对应凹陷所接纳。关节腔呈S形。中腕关节的关节腔与……

The carpal bones arlicuhitr with one another by means of in- joints formed between some of the carpal bones and communicates with the cavity of the carpometacarpal joint. The articular capsule is attached to the margins of the articular surfaces of the carpal bones.

> 腕骨之间通过关节连接，这些关节由部分腕骨之间形成，并与腕掌关节腔相交通。关节囊附着于腕骨关节面的边缘。

The midcarpal joint is strengthened by the following ligaments.

> 中间腕关节由以下韧带加强。

- 1. The dorsal intercarpal ligaments *(ligamenta intercarpea dorsalia)* stretch between some of the carpal bones on the dorsal surface of the joint.
- 2. The palmar intercarpal ligaments *(ligamenta intercarpea palmaria)* like the dorsal ligaments are stretched between the carpal

> 关节背侧腕骨间韧带（ligamenta intercarpea dorsalia）连接于关节背侧表面的一些腕骨之间。  
掌侧腕骨间韧带（ligamenta intercarpea palmaria）与背侧韧带类似，也是连接于腕骨之间的结构。

![](_page_213_Picture_2.jpeg)

213. Right radiocarpal joint (articulatio radiocarpea) and ligaments and joints of the hand; palmar surface  $(\frac{2}{3})$ .

> 右桡腕关节（radiocarpal joint，关节学名：腕桡关节）及手部的韧带与关节；掌面

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_214_Picture_2.jpeg)

214. *Right radiocarpal joint (arliculatio radiocarpea) and ligaments and joints of the hand;* dorsal surface (%).

> 右桡腕关节（radiocarpea 关节）及手部韧带与关节；背侧（%）。

{Cavities of the nietacarpophalangeal and interphalangeal joints of index finger opened by section made parallel to dorsal surface of hand.)

> （经切开显露示指的近节指骨间关节和远节指骨间关节腔，切口方向与手背表面平行。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_215_Picture_2.jpeg)

215. Joints and ligaments of right hand (\(^2\)\_3).

> 右手关节与韧带 (\(^2\)\_3)

(Joint cavities opened by section made parallel to dorsal surface of hand.)

> （关节腔被沿手背表面平行切开的切口所打开。）

bones but on the palmar surface. Some bands arise on the capitate bone and fan out to the bones of the first and second carpal rows to form the radiate carpal ligament *(ligamentum carpi radiatum).*

> 但位于掌侧。一些韧带起源于月骨，并向第一和第二腕骨行发射状分布，形成桡腕韧带（桡腕韧带）。

There are also interosseous intercarpal ligaments *(ligamenta intercarpea interossea)* (see Fig. 215) which are located between some

> 此外，还有骨间腕骨韧带（ligamenta intercarpea interossea）（见图215），位于某些腕骨之间。

of the carpal bones close to the radiocarpal and carpometacarpal joints.

> 腕骨靠近桡腕关节和腕掌关节处。

According to the shape of the articulating surfaces, the midcarpal joint is related to the spheroid joints *(articulatio spkeroidea)* with two spheroid heads. It permits a very small range of movements and is therefore a poorly mobile joint.

> 根据关节面的形态，中腕关节与具有两个球形头的球窝关节（articulatio spheroidea）相关。它允许的活动范围非常小，因此属于活动度较低的关节。

## 14 T H F CARPOMETACARPAL JOINTS

> 14 腕骨间关节

The carpoiiietacarpal joints *(articulationes carpometacarpeae)*  {Figs 213-217) are formed by the distal surfaces of the carpal bones of the second row and the bases of the metacarpal bones. Two carpometacarpal joints are distinguished: one is formed by the trapezium bone and the first metacarpal bone and is related to the thumb; the other is formed between the trapezium, trapezoid, capitate, and hamate bones and the medial four metacarpals.

> 腕掌关节（articulationes carpometacarpeae）{图213-217}由第二列腕骨的远端面和掌骨基底部构成。可分为两个腕掌关节：一个是由舟骨和第一掌骨构成，与拇指相关；另一个是由舟骨、月骨、头状骨、钩骨以及尺侧四个掌骨共同构成。

The carpometacarpal joint of the thumb *(articulatio carpometacarpea pollicis)* is formed by the distal saddle-shaped articular facet of the trapezium bone and the saddle-shaped articular facet of the base of the first metacarpal bone.

> 拇指腕掌关节（articulatio carpometacarpea pollicis）由舟骨远端的鞍状关节面和第一掌骨基底部的鞍状关节面共同构成。

The carpometacarpal joint of the thumb is a variety of biaxial joints and is a saddle joint *(articulatio sellaris).*

> 拇指的腕掌关节是一种双轴关节，属于鞍状关节（articulatio sellaris）。

The second to fifth carpometacarpal joints are formed by the flat articulating facets on the distal surfaces of the trapezium,

> 第二至第五掌骨-近节指骨关节由腕骨钩骨的远端扁平关节面形成。

trapezoid, capitate, and hamate bones and the contiguous proximal articulating surfaces of the bases of the medial four metacarpals. The joint of the fifth metacarpal bone is related in shape to a saddle joint *(articulatio sellaris).* The articular capsule is attached lo the margins of the articular surfaces of the bones and is tightly stretched. The cavity of the carpometacarpal joint communicates with the cavities of the intercarpal, midcarpal, and intcrmetacarpal joints. The palmar and dorsal carpometacarpal ligaments *(ligamenta carpometacarpea palmaria* et *dorsalia)* stretching between the carpals and metacarpals on the respective surfaces are related to the ligaments of the carpometacarpal joints.

> 梯形骨、钩骨和头状骨，以及掌侧四根指骨近端的关节面。第五掌骨关节在形态上类似于鞍状关节（articulatio sellaris）。关节囊附着于骨关节面的边缘，并被紧密拉紧。腕掌关节腔与腕骨间关节、中腕关节和掌骨间关节的腔相通。掌侧和背侧腕掌关节韧带（ligamenta carpometacarpea palmaria et dorsalia）位于腕骨与掌骨之间，分别在掌侧和背侧，与腕掌关节的韧带相关。

The carpometacarpal joints form a unit which is from the mechanical standpoint the firm framework of the hand.

> 腕骨间关节形成一个整体，从力学角度来看，这是手部的稳固支架结构。

These joints permit a very small range of movements and are related to plane joints *(articulationes planae).*

> 这些关节允许非常有限的活动范围，与平面关节（平面关节）相关。

#### 14.1.1 T H E INTERMETACARPAL JOINTS

> 14.1.1 掌骨间关节

The intcrmetacarpal joints *(articulationes intermetacarpeae)*  (Figs 213-217) are formed between the flat facets on the contiguous sides of the bases of the medial four metacarpals. The articular capsule is attached to the margins of the articular facets. The cavities of the joints communicate proximally with the carpometacarpal joints.

> 掌骨间关节（articulationes intermetacarpeae）（图213-217）由拇指侧四根掌骨基底部相邻侧的平坦关节面构成。关节囊附着于关节面的边缘。关节腔向近端与腕掌关节相通。

Two groups of ligaments are related to the intennetacarpal joints. Ligaments of one group are located on the dorsal and pal-

> 与掌骨间关节相关的有两组韧带。一组韧带位于背侧和掌侧。

mar surfaces of the joints. These are the four dorsal metacarpal ligaments *(ligamenta metacarpea dorsalia)* and the three palmar metacarpal ligaments *(ligamenta intercarpea palmaria).* Ligaments of the other group are between the bases of the metacarpal bones. These are called the interosseous metacarpal ligaments *(ligamenta metacarpea interossea).* The intennetacarpal joints are plane joints permitting a very limited range of movements.

> 关节的骨面。这些包括四条背侧掌骨韧带（ligamenta metacarpea dorsalia）和三条掌侧掌骨韧带（ligamenta intercarpea palmaria）。另一组韧带位于掌骨基底部之间，称为骨间掌骨韧带（ligamenta metacarpea interossea）。掌骨间关节为平面关节，允许非常有限的活动范围。

## 15 T H E METACARPOPHALANGEAL JOINTS

> 15 掌指关节

The metacarpopholangeal joints *(articulationes metacarpophalangeae)* (Figs 213, 214, 216) are formed by the articular surfaces of the heads of the metacarpal bones and the contiguous articular facets on the bases of the proximal phalanges. The head of the first metacarpal bone is compressed from front to back and is trochlear in shape; the heads of the other metacarpals arc spherical. The articular capsules are loose. They are attached on the sides by the collateral ligaments *(ligamenta collateralia)* which arise from depressions on the ulnar and radial surfaces of the heads of the metacarpals and are attached to the sides and partly to the palmar surface of the base of the proximal phalanx. Some fibres of these liga-

> 掌指关节（articulationes metacarpophalangeae）（图213、214、216）由掌骨头部的关节面与近节指骨基底部相连的关节面构成。第一掌骨头部从前向后被压缩，呈滑车状；其余掌骨头部呈球形。关节囊松弛。关节囊在两侧由侧副韧带（ligamenta collateralia）所附着，这些韧带起自掌骨头部尺侧和桡侧表面的凹陷处，并附着于近节指骨基底部的两侧及部分掌侧表面。这些韧带的一些纤维向……

ments pass from the sides of the metacarpal heads to the palmar surface of the bases of the proximal phalanges to intersect with similar contralateral fibres. These are called palmar ligaments *(ligamenta palmaria).*

> 掌骨头部的两侧有韧带从其侧方延伸至近节指骨基底部的掌面，并与对侧相似的纤维相交。这些结构称为掌侧韧带（palmar ligaments，ligamenta palmaria）。

The deep transverse ligaments of the palm *(ligamenta metacarpea transversa profunda)* are stretched on the palmar surface of the joints between the heads of the medial four metacarpals.

> 手掌的深横韧带（深掌骨间横韧带）位于掌侧，跨过 medial 四个掌骨头部之间的关节表面。

The metacarpophalangcal joint of the thumb is a hinge joint *(ginglymus),* while those of the other fingers are ball-and-socket or spheroid joints *(articulationes spkeroideae).*

> 拇指的掌指关节是铰链关节（ginglymus），而其他手指的掌指关节则是球窝关节（articulationes sphéroideae）。

![](_page_217_Figure_0.jpeg)

## 16 T H E INTERPHALANGEAL JOINT S O F TH E HAND

> 16 手指的指间关节

The intcrphalangeal joints of the hand *(articulationes interphaiangeae manus)* (Figs 213, 214, 216, 217) form between the approximate phalanges of each finger. The articular surface on the head of each phalanx is trochlear in shape and carries a guiding groove, while the base of the phalanx bears a flat facet with a guiding ridge.

> 手部的指间关节（articulationes interphalangeae manus）（图213、214、216、217）由每根手指的近节指骨与远节指骨之间形成。每根指骨的头部关节面呈滑车状，表面带有引导沟；而指骨的基底部则具有平坦的关节面，并带有引导嵴。

The ligaments of the intcrphalangeal joints are the palmar ligaments *(ligarrunta palmaria)* which pass from the sides of the trochlea, and are attached one to the side of the base of the phalanges (collateral ligaments), and the others to their palmar surface.

> 指骨间关节的韧带为掌侧韧带（ligamentum palmarium），起自滑车的两侧，其中一部分附着于指骨基底部的侧方（侧副韧带），另一部分则附着于其掌侧表面。

The thumb has only orTe iuterphalangeal joint.

> 拇指仅有一个远侧指间关节。

The iuterphalangeal joints between the proximal and middle phalanges of the other fingers are called proximal intcrphalangeal joints, those between the middle and distal phalanges are the distal iuterphalangeal joints. Intcrphalangeal joints are typical hinge joints *(ginglymus).*

> 其他手指的近节指骨与中节指骨之间的关节称为近侧指骨间关节，中节指骨与远节指骨之间的关节称为远侧指骨间关节。指骨间关节属于典型的铰链关节（ginglymus）。

![](_page_218_Picture_2.jpeg)

## 18 ARTICULATIONS OF THE PELVIC GIRDLE AND FREE LOWER LIMB 骨盆带与自由下肢的关节

### 18.1 JOINTS OF THE LOWER LIMB 下肢关节

The joints of the lower limb *(juncturae membri inferioris)* are subdivided into joints of the pelvic girdle *(juncturae cinguli membri inferioris)* and joints of the free lower limb *(juncturae membri inferioris liberi).*

> 下肢关节（juncturae membri inferioris）可分为骨盆带关节（juncturae cinguli membri inferioris）和自由下肢关节（juncturae membri inferioris liberi）。

## 19 JOINTS OF THE PELVIC GIRDLE 骨盆带关节

The bones of the pelvic girdle articulate by means of two sacroitiac joints, the pubic symphysis, and some ligaments.

> 骨盆带的骨通过两个骶髂关节、耻骨联合以及一些韧带进行连接。

#### 19.1.1 THE SACROIUAC JOINT 骶髂关节

the articular surfaces and is taut. The ligaments of the joint are sacral vertebra. surfaces. The anterior (ventral) sacroiliac ligaments *(ligamenta sac-* mil a limited range of movements. surface from the pelvic surface of the sacrum to the iliac bone. means of a series of strong ligaments; these are as follows.

> 关节面并处于紧张状态。关节的韧带连接骶骨椎体表面。前（腹侧）骶髂韧带（ligamenta sacroiliaca ventralia）从骶骨的盆面连接到髂骨，其活动范围受到限制。这些韧带通过一系列强韧的韧带实现，具体包括以下几种。

- ities. process *(processus falciformis).*

> 叶状突（processus falciformis）

The sacroiliac joint *(articulatio sacroiliaca)* (Figs 218-220) is a rior superior iliac spine, and are attached to the transverse tuberpaired joint formed between the iliac bone and sacrum. cles of the sacrum for the distance from the second to third sacral The articulating auricular surfaces *(fades auricularcs)* of the il- foramina. The other bands of ligaments run from the posterior suiac bones and sacrum are flat and covered by fibrous cartilage. The perior iliac spine downwards and slightly medially to be attached articular capsule *(capsula articularis)* is attached to the margins of to the posterior surface of the sacrum in the region of the fourth

> 骶髂关节（articulatio sacroiliaca）（图218-220）是由髂骨和骶骨形成的复合关节，位于第2至第3骶孔之间的距离范围内。髂骨与骶骨的关节面（auricular surfaces）为扁平状，被纤维软骨覆盖。关节囊（capsula articularis）附着于髂骨翼的前缘和后缘，以及骶骨的前缘和后缘。此外，还有一些韧带从髂骨翼的后缘向下，稍向内侧附着于骶骨的后表面，位于第4骶孔区域。

strong fibrous bands tightly stretched on its anterior and superior The sacroiliac joint is related to the group of joints which per-

> 强韧的纤维束紧密地附着于其前侧和上方。骶髂关节与一组关节相关联，这些关节包括：

*roiliaca ventralia)* are short fibrous bands stretching on the anterior The hip bone is also united with the vertebral column by

> (前腹股沟韧带) 是一些短的纤维束，位于前方。髋骨也通过[!note]- 术语说明
“Ligamentum ventro-inguinale” 通常译作“前腹股沟韧带”，是连接髋骨与椎骨的韧带之一。

- The following ligaments are located on the posterior surface of 1. The sacrotuberous ligament *(ligamentum sacrotuberale)*  the joint. (Figs 218-220) arises from the medial surface of the ischial tuber-1. The interosseous sacroiliac ligaments *(ligamenta sacroiliaca* osity, passes upwards and medially spreading fan-wise, and is at*interossea)* lie behind the sacroiliac joint in the space between the tached to the lateral border of the sacrum and coccyx. Some bands bones forming it. They are attached to the iliac and sacral tuberos- pass over to the inferior part of the ischium lo form the falciform
- 2. The posterior (dorsal) sacroiliac ligaments *(ligamenta sacroil-* 2. The sacrospinous ligament *(ligamentum sacrospinale) iaca dorsalia).* Some bands of these ligaments arise from the poste- (Figs 218-220) runs from the ischial spine medially and to the

> 以下韧带位于骶骨坐骨关节的后侧。  
1. 骶结节韧带（ligamentum sacrotuberale）（图218-220）起自坐骨结节的内侧表面，向上并向内呈扇形展开，附着于骶骨和尾骨的外侧缘。部分韧带延伸至坐骨的下部，形成镰状韧带。  
2. 骶棘韧带（ligamentum sacrospinale）（图218-220）起自坐骨棘，向内侧延伸。  

>[!note]-  术语说明  
"Interosseous sacroiliac ligaments" 通常译作“骨间骶髂韧带”，是指位于骶骨与髂骨之间的韧带。  
"Posterior (dorsal) sacroiliac ligaments" 通常译作“后（背侧）骶髂韧带”，是骶髂关节后方的主要韧带之一。  
"Interosseous" 在此指“骨间”，即位于骨骼之间的结构。

back and is attached in front of the sacrotuberous ligament to the lateral border of the sacrum and partly to the coccyx.

> 位于背部，并从前侧附着于骶结节韧带的前方，附着于骶骨的外侧缘，部分附着于尾骨。

Both ligaments together with the greater and lesser sciatic notches form the borders of the greater and lesser sciatic foramina (foramen ischiadicum majus et foramen ischiadicum minus) which transmit muscles as well as vessels and nerves leaving the pelvis.

> 这两条韧带与大骨盆上口和小骨盆上口共同构成大骨盆孔和小骨盆孔（foramen ischiadicum majus et foramen ischiadicum minus），这些孔道传递着离开骨盆的肌肉、血管和神经。

3. The iliolumbar ligament (ligamentum iliolumbale)

> 髂腰韧带（ligamentum iliolumbale）

(Figs 218-219) passes from the anterior surface of the transverse processes of the fourth and fifth lumbar vertebrae laterally to the posterior parts of the iliac crest and medial surface of the ala of the ilium.

> （图218-219）从前侧方向第四腰椎和第五腰椎横突的前表面横向延伸至髂骨嵴的后部以及髂骨翼的内侧表面。

The sacrococcygeal joint (junctura sacrococcygea) (see Articulations of the Vertebral Column).

> 骶尾关节（junctura sacrococcygea）（参见椎骨关节）。

![](_page_220_Picture_7.jpeg)

## 20 Pelvic ligaments and joints; seen from above (1/5).

> 21 骨盆韧带与关节；从上方观察（1/5）

(Ligaments and joints of pelvic girdle [ligamenta et articulationes s. juncturae cinguli membri inferioris]. Part of left hip bone, left parts of sacrum and of third, fourth, and fifth lumbar vertebrae removed by horizontal and sagittal sections.)

> （骨盆带的韧带与关节 [ligamenta et articulationes s. juncturae cinguli membri inferioris]。左侧髋骨、左侧骶骨以及第三、第四和第五腰椎部分被水平面和矢状面切口移除。）

## 21 T H E PUBIC SYMPHYSIS

> 22 骨盆直肠韧带

The pubic symphysis *(symphysis pubica)* (Figs 218, 220) is formed by the articular symphyseal surfaces *(fades symphysialis)* of the pubic bones, which arc covered by hyaline cartilage, and the fibrocartilaginous inlerpubic disc *(discus interpubicus).* The disc fuses with the articular surfaces of the pubic bones and has a sagittal slit-like cavitv within it. The disc is shorter in females than in males, but is thicker and has a relatively larger cavity.

> 耻骨联合（symphysis pubica）（图218、220）由耻骨的关节 symphysialis 面（articular symphyseal surfaces）形成，这些面被透明软骨覆盖，并与纤维软骨构成的耻骨间盘（discus interpubicus）相连。该盘与耻骨的关节面融合，并在其内部具有一个矢状位的裂隙状腔隙。在女性中，该盘较短，但更厚，且腔隙相对较大。

The pubic symphysis is strengthened by the following ligaments.

> 耻骨联合由以下韧带加强。

- 1. The superior pubic ligament *(ligamentum pubicum superius)* is stretched between both pubic tubercles on the superior border of the symphysis.
- 2. The inferior (arcuate) pubic ligament *(ligamentum arcuatum pubis)* passes on the interior border of the symphysis from one pubic bone to the other.

> 耻骨上韧带（ligamentum pubicum superius）位于耻骨联合上缘，连接两侧耻骨隆起之间。  
耻骨下（弓形）韧带（ligamentum arcuatum pubis）则从一侧耻骨延伸至另一侧，沿耻骨联合内侧缘走行。

![](_page_221_Picture_7.jpeg)

219. *Pelvic ligaments and joints, hip joint (artkulatio coxae);* posterior view

> 骨盆韧带与关节，髋关节（artkulatio coxae）；后侧视图

{Articular capsule of left hip joint is removed.) .

> （左侧髋关节关节囊被切除。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_222_Picture_2.jpeg)

220. *Ligaments and joints of pelvis, right side;* inner aspect i (Sagittal-medial section.)

> 骨盆右侧韧带与关节；内侧方面（矢状-内侧断面）

#### 21.1.1 T H E OBTURATOR MEMBRANE

> 22.1.1 阻塞膜

ramen and close it except in the obturator groove. The obturator and nerves.

> 闭合并固定，但勿进入坐骨大孔。坐骨神经和神经。

I he obturator membrane *(membrane obturatoria)* membrane bears some small foramina. Together with the muscle (Figs 219-221) is formed on predominantly transverse connective- arising from it and the obturator groove il borders the obturator tissue Fibres which are attached to the borders of the obturator fo- canal *(canalis obturaiorius)* which transmits the obturator vessels

> 髂骨闭孔膜（membrana obturatoria）上有一些小孔。该膜与肌肉（见图219-221）共同形成，主要由横行的致密结缔组织构成。该膜与闭孔沟（fossa obturatoria）共同界于闭孔区的组织纤维之间，这些纤维附着于闭孔的边缘。闭孔管（canalis obturatori）由此穿过，内有闭孔血管通过。

## 22 JOINTS OF THE FREE LOWER LIMB 自由下肢的关节

### 22.1 **THE HIP** JOINT  髋关节

The hip joint *(articulatio coxae)* (Figs 219, 221-224) is fonncd by ihc articular surface of the femoral head (which is covered by hyaline cartilage except for the fovea capitis) and by the acetabulum of the hip bone. The acetabulum is covered by cartilage only in the region of the articular surface *(fades lunata),* the rest of its surface is filled with fatly tissue and covered by a synovial membrane. Above the acelabular notch stretches the transverse ligament of the acetabulum *(ligamentum transversum acetabuh).*  On the free margin of the acetabulum and on this ligament is attached the labrum acctabulare which makes the acetabulum deeper.

> 髋关节（articulatio coxae）（图219、221-224）由股骨头的关节面（除头凹外均被透明软骨覆盖）和髋骨的髋臼组成。髋臼仅在其关节面区域（月状面）被软骨覆盖，其余部分则被脂肪组织填充，并覆以滑膜膜。在髋臼窝上方延伸出髋臼横韧带（ligamentum transversum acetabuli）。在髋臼的自由边缘以及该韧带上附着有髋臼唇（labrum acetabulare），使髋臼加深。

The articular capsule *(capsula articularis)* is attached to the hip bone along the edge of the labrum acetabulare; on the femur it is attached to the trochanteric line and embraces posteriorly two thirds of the femoral neck but does not reach the trochanteric crest.

>关节囊（capsula articularis）附着于髋骨的髋臼唇边缘；在股骨上，它附着于大转子线，并向后包裹股骨颈的三分之二，但未达到大转子嵴。

The hip joint has the following ligaments.

> 髋关节具有以下韧带。

1. The iliofeiuoral ligament *(ligamenturn iliofcmorale)* (Fig. 221) lies on the anterior surface of the hip joint. It stretches from the anterior inferior iliac spine and is attached to the trochanteric line. It checks extension at the hip joint and contributes lo holding the trunk erect.

> 髂股韧带（ligamentum iliofemorale）（图221）位于髋关节的前表面。它起自前下髂嵴，并附着于大转子线。该韧带限制髋关节的伸展，并有助于维持躯干直立。

![](_page_223_Picture_8.jpeg)

221. *Right hip joint (articulatio coxae);* anterior aspect (%)•

> 右侧髋关节（关节囊）；前方（%）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_224_Picture_2.jpeg)

222. *Right hip joint (articulatio coxae)*  (Cavity of hip joint opened by frontal section.)

> 右侧髋关节（髋关节腔经正中矢状面切开后显示）

- 2. The pubofemoral ligament *(ligamentum pubofcmoralt)*  (Fig. 221) runs downwards from the superior pubic ramus and intertwines with the capsule of the hip joint; some of its bands reach the medial part of the Irochanteric line.
- 3. The ischiofemoral ligament *(ligamentum ischiofemorale)*  (Fig. 219) arises on the anterior surface of the body of the ischium, runs forewards and blends with the capsule of the hip joint; some of its bundles reach the irochanteric fossa.
  - 4. The zona orbicularis (Figs 219 and 222) runs in the articu-

> 耻股韧带（ligamentum pubofemorale）（图221）自耻骨上支向下延伸，并与髋关节囊交织；其部分束纤维到达大转子嵴的内侧部分。  
坐股韧带（ligamentum ischiofemorale）（图219）起自坐骨体的前表面，向前延伸并与髋关节囊融合；其部分束纤维到达大转子窝。  
环状带（zona orbicularis）（图219和222）在关节处运行。

lar capsule, loops the femoral neck, and is attached to the anterior inferior iliac spine.

> 股关节囊、绕过股骨颈，并附着于前下髂嵴。

5. The ligament of the head of the femur *(ligamentum capitis femoris)* (Figs 222, 223) is in the joint cavity. It arises from the transverse ligament of the acetabulum and is covered by a synovial membrane; it is attached to the pit in the femoral head. Vessels pass to the head of the femur in the ligament.

> 股骨头韧带（ligamentum capitis femoris）（图222、223）位于关节腔内。它起自髋臼横韧带，并被滑膜膜覆盖；其附着于股骨头的凹陷处。血管通过该韧带到达股骨头。

The hip joint is« variety of a ball-and-socket joint *(articulatio cotylica).*

> 髋关节是一种球窝关节（关节囊联合窝关节）。

![](_page_225_Picture_2.jpeg)

223. *Right hip joint (articulatio coxae)*  (Articular capsule is cut and femoral head drawn out of acetabulum.)

> 右侧髋关节（髋关节）（关节囊被切开，股骨头被取出髋臼。）

## 24 T H E KNEE JOIN T 膝关节

The knee joint *(articulatio genu)* (Figs 225-233) is formed by three bones, namely, the lower end of the femur, the upper end of the tibia, and the patella. The articular surfaces of the femoral condyles are ellipsoid. The medial condyle is more convex than the lateral condyle. On the anterior surface of the bone, between the condyles, is the patellar surface *(fades patellaris)* which is divided by a small groove into a medial (smaller) and lateral (larger) areas. These areas articulate with the respective articular facets on the

> 膝关节（articulatio genu）（图225-233）由三块骨构成，即股骨下端、胫骨上端和髌骨。股骨髁的关节面呈椭圆形。内侧髁比外侧髁更为凸出。在骨的前表面、两个髁之间是髌面（fades patellaris），该髌面被一个小沟分为内侧（较小）区和外侧（较大）区。这些区域分别与髌骨相应的关节面相接。

posterior surface *(fades articularis)* of the patella. The superior articular surfaces *(fades articulares superiores)* of the tibial condyles are slightly concave and are incongrucnt with the convex articular surfaces of the femoral condyles. This incongruence is corrected to some extent by the interarticular cartilages called the medial semilunar cartilage and lateral seinilwiar cartilage *(menisci medialis* et *lateralis)* or menisci (Figs 231-233) which are located between the femoral and tibial condyles. The menisci are cartilaginous trihe-

> 髌骨的后表面（关节面）。胫骨髁的上关节面（上关节面）略呈凹陷，与股骨髁的凸起关节面不完全契合。这种不契合在一定程度上被位于股骨髁与胫骨髁之间的关节间软骨所矫正，这些软骨称为 medial semilunar cartilage（ medial半月板）和 lateral semilunar cartilage（lateral半月板）或半月板（图231-233）。半月板是软骨性结构，呈三角形，[!note]- 术语说明 “menisci” 通常译作“半月板”，是膝关节内的两个C形软骨结构，分别位于股骨髁与胫骨髁之间，起到缓冲和稳定关节的作用。

![](_page_227_Picture_5.jpeg)

225. *Right knee joint (articulatio genus);* anterior aspect (%).

> 右膝关节（articulatio genus）；前方（anterior aspect）

![](_page_228_Picture_2.jpeg)

226. *Right knee joint (articulatio genus);* posterior aspect (%).

> 右膝关节（articulatio genus）；后方（%）

dral plates. Their peripheral edge is thick and fused with the articular capsule, the edge facing the joint cavity is sharpened and free. The superior surface of the meniscus is concave, the inferior surface is flat. The peripheral edges of the menisci almost copy the configuration of the superior border of the tibial condyles as the result of which the lateral meniscus resembles a part of a circumference, while the medial meniscus is crescent-shaped. The menisci are attached in front and behind to the intercondylar eminence of the tibia. The anterior parts of both menisci are joined by the transverse ligament of the knee *(ligamentum transversum genus).*

> 半月板。其周边缘较厚并与关节囊融合，面向关节腔的边缘则变尖且游离。半月板的上表面凹陷，下表面平坦。半月板的周边缘几乎复制了胫骨髁上缘的形态，因此外侧半月板呈圆弧状，而内侧半月板呈新月形。半月板的前后缘附着于胫骨髁间隆起。两侧半月板的前部由膝横韧带（膝横韧带）相连。[!note]- 术语说明
“Ligamentum transversum genus” 通常译作“膝横韧带”，是膝关节内重要的韧带结构。

The articular capsule *(capsula artieularis)* is loosely stretched. Its posterior part is thicker than the other parts and bears some orifices which transmit vessels. In front it blends with the tendon of the quadriceps femoris muscle and is attached to the borders of the articular surface of the patella. On the femur the capsule is attached slightly above the articular cartilage in front, almost at the

> 关节囊（capsula articularis）呈松弛状态。其后部比其他部分更厚，并有一些孔，可让血管通过。前方与股四头肌腱融合，并附着于髌骨关节面的边缘。在股骨上，关节囊附着于关节软骨前方稍上方的位置，几乎接近/

![](_page_229_Picture_2.jpeg)

227, *Right knee joint (articulatio genus)* (J/I) (Cavity of knee joint opened by sagittal section)

> 227，右膝关节（关节）（J/I）（膝关节腔经矢状面切开）

cartilage on ihc sides, and on its border behind. On the tibia the capsule is attached to the borders of the articular surface. The articular capsule is lined with a synovia! membrane which covers the ligaments lodged in the joint cavity and forms synovial villi *(villi synovialis)* and synovial folds *(plicae synoviales).* The stronger developed folds are as follows: (a) the alar folds *(plicae alares)* (Fig. 227) which run on the sides of the patella to its apex and contain fatty tissue between their layers; the infrapatellar synovial fold *(plica synovialis injrapatellaris)* which is below the patella and is a continuation of the alar folds. It arises in the region of the apex of the patella, enters the cavity of the knee joint, and is attached in the region of the anterior edge of the intercondylar notch of the femur.

> 髌骨两侧及后缘处有软骨覆盖。在胫骨上，关节囊附着于关节面的边缘。关节囊内衬以滑膜，该滑膜覆盖位于关节腔内的韧带，并形成滑膜绒毛（villi synovialis）和滑膜皱襞（plicae synoviales）。其中较发达的皱襞包括：(a) 髂部皱襞（plicae alares）（图227），其沿髌骨两侧延伸至髌骨尖，其层间含有脂肪组织；髌下滑膜皱襞（plica synovialis infrapatellaris），位于髌骨下方，是髂部皱襞的延续。它起始于髌骨尖区域，进入膝关节腔，并附着于股骨髁间窝前缘区域。

The capsule of the knee joint forms a series of synovial eversions *(eversiones synoviales)* and synovial bursae *(bursae synoviales)*  which are situated along the distribution of muscles and tendons but do not communicate with the joint cavity (see *Muscles of the Lower Limb).* The largest pouch of the articular capsule is the suprapatcllar bursa *(bursa suprapateilarts)* situated above the patella between the tendon of the quadriceps femoris muscle; in some individuals it may be isolated.

> 膝关节囊形成一系列滑膜皱襞（synovial eversions）和滑膜鞘（synovial bursae），它们沿肌肉和肌腱的分布区域分布，但并不与关节腔相通（参见下肢肌肉）。关节囊最大的囊袋是位于髌骨上方，处于股四头肌腱之间的髌上囊（bursa suprapatellaris）；在某些个体中，该囊可能单独存在。

Two groups of knee joint ligaments are distinguished, one extra-articular and the other intra-articular. The following well developed ligaments are situated on the sides of the joint.

> 膝关节韧带可分为两组，一组为关节外韧带，另一组为关节内韧带。以下发育良好的韧带位于关节的两侧。

- 1. The medial ligament of the knee or libial collateral ligament *(ligamentum collaterale tibiale)* (Figs 225, 226, 231, 232). It runs downwards from the medial femoral cpicondyle, blends with the articular capsule and medial meniscus, and reaches the upper part of the tibia.
- 2. The lateral ligament of the knee or fibular collateral ligament *(ligamentum collaterale fibulare)* (Figs 225, 230-232). It is narrower than the medial ligament; it arises from the lateral cpicondyle of the femur and also stretches downwards, gives off some bands to the articular capsule, and is attached to the lateral surface of the head of the fibula.

> 膝内侧韧带或胫侧副韧带（ligamentum collaterale tibiale）（图225、226、231、232）。它自股骨内侧髁向下延伸，与关节囊和内侧半月板相融合，并到达胫骨上部。  
膝外侧韧带或腓侧副韧带（ligamentum collaterale fibulare）（图225、230-232）。它比内侧韧带较窄；起自股骨外侧髁，并向下延伸，向关节囊发出一些束状结构，最终附着于腓骨头的外侧表面。

The anterior parts of the articular capsule are reinforced by ligaments related directly lo the tendon of the quadriceps femoris muscle. This muscle approaches the patella to be attached to its base. Some of the bundles of the tendon are continued downwards to the tuberosity of the tibia to form below the apex of the patella the ligamentum patellae (Figs 225, 227, 230). Other bundles stretch vertically on the sides of the patella and its ligament and form vertical ligaments called the lateral and medial retinaculi of the patella *(retinaculum patellae laterale* et *retinaculum patellae mediate).* They run from the sides of the patella to the respective femoral condyle. Under these ligaments are tendon fibres stretching horizontally from the sides of the patella to the femoral epicondyles. The posterior parts of the articular capsule are strengthened by the oblique posterior ligament of the knee *(ligamentum pophteum obliquum)* (Fig. 226) which is a part of the tendon of the scmimembranosus muscle. The ligament runs from the medial tibial condyle to the lateral femoral condyle and some of its fibres blend on the way with the articular capsule.

> 关节囊的前部由与股四头肌肌腱直接相关的韧带加强。该肌接近髌骨并附着于其基底部。股四头肌肌腱的一些束向下延续至胫骨粗隆，形成位于髌骨尖下方的髌韧带（图225、227、230）。其他束则垂直地附着于髌骨及其韧带的两侧，形成称为髌骨外侧和内侧支持带（retinaculum patellae laterale et retinaculum patellae mediate）的垂直韧带。这些支持带从髌骨的两侧延伸至相应的股骨髁。在这些韧带下方，有腱纤维水平地从髌骨的两侧延伸至股骨髁上。关节囊的后部由膝后斜韧带（ligamentum popliteum obliquum）加强（图226），该韧带是半膜肌肌腱的一部分。该韧带从胫骨内侧髁延伸至股骨外侧髁，其部分纤维在途中与关节囊融合。

In addition to the oblique ligament, another ligament called

> 除斜角韧带外，另一条韧带称为

![](_page_230_Picture_9.jpeg)

- 1—femur

- 3 —lateral condyle of tibia
