> 背部肌肉的起始点和止点（示意图）

![](_page_270_Picture_2.jpeg)

**258.** Muscles of the back and posterior region of the neck  $\binom{1}{6}$ .

> 背肌和颈部后侧肌群

(Deep muscles of the back; second deep layer.)

> （背部深部肌肉；第二层深部肌肉）

![](_page_271_Picture_2.jpeg)

259. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles of the trunk* (schematical representation).

> 躯干肌肉的起始与附着部位（示意图）。

(Deep muscles of ihc back; second deep layer.)

> （背部深层肌肉；第二层深层肌群）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_272_Picture_2.jpeg)

**260.** Muscles of the back and posterior region of the neck  $\binom{1}{6}$ .

> 背部及颈部后部的肌肉

(Deep muscles; second deep layer. Short muscles of the back and posterior region of the neck.)

> （深层肌肉；第二层深层。背部及颈部后区的短肌）

#### 4.1.2 SHORT MUSCLES OF TH E BACK

> 4.1.2 背部短肌

1. The interspinales muscles *(musculi interspinales)* (Figs 257, 258, 260) are short paired muscular fibres stretching between the spinous processes ol two contiguous vertebrae.

> 棘间肌（musculi interspinales）（图257、258、260）是由短而成对的肌纤维组成，连接相邻椎骨的棘突之间。

The cervical interspinales muscles *(musculi interspinales cervicis),*  the thoracic interspinales muscles *(musculi interspinales thoracis)*  (which are often absent), and the lumbar interspinales muscles *(musculi interspinales lumborum)* are distinguished.

> 颈椎棘间肌（musculi interspinales cervicis）、胸椎棘间肌（musculi interspinales thoracis）（常缺如）和腰椎棘间肌（musculi interspinales lumborum）可加以区分。

Action: extend the vertebral column and hold it erect.

> 动作：伸展椎体列并保持直立。

Innervation: the spinal nerves (C3-L5).

> 支配神经：脊神经（C3-L5）。

2. The intertransverse muscles *(musculi intertransversarii)* (Figs 259,260) are short and stretch between the transverse processes of two contiguous vertebrae. The following parts are distinguished: the anterior and posterior intertransverse muscles *(musculi intertransversarii anteriores* et *posteriores cervias),* the thoracic intertransverse muscles *(musculi intertransversarii thoracis),* and the lateral and medial intertransverse muscles *(musculi intertransversarii laterales* et *mediates lumborum).*

> 横突间肌（musculi intertransversarii）（图259、260）是短而细的肌肉，连接相邻两个椎骨的横突之间。其可分为以下部分：前纵列和后纵列横突间肌（musculi intertransversarii anteriores et posteriores cervias）、胸段横突间肌（musculi intertransversarii thoracis），以及腰段的外侧和内侧横突间肌（musculi intertransversarii laterales et mediates lumborum）。

Action: hold the vertebral column erect; unilateral contraction of the muscles bends the column to the side.

> 动作：保持椎体柱直立；单侧肌肉收缩会使椎体柱向一侧弯曲。

Innervation: the spinal nerves (C( -Cs; L^L,).

> 支配：脊神经（C1-C7；L1-L5）

3. The levalores costarum muscles *(musculi Uvatorts costarum)*  (Figs 258-260) are present only in the thoracic segment of the vertebral column. They arc covered by the erector spinae muscle. The muscular fibres arise from the transverse processes of the vertebra proininens and the upper eleven thoracic vertebrae and run downwards obliquely and laterally, diverging fan-wise, to be inserted to the angles of the ribs below. In the lower thoracic segment of the vertebral column there arc muscular fibres which overlap one rib. These are called the levalores costarum longi muscles *(musculi levatores costarum longi)* in distinction from the levatores

> 肋间提肌（musculi levatores costarum）（图258-260）仅存在于脊柱的胸段。它们被竖脊肌覆盖。肌纤维起自突出椎体的横突及上十一胸椎，并向下斜向侧方延伸，呈扇形分散，最终附着于下方肋骨的肋角。在脊柱的下胸段，存在一些肌纤维覆盖单根肋骨。这些肌纤维称为肋间提肌长肌（musculi levatores costarum longi），以区别于肋间提肌。

costarum breves muscles *(musculi levatores costarum breves)* passing to the rib next below.

> 短肋举肌（musculi levatores costarum breves）附着于下方的肋骨。

Action: raise the ribs.

> 动作：提肋。

Innervation: the spinal and intercostal nerves (C<sup>s</sup> ; Thj-Th <sup>n</sup> ).

> 支配神经：脊神经和肋间神经（C<sup>s</sup> ; Thj-Th <sup>n</sup> ）。

- 4. The group of suboccipital muscles (Figs 256, 258-260; 261, 262) consists of short, weak muscles occupying the deepest position. These are as follows:
- (a) the rectus capitis posterior major muscle *(musculus rectus capitis posterior major)* runs between the spinous process of the axis and the lateral segment of the inferior nuchal line;
- (b) the rectus capitis posterior minor muscle *(musculus rectus ca~ pit is posterior minor)* passes from the posterior tubercle of the atlas to the medial segment of the inferior nuchal line;
- (c) the obliquus capitis inferior muscle *(musculus obliquus capitis inferior)* stretches between the spinous process of the axis and the transverse process of the atlas;
- (d) the obliquus capitis superior muscle *(musculus obliquus capitis superior)* runs from the transverse process of the atlas to the lateral segments of the inferior nuchal line.

> 枕下肌群（图256，258-260；261，262）由一些短而弱的肌肉组成，位于最深的位置。这些肌肉包括：
(a) 枢椎棘突与下项线外侧段之间走行的**直肌（rectus capitis posterior major）**（musculus rectus capitis posterior major）；
(b) 从寰椎后结节至下项线内侧段走行的**直肌（rectus capitis posterior minor）**（musculus rectus capitis posterior minor）；
(c) 从枢椎棘突至寰椎横突之间走行的**下斜肌（obliquus capitis inferior）**（musculus obliqu.
(d) 从寰椎横突至下项线外侧段走行的**上斜肌（obliquus capitis superior）**（musculus obliquus capitis superior）。

Action: contraction of muscles on both sides bends the head backwards; contraction of muscles on one side bends the head backwards and to the side; at the same time the obliquus capitis inferior muscle and partly the rectus capitis posterior major muscle rotate the head.

> 动作：两侧肌肉收缩使头后仰；一侧肌肉收缩使头向后并侧屈；同时，斜方肌下部（obliquus capitis inferior）和部分头直肌后外侧（rectus capitis posterior major）使头旋转。

Innervation: the first cervical (suboccipital) and second cervical nerves.

> 支配神经：第1颈神经（枕下神经）和第2颈神经。

Blood supply: all the deep (proper) muscles of the back are supplied with blood by the intercostal, lumbar and sacral arteries while the muscles of the back of the neck are supplied by the occipital, deep cervical, and vertebral arteries.

> 血供：背部的所有深（固有）肌肉由肋间动脉、腰动脉和骶动脉供血，而颈部后侧的肌肉则由椎动脉、颈深动脉和椎动脉供血。

## 5 FASCIAE OF THE BACK

> 5 背部筋膜

The following fasciae of the back are distinguished.

> 背部的以下筋膜有所区别。

- 1. The superficial fascia of the back is a thin connective-tissue layer (part of the general subcutaneous fascia) covering the superficial muscles of the back.
- 2. The fascia nuchae is located on the dorsal surface of the neck between the superficial and deep layers of muscles. It fuses with the ligamentum nuchae medially {Fig. 255) and is continuous with the superficial layer of the cervical fascia laterally; it is attached above to the superior nuchal line.
- 3. The lumbar fascia *(fascia tkoracolumbalis)* (Figs 253-255; 258) forms a dense fibrous sheath in which the deep muscles of the back are lodged. This fascia consists of two layers; superficial (posterior) and deep (anterior). The superficial layer is attached below to the iliac crests, laterally it reaches the angles of the ribs, and is attached medially to the spinous processes of all the vertebrae,

> 背部浅层筋膜是一层薄的结缔组织层（属于全身浅层筋膜的一部分），覆盖在背部的浅层肌肉上。

颈后筋膜位于颈部背侧，处于浅层肌肉与深层肌肉之间。它在内侧与颈韧带相融合（见图255），在外侧与颈筋膜的浅层连续；其上方附着于枕外隆起。

腰筋膜（胸腰筋膜）（见图253-255；268）形成一个致密的纤维鞘，深部背部肌肉位于其中。该筋膜由两层组成：浅层（后层）和深层（前层）。浅层在下方附着于髂嵴，外侧延伸至肋骨的角，内侧则附着于所有椎骨的棘突。

with the exception of the cervical vertebrae. It is the thickest in the lumbar region and much thinner in the upper parts. The superficial layer fuses with the deep layer laterally on the lateral border of the erector spinae muscle. As a result a fibrous sheath forms which invests the lumbar part of this muscle whose upper parts are lodged in the osteofibrous sheath of the back.

> 除颈椎外，该结构在腰段最厚，而在上段则明显较薄。表层在竖脊肌的外侧边界处与深层融合，形成一层纤维鞘，包裹该肌的腰段，而该肌的上段则位于背部骨纤维鞘内。

The superficial layer gives rise to the latissimus dorsi and serratus posterior inferior muscles. The deep layer of the lumbar fascia stretches between the transverse processes of the lumbar vertebrae, ilu iliac crest, and the twelfth rib; il fuses laterally with the superficial layer. The deep layer is present only in the lumbar region, in the space between the quadratus lumborum and the erector spinae muscles. The transversus abdominis muscle *(musculus transversus abdominis)* takes origin from the deep layer and from its junction with the superficial layer.

> 浅层形成背阔肌和下后锯肌。腰椎筋膜的深层在腰椎横突、髂骨髂嵴和第十二肋之间延伸，并在侧方与浅层融合。深层仅存在于腰部，在腰方肌与竖脊肌之间的间隙中存在。腹横肌（腹横肌）起源于深层及其与浅层的交界处。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_274_Picture_2.jpeg)

261. *Short muscles of posterior region of the neck*

> 颈后区短肌群

![](_page_275_Picture_2.jpeg)

262. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles of the back* (schematical representation).

> 背部肌肉的起始点和止点（示意图）。

(Deep muscles of the back; second deep layer. Short muscles of the posterior region of the neck.)

> （背部深层肌肉；第二层深层肌肉。颈部后区的短肌）

## 6 **MUSCLES AND FASCIAE OF THE HEAD**

> 6 头部的肌肉与筋膜

The following *regions of the head and face* are distinguished (Fig. 264).

> 头面部以下区域有所区别（图264）。

## 7 REGIONS OF THE HEAD

> 头部分7个区域

- 1. The frontal region *(regio frontalis)* is unpaired and reaches the nasofrontal suture (the root of the nose) and the supraorbital margins anteriorly, the parietal region posteriorly, and the temporal regions laterally.
- 2. The parietal region *(regio parietalis)* is unpaired and corresponds to the contours of the parietal bones.
  - 3. The temporal region *(regio temporalis)* is paired and is situ-

> 额区（regio frontalis）为单侧结构，向前达鼻额缝（鼻根）和眶上缘，向后达顶区，向侧达颞区。  
顶区（regio parietalis）为单侧结构，与顶骨的轮廓相对应。  
颞区（regio temporalis）为双侧结构，位于颞骨区域。

ated on the sides of the head below the parietal region. It corresponds to the contours of the squamous part of the temporal bone.

> 位于头侧部额顶区下方，其轮廓与颞骨鳞部的外形相对应。

- 4. The occipital region *(regio ocdpitalis)* is unpaired and is situated to the back of the parietal region. It stretches to the posterior region of the neck.
  - 5. The infratemporal region *(regio infratemporalis).*

> 枕区（regio occipitalis）为单侧结构，位于顶区的后方。其范围延伸至颈部的后部。  
下颌下区（regio infratemporalis）。

## 8 REGIONS OF THE FACE

> 面部8个区域

- 1. The orbital region *(regio orbitalis)* is paired and corresponds to the boundaries of the orbit.
- 2. The nasal region *(regio nasalis)* is unpaired and corresponds to the contours of the nose.
- 3. The infraorbital region *(regio infraorbitalis)* is paired and is located lateral to (hi- nasal region and below the orbital region.
- 4. The zygomatic region *(regio zygomatica)* corresponds to the contours of the body of the zygomatic bone.
  - 5- The buccal region *(regio buccalis)* is paired and is separated

> 眶区（regio orbitalis）为成对结构，对应眼眶的边界。  
鼻区（regio nasalis）为不成对结构，对应鼻部的轮廓。  
下眶区（regio infraorbitalis）为成对结构，位于鼻区的外侧，并处于眶区的下方。  
颧骨区（regio zygomatica）对应颧骨体的轮廓。  
5- 颊区（regio buccalis）为成对结构，位于鼻区与眶区的外侧。

from the nasal and oral region by the nasolabial groove *(sulcus nasolabialis).*

> 由鼻部和口腔区域通过鼻唇沟（鼻唇沟，sulcus nasolabialis）分隔。

- 6. The parotideomasseteric region *(regio parotideomasseterica)* is paired and corresponds to the contours of the parotid gland and the masscter muscle. The posterior parts of this region are called the retromandibular fossa.
  - 7. The oral region *(regio oralis)* is an unpaired region.
- 8. The mental region *(regio mentalis)* is unpaired and is separated from the oral region by the mentolabial groove *(sulcus mentolabialis).*

> 腮腺咬肌区（regio parotideomasseterica）为成对区域，其形态与腮腺和咬肌的轮廓相对应。该区域的后部称为下颌后窝（fossa retromandibularis）。

口区（regio oralis）为不成对区域。

颏区（regio mentalis）为不成对区域，其与口区以颏唇沟（sulcus mentolabialis）分隔。

## 9 MUSCLES OF THE HEAD

> 9 头部肌肉

The muscles of the head *(musculi capitis)* are divided into two groups: the muscles of facial expression and the muscles of mastication.

> 头部肌肉（musculi capitis）可分为两组：表情肌和咀嚼肌。

The muscles of facial expression, or the facial muscles are located under the skin and, in contrast to the other skeletal muscles, are devoid of fasciae. Most of them arise on the bones or fasciae of the head and are inserted into the skin.

> 表情肌，或称面部肌肉，位于皮肤之下，与其它骨骼肌不同的是，它们没有筋膜。大多数表情肌起始于头骨或头面部的筋膜，最后插入到皮肤中。

On contraction, the muscles of facial expression displace certain areas of the skin on the head and thus lend the face a variety of expressions, hence their name.

> 当面部表情肌收缩时，会牵动头部某些区域的皮肤，从而使面部呈现出多种表情，因此得名。

They arc predominantly grouped around the natural orifices of the face (the palpebral fissure, oral fissure, orifices of the nose and ear) which either become smaller and even closed completely by the action of the muscles or become larger, i.e. dilate. In accordance with this, all muscles of facial expression are divided into the following four groups.

> 它们主要围绕面部的自然孔道（如眼睑裂、口裂、鼻孔和耳孔）进行分组。这些孔道要么因肌肉的作用而变小，甚至完全闭合；要么则扩大，即发生扩张。根据这一特点，所有面部表情肌可分为以下四个组。

- 1. Muscles of the scalp.
- 2. Muscles surrounding the eyes.
- 3. Muscles surrounding the mouth.
- 4. Muscles surrounding the nose.

> 头皮肌肉。  
眼周肌肉。  
口周肌肉。  
鼻周肌肉。

The muscles of mastication move the mandible on contraction and thus cause the act of mastication. They have a mobile point, or the point of insertion, on the mandible and a fixed point, the point of origin, on the skull bones.

> 咀嚼肌在收缩时使下颌骨运动，从而引发咀嚼动作。它们在下颌骨上有可动点（即附着点），而在颅骨骨上有定点（即起始点）。

The following four pairs of muscles of mastication are distinguished.

> 以下四对咀嚼肌可加以区分。

- 1. The masscter muscle *(musculus massetcr).*
- 2. The temporal muscle *(musculus temporalis).*
- 3. The medial pterygoid muscle *(musculus pterygoideus medialis).*
- 4. The lateral pterygoid muscle *(musculus pterygoideus lateralis).*

> 咬肌（musculus massetericus）。  
颞肌（musculus temporalis）。  
翼内肌（musculus pterygoideus medialis）。  
翼外肌（musculus pterygoideus lateralis）。

![](_page_277_Figure_2.jpeg)

263. *Muscles of the head;* right side *(%).*  (Muscles of facial expression.)

> 头肌；右侧（%）。 （表情肌。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_278_Picture_2.jpeg)

264. Regions of the head and neck.

> 头颈部位

![](_page_279_Picture_2.jpeg)

265. *Lines of skin incisions on the head and neck.*  (Mosl suitable for exposing the muscles which are being dissected.)

> 头颈部皮肤切口线。（适用于暴露正在解剖的肌肉。）

#### 9.1.1 **MUSCLES OF FACIAL EXPRESSION**

> 9.1.1 面部表情肌

#### 9.1.2 MUSCLES OF TH E **SCALP**

> 9.1.2 头皮肌肉

I. A broad tendinous plate, called the epicrancal aponeurosis *(galea aponeurotica* s. *aponeurosis epicranialis)* (Figs 263, 266), lies under the skin of the scalp between the frontal and occipital bones and is fused tightly with the skin of the scalp and loosely with the periosteum of its bones.

> I. 一块宽阔的腱膜板，称为顶筋膜（epicrancal aponeurosis，即galea aponeurotica s. aponeurosis epicranialis）（图263、266），位于头皮皮肤下，介于额骨与枕骨之间，并紧密地与头皮皮肤相连，而与这些骨的骨膜则较为松散地相连。

The anterior parts of the aponeurosis include the frontal belly, the posterior parts include the occipital belly. The two bellies form the occipitofrontalis muscle *(musculus occipitofrontalis).*

> 筋膜的前部包括额腹，后部包括枕腹。这两部分共同构成枕额肌（musculus occipitofrontalis）。

- (a) The frontal belly *(venter fiontalis)* (Figs 263, 266) is under the skin of the forehead. It is formed of vertical fibres originating from the epicranial aponeurosis slightly above the frontal tubers and passing downwards to be intertwined with the skin of the forehead at the level of the superciliary arches.
- (b) The occipital belly *(venter oedpitalis)* (Figs 263, 266, 270) is made up of relatively short muscle fibres which originate in the region of the highest nuchal line, stretch upwards, and intertwine with the posterior parts of the epicranial aponeurosis.

> (a) 额腹（venter frontalis）（图263、266）位于额部皮肤之下。它由垂直走向的肌纤维组成，这些肌纤维起自额突稍上方的颅顶腱膜，向下延伸并与额部皮肤在眉间弓水平处交织在一起。

(b) 枕腹（venter occipitalis）（图263、266、270）由相对较短的肌纤维构成，这些肌纤维起自最高颈线区域，向上延伸并与颅顶腱膜的后部交织在一起。

The epicranial aponeurosis and the muscular parts connected with it form the epicranius muscle *(musculus epicranius).*

> 颅顶腱膜及其相连的肌性部分共同构成额肌（musculus epicranius）。

Action: contraction of the occipital belly displaces to the back the epicranial aponeurosis and, together with it, the skin of the scalp; contraction of the frontal belly displaces forwards the epicranial aponeurosis and the part of the skin of the scalp connected with it; with the aponeurosis fixed, the muscle raises the eyebrows and widens the palpebral fissure.

> 作用：枕部肌束收缩时，将帽状腱膜及与其相连的头皮皮肤向后牵拉；额部肌束收缩时，将帽状腱膜及与其相连的部分头皮皮肤向前牵拉；当帽状腱膜固定时，该肌可提眉并扩大眼裂。

Blood supply: frontal belly —the superficial temporal, supraorbital, lacrimal, and angular arteries; occipital belly — the occipital and posterior auricular arteries.

> 血供：额肌部 — 颞浅动脉、眶上动脉、泪动脉和内眦动脉；枕肌部 — 枕动脉和耳后动脉。

2. The auricularis anterior muscle *(musculus auricularts anterior)*  (Fig. 263) originates from the temporal fascia and epicranial aponeurosis, runs to the back and downwards, becomes slightly narrower, and is inserted into the skin of the auricle above the tragus. Action: pulls the auricle forwards and upwards.

> 耳前肌（musculus auriculatus anterior）（图263）起自颞筋膜和额顶筋膜，向后下方走行，逐渐变细，最终插入耳廓耳屏上方的皮肤。功能：牵拉耳廓向前上方。

Blood supply: the superficial temporal artery.

> 供血：颞浅动脉。

3. The auricularis superior muscle *(musculus auricularis superior)*  (Fig. 263) is next to the auricularis anterior muscle. It arises above the auricle from the epicranial aponeurosis, extends downwards, and is inserted into the upper part of the auricular cartilage.

> 耳上肌（musculus auricularis superior）（图263）位于耳前肌的附近。它起自耳廓上方的额顶筋膜，向下延伸，并附着于耳廓软骨的上部。

A bundle of fibres of this muscle is interlaced into the epicranial aponeurosis and is called the temporoparietal muscle *(musculus temporopa rietalis).*

> 该肌的一部分纤维交织入颅顶部腱膜，并称为颞顶肌（musculus temporoparieta lis）。[!note]- 术语说明 “temporoparieta lis” 是拉丁学名，中文译名通常为“颞顶肌”，属于头颈肌群中的一个肌群，主要起自颞区和顶区，参与头部运动和稳定。

Action: pulls the auricle upwards and tenses the epicranial aponeurosis.

> 作用：将耳廓向上拉并紧张额顶筋膜。

Blood supply: the superficial temporal, posterior auricular, and occipital arteries.

> 供血：浅颞动脉、后耳动脉和枕动脉。

4. The auricularis posterior muscle *(musculus auricularis posterior)* (Fig. 263) is poorly developed. It originates dorsally from the fascia nuchac and, passing forwards, reaches the base of the auricle.

> 耳后肌（musculus auricularis posterior）（图263）发育不完善。它起源于枕颈筋膜的背侧，并向前延伸至耳廓基部。

Action: pulls the auricle backwards.

> 动作：将耳郭向后拉。

Blood supply: the posterior auricular artery.

> 供血：后耳动脉。

5. The transversus nuchae muscle *(musculus transversus nuchae)*  is an inconstant muscle. It arises from the external occipital protuberance, extends laterally to the point of insertion of the sternocleidomastoid muscle and reaches the mastoid process. It is inserted here into the tendon of the sternocleidoinastoid muscle and sometimes gives off some fibres to the occipital fascia and the platysma muscle.

> 斜方肌（musculus transversus nuchae）是一块变异较大的肌肉。它起自枕外隆凸，向侧方延伸至胸锁乳突肌的止点，并到达乳突。该肌在此处插入到胸锁乳突肌的肌腱中，有时还会向枕部筋膜和颈阔肌发出一些肌纤维。

Action: tenses the fascia and, with it, the skin of the occipital region.

> 作用：牵拉枕部皮肤及皮下筋膜。

Blood supply: the occipital artery.

> 血供：枕动脉。

#### 9.1.3 MUSCLES SURROUNDING THE EYES

> 9.1.3 眼部周围肌肉

1. The corrugator muscle of the eyebrow *(musculus corrugator supercUii)* (Fig. 266) arises from the frontal bone above the lacrimal bone, passes upwards in line with the superciliary arch, and is inserted into the skin of the eyebrow, in which its bundles are interlaced with the muscle fibres of the frontal belly of the occipitofrontal muscle.

> 眉间肌（musculus corrugator supercilli）（图266）起自泪骨上方的额骨，沿眉突弓向上走行，并插入到眉毛皮肤中，其肌束与额枕肌额部的肌纤维交织在一起。

Action: draws the skin of the eyebrows towards the midline to form vertical folds in the region of the bridge of the nose.

> 动作：将眉毛皮肤向中线牵拉，形成鼻梁区域的垂直褶皱。

Blood supply: the angular, supraorbital, and superficial temporal arteries.

> 供血：角动脉、额上动脉和颞浅动脉。

2. The procerus muscle *(musculus procerus)* arises on the ridge of **the** nose by elongated flat fibres from the nasal bone or the aponeurosis of the nasal muscle and is inserted into the skin.

> 鼻翼肌（musculus procerus）由鼻骨或鼻肌的筋膜以延长的扁平肌纤维起始，附着于鼻梁的嵴部，并插入皮肤。

Action: contraction of the muscle on both sides produces transverse folds at the root of the nose.

> 动作：两侧肌肉收缩会在鼻根处形成横行褶皱。

Blood supply: the angular and ethmoidal arteries.

> 血供：角动脉和筛动脉。

- 3. The orbicularis oculi muscle *(musculus orbicularis oculi)* (Figs 263, 266) lies under the skin overlying the anterior parts of the orbit. Three parts are distinguished in the muscle: orbicular, palpebral, and lacrimal which arise in the region of the medial angle of the eye:
- (a) the orbital part *(pars orbitalis)* takes origin from the medial palpebral ligament, the frontal process of the maxilla, and the nasal part of the frontal bone and stretches along the superior and inferior margins of the orbit to form a muscular ring.

> 眼轮匝肌（musculus orbicularis oculi）（图263、266）位于眼眶前部皮肤之下。该肌可分为三部分：眶部、睑部和泪部，起源于眼内眦区域：

(a) 眶部（pars orbitalis）起自内眦韧带、上颌骨的颧突以及额骨的鼻部，沿眶上缘和眶下缘延伸，形成一个肌性环。

In the region of the lateral palpebral ligament, the inner fibres of the muscle form the lateral palpebral raphe *(raphe palpebralis lateralis);*

> 在外侧眼睑韧带区域，肌肉的内层纤维形成外侧眼睑缝（外侧眼睑缝，raphe palpebralis lateralis）；

(b) the palpebral part *(pars palpebralis)* is a direct continuation of the orbital part of the muscle and is found right under the skin of the eyelid. It has two parts, superior and inferior *(pars palpebralis superior* et *inferior).* They take origin from the upper and lower

> (b) 睑部（pars palpebralis）是肌肉眶部的直接延续，位于眼睑皮肤正下方。其分为上睑部和下睑部（pars palpebralis superior et inferior）。它们分别起自上睑和下睑

![](_page_281_Figure_2.jpeg)

266. Muscles of the head; right side (½). (Muscles of facial expression and muscles of mastication).

> 头肌；右侧（½）。（表情肌和咀嚼肌）

![](_page_282_Picture_2.jpeg)

267. *Muscles surrounding the mouth;* inner aspect (\*/).

> 口周肌肉；内侧（*\/）。

{The skin with the muscles surrounding the mouth is separated from the bones of the face. The mucous membrane of the cheeks and lips is removed.)

> （口周皮肤及肌肉层与面部骨骼分离。颊部及唇部的黏膜层被去除。）

edges of the medial palpebral ligament, respectively, and pass to the lateral angle of the eye to be inserted into the lateral palpebral ligament;

> 分别附着于内眦韧带的边缘，并延伸至眼的外侧角，插入外眦韧带；

(c) the lacrimal part *(pars lacrimalis)* arises from the posterior crest of the lacrimal bone and separates into two parts which embrace the lacrimal sac *(saccus lacrimalis)* anteriorly and posteriorly and are lost between the muscle fibres of the palpebral part.

> (c) 泪部（pars lacrimalis）起自泪骨的后嵴，分为两部分，分别包绕泪囊（saccus lacrimalis）的前侧和后侧，并在眼睑部肌肉纤维之间消失。

Action: the palpebral part narrows the palpebral fissure and smoothes out the transverse folds in the skin of the forehead; the palpebral part closes the palpebral fissure; the lacrimal part dilates the lacrimal sac.

> 作用：睑部使睑裂变窄，平复额部皮肤的横行皱褶；睑部使睑裂闭合；泪部使泪囊扩张。

Blood supply: the facial, superficial temporal, infraorbital, and supraorbital arteries.

> 血供：面动脉、颞浅动脉、眶下动脉和眶上动脉。

#### 9.1.4 MUSCLES SURROUNDING THE MOUTH

> 9.1.4 嘴周肌肉

The muscles surrounding the oral fissure are divided into two groups: one is represented by the orbicularis oris muscle whose contraction narrows **the** oral fissure, while the other group is made up of muscles stretching radially in relation to the oral fissure; their contraction widens it.

> 围绕口裂的肌肉可分为两组：一组以口轮匝肌为代表，其收缩会使口裂变窄；另一组由相对于口裂呈放射状分布的肌肉组成，其收缩会使口裂变宽。

1. The orbicularis oris muscle *(musculus orbicularis oris)* (Figs 263, 266, 267) is formed of circular muscle fibres lying in the thickness of the lips. The muscle fibres are fused closely with the skin. The superficial layers of this muscle receive the fibres of muscles approaching the oral fissure. A marginal part *(pars marginalis)*  and a labial part *(pars labialis)* are distinguished in the muscle.

> 口轮匝肌（musculus orbicularis oris）（图263、266、267）由环绕唇部的环形肌纤维构成，这些肌纤维位于唇的厚度内。肌纤维紧密地与皮肤融合。该肌的浅层接受接近口裂的肌肉纤维。在该肌中可区分出边缘部（pars marginalis）和唇部（pars labialis）。

Action: narrows the oral fissure and pulls the lips forward. Blood supply: the labial, mental, and infraorbital arteries.

> 作用：缩小口裂并向前牵拉唇部。血供：唇动脉、颏动脉和眶下动脉。

2. The zygomaticus major muscle *(musculus zygomaticus major)*  (Figs 263, 266, 267) takes origin from the lateral surface of the zygomatic bone. Some of the muscle fibres are a continuation of the orbicularis oris muscle. Stretching downwards and medially, the zygoinaticus majoi muscle is inserted into the orbicularis muscle and the skin of the angle of the mouth.

> 颧大肌（musculus zygomaticus major）（图263、266、267）起自颧骨的外侧面。部分肌纤维是口轮匝肌的延续。颧大肌向下并向内延伸，附着于口角的口轮匝肌和皮肤。

Action: pulls the angle of the mouth upwards and laterally. Blood supply: the infraorbital and buccal arteries.

> 动作：将口角向上及向外牵拉。血供：眶下动脉和面动脉。

3. The zygomaticus minor muscle *(musculus zygomaticus minor)*

> 颧小肌（musculus zygomaticus minor）

(Figs 263, 266, 267) takes origin from the anterior surface of the zygomatic bone. Its medial fibres intertwine with the fibres of the orbicularis oris muscle.

> （图263、266、267）起源于颧骨的前表面。其内侧纤维与口轮匝肌的纤维交织。

- 4. The levator labii superioris muscle *(musculus levator labii superioris)* arises from the infraorbital margin above the infraorbital foramen.
- 5. The levator labii superioris alaeque nasi muscle *(musculus levator kbit superioris alaeque nasi)* is next to the levator labii superioris muscle; it takes origin from the base of the frontal process of the maxilla.

> 提上唇肌（musculus levator labii superioris）起自上颌窦下缘上方的眶下缘。  
提上唇鼻翼肌（musculus levator labii superioris alaeque nasi）位于提上唇肌的外侧；其起始点位于上颌骨额突的基部。

The three last muscles stretch downwards, converge a little, and form a quadrangular muscular plate whose bundles are inserted into the skin of the upper lip, partly into the orbicularis oris muscle and into the skin of the ala nasi.

> 最后三块肌肉向下延伸，稍作汇聚，形成一块四边形的肌板，其肌束插入上唇皮肤，部分插入口轮匝肌及鼻翼皮肤。

Action: the levator labii superioris alaeque nasi muscle raises the upper lip and pulls upwards the ala of the nose.

> 动作：提上唇鼻翼肌提升上唇，并向上牵拉鼻翼。

Blood supply: the infraorbital, superior labial, and angular arteries.

> 血供：眶下动脉、上唇动脉和鼻翼动脉。

6. The levator anguli oris muscle *(musculus levator anguli oris)*  (Figs 266, 267) lies deeper than the last named muscle. It takes origin below the infraorbital foramen from the canine fossa and, extending downwards, is inserted into the skin at the angle of the mouth and into the orbicularis oris muscle.

> 提肌角肌（musculus levator anguli oris）（图266、267）位于上述肌肉的深面。该肌起自眶下孔下方的尖牙窝，向下延伸后，肌腱附着于口角皮肤及口轮匝肌。

Action: pulls the angle of the mouth upwards and laterally. Blood supply: the infraorbital and buccal arteries.

> 作用：牵拉口角向上及向外。血供：眶下动脉和面动脉。

7. The buccinator muscle *(musculus buccinator)* (Figs 266, 267, 273) takes origin from the buccinator crest of the mandible, the pterygomandibular ligament, and the external surfaces of the maxilla and mandible in the region of the sockets of the second molars. Passing forwards, the fibres of the buccinator muscle are continuous with the upper and lower lips and arc inserted into the skin of the lips and the angle of the mouth, and the mucous membrane of the vestibule of the mouth.

> 颊部肌（musculus buccinator）（图266、267、273）起自下颌骨的颊部隆起、翼下颌韧带以及上颌骨和下颌骨第二磨牙窝区的外表面。颊部肌的肌束向前延续并与上唇和下唇相连，其肌腱插入至唇部皮肤、口角以及口腔前庭的黏膜层。

A buccal pad of fat *(corpus adiposum buccae)* lies external to the muscle, the mucous membrane of the vestibule of the mouth adjoins the inner surface of the muscle. The parotid duct *(ductus parotideus)* pierces the middle parts of the buccinator muscle at the level of the anterior border of the masseter muscle.

> 颊部脂肪垫（corpus adiposum buccae）位于肌肉的外侧，口腔前庭黏膜与肌肉的内侧表面相接。腮腺导管（ductus parotideus）穿过咬肌前缘水平的颊肌中部。

Action: pulls the angle of the mouth laterally; in bilateral contraction the oral fissure is stretched and the inner surface of the check is pressed to the teeth.

> 作用：将口角向侧方拉；双侧收缩时，口裂被拉伸，颊部内侧被压向牙齿。

Blood supply: the buccal artery.

> 血供：颊动脉。

8. The risorius muscle *(musculus risorius)* {Figs 263, 267) is an inconstant muscle and partly a continuation of the platysma fibres. Some fibres of the muscle arise from the masseteric fascia and the skin in the region of the nasolabial fold. It stretches medially to be inserted into the skin of the angle of the mouth.

> 口轮匝肌（musculus risorius）{图263、图267} 是一块变异较大的肌肉，部分区域是浅层筋膜（platysma）纤维的延续。该肌的部分纤维起自颧筋膜及鼻唇褶区域的皮肤，向内侧延伸，最终止于口角皮肤。

Action: pulls the angle of the mouth laterally.

> 作用：将口角向侧方牵拉。

Blood supply: the facial, transverse facial, buccal, and infraorbital arteries.

> 供血：面动脉、颧动脉、颊动脉和眶下动脉。

9. The depressor anguli oris muscle *(musculus depressor anguli oris)* (Fig. 263) takes origin as a wide base from the anterior surface of the mandible inferior to the mental foramen. On extending upwards it narrows and reaches the angle of the mouth; some of its fibres are inserted into the skin here, others are inserted into the upper lip and the levator anguli oris muscle.

> 下唇角牵拉肌（musculus depressor anguli oris）（图263）起自下颌骨颏孔下方的下颌骨前表面，呈宽基起始。该肌向上延伸时逐渐变细，并到达口角处；其中一些肌纤维在此处插入皮肤，另一些则插入上唇及上唇角提肌。

Action: pulls the angle of the mouth downwards and laterally. Blood supply: the inferior labial, mental, and submental arteries.

> 动作：将口角向下并向侧牵拉。血供：下唇动脉、颏动脉和颏下动脉。

10. The depressor labii inferioris muscle *(musculus depressor labii inferioris)* (Figs 263, 266, 267) is partly covered by the depressor anguli oris muscle. It arises from the anterior surface of the mandible above the origin of the depressor anguli oris anteriorly of the mental foramen, passes upwards, and is inserted into the skin of the lower lip and chin.

> 下唇压肌（musculus depressor labii inferioris）（图263、266、267）部分被口角压肌覆盖。该肌起自颏孔前方、口角压肌起始点上方的下颌骨前表面，向上行进，最终附着于下唇及下巴皮肤。

The medial fibres of the muscle intertwine with those of the contralateral muscle at the lower lip.

> 肌肉的内侧纤维在下唇处与对侧肌肉的纤维交织。[!note]- 术语说明 “medial fibres” 译为“内侧纤维”，指肌肉内部靠近中线的纤维束；“contralateral muscle” 译为“对侧肌肉”，指位于身体另一侧的相应肌肉。

Action: pulls the lower lip downwards.

> 动作：向下牵拉下唇。

Blood supply: the inferior labial, mental, and submental arteries.

> 供血：下唇动脉、颏动脉和颏下动脉。

11. The mentalis muscle *(musculus mentalis)* (Figs 266, 267) arises next to the depressor labii inferioris muscle from the alveolar juga of the mandibular incisors, passes downwards, and is inserted into the skin of the chin.

> 颏舌骨肌（musculus mentalis）（图266、图267）起自下颌中切牙的牙槽突，向下延伸，最后附着于下巴皮肤。

Action: pulls the skin of the chin upwards and pulls out the lower lip.

> 动作：向上牵拉下巴皮肤，并牵出下唇。

Blood supply: the inferior labial and mental arteries.

> 血供：下唇动脉和颏动脉。

12. The transversus menu muscle *(musculus transversus menti)* is a small inconstant muscle which crosses the midline directly under the chin. It is often a continuation of the depressor anguli oris muscle.

> 颏部横肌（musculus transversus menti）是一块小而变异较大的肌肉，直接位于下巴正下方，跨越中线。它通常为口角下垂肌（depressor anguli oris）的延续。[!note]- 术语说明 “transversus menti” 通常译作“颏部横肌”，是面部表情肌之一，位于颏部正下方，跨越中线。

#### 9.1.5 MUSCLES SURROUNDING THE NOSE

> 9.1.5 鼻部周围肌肉

- 1. The nasal muscle *(musculus nasalis)* (Figs 263, 266) takes origin from the maxilla above the alveoli of the canine and lateral incisor teeth, stretches upwards, and separates into two parts, medial and lateral:
- (a) the lateral, or transverse part *(pars transversus)* curves around the ala nasi, becomes slightly wider, and is continuous with a tendon in the midline. The tendon joins that of the contralateral muscle;
- (b) the medial, or alar part *(pars alaris)* is inserted into the posterior end of the cartilage of the ala nasi.

> 鼻肌（musculus nasalis）（图263、266）起自上颌骨，在尖牙和侧切牙牙槽上方，向上延伸，并分为两部分： medial（内侧）和lateral（外侧）：
(a) 外侧部，或横部（pars transversus）绕过鼻翼，稍加宽，并在中线处与一条腱相连。该腱与对侧肌肉的腱相连；
(b) 内侧部，或鼻翼部（pars alaris）附着于鼻翼软骨的后端。

Action: narrows the nostrils.

> 作用：缩窄鼻孔。

Blood supply: the superior labial and angular arteries.

> 血供：上唇动脉和鼻翼动脉。

2. The depressor sepli nasi muscle *(musculus depressor septi nasi)*  (Fig. 266) arises from the alveolar juga of the maxillary medial incisor and partly includes fibres of the orbicularis oris. It is inserted into the inferior surface of the cartilage of the nasal septum.

> 鼻中隔压肌（musculus depressor septi nasi）（图266）起自上颌骨中切牙的牙槽突，部分纤维来自口轮匝肌。该肌附着于鼻中隔软骨的下表面。

Action: pulls the nasal septum downwards.

> 作用：将鼻中隔向下牵拉。

Blood supply: the superior labial artery.

> 血供：上唇动脉。

Innervation: all the muscles of facial expression arc innervated by branches of the facial nerve.

> 支配：所有表情肌均由面神经的分支支配。

## 10 MUSCLES O F MASTICATION

> 10 咀嚼肌

1. The masseter muscle *(musculus masseter)* (Figs 266, 268-270) takes origin from the inferior border of the zygomatic arch by superficial and deep parts.

> 咬肌（musculus masseter）（图266、268-270）由颧弓的下缘的浅层和深层部分起始。

The superficial part *(pars mperficialis)* arises as tendinous fibres from the anterior and middle parts of the zygomatic arch; the deep part *(pars profunda}* takes origin as a muscle from the middle and posterior areas of the zygomatic arch. The bands of muscle fibres of the superficial part pass obliquely, downwards and to the back; those of the deep part stretch downwards and to the front. Both parts of the masseter muscle unite to be inserted into the external surface of the ramus of the mandible and its angle in the region of the masseteric tuberosity.

> 浅层（pars mperficialis）起源于颧弓的前部和中部，以肌腱纤维的形式发出；深层（pars profunda）则起源于颧弓的中部和后部，作为肌肉纤维发出。浅层的肌纤维束斜向下并向后走行；深层的肌纤维束则向下并向前走行。咬肌的浅层和深层部分最终汇合，附着于下颌骨髁突的外表面及其在咬肌粗隆区域的角部。

Action: raises the lowered mandible; the superficial part of the muscle contributes to forward protrusion of the mandible.

> 作用：抬升下颌骨；肌肉的浅层部分参与下颌骨的前突运动。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_284_Picture_7.jpeg)

268. *Muscles of mastication;* right side (/<sup>3</sup> (The superficial layer of temporal fascia partly cut and drawn aside.)

> 咀嚼肌；右侧（/<sup>3</sup>（颞筋膜浅层部分切除并牵开。）

Blood supply: the facial, masseteric, and transverse facial arteries.

> 供血：面动脉、咬肌动脉和颞浅动脉。

lnnervation: nerve to the massetcr (trigcminal nerve).

> 支配：咬肌神经（三叉神经）。

2. The temporal muscle *(musculus temporalis)* (Figs 266, 269-271) occupies the temporal fossa *(fossa temporalis).* It takes origin from the temporal surface of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone and the squamous part of the temporal bone. Passing downwards, the fibres of the muscle converge to form a strong tendon which passes medially of the zygomatic arch and is inserted into the coronary process of the mandible.

> 颞肌（musculus temporalis）（图266，269-271）位于颞窝（fossa temporalis）内。其起始点为蝶骨大翼的颞面及颞骨鳞部。肌纤维向下走行，逐渐汇聚形成一条强健的肌腱，经过颧弓的内侧，最终插入下颌骨的冠突。

Action: contraction of all fibres raises the lowered mandible; the posterior fibres pull backwards the anteriorly protruded mandible.

> 作用：所有纤维收缩可抬高下颌骨；后部纤维可将向前突出的下颌骨向后拉。

Blood supply: the deep temporal and superficial arteries. lnnervation: the deep temporal nerves (trigcminal nerve).

> 血供：深颞动脉和浅颞动脉。神经支配：深颞神经（三叉神经）。

3. The lateral pterygoid muscle *(musculus pterygoideus lateralis)*

> 翼外肌（musculus pterygoideus lateralis）

![](_page_285_Picture_9.jpeg)

269. *Muscles of mastication;* right side (%).

> 咀嚼肌；右侧（%）

(The zygomatic arch is divided and turned aside together with the masseter muscle.)

> （颧弓被分割并连同咬肌一起向侧方牵开。）

(Figs 269-271; 272-274) arises by two parts, or heads, upper and lower.

> （图269-271；272-274）由两个部分，或两个头组成，上部和下部。

The upper head of the muscle takes origin from the inferior surface and infratemporal crest of the greater wing of the sphenoid bone and is inserted into the medial surface of the articular capsule of the mandibular joint and into the articular disc. The lower head arises from the lateral surface of the lateral plate of the pterygoid process of the sphenoid bone and passes backwards to be inserted into the plerygoid pit of the mandible. A small slit transmitting the buccal nerve is left between the upper and lower heads of the muscle.

> 肌肉的上头起源于蝶骨大翼的下表面及其下方的颞下嵴，止于下颌关节关节囊的内侧表面以及关节盘。肌肉的下头起源于蝶骨翼突的翼突板的外侧表面，向后延伸并止于下颌的翼突窝。肌肉的上头与下头之间留有一条小的裂隙，通过颊神经。

Action: displaces the mandible to the contralateral side. Bilateral contraction of the muscle causes the mandible to protrude forwards.

> 作用：将下颌骨向对侧移动。双侧肌收缩会使下颌骨向前突出。

![](_page_286_Figure_6.jpeg)

270. *Sites of origin and insertion of the muscles of the head* (schematical representation).

> 头部肌肉的起始点和止点（示意图）。

Blood supply: the maxillary artery.

> 血供：上颌动脉。

Innervation: the lateral ptcrygoid (trigcminal) nerve.

> 支配：颞肌（三叉神经）。

4. The medial plerygoid muscle *(musculus pterygoideus nudialis)*  (Figs 271-274). Takes origin from the walls of the pterygoid fossa of the sphenoid bone, stretches backwards and downwards, and is inserted into the pterygoid tuberosity of the mandible.

> 内侧翼突肌（musculus pterygoideus nudialis）（图271-274）。起自蝶骨翼突窝的壁，向后下方延伸，最终附着于下颌骨的翼突粗隆。

Action: displaces the mandible to the contralateral side. Bilateral contraction causes forward protrusion and raises the lowered mandible.

> 作用：将下颌骨向对侧移动。双侧收缩可使下颌骨向前突出，并提升下颌骨的位置。

Blood supply: the alveolar, buccal, and facial arteries.

> 血供：牙槽动脉、颊动脉和面部动脉。

Innervation: nerve to the medial pterygoid muscle (trigeminal nerve).

> 支配：翼内肌的神经（三叉神经）。

![](_page_287_Picture_8.jpeg)

## 11 *Muscles of mastication;* right side (%).

> 11 咀嚼肌；右侧（%）

(The cavity of the mandibular joint is opened by sagittal section; part of mandibular ramus is removed.)

> （下颌关节腔经矢状面剖开；部分下颌骨髁突被移除。）

![](_page_288_Picture_2.jpeg)

272. *Muscles of mastication;* posterior aspect (%).

> 咀嚼肌；后侧视图（%）

![](_page_288_Picture_4.jpeg)

273. *Sites of origin and insertion of the muscles of mastication* (schematical represen tation).

> 咀嚼肌的起始与附着部位（示意图）。

![](_page_289_Figure_2.jpeg)

274. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles and ligaments on base of skull*  (schematical representation).

> 颅底肌肉和韧带的起始与附着部位（示意图）。

## 12 FASCIAE OF THE HEAD

> 12 面部筋膜 /no_think

The fasciae of the head (Figs 263, 266, 268) are as follows: the temporal, masseteric, parotid, and buccopharyngeal.

> 头颈部的筋膜（图263、266、268）包括以下几种：颞筋膜、咬肌筋膜、腮腺筋膜和颊咽筋膜。

- 1. The temporal fascia *(fascia temporalis)* extends from the periosteum of the skull bones in the region of the temporal line and epicranial aponeurosis, covers the temporal muscle and separates into two layers close to the zygomatic arch. One is the superficial layer *(lamina suptrficialis)* which is attached to the superior margin and outer surface of the zygomatic arch, the other is the deep layer *(lamina profunda)* which passes over to the inner surface of the zygomatic arch. Vessels and fatty tissue are lodged between these two layers.
- 2. The masseteric fascia *(fascia masseteriea)* is continuous with the temporal fascia on the zygomatic arch, and it then passes

> 颞筋膜（fascia temporalis）起自头骨颞线区域及颅顶腱膜的骨膜，覆盖颞肌，并在颧弓附近分为两层。一层为浅层（lamina superficialis），附着于颧弓的上缘和外侧表面；另一层为深层（lamina profunda），延伸至颧弓的内侧表面。血管和脂肪组织位于这两层之间。

咬肌筋膜（fascia masseteriea）在颧弓处与颞筋膜连续，随后延伸至...

downwards. Posteriorly it is attached to the cartilage of the external acoustic meatus and passes over to the mastoid process. Inferiorly it is continuous with the cervical fascia; anteriorly it covers the masseter muscle after which it is continuous with the buccopharyngeal fascia.

> 向下延伸。其后方附着于外耳道软骨，并延伸至乳突过程。其下方与颈深筋膜相连续；其前方覆盖咬肌，之后与颊咽筋膜相连续。

- 3. The parotid fascia *(fascia parotidea)* is connected posteriorly with the masseteric fascia and separates into two layers which invest on both sides the parotid gland.
- 4. The buccopharyngeal fascia *(fascia buccopkaryngea)* covers the buccinator muscle and at the anterior border of the masseter muscle passes over to the medial surface of the mandibular ratnus where it covers the medial pterygoid muscle and then stretches over to the pharyngeal wall.

> 腮腺鞘（fascia parotidea）在后方与咬肌鞘相连，并分为两层，分别包裹腮腺的两侧。  
颊咽筋膜（fascia buccopharyngea）覆盖颊肌，并在咬肌前缘过渡至下颌骨体的内侧面，覆盖翼内肌，然后延伸至咽壁。

## 13 **MUSCLES AND FASCIAE OF THE NECK**

> 13 颈部肌肉与筋膜

## 14 **REGIONS OF THE NECK**

> 14 个颈部区域

The following regions of the neck *(regiones colli)* (Fig. 264) arc distinguished,

> 颈部的以下区域（regiones colli）（图264）有所区分，

- 1. The anterior cervical region *(regio colli anterior)* includes:
- (a) the submaxillary triangle *(trigonum submandibulare);*
- (b) the carotid triangle *(trigonum caroticum).*
- 2. The paired sternocleidomastoid region *(regio sternocleidomastoideae)* corresponds to the contours of the sternocleidomastoid muscle.

> 前颈区（regio colli anterior）包括：
(a) 下颌下三角（trigonum submandibulare）；
(b) 颈动脉三角（trigonum caroticum）。

成对的胸锁乳突肌区（regio sternocleidomastoideae）对应于胸锁乳突肌的轮廓。

[!note]- 术语说明  
“regio sternocleidomastoideae” 译为“胸锁乳突肌区”，是颈部的一个解剖区域，由两侧胸锁乳突肌构成。

The paired lesser supraclavicular fossa *(fossa supraclavicularis minor)* is bounded by the heads (slips) of the sternocleidomastoid muscle and the corresponding border of the clavicle.

> 对称的颈上小凹（小颈上窝，fossa supraclavicularis minor）由胸锁乳突肌的肌腹（肌腱）及其对应的锁骨边缘所围成。

- 3. The paired lateral cervical region *(regio colli lateralis)* is bounded by the posterior border of the sternocleidomastoid muscle anteriorly, by the border of the trapev.ius muscle posteriorly, and by the border of the clavicle inferiorly. This region includes **the** omoclavicular triangle *(trigonum omoclaoiculare)* in which the greater supraclavicular fossa *(fossa supraclavicularis major)* is situated.
- 4. The posterior cervical region *(regio colli posterior)* is bounded by the lateral borders of the trapezius muscle.

> 双侧颈侧区（colli lateralis 区）前界为胸锁乳突肌的后缘，后界为斜方肌的边界，下界为锁骨的边缘。此区域包含肩锁三角（trigonum omoclavicularis），其中包含较大的锁骨上窝（fossa supraclavicularis major）。

后颈区（colli posterior 区）由斜方肌的侧缘界定。

## 15 MUSCLES OF THE NECK

> 15 颈部肌肉

The cervical muscles *(musculus colli)* cover one another to form three groups—superficial, middle, and deep.

> 颈肌（颈肌群）相互覆盖，形成三组——浅层组、中层组和深层组。

The deep muscles may be divided into a lateral and prevertebral groups.

> 深部肌肉可分为侧群和椎前群。

- I. The superficial muscles of the neck: the platysma and the sternocleidomastoid muscles *(musculus sternocleidomastoideus).* 
  - II. The middle group:
- 1. The suprahyoid muscles *(musculi suprahyoidei):* the digastric muscle *(musculus digastricus),* the stylohyoid muscle *(musculus stylohyoideus),* the mylohyoid muscle *(musculus mylokyoideus),* and the geniohyoid muscle *(musculus geniohyoideus).* 
  - 2. The infrahyoid muscles *(musculi infrahyoidei):* the sternohy-

> I. 颈部浅层肌肉：胸锁乳突肌（musculus sternocleidomastoideus）和颈阔肌（platysma）。  
II. 中层肌群：  
上喉部肌肉（musculi suprahyoidei）：二腹肌（musculus digastricus）、舌骨舌肌（musculus stylohyoideus）、舌骨肌（musculus mylohyoideus）以及颏舌肌（musculus geniohyoideus）。  
下喉部肌肉（musculi infrahyoidei）：胸骨舌肌（sternohy-）

oid *(musculus stcrnohyoideus),* the sternothyroid *(musculus sternothyroideus),* the thyrohyoid *(musculus tkyrokyoideus),* and the omohyoid *(musculus omokyoideus)* muscles.

> 胸骨舌骨肌（musculus sternohyoideus）、胸骨甲状肌（musculus sternothyroideus）、甲状舌骨肌（musculus thyrohyoideus）以及肩胛舌骨肌（musculus omohyoideus）。

- III. The deep muscles of the neck:
- 1. The lateral group: the scalenus anterior *(musculus scalenus anterior),* medius *(musculus scalenus medius),* and posterior *(musculus scalenus posterior)* muscles.
- 2- The prevertebral group: the longus capilis *(musculus longus capitis),* the longus cervicis *(musculus longus colli),* the rectus capilis anterior *(musculus rectus capilis anterior),* and the rectus capitis lateralis *(musculus rectus capitis lateralis)* muscles.

> III. 颈深肌群：
1. 侧群：前斜角肌（musculus scalenus anterior）、中斜角肌（musculus scalenus medius）和后斜角肌（musculus scalenus posterior）。
2. 颈前群：头长肌（musculus longus capitis）、颈长肌（musculus longus colli）、前直肌（musculus rectus capitis anterior）和侧直肌（musculus rectus capitis lateralis）。

## 16 SUPERFICIAL MUSCLES OF TH E NECK

> 16 颈部浅层肌肉

1. The platysma *(platysma)* (Figs 275, 280, 281) is a thin muscular sheet lying under the skin with which it is closely fused. The muscle fibres arise on the chest on the level of the second rib and pass upwards and medially. On reaching the border of the mandible the medial fibres intertwine with those of the contralateral muscle and are inserted into the border of the mandible; the lateral fibres of the muscle extend to the face on which they interlace with the parotid and masseteric fasciae and reach the angle of the mouth.

> 胸锁乳突肌（platysma）（图275、280、281）是一层薄而坚韧的肌肉膜，位于皮肤之下并与皮肤紧密结合。该肌的肌纤维起自胸部第二肋骨水平，向上并向内延伸。当肌纤维到达下颌骨边缘时，内侧纤维与对侧肌肉的纤维交织，并插入下颌骨边缘；而外侧纤维则延伸至面部，与腮腺和咬肌筋膜交织，并最终到达口角。

Action: tenses the skin of the neck and partly of the chest, lowers the mandible, and pulls the angle of the mouth laterally and downwards.

> 作用：紧张颈部皮肤及部分胸部皮肤，下颌骨下垂，并将口角向侧下方牵拉。

Blood supply: the superficial cervical and facial arteries. Innervation: cenical branch of the facial nerve.

> 血液供应：浅表颈动脉和面动脉。神经支配：面神经的颈支。

2. The sternocleidomastoid muscle *(musculus sternocleidomastoideus)* (Figs 275, 276, 280, 281) is behind (under) the platysma. It is a rather thick, slightly flattened muscular band which crosses the neck obliquely and spiral-like from the mastoid process to the sternoclavicular joint. It arises by two heads, one lateral taking origin from the sternal end of the clavicle, and the other medial arising from the anterior surface of the manubrium sterni.

> 胸锁乳突肌（musculus sternocleidomastoideus）（图275、276、280、281）位于颈阔肌的深面。它是一条较厚、略呈扁平的肌束，斜行螺旋状地跨越颈部，从乳突延伸至胸骨-锁骨关节。该肌由两个头组成：一个为外侧头，起自锁骨的胸骨端；另一个为内侧头，起自胸骨柄的前表面。

Both heads join at a right angle in such a manner that fibres of the medial head lie closer to the surface. The formed muscular belly stretches upwards and to the back to be inserted into the mastoid process of the temporal bone and the superior nuchal line.

> 两头以直角方式连接，使得内侧头的肌纤维更接近表面。形成的肌腹向上并向后延伸，插入到颞骨的乳突和上项线。

Between the lateral and medial heads of the muscle is a small depression called the lesser supraclavicular fossa *(fossa supraclavicularis minor),* while between the medial heads of the right and left sternocleidomastoid muscles above the jugular notch of the manubrium stenii is the jugular fossa *(fossa jugularis).*

> 肌肉的外侧头与内侧头之间有一个小凹陷，称为小锁骨上窝（fossa supraclavicularis minor）。而在胸骨柄的颈静脉切迹上方，右侧和左侧胸锁乳突肌的内侧头之间，则为颈静脉窝（fossa jugularis）。

Action: when the chest is fixed contraction of one muscle inclines the- head m the same side but turns ihe larc (<> the opposite side; contraction of both muscles draws the head to the back and moves it slightly forward; with the head fixed the muscle pulls the clavicle and sternum upwards.

> 动作：当胸廓固定时，单侧肌肉收缩会使头向同侧倾斜，但使躯干（躯干）向对侧扭转；双侧肌肉收缩则将头向后拉并略微向前移动；当头固定时，该肌肉会将锁骨和胸骨向上拉。

Blood supply: the occipital, sternocleidomastoid, and superior thyroid arteries.

> 血供：枕动脉、胸锁乳突肌动脉和甲状腺上动脉。

Innervation: branch of accessory nerve to the sternomastoid muscle and second pair of cervical nerves (C<sup>2</sup> -C,).

> 支配：副神经的分支支配胸锁乳突肌，以及第二对颈神经（C<sup>2</sup> -C<sup>3</sup>）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_291_Picture_2.jpeg)

275. *Superficial muscles of the neck;* anterior aspect (%).

> 颈部浅层肌肉；前方（%）

![](_page_292_Figure_2.jpeg)

276. *Muscles of the neck;* right side (%). (Superficial muscles and the middl e group.)

> 颈部肌肉；右侧（%）。 （浅层肌肉和中层肌群。）

![](_page_293_Picture_2.jpeg)

277. *Muscles of the neck;* right side (J^). (Middle group and deep muscles, lateral group.)

> 颈部肌肉；右侧（J^）。（中群及深层肌肉，外侧群）

## 17 T H E MIDDLE GROU P OF MUSCLES OF TH E NECK

> 17 颈部中组肌肉

#### 17.1.1 T H E SUPRAHYOID MUSCLES

> 17.1.1 舌骨上肌群

1. The digastric muscle *(musculus digastricus)* (Figs 275-278) has two bellies, anterior and posterior, which are connected by a tendon.

> 二腹肌（musculus digastricus）（图275-278）具有前腹和后腹两个肌腹，二者通过腱相连。

The anterior belly *(venter anterior)* arises from the mandibular (iignsirir lossa and passes downwards and backwards to be continuous with the tendon which is fastened to the body of the hyoid bone by a process of the cervical fascia. This tendon, curving backwards and upwards, is continuous with the posterior belly *(venter posterior)* which is inserted into the mastoid notch of the temporal bone. Between the two bellies and the border of the mandible is the submandibular fossa *(fossa submandibularis)* lodging the submandibular gland.

> 前腹（venter anterior）起自下颌骨（mandibular），向下并向后延伸，最终与一条腱相连，该腱通过颈深筋膜的一个过程附着于舌骨体。这条腱向后上方弯曲，与后腹（venter posterior）相连，后者插入颞骨的乳突窝。前腹、后腹以及下颌骨的边缘之间为下颌下窝（fossa submandibularis），内藏下颌下腺。

Action: when the hyoid bone is fixed the muscle lowers ihe mandible; with the mandible fixed the muscle pulls the hyoid bone upwards.

> 作用：当会厌骨固定时，该肌肉使下颌骨下降；当下颌骨固定时，该肌肉将会厌骨向上拉。

Blood supply: anterior belly —the submcntal artery; posterior belly—the occipital and posterior auricular arteries.

> 血供：前腹部分支——下颌动脉；后腹部分支——枕动脉和后耳动脉。

Innervation: anterior belly—the trigeminal nerve *(nervus trigeminus)* (third division); posterior belly—the facial nerve *(nervusfacia-Us).*

> 支配：前腹部分支——三叉神经（trigeminus nervus）（第三支）；后腹部分支——面神经（facialis nervus）。

2. The stylohyoid muscle *(musculus stylokyoideus)* (Figs 275-278) has a thin Hat belly which takes origin from the styloid process of the temporal bone, stretches forwards and downwards, and lies on the anterior surface of the posterior belly of the digastric muscle. The distal end of the muscle separates into two slips embracing the tendon of the digastric muscle and is inserted into the body and greater horn of the hyoid bone.

> 舌骨茎突肌（musculus stylohyoideus）（图275-278）具有一个扁平的肌腹，起自颞骨的茎突，向前下方延伸，位于二腹肌后腹的前表面。肌肉的远端分为两束，包裹着二腹肌的肌腱，并插入至舌骨体和大舌骨角。

Action: pulls the hyoid bone backwards, upwards, and laterally.

> 作用：将会厌骨向后、向上及外侧拉。

Blood supply: the occipital, facial arteries and the suprahyoid branch of the lingual artery.

> 血供：枕动脉、面动脉以及舌动脉的下颌下支。

Innervation: the facial nerve.

> 支配神经：面神经。

3. The mylohyoid muscle *(musculus mylohyoideus)* (Figs 275-278) is flat and of an irregular triangular shape. It arises from the mylohyoid line on the mandible. Its fibres pass downwards and slightly to the front and meet the fibres of the contralateral muscle to form the raphe of the mylohyoid muscle.

> 颏舌骨肌（musculus mylohyoideus）（图275-278）呈扁平状，形状为不规则的三角形。其起始部位于下颌骨的颏舌骨肌线。肌纤维向下并略微向前延伸，与对侧颏舌骨肌的纤维相会合，形成颏舌骨肌的正中线。

The posterior fibres of the muscle are inserted into the anterior surface of the body of the hyoid bone. Both mylohyoid muscles contribute to the formation of the floor of the oral cavity and arc called the diaphragm of the mouth.

> 该肌的后纤维附着于会厌骨体的前表面。双侧舌骨舌肌共同参与口底的形成，并构成称为口唇膈的结构。

Action: when the mandible is fixed the muscle pulls the hyoid bone upwards and forwards; when the hyoid bone is fixed the muscle helps to lower the mandible.

> 作用：当下颌骨固定时，该肌肉将会厌骨向上前方牵引；当会厌骨固定时，该肌肉帮助下颌骨向下运动。

Blood supply: the sublingual and submcntal arteries.

> 血供：舌下动脉和下颌下动脉。

Innervation: the mylohyoid nerve from the trigeminal nerve.

> 支配：来自三叉神经的颏舌肌神经。

4. The geniohyoid muscle *(musculus geniohyoideus)* (see Fig. 278) arises from the spina mentalis of the mandible, passes downwards and slightly lo the back above the mylohyoid muscle, and is inserted into the anterior surface of the body of the hyoid bone.

> 颏舌骨肌（musculus geniohyoideus）（见图278）起自下颌骨的颏结节，向下并稍向后行进，在舌骨肌上方略偏后处，止于舌骨体的前表面。

Action: pulls the hyoid bone forwards and upwards; when the hyoid bone is fixed the muscle takes part in lowering the mandible.

> 作用：牵拉会厌骨向前上方；当会厌骨固定时，该肌参与下颌骨下降。

Blood supply: the sublingual and submental arteries.

> 血供：舌下动脉和颏下动脉。

Innervation: the hypoglossal nerve and first and second pairs of cervical nerves (C,-C<sup>2</sup> ).

> 支配神经：舌下神经和第一、二对颈神经（C₁-C₂）。

#### 17.1.2 T HE INFRAHYOID MUSCLES

> 17.1.2 颈部下方肌群

1. The sternohyoid muscle *(musculus sternohyoideus)*  (Figs 275-278, 281) is thin and flat and arises from the posterior surface of the clavicle, the capsule of the sternoclavicular joint, and the manubrium sterni. Stretching upwards it reaches the body of the hyoid bone into which it is inserted below the mylohyoid muscle. Between the muscle and the bone are located here the retrohyoid bursa *(bursa retrohyoidea)* and the infrahyoid bursa *(buna infrakyoidea).* Sometimes the muscle is crossed by one or two tendinous intersections *(intersectiones tendineae).*

> 胸骨舌骨肌（musculus sternohyoideus）（图275-278、281）呈薄而扁平的形态，起自锁骨的后表面、胸锁关节的关节囊以及胸骨柄。肌纤维向上延伸，到达舌骨体，并在其下方插入舌骨肌的下方。在该肌与舌骨之间，此处有舌骨后方滑膜囊（bursa retrohyoidea）和舌骨下方滑膜囊（bursa infrakyoidea）。有时该肌可被一条或两条肌腱性交界（intersectiones tendineae）所横跨。

Action: pulls the hyoid bone downwards.

> 动作：向下牵拉会厌骨。

Innervation: superior branch of the ansa cervicalis [CrC,(C4)J.

> 支配神经：颈襻上支 [CrC,(C4)]

2. The sternothyroid muscle *(musculus sternothyroideus)*  (Figs 277, 281) is flat and lies behind the sternohyoid muscle. It takes origin from the posterior surface of the first costal cartilage and manubrium sterni, and is directed upwards to be inserted into the oblique line of the thyroid cartilage.

> 胸骨甲状肌（musculus sternothyroideus）（图277、281）呈扁平状，位于胸骨舌骨肌的后方。它起自第一肋软骨的后表面和胸骨柄，向上延伸，插入甲状软骨的斜线。

Action: pulls the larynx downwards.

> 作用：将喉部向下牵拉。

Innervation: superior branch of ansa cervicalis [C|-Cj(C\*)].

> 支配神经：颈襻上支 [C1-C2(C*)]。

3. The thyrohyoid muscle *(musculus thyrokyoideus)* (Figs 276-278) seems to be a continuation of the sternothyroid muscle. It arises from ihe oblique line of the thyroid cartilage, passes upwards, and is inserted into the edge of the greater horns of the hyoid bone.

> 甲状舌骨肌（musculus thyrohyoideus）（图276-278）似乎是由胸骨舌骨肌延续而来。它起自甲状腺软骨的斜线，向上行进，最终附着于舌骨大角的边缘。

Action: pulls the hyoid bone closer lo the larynx; raises the larynx when the hyoid bone is fixed.

> 作用：将会厌骨拉近声带；当会厌骨固定时，提升声带。

Innervation: thyrohyoid branch of the ansa cervicalis (Ci~C?).

> 支配：颈袢的甲状舌骨支（C₁~C₃）[!note]- 术语说明
“ansas cervicalis” 通常译作“颈袢”，是颈神经丛的一个结构，由C₁~C₃神经前支组成。

4. The levator glandulae thyroidcae muscle *(musculus levator glandulae thyroidcae)* is a thin muscular slip stretching on the medial border of the thyrohyoid muscle from the body of the hyoid bone or the thyroid cartilage to the capsule of the thyroid gland (in the region of ils isthmus or the lateral or the pyramidal lobe).

> 甲状软骨喉肌（musculus levator glandulae thyroidcae）是一条纤细的肌肉束，起自会厌骨体或甲状软骨，沿甲状舌骨肌的内侧缘延伸，止于甲状腺囊（在甲状腺峡部或侧叶或锥体叶区域）。

This muscular slip can separate from the thyrohyoid or cricothyroid muscle or from the inferior constrictor muscle of the pharynx.

> 这条肌腱可以与甲状舌骨肌或环状软骨舌骨肌，或咽部的下咽缩肌分离。[!note]- 术语说明
“muscular slip” 译为“肌腱”或“肌束”，此处指从肌肉中延伸出的肌束，具有一定的独立性。

Action: pulls the capsule together with the thyroid upwards.

> 作用：将囊与甲状腺一同向上牵拉。

5. The omohyoid muscle *(musculus omohyoideus)* (Figs 257-278, 281) is long and flat. It has two bellies, superior and inferior, which are joined by an intermediate tendon approximately in the middle of the length of the muscle.

> 斜方舌骨肌（musculus omohyoideus）（图257-278、281）呈长条形扁平状。该肌有两个头，即上头和下头，二者通过一条中间腱相连，该腱位于肌肉长度的中段。

The superior belly *(venter superior)* arises from the lower border of the body of the hyoid bone lateral lo the insertion of the sternohyoid muscle and passes downwards along the lateral border of this muscle. It then deviates to the back, lies behind the sternocleidomastoid muscle and is continuous here with the intermediate tendon which fuses with the fascia) sheath of the cervical neurovascular bundle.

> 上腹（venter superior）起自甲状软骨体下缘，位于胸骨舌骨肌插入点的外侧，向下沿该肌的外侧缘行进。随后它向后偏转，位于胸锁乳突肌的后方，并在此处与中间腱相连，该中间腱与颈神经血管束的筋膜鞘融合。

The inferior belly *(venter inferior)* arises from the intermediate

> 下腹（venter inferior）起源于中间部

tendon, comes out from under the lateral border of the sternoclcidomastoid muscle, stretches backwards and slightly downwards, and reaches the suprascapular notch to be inserted into the superior border of the scapula and the suprascapular ligament.

> 腱起自胸锁乳突肌外侧缘下方，向后并略向下延伸，到达肩胛上切迹，插入肩胛骨上缘及肩胛上韧带。

Action: when the scapula is fixed the muscle pulls the hyoid bone downwards and laterally and also pulls at the sheath of the cervical ncurovascular bundle thus dilating the lumen of the internal jugular vein.

> 作用：当肩胛骨固定时，该肌将会厌骨向下及向侧方牵拉，并牵拉颈神经血管束的鞘膜，从而使颈内静脉的管腔扩张。

Blood supply: all muscles which are situated below the hyoid bone arc supplied with blood by the inferior thyroid, superficial cervical, and transverse cervical arteries.

> 血供：所有位于会厌骨下方的肌肉均由甲状腺下动脉、颈浅动脉和颈横动脉供血。

Innervation: superior branch of the ansa cervicalis (C1-C3).

> 支配神经：颈袢上支（C1-C3）。

## 18 DEEP MUSCLES OF TH E NECK

> 18 颈部深层肌肉

#### 18.1.1 T H E LATERAL GROUP

> 18.1.1 侧组

1. The scalenus anterior muscle *(musculus scalenus anterior)*  (Figs 276, 277, 279) arises from the anterior tubercles of the third, fourth, fifth, and sixth cervical vertebrae and stretches downwards and to the front to be inserted into the scalene tubercle of the first rib.

> 前外侧腹直肌（musculus scalenus anterior）（图276、277、279）起自第三、第四、第五和第六颈椎的前结节，向下并向前方延伸，最终插入第一肋骨的 scalene 粪突。

Action: when the vertebral column is fixed the muscle pulls the first rib upwards; with the chest fixed contraction of the muscle on one side flexes the cervical spine to the same side, bilateral contraction flexes it forward.

> 作用：当椎骨列固定时，该肌将第一肋骨向上牵拉；当胸廓固定时，单侧收缩可使颈椎向同侧屈曲，双侧收缩则使颈椎前屈。

Blood supply: the ascending cervical and inferior thyroid arteries.

> 血供：椎前动脉和甲状腺下动脉。

Innervation: the cervical nerves (Cs-C;).

> 支配神经：颈神经（Cₙ₋₈）。

2. The scalenus medius muscle *(musculus scalenus medius)*

> 中斜角肌（musculus scalenus medius）

(Figs 276, 277, 279) takes origin from the anterior tubercles of the upper six cervical vertebrae, passes downwards behind the scalenus anterior muscle, and is inserted into the superior surface of the first rib behind the groove for the subclavian artery. Above this groove, between the scalenus anterior and medius muscles, is a triangular inierscalenus space *(spatium interscalenum)* lodging the subclavian artery and the nerves of the branchial plexus.

> （图276、277、279）起自上六颈椎的前结节，向下经过前锯肌的后方，止于第一肋骨上表面的锁骨下动脉沟后方。该沟上方，位于前锯肌与中锯肌之间，有一个三角形的内锯间隙（interscalenum space），内有锁骨下动脉和臂丛神经。

Action: with the vertebral column fixed the muscle raises the first rib; when the chest is fixed it flexes the cervical spine forwards.

> 作用：当椎骨固定时，该肌可抬起第一肋骨；当胸廓固定时，可使颈椎向前屈曲。

Blood supply: the vertebral and deep cervical arteries.

> 血供：椎动脉和深部颈动脉。

Innervation: the cervical nerves (Cj-Cg).

> 支配神经：颈神经（Cj-Cg）。

3. The scalenus posterior muscle *(musculus scalenus posterior)*

> 后斜角肌（musculus scalenus posterior）

![](_page_295_Picture_21.jpeg)

278. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles on the hyoid bone* (schematical representation).

> 舌骨上肌和下肌的起止点（示意图）。

![](_page_296_Picture_2.jpeg)

279. *Deep muscles of the neck;* anterior aspect *(%).*

> 颈部深部肌肉；前方（%）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_297_Picture_2.jpeg)

280. *Fasciae of the neck;* right side *(Y2).*

> 颈部筋膜；右侧（Y2）

![](_page_298_Picture_2.jpeg)

281. Muscles and fasciae of the neck (3/4).

> 颈部肌肉和筋膜（3/4）

(Horizontal section of the neck through the seventh cervical vertebra.)

> （颈部水平断层，经第七颈椎。）

(Figs 276, 277, 279) takes origin from the posterior tubercles of the fifth and sixth (sometimes from the prominens) cervical vertebrae, stretches downwards behind the scalenus medius muscle, and is inserted into the external surface of the second rib.

> （图276、277、279）起自第五和第六（有时为 prominens）颈椎的后结节，向下越过中斜角肌的后方，止于第二肋的外侧面。

Action: raises the second rib when the vertebral column is

> 动作：当椎骨列伸直时，使第二肋骨上抬

fixed; when the chest is fixed contraction of the muscle on both sides flexes forward the cervical spine.

> 固定；当胸廓固定时，两侧肌肉收缩可使颈椎前屈。

Blood supply: the deep and transverse cervical arteries, first intercostal arterv.

> 血供：深 cervical 动脉、横 cervical 动脉、第一肋间动脉。

Innervation: the cervical nerves (C;-Cs).

> 支配神经：颈神经（C₁-C₇）

### 18.2 T H E PREVERTEBRAL GROUP

> 18.2 前纵列群

1. The longus capitis muscle *(musculus longus capitis)* (Fig. 279) arises from the anterior tubercles of the third, fourth, fifth, and sixth cervical vertebrae and runs upwards to be inserted into the inferior surface of the basilar part of the occipital bone slightly behind the pharyngeal tubercle.

> 长头肌（musculus longus capitis）（图279）起自第3、4、5、6颈椎的前结节，向上走行，最终附着于枕骨基底部的下表面，位于咽突稍后方。

Action: flexes forward the head and cervical spine.

> 动作：使头和颈椎向前屈曲。

Innervation: the cervical nerves (C)-C<sup>8</sup> ).

> 支配神经：颈神经（C1-C8）

- 2. The longus cervicis muscle *(musculus longus colli)* (Figs 279, 281) occupies the anterolateral surface of all the cervical and the first, second, third, and fourth thoracic vertebrae. The middle parts of the muscle are slightly wider. The muscle fibres differ in length in view of which three parts are distinguished in the muscle:
- (a) the mediovertical part takes origin from the bodies of the fifth, sixth, seventh cervical and first, second, and third thoracic vertebrae and stretches upwards and medially to be inserted into the anterior surface of the bodies of the third and second cervical vertebrae and the anterior tubercle of the atlas;
- (b) the superior oblique part extends from the anterior tubercles of the transverse processes of the second, third, fourth, and fifth cervical vertebrae to the body of the second cervical vertebra and the anterior tubercle of the atlas;
- (c) the inferior oblique part arises from the bodies of the upper ihree thoracic vertebrae and is directed upwards and laterally to be inserted into the anterior tubercles of the transverse processes of the lower three cervical vertebrae (fifth, sixth, and seventh).

> 长颈肌（musculus longus colli）（图279、281）占据所有颈椎以及第一、第二、第三和第四胸椎的前外侧表面。该肌的中部略宽。由于肌纤维长度不同，该肌可分为三个部分：
(a) 中央垂直部起自第五、第六、第七颈椎和第一、第二、第三胸椎的椎体，向上并向内延伸，最终插入至第三和第二颈椎椎体的前表面以及寰椎的前结节；
(b) 上斜部起自第二、第三、第四、第五颈椎横突的前结节，向上延伸至第二颈椎椎体及寰椎的前结节；
(c) 下斜部起自上三个胸椎的椎体，向上并向外延伸，最终插入至下三个颈椎（第五、第六、第七颈椎）横突的前结节。

Action: flexes the cervical spine forwards and to the side of the contracting muscle.

> 动作：使颈椎向前并侧屈，朝向收缩肌的一侧。

Blood supply of both muscles: the vertebral and the ascending and deep cervical arteries.

> 两块肌肉的血液供应：椎动脉和颈升动脉及深颈动脉。

Innervation: the cervical nerves (C<sup>2</sup> -C<sup>6</sup> ).

> 支配神经：颈神经（C<sup>2</sup>～C<sup>6</sup>）。

3. The rectus capitis anterior muscle *(musculus rectus capitis anterior)* (Fig. 279) is short and takes origin from the anterior surface of the transverse process and lateral mass of the atlas, passes upwards, and is inserted into the inferior surface of the basilar part of the occipital bone in front of the foramen magnum.

> 直肌前外侧肌（musculus rectus capitis anterior）（图279）较短，起自寰椎的横突前表面和椎体外侧块，向上行进，最终附着于枕骨基底部的下表面，位于枕骨大孔前方。

Action: flexes the head to the side of the contracting muscle; bilateral contraction flexes the head forwards.

> 动作：使头向收缩肌一侧侧屈；双侧收缩使头前屈。

Blood supply: the vertebral and ascending pharyngeal arteries. Innervation: the cervical nerves (C1-C2).

> 血供：椎动脉和咽升动脉。神经支配：颈神经（C1-C2）。

4. The rectus capitis lateralis muscle *(musculus rectus capitis lateralis)* (Fig. 279) is square in shape. It arises from the anterior periphery of the transverse process of the atlas and is directed upwards and laterally to be inserted into the jugular process of the occipital bone.

> 斜方肌（musculus rectus capitis lateralis）（图279）呈方形。它起自寰椎横突的前缘，向上外侧方向延伸，最终附着于枕骨的颈静脉孔突。

Action: flexion of the head to ihc side of the contracting muscle; contraction of both muscles flexes the head forwards.

> 动作：头部向收缩肌一侧屈曲；两块肌肉同时收缩会使头部向前屈曲。[!note]- 术语说明 "flexion of the head" 通常译作“头部屈曲”，指头部向前弯曲的动作。

Blood supply: the vertebral and occipital arteries.

> 血供：椎动脉和椎前动脉。

[nnervation: the cervical nerves (Ci-C<sup>2</sup> ).

## 19 TRIANGLES OF THE NECK

> 19 颈部三角区

The two stcrnocleidomastoid muscles divide the anterior region of the neck *(regio colli anterior)* into three triangles, one anterior and two lateral (Fig. 282).

> 两侧的胸锁乳突肌将颈部前部区域（颈前区）分为三个三角形，一个位于前部，两个位于侧部（图282）。

To the side of the midline each half of the neck is divided by the sternocleidomastoid into two triangles, medial and lateral.

> 在正中线的两侧，颈部被胸锁乳突肌分为两个三角形，分别为内侧三角和外侧三角。

The medial triangle is bounded by the inferior border of the mandible, the midline of the neck, and the anterior border of the sternocleidomastoid muscle. In this manner the right and left medial triangles form together one anterior triangle of the neck.

> medial triangle 由下颌骨下缘、颈部中线和胸锁乳突肌前缘围成。以此方式，左右两侧的 medial triangle 共同构成颈部的一个前三角区。

**The** lateral triangle of the neck is bounded by the posterior border of the sternocleidomastoid muscle, the clavicle, and the border of the trapezius muscle.

> 颈部的侧三角由胸锁乳突肌的后缘、锁骨和斜方肌的边界所围成。

Each of these triangles is divided by the muscles of the neck into some smaller triangles.

> 每个三角区又被颈部肌肉分为一些更小的三角区。

The digastric muscle and the superior belly of the omohyoid muscle divide the medial triangle into the submaxillary and carotid triangles.

> 二腹肌和肩胛舌骨肌上腹将咽侧区分为下颌下三角和颈动脉三角。

- 1. The submaxillary (submandibular) triangle *(trigonum submandibulare)* is bounded by the anterior and posterior bellies of the digastric muscle and the inferior border of the mandible. A small trigonum Hnguale or Pirogoff's triangle *(trtgonum Pirogowi)* is marked out in it by the posterior border of the myohyoid muscle, the posterior belly of the digastric muscle, and the hypoglossal nerve.
- **2. The carotid** triangle *(trigonum caroticum)* is limited by the posterior belly of the digastric muscle, the superior belly of the omohyoid muscle, and the anterior border of the sternocleidomastoid muscle.

> 下颌下三角（submandibular triangle，trigonum submandibulare）由二腹肌的前腹和后腹以及下颌骨的下缘构成。该三角内由舌骨肌的后缘、二腹肌的后腹以及舌下神经围成一小三角形区域，称为舌下三角或皮罗高夫三角（trigonum Pirogowi）。

颈动脉三角（carotid triangle，trigonum caroticum）由二腹肌后腹、肩胛舌骨肌上腹以及胸锁乳突肌的前缘构成。

The lateral triangle includes the omoclavicular triangle.

> 外侧三角包括锁骨上三角。

3. The omoclavicular triangle *(trigonum omoclaviculare)* is bounded by the posterior border of the sternocleidomastoid muscle, the clavicle, and the inferior belly of the omohyoid muscle; it corresponds to the greater supraclavicular fossa.

> 锁骨上三角（trigonum omoclaviculare）由胸锁乳突肌的后缘、锁骨和斜方肌锁骨部的下部构成；它对应于较大的锁骨上窝。

![](_page_300_Figure_2.jpeg)

## 20 *Triangles of the neck* (semischematical representation).

> 颈部三角区（半示意图）。

Arrows indicate the triangles. The triangles arc outlined brown and yellow; the relation of the trunks of the main nerves and blood vessels to the triangles is shown.

> 箭头指示三角形区域。三角形区域以棕色和黄色标出；展示了主神经和血管干与三角形区域之间的关系。

“PtrogofFs trianglr” 是“Protego’s triangle”的拼写错误，正确译名为“伯格夫三角”，是解剖学中一个特定的三角区域，通常用于描述某些解剖结构的分布或关系。

<sup>2 —</sup>omolracheal mangle

> <sup>2 —</sup>气管食管瘘

## 21 FASCIAE OF THE NECK

> 21 颈部筋膜 /no_think

The cervical fascia *(fascia ccrvicalis)* is composed of the following three layers: the superficial layer *(lamina supaficialis)* investing, like a sock, all the cervical muscles and the submandibular gland; the pretracheal fascia *(lamina pretrachealis)* forming a sheath for the infrahyoid group of muscles and investing the neurovascular bundles and some of the organs of the neck; the prevertebral fascia *(lamina prcvaiebralis)* forming a sheath for the prevertebral group of muscles.

> 颈深筋膜（fascia cervicalis）由以下三层组成：浅层（lamina superficialis），如同长筒袜一样包裹着全部颈肌和下颌下腺；中层（lamina pretrachealis），形成包裹甲状舌骨肌群的筋膜鞘，并包裹颈神经血管束及颈部部分器官；深层（lamina prevertebralis），形成包裹椎前肌群的筋膜鞘。

1. The anterior part of the superficial layer of the cervical fascia *(lamina supaficialis)* is a continuation of the fascia proper of the chest and neck. The lower part of the fascia is attached to the anterior border of the clavicle and the manubrium sterni. Ascending, it splits to form a sheath for the sternocleidomastoid muscles and on reaching the hyoid bone it is attached here and then invests the suprahyoid group of the cervical muscles. Having formed the sheath for these muscles and for the submandibular gland, the superficial layer passes over to the face where it is continuous with the masseteric and parotid fasciae *(fascia masseterica* el *fascia parotidea).*

> 表层颈筋膜（lamina superficialis）的前部是胸壁和颈部真性筋膜的延续。该筋膜的下部附着于锁骨前缘和胸骨柄。向上延伸时，它分裂形成胸锁乳突肌的筋膜鞘，并在到达会厌骨时附着于此，继而包裹住颈前部的咽上组肌肉。在形成这些肌肉及下颌下腺的筋膜鞘后，表层筋膜延伸至面部，与咬肌筋膜和腮腺筋膜（fascia masseterica et fascia parotidea）相延续。

At the back of the neck the superficial layer is continuous with the fascia proper of the shoulder and back. It splits at the lateral margin of the trapezius muscle to invest this muscle, and is attached to the ligainentum nuchae and reaches the superior nuchal line and the external occipital protuberance.

> 在颈部后方，浅层筋膜与肩胛背筋膜相延续。它在斜方肌的外侧缘分裂，包绕该肌，并附着于颈枕韧带，延伸至枕外隆突和上项线。

2. The pretracheal fascia *(lamina pretrachealis)* arises from the posterior surface of the clavicles and the manubrium sterni and ascends to form a sheath for the thyroid gland and the group of infrahyoid muscles. The upper parts of this fascia blend with the superficial layer at the level of the hyoid bone, the lateral parts give off processes lo the organs of ihe neck (the larynx, trachea, pha-

> 气管前筋膜（气管前层）起源于锁骨后表面和胸骨柄，并向上形成包裹甲状腺和甲状舌骨肌群的筋膜鞘。该筋膜的上部在会厌水平与浅层筋膜融合，侧部则向颈部器官（如喉、气管、食管）发出分支。

rynx, oesophagus) and also form a sheath for the neurovascular bundle of the neck (for the internal jugular vein, the common carotid artery, and the vagus nerve), which is called the carotid sheath. The pretracheal fascia blends with the superficial layer at the posterior border of the sternocleidomastoid muscle. An area of the pretracheal fascia between the two omohyoid muscles which is limited above by the hyoid bone and below by the clavicles and manubrium sterni is dense and forms the omoclavicular aponeurosis.

> （气管、食管）并形成颈部神经血管束（包括颈内静脉、颈总动脉和迷走神经）的鞘膜，称为颈动脉鞘。颈前筋膜在胸锁乳突肌后缘与浅层筋膜融合。位于两斜角肌之间的颈前筋膜部分，其上方由会厌骨限制，下方由锁骨和胸骨柄构成，该区域致密并形成斜角肌锁骨膜。

3. The prevertebral fascia *(lamina prevcrtebralis)* arises from the base of the skull and descends to cover the group of prevertebral muscles. Its lateral parts blend with ihe costal processes of the cervical vertebrae. As a result ihe prevertebral fascia with the cervical vertebrae form an osteofibrous shealh for the prevertebral muscles. Approximately at the level of the third thoracic vertebra the lower parts of the fascia are continuous wilh the endothoracic fascia *(fascia endotkoracica).* On the periphery ihe fascia passes over to the scalenus muscles.

> 椎前筋膜（lamina prevertebralis）起源于颅底，向下覆盖椎前肌群。其侧部与颈椎的肋骨突融合。因此，椎前筋膜与颈椎共同形成包裹椎前肌群的骨纤维鞘。大约在第三胸椎水平，筋膜的下部与胸内筋膜（fascia endothoracica）连续。在周围区域，筋膜则过渡至斜方肌。

Spaces filled with loose fatty tissue form between the fasciae of the neck and between the fasciae and the viscera.

> 颈部筋膜层之间以及筋膜层与内脏之间形成了充满松散脂肪组织的间隙。

1. The suprasternal interaponeurotic space *(spatium interaponeuroticum suprastcmaU)* is above the jugular notch of the manubrium sterni, between the superficial layer and pretracheal fascia.

> 胸骨上间隙（spatium interaponeuroticum suprasternum）位于胸骨柄的颈静脉切迹上方，介于浅层筋膜与气管前层筋膜之间。

This space is continuous with the right and left lateral recesses behind the sternocleidomastoid muscle.

> 此空间与胸锁乳突肌后方的右、左侧沟连续。

- 2. The previsceral space *(spatium preoisceraU)* is between the pretracheal fascia and the viscera of the neck.
- 3. The retrovisceral space *(spatium retroviscerale)* forms between the prevertebral fascia and the viscera of the neck.

> 前腹腔间隙（spatium previscerale）位于颈前筋膜与颈部脏器之间。  
后腹腔间隙（spatium retroviscerale）形成于颈前纵筋膜与颈部脏器之间。

## 22 MUSCLES AND FASCIAE OF THE CHEST

> 22 胸部肌肉与筋膜

## 23 REGIONS OF THE CHEST

> 胸部23个区域

The anterolatcral thoracic wall is composed of the following regions *(regiones pectoraUsJ* (Fig. 285).

> 前外侧胸壁由以下区域（胸壁区域，regiones pectorales）组成（图285）。

- 1. The pectoral region *(regio pectoralis)* (the region of the mammary gland, or *regio mammaria)* is limited by the inferior border of the pectoralis major muscle, superiorly it borders on the infraclavicular fossa. This region is also called the anlerosupcrior region of the chest.
- 2. The prestcrnal region *(regio presternalis)* occupies an extreme medial position stretching from the anterior median line to the parasternal line. It is also called the anterior median region of the chest.
- 3. The axillary region *(regio axillaris)* includes the axillary fossa *(fossa axillaris)* (see *Muscles of the Upper Limb. The Axillary fossa).*
- 4. The inframammary region *(regio inframammaria)* occupies ihc lower part of the pectoral region and borders upon hypochondriac region *(regio hypockondriaca).* It is also the inferior part of the pectoral region.

> 胸前区（regio pectoralis）（乳腺区域，或regio mammaria）由胸大肌的下缘界定，其上方与锁骨下窝相邻。此区域也称为胸部的前外侧上区。  
胸前内侧区（regio presternalis）占据极内侧的位置，从前正中线延伸至肋间线。它也称为胸部的前正中区。  
腋区（regio axillaris）包括腋窝（fossa axillaris）（参见《上肢肌肉》。腋窝）。  
乳腺下区（regio inframammaria）位于胸前区的下部，并与肋下区（regio hypochondriaca）相邻。它也是胸前区的下部。

The following vertical lines are marked on the thoracic wall (see Vol. II. *Respiratory Apparatus).*

> 以下垂直线标示于胸壁上（参见第二卷 呼吸系统）。

- 1. The anterior median line *(linea mediana anterior)* runs on the middle of the sternum.
- 2. The sternal line *(linea sternalis)* corresponds lo the lateral border of the sternum.
- 3. The parasternal line *(linea parasternalis)* runs midway between the sternum and the medioclavicular line.

> 前正中线（ linea mediana anterior）位于胸骨的中线。  
胸骨线（linea sternalis）对应于胸骨的外侧缘。  
胸骨旁线（linea parasternalis）位于胸骨与胸骨中线之间中央的位置。

- 4. The medioclavicular line *(hnea mamillaris* s. *medioclavicularis)* runs through the middle of the clavicle. It is also called the mamillary line *(linea mamillaris)* but the variable position of the mammary gland makes the name inaccurate.
- 5. The anterior axillary line *(linea axillaris anterior)* corresponds to the anterior axillary fold *(plica axillaris anterior)* which is projected along the superolatcral border of the pectoralis major and pectoralis minor muscles.
- 6. The posterior axillary line *(linea axillaris posterior)* corresponds to the posterior axillary fold *(plica axillaris posterior)* formed by the anterior borders of the teres major and latissimus dorsi muscles.
- 7. The middle axillary line *(linea axillaris media)* passes between the anterior and posterior axillary lines.
- 8. The scapular line *(linea scapular'is)* passes vertically through the inferior angle of the scapula
- 9. The paravertebral line *(linea paravertebralis)* is projected along the transverse vertebral processes.
- 10. The posterior median line *(linea mediana posterior)* runs on the midline of the back along the vertebral spinous processes.

> 中斜方肌线（linea medioclavicularis 或 linea mamillaris s. medioclavicularis）沿锁骨中部走行。该线也称为乳头线（linea mamillaris），但由于乳腺位置的变异，该名称不够准确。

前腋前线（linea axillaris anterior）对应前腋褶（plica axillaris anterior），沿胸大肌和胸小肌的上外侧缘投影。

后腋后线（linea axillaris posterior）对应后腋褶（plica axillaris posterior），由大圆肌和背阔肌的前缘形成。

中腋中线（linea axillaris media）位于前腋前线和后腋后线之间。

肩胛线（linea scapularis）垂直通过肩胛骨的下角。

椎旁线（line  paravertebralis）沿横突投影。

后正中线（linea mediana posterior）沿背部正中线走行，位于椎骨棘突上。

Inspection and palpation of the chest determine the regions of the clavicles on the superior border and the right and left costal arches and the infrasternal angle on the inferior border. The angle of the scapula is also well palpated, it corresponds to the articulation of the second costal cartilage with the sternum. The nipple in males is usually in line with the fourth rib.

> 检查和触诊胸部可确定锁骨上缘的区域、左右肋弓以及胸骨下角（即肋弓与胸骨之间的夹角）的下缘。肩胛骨角也可良好触诊，其对应于第二肋软骨与胸骨的连接处。在男性中，乳头通常与第四肋处于同一条线上。

## 24 MUSCLES OF THE CHEST

> 24 胸部肌肉

The muscles of the chest *(musculi thoraeis)* are separated into two groups, one is composed of superficial muscles (those related to the shoulder girdle) and the other is formed by deep muscles (muscles of the chest proper).

> 胸肌（musculi thoracis）可分为两组，一组为浅层肌肉（与肩带相关的肌肉），另一组为深层肌肉（真正的胸肌）。

The superficial muscles are as follows.

> 浅层肌肉如下。

- 1. The pectoralis major muscle *(musculus pectoralis major).*
- 2. The pectoralis minor muscle *(musculus pectoralis minor).*
- 3. The subclavius muscle *(musculus subclavius).*
- 4. The serratus anterior muscle *(musculus serratus anterior).*

> 胸大肌（musculus pectoralis major）  
胸小肌（musculus pectoralis minor）  
锁骨下肌（musculus subclavius）  
前锯肌（musculus serratus anterior）

The following are the deep muscles.

> 以下为深层肌肉。

- 1. The external intercostal muscles *(musculi intercostales externi).*
- 2. The internal intercostal muscles *(musculi intercostalis interni).*
- 3. The intercostales intimi muscles *(musculi intercostales intimi).*
- 1. The subcostal muscles *(ntUSCUlt tubc&sUtUs),*
- 5. The transversus thoraeis muscle *(musculus transversus thoracis).*

> 肋间外肌（musculi intercostales externi）。  
肋间内肌（musculi intercostales interni）。  
肋间最内肌（musculi intercostales intimi）。  
肋下肌（musculi subcostales）。  
胸横肌（musculus transversus thoracis）。

The musculotendinous sheet separating the thoracic and abdominal cavities and which is called the diaphragm *(diaphragma)* is also related to the chest muscles.

> 分隔胸腔与腹腔的肌腱膜，称为膈（diaphragma），同时也与胸肌相关。

#### 24.1.1 SUPERFICIAL MUSCLES O F TH E CHEST

> 24.1.1 胸部浅层肌肉

I. The pectoralis major muscle *(musculus pectoralis major)*  (Figs 283, 285-287, 290, 292) is a wide paired muscle located in the anterosuperior parts of the thoracic wall.

> I. 胸大肌（musculus pectoralis major）（图283、285-287、290、292）是一块宽大的成对肌肉，位于胸壁的前上方。

The superolatcral border of the muscle meets the anterior border of the deltoid muscle to form the deltoideopectoral groove which is continuous upwards with the infraclavicular fossa. The inferolateral border of the pectoralis major muscle is sometimes clearly outlined under the skin. The muscle arises on the medial half of the clavicle (the clavicular part, or *pars clavicularis),* the anterior surface of the sternum and second to seventh costal carti-

> 肌肉的上外侧边与三角肌的前缘相交，形成三角肌与胸大肌之间的三角胸沟（deltoideopectoral groove），该沟向上延续至锁骨下窝（infraclavicular fossa）。胸大肌的下外侧边在皮肤下有时可清晰地辨认出来。该肌起自锁骨的内侧半（锁骨部，或称pars clavicularis）、胸骨的前表面以及第2至第7肋软骨的前面。

283. Outlines of trunk muscles (anterior aspect).
