## 26 *Muscles of the trunk;* right side ('/5).

> 26 躯干肌肉；右侧 ('/5)

{The scapula is pulled backwards. The pectoralis major and minor muscles and the internal oblique muscle of the abdomen are removed.)

> 肩胛骨被向后牵拉。胸大肌、胸小肌以及腹内斜肌被切除。

![](_page_309_Picture_2.jpeg)

289. *Sites of origin and insertion of the trunk muscles* (schematical representation).

> 躯干肌的起止点（示意图）

lages (the siernocostal part, or *pars sternocostalis),* and the anterior wall of the sheath of the reclus abdominis muscle (the abdominal part, or *pars abdominalis).*

> 肋间内肌（胸肋部，或pars sternocostalis），以及腹直肌鞘的前壁（腹部部分，或pars abdominalis）。

Passing laterally and upwards, the fibres of the muscles converge in such a manner that those of the lower part of the muscle lie behind the fibres of the upper part as a result of which the muscle is much thicker here. This narrowed, but thicker part of the muscle passes over to the humerus and thus forms the anterior wall of the axillary fossa, and is continuous with a tendon which is inserted into the lateral lip of the bicipital groove, the lower fibres being attached at a higher and the upper fibres at a lower level.

> 肌纤维向侧上方延伸，其排列方式为：肌的下部纤维位于上部纤维的后方，因此该区域的肌肉明显增厚。这一狭窄但增厚的部分跨越至肱骨，从而构成腋窝的前壁，并与一条肌腱连续，该肌腱附着于肱二头肌沟的外侧唇。其中，下部纤维附着于较高位置，上部纤维则附着于较低位置。

Action: draws the arm to the trunk and rotates it medially (pronation); when the limb is held horizontally the muscle pulls it to a sagittal position (anteversion); when the arm is fixed the siernocostal pan of the muscle assists in expanding the thoracic cage during respiration.

> 动作：将上肢向躯干靠拢并作内旋（前旋）；当上肢水平持举时，该肌将其拉向矢状面位置（前倾）；当上肢固定时，肋间胸肋部肌束协助呼吸时扩张胸廓。

Blond supply: (he acromiothoracic, lateral and superior ihoracic, and intercostal arteries.

> Blond supply: (he acromiothoracic, lateral and superior ihoracic, and intercostal arteries. /no_think

Inuervation: medial and lateral pectoral nerves (Cs-Tli!).

> 支配神经：胸内侧神经和胸外侧神经（C3-T1）[!note]- 术语说明  
“medial and lateral pectoral nerves” 通常译作“胸内侧神经和胸外侧神经”，是胸大肌的支配神经，分别起源于C3-T1脊髓节段。

2. The pectoralis minor muscle *(musculus pedoralis minor)*  (Figs 291, 292) is flat, triangular, and located in the second layer being covered by the pectoralis major muscle. It arises from the second, third, fourth and fifth ribs near to the junction of their cartilaginous and bony parts. Running upwards and laterally the fibres of the muscle converge to be inserted by a short tendon into (he coracoid process of the scapula.

> 胸小肌（musculus pectoralis minor）（图291，292）呈扁平三角形，位于第二层，被胸大肌覆盖。其起始点位于第二、第三、第四和第五肋骨的软骨与骨性部分交界附近。肌纤维向上外侧行进，逐渐汇合，以一条短的肌腱止于肩胛骨的喙突。

Action: pulls the scapula forwards and downwards; when the scapula is fixed raises the ribs being thus an auxiliary muscle of respiration.

> 作用：将肩胛骨向前下方拉；当肩胛骨固定时，可抬高肋骨，因此是呼吸的辅助肌。

Blood supply: ihe acromiothoracic, intercostal and superior thoracic arteries,

> 血供：肩胛胸廓动脉、肋间动脉和胸上动脉

Inuervation: the medial and lateral pectoral nerves (Cj-Tri!).

> innervation: 胸内侧神经和胸外侧神经（C5-T2）

3. The subclavius muscle *(musculus subclavius)* (Figs 291, 294) is

> 胸锁三角肌（musculus subclavius）（图291，图294）是

small and elongated and lies below and almost parallel to the clavicle. It is covered by the pectoralis major muscle. The subclavius muscle takes origin from the bony and cartilaginous parts of the first rib and is directed laterally and upwards to be inserted into the inferior surface of the acromial part of the clavicle.

> 细长且位于锁骨下方，几乎与锁骨平行。其表面被胸大肌覆盖。胸锁筋膜起自第一肋骨的骨性和软骨性部分，并向侧上方延伸，最终附着于锁骨肩峰部的下表面。

Action: pulls the clavicle downwards and medially and in this manner holds it fast in the sternoclavicular joint; when the shoulder girdle is fixed the muscle raises the first rib and thus acts as an auxiliary muscle of respiration.

> 作用：将锁骨向下并向内牵拉，从而在胸锁关节中将锁骨牢固地固定；当肩胛带固定时，该肌可抬起第一肋骨，因此作为呼吸的辅助肌起作用。

Blood supply: the transverse scapular (suprascapular) and acromiothoracic arteries.

> 血供：横肩胛（肩胛上）动脉和锁骨胸廓动脉。

Innervaliou: ihe subclavian nerve (C5).

> 支配神经：锁骨下神经（C5）。

4. The serratus anterior muscle *(musculus scrratus anterior)*  (Figs 285, 287-291) is flat and wide and situated on the anterolateral part of the thoracic wall. Its upper part is under the pectoralis major muscle, while th< lowei part lies superfil tally and i> covered by the pectoral fascia. The muscle arises by eight or nine slips from the external surface of the upper eight or nine ribs and from the tendinous arch between the first and second ribs. Passing upwards and backwards it covers the outer surface of the ribs and runs under the scapula lo be inserted into its medial border and inferior angle. Fibres which are inserted into the inferior angle of the scapula are developed best.

> 斜方肌前外侧肌（serratus anterior muscle，musculus serratus anterior）（图285，287-291）呈扁平宽大，位于胸壁的前外侧部分。其上部位于胸大肌下方，而下部则位于胸大肌筋膜之上。该肌由八条或九条肌束起源于上八条或九条肋骨的外侧面，以及第一与第二肋骨之间的腱膜弓。肌束向上并向后延伸，覆盖肋骨的外侧表面，并在肩胛骨下方走行，最终插入肩胛骨的内侧缘和下角。其中插入肩胛骨下角的肌束最为发达。

Action: pulls ihe scapula away from the vertebral column; the inferior fibres, in addition, displace the inferior angle of the scapula laterally and cause its rotation about the sagittal axis. Together with the rhomboid muscle the serratus anterior muscle presses the scapula to the thoracic wall. When the shoulder girdle is fixed the serratus anterior muscle also acts as an auxiliary muscle of respiration (during inspiration).

> 作用：将肩胛骨远离椎骨柱拉离；下部纤维还使肩胛骨下角向外侧移位，并使其围绕矢状轴旋转。与菱形肌共同作用，前锯肌将肩胛骨压向胸壁。当肩带固定时，前锯肌还作为呼吸的辅助肌（在吸气时起作用）。

Blood supply: the thoracodorsal, lateral thoracic, and intercostal arteries.

> 血供：胸背动脉、肋间动脉和肋外侧动脉。

Inuervation: nerve lo the serratus anterior muscle (C5-C7).

> 支配：神经支配前锯肌（C5-C7）。

#### 26.1.1 DEEP (PROPER) MUSCLES O F TH E CHEST

> 26.1.1 胸部深层（真）肌肉

The intercostal muscles are short and flat and fill the intercostal spaces. External, internal, and intimi (innermost) intercostal muscles are distinguished.

> 肋间肌为短而扁平的肌肉，填充于肋间隙。可分为肋间外肌、肋间内肌和肋间最内肌。

1. The external intercostal muscles *(musculi intercostaUs externi)*  (see Figs 258-260, 291) arise from the lower border of the rib lateral of the costal groove, run obliquely downwards and forewards, and are inserted into the upper border of the rib next below. The external intercostal muscles are absent in the region of the costal cartilages which is filled by the external anterior intercostal membrane *(membrana intercostalh externa).* In the posterior parts of the thoracic wall they adjoin the levatores costarum muscles (sec *Muscles of the Back),*

> 肋间外肌（musculi intercostales externi）（见图258-260、291）起自肋骨的肋沟外侧的下缘，斜向下前方走行，并附着于下方肋骨的上缘。肋间外肌在肋软骨区域缺失，该区域由肋间前膜（membrana intercostalis externa）所替代。在胸壁的后部，肋间外肌与肋间肌（levator costarum muscles）相邻（参见“背部肌肉”部分）。

Action: participate in the act of respiration (inspiration).

> 作用：参与呼吸动作（吸气）。

Blood supply: the intercostal, internal mammary, and musculophrenic arteries.

> 供血：肋间动脉、内乳动脉和肌膈动脉。

Inuervation: intercostal nerves (Tr^-Th,,).

> innervation: 肋间神经（T2-Th12）

2. The internal intercostal muscles *(musculi intercostales interni)*  (see Figs 259, 260, 295) take origin from the upper border of the rib, pass obliquely upwards and forwards, and are inserted into the lower border of the rib next above medially of the costal groove. They are absent in the posterior part of the intercostal space to the back of the angle of the rib. This part is filled by the internal posterior intercostal membrane *(membrana intcrcostalis interna).*

> 内部肋间肌（musculi intercostales interni）（见图259、260、295）起自肋骨的上缘，斜向上方和前方走行，并附着于上方肋骨的下缘，位于肋骨沟的内侧。这些肌肉在肋间间隙的后部，即肋骨角的后方区域缺失。该区域由内部后肋间膜（membrana intercostalis interna posterior）所填充。

The sources of blood supply and inuervation are the same as those for the external intercostal muscles.

> 血供和神经支配来源与肋间外肌相同。

3. The intercostalis intimi muscles *(musculi intercostaUs intimi)*  are on the inner surface of ihe inlenial intercostal muscles and their fibres pass in the same direction and are inserted into the internal surface of adjacent ribs. These muscles fill half of the intercostal space and their posterior border touches the subcostal muscles.

> 肋间内肌（musculi intercostales intimi）位于肋间内侧肌的内侧表面，其肌纤维朝同一方向延伸，并附着于相邻肋骨的内侧表面。这些肌肉占据肋间隙的一半空间，其后缘与肋下肌相接。

Blood supply: the same as for the external intercostal muscles.

> 血供：同肋间外肌的血供。

Innervation: intercostal nerves (Th( -Thn).

> 支配神经：肋间神经（Th( -Thn）。

4. The subcostal muscles *(musculi subcostales)* (Fig. 298) He on the internal surface of the lower ribs in the region of their posterior ends. They have the same sites ol origin and direction of fibres as the internal intercostal muscles, but their fibres, in contrast, pass over one rib to the next above.

> 肋间内肌（musculi intercostales interni）（图298）位于下肋骨的内侧表面，处于肋骨后端的区域。它们的起始部位和肌纤维走向与肋间内肌相同，但其肌纤维则从一个肋骨跨越到其上方的下一个肋骨。

Action: the internal intercostal and subcostal muscles take part in the act of respiraiion (expiration).

> 动作：肋间内肌和肋下肌参与呼吸动作（呼气）。

Blood supply: the intercostal arteries.

> 血供：肋间动脉。

Innervation: intercostal nerves (Th|-Th <sup>M</sup> ).

> 支配：肋间神经（T<sub>M</sub>）。

5. The transversus thoracis muscle *(musculus transversvs thoracis)*  (Fig. 259) is flat, thin, fan-shaped, and lies on the internal surface of the anterior thoracic wall. It takes origin from the inner surface of the xiphoid process and the lower part of the body of the slcriium. Its fibres radiate obliquely upwards and laterally to be inserted into the internal surfaces of the third and fourth ribs.

> 胸横肌（musculus transversus thoracis）（图259）呈扁平、纤薄、扇形，位于前胸壁内侧。其起始点位于剑突内侧及肋骨体的下部。肌纤维斜向放射状向上及外侧，最终附着于第三和第四肋骨的内侧表面。

Action: takes part in the respiratory act (expiration).

> 作用：参与呼吸作用（呼气）。

Blood supply: the Intercostal arteries.

> 血供：肋间动脉。

Innervation: intercostal nerves (Th.;-Th").

> 支配神经：肋间神经（T；-T"）

## 27 FASCIAE OF THE CHEST

> 27 胸部筋膜

1. The pectoral fascia *(fasaa pectoralis)* (Figs 285, 290). The superficial layer *(lamina superficial is)* of this fascia covers the external surface ol the pectoralis major muscle. It fuses with the clavicle superiorly and with the sternum medially, and is continuous laterally with the fascia covering the serratus anterior muscle and infcriorly with the fascia of the abdominal wall. In ihe infraclavicular region it sinks and as the deep layer invests the pectoralis minor and subclavius muscles and then luses with the clavicle and the coracoid process of the scapula. In the axillary fossa it runs as a dense structurc from the lower border of ihe pectoralis major muscle over lo the lower border of the latissimus dorsi muscle to form the axillaryfascia *(fasaa axillans).* In the infraclavicular region part of the pectoral fascia forms a thick area called the clavipectoral fascia *(fascia clavipectoralis)* which fuses with the vessels passing under it (the subclavian artery and vein).

> 胸筋膜（fasaa pectoralis）（图285、290）。该筋膜的浅层（lamina superficialis）覆盖胸大肌的外表面。其上部与锁骨相连，中部与胸骨相连，外侧与覆盖前锯肌的筋膜相连，下部则与腹壁筋膜相连。在锁骨下区，胸筋膜向下延伸，作为深层覆盖胸小肌和肩胛下肌，然后与锁骨和肩胛骨的喙突相连。在腋窝区域，胸筋膜从胸大肌的下缘延伸至背阔肌的下缘，形成腋筋膜（fasaa axillans）。在锁骨下区，胸筋膜的一部分形成一个较厚的区域，称为锁骨上胸筋膜（fascia clavipectoralis），并与穿过其下方的血管（如锁骨下动脉和静脉）相连。

2. The endoihoracic fascia *(fascia endothoraeica)* covers the internal surface of the thoracic wall.

> 胸膜内筋膜（fascia endothoracica）覆盖胸壁的内侧表面。

## 28 THE DIAPHRAGM

> 28 膈肌

The diaphragm *(diaphragma)* (Figs 295-297) is an unpaired broad muscle closing the outlet of the thorax like a dome.

> 膈肌（diaphragma）（图295-297）是一块不成对的扁肌，形似穹顶，封闭胸腔的出口。

The fibres of the muscular part of the diaphragm arise from the inner border of the outlet of the thorax, according to which the sternal, costal, and lumbar parts are distinguished in it.

> 膈肌的肌性部分纤维起源于胸腔出口的内侧缘，据此可将其分为胸骨部、肋骨部和腰部部。

The sternal part of the diaphragm *(pars sternalis diaphragmatis)*  is the smallest. It arises from the posterior surface of the xiphoid process and is continuous with the central tendon.

> 膈的胸骨部（diaphragmatis pars sternalis）是最小的。它起自剑突的后表面，并与中央腱连续。

The costal part of the diaphragm *(pars costalis diaphragmatis)*  is also small and originates by slips from the inner surface of the bony and cartilaginous parts of the lower six ribs. Its fibres run upwards and inwards and are continuous with the central tendon.

> 膈的肋部（diaphragmatis pars costalis）也较小，由肋骨下六对骨性和软骨性部分内侧的肌束起始。其肌纤维向上并向内延伸，与中央腱连续。

The vertebral part of the diaphragm *(pars lumbalu diaphragmatis)* arises from the lumbar vertebrae and consists of two, right and left, crura *(crus dextrum* et *cms sinistrum).*

> 膈的椎部（diaphragmaticus pars lumbalis）起源于腰椎，并由左右两根脚（crus dextrum et crus sinistrum）组成。

Each crus arises from the anterolateral surface of the bodies of the first three (on the right side the first four) lumbar vertebrae and from the medial and lateral arcuate ligaments.

> 每侧 crus 起源于第一至第三（右侧还包括第四）腰椎体的前外侧表面，以及内侧和外侧弓状韧带。

The medial arcuate ligament *(ligamentum arcuatum mediate)*  stretches arch-like as a thick connective-tissue band over the anterior surface of the psoas major muscle from the body to the transverse process of the first lumbar vertebra.

> medial arcuate ligament（ligamentum arcuatum mediate）呈弓形延伸，作为一条厚实的结缔组织带，覆盖于腰大肌前表面，从椎体延伸至第一腰椎的横突。

The lateral arcuate ligament *(ligamentum arcuatum laterale)* runs over the quadratus lumborum muscle from the transverse process of the first lumbar vertebra to the twelfth rib.

> 侧弓状韧带（ligamentum arcuatum laterale）从第一腰椎的横突延伸至第十二肋，跨越腰方肌。

The median arcuate ligament *(ligamentum arcuatum medianum)*  is in front of the aortic opening.

> 中隔弧韧带（ligamentum arcuatum medianum）位于腹主动脉裂孔的前方。

The medial muscle fibres of the diaphragmatic crura pass upwards and converge to form the aortic opening *(hiatus aorticus)*  (Fig. 297) transmitting the aorta and thoracic duct. A little higher the medial muscular bundles of both crura split again to form the oesophageal opening *(hiatus esophageus)* (Figs 296, 297) transmitting the oesophagus and vagus nerves, and then pass to the cenire.

> 膈脚的内侧肌纤维向上走行并汇聚形成主动脉裂孔（hiatus aorticus）（图297），通过该孔的有主动脉和胸导管。稍高处，两侧膈脚的内侧肌束再次分开，形成食管裂孔（hiatus esophageus）（图296、297），通过该孔的有食管和迷走神经，之后肌束进入中心区域。

Besides, two paired slits form in the crura of the vertebral part of the diaphragm. One pair transmits the greater and lesser splanchnic nerves and the azygos (on the right side) and hemiazygos (on the left side) veins. The other paired slit transmits the sympathetic trunk.

> 此外，膈的椎部的 crus 部分形成两个成对的裂孔。一对裂孔传递腹腔神经丛（greater splanchnic nerve）和内脏小神经（lesser splanchnic nerve），以及在右侧的奇静脉（azygos vein）和左侧的半奇静脉（hemiazygos vein）。另一对裂孔则传递交感干（sympathetic trunk）。

More or less clearly outlined triangular slits form between the sternal and costal and between the costal and vertebral parts of the diaphragm: diaphragmatic hernias often occur here.

> 在膈的胸骨部与肋部之间、肋部与椎部之间，形成或多或少清晰的三角形裂隙：膈疝常发生于此处。

The muscular fibres of the diaphragm which are directed to the centre continue as tendons to form the central tendon *(centrum tendineum).* This area of the diaphragm is trifoliate in shape, with one leaf directed forwards (on which the heart lies) and the other two directed to the sides (the lungs are located on them). In the posterior part of the central tendon to the right of the midlinc is the vena-caval opening *(foramen venae cavae injerions)* (Figs 296, 297) which transmits the inferior vena cava.

> 膈肌中朝向中心的肌纤维继续形成中央腱（centrum tendineum）。膈肌的这一区域呈三叶形，其中一叶朝向前方（心脏位于其上），另外两叶朝向两侧（肺位于其上）。在中央腱的后部，中线右侧为下腔静脉孔（foramen venae cavae inferioris）（图296、297），该孔使下腔静脉通过。

The thoracic and abdominal surfaces of the diaphragm are covered by fasciae which in turn are covered by connective tissue. the subplcural and subpcritoneal fatty tissue, respectively. This is the foundation for the serous membrane, namely, the parietal peritoneum in the abdominal cavity and the parietal layer of the pleura and pericardium in the thoracic cavity. The lungs and heart lie on the thoracic surface of the diaphragm; the liver, stomach, and spleen are in contact with the abdominal surface; and the pancreas, duodenum, kidneys, and adrenals touch areas of the abdominal surface of the diaphragm which are not covered by the parietal peritoneum.

> 膈的胸廓面和腹腔面被筋膜覆盖，而筋膜又被结缔组织覆盖。其下方分别是肋下脂肪组织和腹膜下脂肪组织。这是浆膜层的基础，即腹腔内的壁层腹膜，以及胸腔内的壁层胸膜和心包。肺和心脏位于膈的胸廓面；肝脏、胃和脾脏与膈的腹腔面接触；而胰腺、十二指肠、肾脏和肾上腺则接触那些未被壁层腹膜覆盖的膈腹腔面区域。

A relaxed diaphragm has the shape of a bevelled spherical convexity facing the thoracic cavity with two domes, right and left, distinguished in it. The apex of the domes rises on the medioclavicular line lo the level of the fourth intercostal space on the right side, and to the level of the fifth intercostal space on the left side. When the diaphragm contracts its domes flatten out as a result of which the capacity of the thoracic cavity increases.

> 放松的膈肌呈一个斜面球形凸起，面向胸腔，其内可见左右两个穹隆。右侧穹隆顶部位于胸骨旁线第四肋间隙水平，左侧穹隆顶部位于胸骨旁线第五肋间隙水平。当膈肌收缩时，穹隆变平，从而使胸腔容积增加。

Action: the diaphragm is the main muscle of respiration which on contraction becomes flat and thus promotes inspiration but becomes spherically convex during expiration.

> 动作：膈肌是呼吸的主要肌肉，收缩时变平，从而促进吸气；而在呼气时则呈球状凸起。

Blood supply: the pericardiacophrenic artery, phrenic branches of the descending thoracic aorta, inferior phrenic, and musculophrenic arteries.

> 血供：心包膈动脉、胸主动脉降部的膈支、下肋膈动脉和肌膈动脉。

In nervation: phrenic nerves (C<sup>3</sup> -C<sup>5</sup> ).

> 在神经支配方面：膈神经（C<sup>3</sup> -C<sup>5</sup>）。

## 29 **MUSCLES AND FASCIAE OF THE ABDOMEN**

> 29 腹部肌肉与筋膜

## 30 **REGIONS OF THE ABDOMEN**

> 腹部30个区域

The following regions of the abdomen *(regiones abdominis)* are distinguished (see Fig. 284). The upper part of the abdomen (epigastrium) has an epigastric region *(regio epigaslrica)* and two lateral, right and left hypochondriac regions *(regio hypochondriaca dacha* et *sinutra).* In the middle part of the abdomen (mesogastrium) are distinguished two lateral abdominal (right and left) regions *(regio lateralis dextra* et *sinistra)* and a middle, umbilical region *(regio umbilicalis).* The lower part of the abdomen (hypogastrium) has two lateral regions called the inguinal (right and left) regions *(regio inguinalis dextra* et *sinistra)* and a middle, pubic region *(regio pubica;.*

> 腹部可分为以下区域（腹部分区，regiones abdominis）（见图284）。腹部上部（上腹部，epigastrium）包括一个上腹部区域（上腹区，regio epigastrica）以及两个侧部区域，即右侧肋下区（右肋下区，regio hypochondriaca dextra）和左侧肋下区（左肋下区，regio hypochondriaca sinistra）。腹部中部（中腹部，mesogastrium）包括两个侧部区域，即右侧腹部区（右腹部区，regio lateralis dextra）和左侧腹部区（左腹部区，regio lateralis sinistra），以及一个中部区域，即脐区（脐区，regio umbilicalis）。腹部下部（下腹部，hypogastrium）包括两个侧部区域，即右侧腹股沟区（右腹股沟区，regio inguinalis dextra）和左侧腹股沟区（左腹股沟区，regio inguinalis sinistra），以及一个中部区域，即耻骨区（耻区，regio pubica）。

Right and left costal arches *(arms costalis dexter* et *sinister)* arc clearly outlined when the abdominal wall is pulled in. The xiphoid process is felt in the angle formed by the cartilaginous costal arches, which is called the infrasternal angle *(angulus infrasternalis).*  The inguinal folds corresponding to the position of the inguinal ligaments are distinctly seen in the lower part of the abdominal wall. When the abdominal muscles are tensed a groove forms on the midline which corresponds to the Hnea alba abdominis, The umbilicus is on the linea alba on the level of the articulation between the third and fourth lumbar vertebrae.

> 右侧和左侧肋弓（右肋骨弓和左肋骨弓）在腹壁被拉紧时轮廓清晰可见。在由软骨性肋弓形成的夹角处可触及剑突，此夹角称为肋弓下角（肋弓下角）。在腹部下部可见对应腹股沟韧带位置的腹股沟褶皱。当腹肌紧张时，正中线上形成一条沟，该沟对应腹白线（linea alba abdominis）。脐位于第三腰椎和第四腰椎关节水平的腹白线上。

The rectus abdominis muscles are outlined to both sides of the midline; the tendinous intersections *(intersections tendineae)* of these muscles are defined clearly as three or four transverse constrictions.

> 腹直肌在中线两侧被勾勒出来；这些肌肉的腱性交界处（腱性交界）清晰地表现为三到四个横行的束带。

The slips of the external oblique muscle alternating with slips of the serratus anterior muscle and longissimus dorsi muscle are outlined on the upper part of the anterolateral portion of the thoracic wall.

> 胸廓前外侧部上部可见外斜肌的肌束与前锯肌和最长肌的肌束相间排列。

## 31 MUSCLES OF THE ABDOMEN

> 31 腹部肌肉

The muscles of the abdomen *(muscuti abdominis)* may be separated topographically into muscles of the lateral, anterior, and posterior abdominal wall.

> 腹部肌肉（腹肌）可根据其解剖位置分为侧腹壁肌肉、前腹壁肌肉和后腹壁肌肉。

The muscles of the lateral abdominal wall are as follows: (1) the external oblique muscle *(muscutus obliquus abdominis externus)\* (2) the internal oblique muscle *(musculus obliquus abdominis in-* *ternus);* (3) the transversus abdominis muscle *(musculus transversus abdominis).* The muscles of the anterior abdominal wall are: (1) the rectus abdominis muscle *(musculus rectus abdominis);* (2) the pyramidalis muscle *(musculus pyramidalis).*

> 侧腹壁的肌肉包括以下部分：(1) 腹外斜肌（musculus obliquus abdominis externus）；(2) 腹内斜肌（musculus obliquus abdominis internus）；(3) 腹横肌（musculus transversus abdominis）。前腹壁的肌肉包括：(1) 腹直肌（musculus rectus abdominis）；(2) 腹横肌（mus, 腹直肌（musculus rectus abdominis）；(2) 腹横肌（musculus transversus abdominis）。[!note]- 术语说明 “pyramidalis muscle” 通常译作“锥体肌”，是腹直肌的辅助肌，功能为协助腹直肌收缩。

The quadratus lumborum muscle *(musculus quadratus lumborum)* is related to the muscles of the posterior abdominal wall.

> 腰方肌（musculus quadratus lumborum）与后腹壁的肌肉相关。

#### 31.1.1 MUSCLES OF TH E LATERAL ABDOMINAL WALL

> 31.1.1 腹外斜肌等侧腹壁肌肉

The muscles of the lateral abdominal wall are arranged in three layers. The external oblique muscle lies superficially, the internal oblique muscle lies deeper, and the transversus abdominis muscle occupies the deepest position.

> 腹外侧肌群分为三层排列。浅层为腹外斜肌，中层为腹内斜肌，深层为腹横肌。

All these muscles are related to the broad muscles of the abdomen. On the anterior abdominal wall they are continuous with aponeuroses.

> 所有这些肌肉均与腹壁的广义腹肌相关联。在腹前壁，它们与腱膜连续。

1. The external oblique muscle of the abdomen *(musculus obliquus abdominis externus)* (Figs 285, 287, 289, 299) is flat and broad and arises from the lateral surface of the lower eight ribs by eight slips. On the anterolateral surface of the thorax the upper five slips are wedged between the lower slips of the scrratus anterior muscle, while the lower three slips arc between those of the longissimus dorsi muscle. The fibres of the external oblique muscle are directed obliquely downwards and forwards to be continuous with the aponeurosis. The upper part of the aponeurosis extends to the midline and contributes to the formation of the anterior wall of the sheath of the rectus abdominis muscle. The bundles of the aponeurosis of the external oblique muscle, like those of all the broad abdominal muscles, interlace with the bundles of the aponeuroses of the contralateral muscle and thus help to form the linea alba.

> 腹外斜肌（musculus obliquus abdominis externus）（见图285、287、289、299）呈扁平宽广，由下部八对肋骨的外侧表面发出八条肌束。在胸廓的前外侧面上，上部的五条肌束位于前锯肌下部肌束之间，而下部的三条肌束则位于最长肌下部肌束之间。腹外斜肌的肌纤维呈斜向下前方方向走行，并与腱膜连续。腱膜的上部延伸至正中线，参与构成腹直肌鞘的前壁。腹外斜肌腱膜的束与所有阔腹肌的腱膜束相交织，与对侧肌肉的腱膜束共同形成白线（linea alba）。

The lower slips of the external oblique muscle arc inserted into the anterior part of the outer lip of the iliac crest. The middle fibres of the aponeurosis bridge the anterior notch of the hip bone and are stretched between the anterior superior iliac spine and the pubis; the lower border of the aponeurosis folds back on itself (it is reflected) to form a groove. This thick lower border of the aponeurosis stretching between the anterior superior iliac spine and the pubic tubercle and symphysis is called the inguinal ligament *(ligamentum inguinale).* The fibres of this ligament separate at the pubic bone to form two crura. One is the medial, or superior cms *(cms mediate)* which is attached to the symphysis with some of the fibres passing over to the contralateral side, the other is the lateral, or inferior cms *(cms laterale)* and is attached to the pubic tubercle on the same side. A triangular cleft forms between the crura; the superolateral angle of the cleft is rounded by curving inlercrural fibres *(fibrae intercruraUs).* Fibres separate from the inner part of the inferior cms and pass inwardly and medially to the anterior layer of the sheath of the rectus abdominis muscle; this is the reflected

> 腹外斜肌的下部肌束弧形附着于髂嵴外侧缘的前部。腹外斜肌腱膜的中层纤维跨过髋骨的前部凹陷，连接于前上髂棘与耻骨之间；腱膜的下缘向内折叠（即反折）形成沟槽。连接前上髂棘与耻骨联合的腱膜下缘增厚部分称为腹股沟韧带（ligamentum inguinale）。该韧带的纤维在耻骨处分开形成两个韧带：一个是内侧的、上部的（cms mediate），其部分纤维附着于耻骨联合，并有部分纤维延伸至对侧；另一个是外侧的、下部的（cms laterale），其纤维附着于同侧的耻骨结节。两个韧带之间形成一个三角形的裂隙；裂隙的上外角由内侧韧带纤维（fibrae intercrurales）弯曲形成而变得圆钝。来自下部韧带内侧的纤维向内、向中线延伸，附着于腹直肌鞘的前层；这部分称为反折的韧带纤维。

part of the inguinal ligament *(ligamentum rejlexum).* The oval opening formed in the aponeurosis of the external oblique muscle by the two crura of the inguinal ligament, the intercrural fibres, and the reflected part is the superficial inguinal ring *(anulus inguinalis superfidalis).* It transmits the spermatic cord *(funiculus sbermaticus)*  in males (Fig. 301) and the round ligament of the uterus *(ligamentum teres uteri)* in females (Fig. 302). (In pathological cases organs may protrude from this opening and inguinal hernia forms.) A bundle separates from the medial end of the lateral crus and runs backwards and laterally on the border of the superior pubic rain us. It rounds off the sharp angle between the inguinal ligament and the pubic bone and is called the lacunar ligament *(ligamentum lacunare),* or pectincal part of the inguinal ligament.

> 腹股沟韧带（ligamentum reflexum）的一部分。由腹股沟韧带的两个脚、脚间纤维以及反射部分在腹外斜肌腱膜上形成的椭圆形裂孔称为浅层腹股沟环（anulus inguinalis superficialis）。在男性，该环通过精索（funiculus spermaticus）（图301）；在女性，则通过子宫圆韧带（ligamentum teres uteri）（图302）。（在病理情况下，器官可能由此裂孔突出，形成腹股沟疝。）从腹股沟韧带外侧脚的内侧端分出一束纤维，向后外侧行于上部耻骨支的边缘。该束纤维使腹股沟韧带与耻骨之间的锐角变得圆钝，称为镰状韧带（ligamentum lacunare），亦称为腹股沟韧带的耻骨部。

A triangular area forms in the wall of the trunk to the back of the posterior border of the external oblique muscle above the iliac crest; it is called the lumbar triangle *(trigonum lumbale)* (see *Muscles of the Back).*

> 在腹外斜肌后缘上方、髂嵴的后方，躯干壁形成一个三角形区域，称为腰三角（trigonum lumbale）（参见《背部肌肉》）。

Action: the external oblique muscle is a muscle of the preluin abdominale; contraction of one muscle rotates the trunk to the other side; with the pelvis fixed contraction of both muscles pulls the chest and flexes the vertebral column.

> 动作：腹外斜肌是腹直肌的辅助肌；一侧肌肉收缩可使躯干向另一侧旋转；骨盆固定时，两侧肌肉同时收缩可牵引胸廓并使脊柱前屈。

Blood supply: the intercostal, lateral ihorucic and the superficial circumflex iliac arteries.

> 血供：肋间动脉、外侧腹壁动脉和浅层腹股沟动脉。

Innervalion: intercostal nerves (fifth to twelfth), the lumbar nerve (Th<sup>5</sup> -Th| ? , L,).

> 支配神经：肋间神经（第五至第十二对），腰神经（T5-T12，L）。

2. The internal oblique muscle *(musculus obliquus abdominis internus)* (Figs 288-290, 299, 304) is broad and flat and located medially of the extenial oblique muscle in the anterolatcral part of the abdominal wall. It arises from the lateral two thirds of the inguinal ligament, intermediate area of the iliac crest, and the lumbar fascia (at the junction of its two layers). Its fibres spread fanlike, mainly obliquely, upwards and forwards; the lower fibres run almost horizontally and obliquely downwards and forwards. They give off fine fibres which descend along the spermatic cord and form part of the cremaster muscle (see Fig. 304) which elevates the testis. The posterior fibres of the internal oblique muscle run almost vertically to be inserted into the external surface of the lower three or four ribs. The remaining fibres end as an aponeurosis which extends to the lateral border of the rectus abdominis muscle and separates into two layers investing the muscle anteriorly and posteriorly to take part in the formation of its sheath. The aponeurosis of the internal oblique muscle contributes to the formation of the posterior wall of the rectus abdominis sheath only in the upper two thirds, to the level of the arcuate fine *(linea arcuata).* On the midlinc the bands of the anterior and posterior layers intertwine with those of the fellow layers on the contralateral side to form the linea alba (see *Sheath of the Rectus Abdominis Muscle).*

> 内斜肌（musculus obliquus abdominis internus）（图288-290、299、304）呈宽而扁平状，位于腹壁前外侧部的外斜肌内侧。其起始于腹股沟韧带的外侧三分之二、髂嵴的中间区域以及腰背筋膜（两层交界处）。其肌束呈扇形分布，主要呈斜方向向上前方延伸；下部肌束几乎水平并向斜下方前方延伸。这些肌束发出细小的肌束，沿精索下行，形成提睾肌的一部分（见图304），用于提睾。内斜肌的后部肌束几乎垂直地附着于下三至四根肋骨的外侧表面。其余肌束则终止于腱膜，该腱膜延伸至腹直肌的外侧缘，并分为前层和后层，包裹腹直肌的前后两侧，参与形成腹直肌鞘。内斜肌的腱膜仅在腹直肌鞘的上三分之二部分，即弓状线（linea arcuata）水平，参与构成腹直肌鞘的后壁。在正中线处，前后层的筋膜带与对侧同层筋膜带交织，形成白线（linea alba）（见腹直肌鞘）。

Action: the internal oblique muscle is part of the prelum abdominale; contraction of one muscle rotates the trunk to the same side.

> 动作：腹内斜肌是腹直肌的一部分；一侧腹内斜肌收缩时，使躯干向同侧旋转。

Blood supply: the intercostal, inferior and superior epigastric, and musculophrcnic arteries.

> 供血：肋间动脉、腹壁下动脉和腹壁上动脉，以及肌膈动脉。

Innervalion: intercostal nerves (eighth to twelfth), iliohypogastric and ilioinguinal nerves.

> 支配神经：肋间神经（第8至第12对）、髂腹下神经和髂腹股沟神经。

3. The transversus abdominis muscle *(musculus transversus abdominis)* (Figs 290-292, 295, 299, 305) is flat and broad and occupies the deepest position in the anterolatcral part of the abdominal wall. It arises from the inner surfaces of the lower six costal cartilages (where its slips are wedged between the slips of the costal part of the diaphragm), the lumbar fascia, the inner lip of the iliac crest, and the lateral two thirds of the inguinal ligament. Its fibres run horizontally forwards and end in an aponeurosis before they reach the lateral border of the rectus abdominis muscle. Above the arcuate line the aponeurosis lies behind the rectus abdominis, below the line it extends over the anterior surface of the muscle. On the midline the fibres of the aponeurosis contribute to the formation of the linea alba. A few fibres separate from the lower parts of the transversus muscle and meet similar fibres of the internal oblique muscle to form the cremaster muscle.

> 腹横肌（musculus transversus abdominis）（图290-292、295、299、305）呈扁平宽广状，位于腹壁前外侧部的最深处。其起始部位于下六对肋软骨的内侧表面（此处其肌束被楔夹于膈肌肋部的肌束之间），腰筋膜、髂嵴内侧缘以及腹股沟韧带的外侧三分之二。其肌纤维水平向前走行，在到达腹直肌的外侧缘之前终止于腱膜。在弓状线以上，腱膜位于腹直肌的后方；在弓状线以下，腱膜则覆盖于腹直肌的前表面。在正中线处，腱膜的纤维参与形成白线。部分腹横肌的纤维从下部分离，与腹内斜肌的相似纤维结合形成提睾肌。

A laterally convex line forms at the junction of the muscular fibres with the aponeurosis; it is called the linea semilunaris (Fig. 291). It is behind the rectus abdominis muscle in the upper part and lateral to the lateral border of the muscle for the remaining distance.

> 在肌肉纤维与腱膜相交处形成一条向外凸起的线，称为半月线（Fig. 291）。在上部，该线位于腹直肌后方，而在其余部分则位于腹直肌外侧边的外侧。

Action: the transversus abdominis muscle is part of the prelum abdominale; it flattens the abdominal wall and brings the lower parts of the chest closer to each other.

> 作用：腹横肌是腹直肌的一部分；它使腹壁变平，并使胸部下部彼此靠近。

Blood supply: the superior and inferior epigastric and musculophrcnic arteries.

> 血供：腹壁上动脉和腹壁下动脉、肌膈动脉。

Innervalion: intercostal (seventh to twelfth), iliohypogastric, and ilioinguinal nerves.

> 支配神经：肋间神经（第七至第十二对）、髂腹下神经和髂腹股沟神经。

#### 31.1.2 MUSCLES OF TH E ANTERIOR ABDOMINAL WALL

> 31.1.2 前腹壁肌肉

1. The rectus abdominis muscle *(musculus rectus abdominis)* (Figs 290-292, 295, 306, 307) is paired, flat and related to the long muscles of the abdomen. It is in the anterior part of the abdominal wall to both sides of the iinea alba which stretches on the midlinc from the xiphoid process to the pubic symphysis. The rectus abdominis muscle arises from the fifth, sixth, and seventh costal cartilages and the xiphoid process; running downwards it becomes narrower and is inserted into the pubic bone in the space between the pubic symphysis and tubercle. The muscle fibres are interrupted by three or four transverse tendinous intersections *(intersec-* *tiones tendineae),* two of which are above the umbilicus, one is on the level with it, while the poorly developed fourth intersection is sometimes below the umbilicus.

> 腹直肌（musculus rectus abdominis）（图290-292、295、306、307）为成对的扁平肌，与腹腔内长肌相关联。其位于腹壁的前部，两侧围绕着自剑突延伸至耻骨联合的白线（linea alba）。腹直肌起自第五、第六和第七肋软骨以及剑突；向下延伸时逐渐变细，最终插入于耻骨联合与耻骨结节之间的耻骨体上。肌纤维被三至四个横行的腱性交界（intersec-tiones tendineae）所中断，其中两个位于脐上方，一个与脐平齐，而发育较差的第四个交界有时位于脐下方。

2. The pyramidalis muscle *(musculus pyramidalis}*  (Figs 290-292, 300, 304, 306) is paired, triangular, and varies in size. It arises from the pubic bone in front of the insertion of the rectus abdominis muscle. Its fibres converge and run upwards to be inserted into the lower parts of the linea alba at various levels.

> pyramidalis肌（musculus pyramidalis）（图290-292、300、304、306）为成对的三角形肌肉，大小不一。其起始于腹直肌附着点前方的耻骨上支。其肌纤维向上汇聚，最终分别在不同水平插入腹直肌腱膜的下部。

Both muscles, the rectus and the pyramidalis, are enclosed in the sheath of the rectus abdominis muscle *(vagina musculi recti ab-*

> 这两块肌肉，腹直肌和腹横肌，均被腹直肌鞘（vagina musculi recti）包裹。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_315_Picture_2.jpeg)

## 32 *Muscles of the trunk;* anterior aspect (%).

> 32 躯干肌肉；前侧（%）

(The external oblique muscle and part of the pectoralis major muscle are removed on the right; the external and internal oblique muscles and part of the pectoralis major muscle are removed on the left; the greater part of the anterior layer of the sheath of the rectus abdominis muscles is also removed.)

> （右侧的外斜肌和部分胸大肌被切除；左侧的外斜肌、内斜肌和部分胸大肌被切除；腹直肌鞘前层的大部分也被切除。）

![](_page_316_Figure_2.jpeg)

## 33 *Muscles of the trunk;* anterior aspect (J4).

> 33 躯干肌肉；前侧（J4）

(The pectoralis major, external and internal oblique, and rectus abdominis muscles are removed on the right; the superficial muscles of the chest, the external and internal oblique muscles, and part of the rectus abdominis muscle are removed on the left.)

> （右侧胸大肌、外斜肌、内斜肌和腹直肌被切除；左侧胸部浅层肌肉、外斜肌、内斜肌以及腹直肌的一部分被切除。）

*dominis)* (Figs 285, 290. 291, 295, 300, 306) which is formed by the aponeuroses of the broad abdominal muscles.

> （见图285、290、291、295、300、306）由腹直肌的腱膜形成。

Action: they are part of the prclum abdomiualc; ilex the trunk forwards; the pyramidalis muscle, in addition, tenses the linea alba.

> 动作：它们是腹直肌的一部分；髂肌使躯干向前弯曲；此外，腹横肌还能紧张脐正中线。

Blood supply: rectus abdominis muscle —the superior and inferior epigastric arteries; pyramidalis muscle —the cremasteric and inferior epigastric arteries.

> 血供：腹直肌——上腹壁动脉和下腹壁动脉；腹横肌——精索动脉和下腹壁动脉。

Iimervation: intercostal and lumbar nerves (Th<sup>5</sup> -Th1 2 ; L,).

> 支配：肋间神经和腰神经（Th<sup>5</sup> -Th<sub>12</sub>；L<sub>1</sub>）[!note]- 术语说明
“Th<sup>5</sup> -Th<sub>12</sub>；L<sub>1</sub>” 中的“Th”代表胸神经（Thoracic nerve），即胸段脊神经；“L”代表腰神经（Lumbar nerve），即腰段脊神经。此处表示第5至第12胸神经以及第1腰神经。

The broad and long muscles of the abdominal wall are the muscles of the trunk and cause the following movements: by lowering the ribs they take part in the act of respiration; they change the position of the vertebral column; contraction of all muscles (except for the transversus abdominis) pulls the chest downwards and flexes the vertebral column forwards; contraction of muscles on

> 腹壁宽阔而长的肌肉属于躯干肌肉，可引起以下运动：通过降低肋骨，它们参与呼吸动作；改变椎骨柱的位置；除腹横肌外，所有肌肉的收缩会将胸腔向下拉并使椎骨柱向前弯曲；位于腹壁的肌肉收缩时，可...

one side flexes the vertebral column laterally. Unilateral contraction of the external oblique muscle rotates the vertebral column to the contralatcral side; contraction of the internal oblique muscle rotates it to the side of the contracting muscle. The muscles of the abdominal wall and the diaphragm maintain the intra-abdominal pressure at a certain level by their tonus, which is important for holding the abdominal organs in a definite position. When the tonus of the muscles of the abdominal wall reduces (atony) intra-abdominal pressure drops as a result of which the organs are displaced downwards (ptosis) by their own weight and their function is disturbed as a consequence. Contraction of the muscles of the abdominal wall reduces the capacity of the abdominal cavity and the organs are compressed, which helps in their evacuation (defaecalion, urination, childbirth). In view of this the muscles of the abdominal wall are called prclum abdominale.

> 一侧肌肉收缩可使椎骨列向侧方屈曲。单侧腹外斜肌收缩会使椎骨列向对侧旋转；单侧腹内斜肌收缩则会使椎骨列向收缩肌所在的一侧旋转。腹壁肌肉和膈肌通过其张力维持腹腔内压力处于一定水平，这对于维持腹腔内器官处于固定位置具有重要意义。当腹壁肌肉的张力降低（肌张力减退）时，腹腔内压力下降，导致器官因自身重力向下移位（下垂），从而影响其功能。腹壁肌肉的收缩可减少腹腔容积，使器官受到挤压，这有助于排便、排尿和分娩。鉴于此，腹壁肌肉被称为“腹压肌”（primum abdominale）。

## 34 MUSCLES O F TH E POSTERIOR ABDOMINAL WALL

> 34 腹后壁肌肉

The quadratus lumborum muscle *(musculus quadratus lumborum)* (Figs 292, 297, 298, 299) is flat and fills the space between the twelfth rib and the iliac crest; it lies on the posterior abdominal wall and is separated from the deep muscles of the back by the deep layer of the lumbar fascia. The muscle is made up of two parts, anterior and posterior. The anterior part stretches from the internal lip of the iliac crest and iliolumbar ligament to the twelfth rib and twelfth thoracic vertebra and also to the medial arcuate ligament. The posterior part extends from the iliac crest and iliolumbar ligament to the transverse processes of the upper four lumbar vertebrae.

> 腰方肌（musculus quadratus lumborum）（图292、297、298、299）呈扁平状，位于第十二肋与髂嵴之间的间隙内；它位于后腹壁，被腰筋膜深层分隔，与背部深层肌肉分开。该肌可分为前部和后部两部分。前部起自髂嵴内侧缘和髂腰韧带，止于第十二肋、第十二胸椎以及 medial arcuate ligament（ medial 弓状韧带）。后部起自髂嵴和髂腰韧带，止于上四节腰椎的横突。

Action: pulls the ilium upwards and the twelfth rib downwards; contributes to lateral flexion of the lumbar vertebral column; contraction of both muscles pulls the lumbar spine backwards.

> 作用：牵拉髂骨向上，第十二肋向下；参与腰椎骨柱的侧屈运动；两块肌肉同时收缩时，可使腰椎向后弯曲。

Blood supply: the subcostal, lumbar, and iliolumbar arteries. Innervation: intercostal and lumbar nerves (Th^ , I-1-L3).

> 血供：肋下动脉、腰动脉和髂腰动脉。神经支配：肋间神经和腰神经（T11-L3）。

## 35 APONEUROSES AND FASCIAE OF THE ABDOMEN

> 35 腹部筋膜与腱膜

#### 35.1.1 T H E SHEATH OF TH E RECTUS ABDOMINIS MUSCLE

> 35.1.1 腹直肌鞘

Each of the two rectus abdominis muscles is invested in its sheath *(vagina musculi recti abdominis)* (Figs 285, 290, 291, 295, 300, 306, 307) formed by the aponeuroses of the throe broad muscles of the abdominal wall. The sheath has an anterior and a posterior lamina *(laminae anterior* et *posterior)',* the posterior lamina exists only in the upper two thirds of the muscle but is absent in the lower part below the arcuate line (Figs 291, 295, 300, 307) so that the posterior surface of the rectus abdominis muscles rests here on the fascia transversalis (Figs 295, 306). The arcuate line is convex upwards and is 4-5 cm below the umbilicus.

> 每侧腹直肌均被其筋膜鞘（腹直肌鞘，vagina musculi recti abdominis）包裹（图285、290、291、295、300、306、307），该鞘由腹壁的三块阔肌的腱膜形成。该鞘具有前层和后层（前层与后层，laminae anterior et posterior），后层仅存在于腹直肌上部的三分之二部分，而在脐以下的弧形线以下部分则不存在（图291、295、300、307），因此腹直肌的后表面在此处直接接触腹横筋膜（图295、306）。弧形线向上凸起，位于脐平面下4～5 cm处。

Above the arcuate line the anterior wall of the sheath is formed by fibres of the aponeurosis of the external oblique muscle and the anterior layer of the aponeurosis of the internal oblique muscle; the posterior wall is formed by the posterior layer of the aponeurosis of the internal oblique muscle, the aponeurosis of the transversus abdominis muscle and uppermost by muscle fibres of this muscle. Below the arcuate line the aponeuroses of the three muscles form a thicker anterior wall of the sheath, but there is no posterior layer below this line and only the fascia transversalis is found here.

> 在弓状线以上，鞘的前壁由腹外斜肌腱膜的纤维和腹内斜肌腱膜的前层构成；后壁则由腹内斜肌腱膜的后层、腹横肌腱膜以及该肌最上部的肌纤维构成。在弓状线以下，三块肌肉的腱膜共同形成较厚的鞘前壁，但在此线以下没有后层，仅见腹直肌鞘的腹横筋膜。

#### 35.1.2 T H E LINEA ALBA

> 35.1.2 白线

The linea alba (Figs 285, 300, 302, 303) has the appearance of a tendinous band stretching from the xiphoid process to the pubic symphysis. It is 1-2 cm wide in the upper part of the abdominal wall and considerably narrows in the lower parts but is thicker here being reinforced on the inner surface by a connective-tissue structure called the adminiculum lineae albae. The linea alba is formed by interlacing fibres of the aponeuroses of the three pairs of broad abdominal muscles. In the upper part, where it is thinner

> 白线（图285、300、302、303）呈一条肌腱样带状结构，从剑突延伸至耻骨联合。在腹部上部，白线宽约1-2 cm，而在下部则明显变窄，但此处反而增厚，其内侧表面由一种称为“白线腱膜”的结缔组织结构加强。白线由三组腹直肌的腱膜交织形成。在上部，其较薄，[!note]- 术语说明  
“linea alba” 通常译作“白线”，是腹部正中线的结构，由腹直肌腱膜交织而成。

and wider, more or less defined slits are left between the interlacing fibres, through which herniations may occur. Approximately on the middle of the linea alba is the umbilical ring *(anulus umbilicalis)* which is filled by loose cicatricial tissue called the navel *(umbilicus* s. *umbo).* In the intrauterine developmental period in place of the navel was a round opening transmitting the umbilical vein and arteries. A hernia often occurs here.

> 并且在交织的纤维之间留下更宽、边界较不明确的裂隙，疝气可能由此发生。在白线的中段大约位置是脐环（脐环），其内填充着疏松的瘢痕组织，称为脐（脐点）。在胎儿发育期间，脐环的位置原本是一个圆形的开口，通过该开口传递脐静脉和脐动脉。此处常常发生疝气。

#### 35.1.3 FASCIAE O F TH E ABDOMEN

> 35.1.3 腹部筋膜

The following fasciae are developed best in the abdominal wall (Figs 285, 295, 299).

> 腹壁中以下筋膜发育最为明显（图285、295、299）。

- 1. The superficial fascia of the abdomen is thin in the upper part of the abdominal wall but much thicker in the lower parts and is distinguished by the presence of elastic fibres. It fuses with the Itiic -i alba on the midline and with the inguinal ligament inferiorly. Two thick bands form in the lower part above the symphysis, these are called the ligaments of the penis. There are two of them: (a) the fundiform ligament of the penis *(ligamentum fundiforme penis)* arising from the pubic symphysis and giving off two crura which pass on the sides of the penis, and (b) the suspensory ligament of the penis (the suspensory ligament of the clitoris in females) *(ligamentum suspensorium penis* et *ligamentum suspensorium clitoridis)* stretching from the pubic symphysis to the dorsal surface of the penis (clitor). The fascial bands in the region of these ligaments are reinforced partly by tendinous bands of the rectus abdominis and external oblique muscles.
  - 2. The fascia iliaca (see *Fasciae of the Pelvis and Thigh).*
- 3. The transversalis fascia *(fascia transversalis)* covers the inner surface of the transversus abdominis muscle and the inner surface of the posterior lamina of the rectus abdominis sheath; below the arcuate line it covers the inner, posterior, surface of the rectus abdominis. Inferiorly it fuses with the borders of the inguinal ligament which is reflected to the back and upwards. The transversalis fascia is thicker in the region of the umbilicus and is called here the umbilical fascia. Concentrated longitudinal bands in the lower part of the linea alba form the adminiculum lineae albae for its support. In the inguinal region the transversalis fascia forms a funnel-like protrusion lodging the processus vaginalis of the peritoneum which passes along the spermatic cord into the scrotum; in-

> 腹壁的浅筋膜在腹壁上部较薄，而在下部则明显增厚，并因其含有弹性纤维而具有弹性。该筋膜在中线处与腹直肌鞘的白线融合，在下方则与腹股沟韧带相连。在脐以下、耻骨联合上方的下部，形成两条较厚的筋膜束，称为阴茎韧带。阴茎韧带共有两条：(a) 阴茎的足弓韧带（penis fundiform ligament，ligamentum fundiforme penis），起自耻骨联合，发出两个阴茎脚，沿阴茎两侧延伸；(b) 阴茎的悬韧带（在女性则为阴蒂的悬韧带，即clitoris suspensory ligament，ligamentum suspensorium penis et ligamentum suspensorium clitoridis），从耻骨联合延伸至阴茎（阴蒂）的背侧。在这些韧带区域的筋膜束部分由腹直肌和腹外斜肌的腱性束加强。

腹股沟筋膜（参见骨盆和大腿的筋膜）。

腹横筋膜（transversalis fascia）覆盖腹横肌的内侧表面以及腹直肌鞘后层的内侧表面；在脐带线以下，它覆盖腹直肌的内侧和后侧表面。在下方，它与腹股沟韧带的边缘融合，该韧带向后上方延伸。腹横筋膜在脐部区域较厚，称为脐筋膜。白线的下部出现集中纵向的筋膜束，形成白线的脐状线（linea alba’s umbilical line）以提供支持。在腹股沟区域，腹横筋膜形成一个漏斗状的突起，容纳腹膜的鞘突（processus vaginalis），该鞘突沿精索进入阴囊；

vesting the spermatic cord and testis this protrusion of the transversalis fascia is called the internal spermatic fascia *(fascia spermatica interna).* The dilated oval depression on the surface of the transversalis fascia is the deep inguinal ring (opening of the inguinal canal) *(anulus inguinalis profundus).* The medial border of this ring, which is most pronounced due to thickening of the fascia, is called the interfoveolar ligament *(ligamentum interfovcolare).*  On the inner surface of the subperitoneal fascia lies the peritoneum. A series of folds (Fig. 307) are seen on the peritoneum of the anterior abdominal wall along the distribution of the ligaments and vessels in the prcperitoneal fatty tissue. An unpaired median umbilical fold *(plica umbilicalis mediana)* passes on the midline from the apex of the urinary bladder to the umbilicus; it forms along the course of the obliterated embryonal urachus. To each side of the median folds is a medial umbilical fold *(plica umbilicalis medialis)*  which runs from the lateral surface of the bladder to the umbilicus; it forms along the course of the obliterated embryonal umbilical artery. Still further laterally is the paired lateral umbilical fold *(plica umbilicalis lateralis)* stretching along the distribution of the inferior epigastric artery and veins.

> 覆盖睾丸和精索的这一腹横筋膜突起称为精索内筋膜（fascia spermatica interna）。腹横筋膜表面的扩大椭圆形凹陷称为深环（腹股沟管的深部开口）（anulus inguinalis profundus）。由于筋膜增厚，该环的内侧缘最为明显，称为腹股沟镰（ligamentum interfoveolare）。在壁腹膜的内侧面上覆盖着腹膜。在前腹壁腹膜上，沿腹膜后脂肪组织中筋膜和血管的分布可见一系列褶皱（图307）。一条未配对的中脐褶（plica umbilicalis mediana）沿中线从膀胱尖延伸至脐部，其形成路径为闭锁的胚胎脐尿管。中脐褶两侧为一对中脐褶（plica umbilicalis medialis），从膀胱的外侧面向脐延伸，其形成路径为闭锁的胚胎脐动脉。更靠外侧的是成对的侧脐褶（plica umbilicalis lateralis），沿下腹壁动脉及其静脉的分布延伸。

Depressions called fossae are seen between the folds in the lower part of the inner surface of the anterior abdominal wall. Lateral to the lateral umbilical fold is the lateral inguinal fossa *(fossa inguinalis lateralis)* which corresponds to the deep inguinal ring. Between the medial and lateral folds is the middle inguinal fossa *(fossa inguinalis medialis)* corresponding to the superficial inguinal ring. The supravesical fossa *(fossa supravesicalis)* is between the medial and median umbilical folds. Viscera may protrude (hernias) through these fossae and after passing through the abdominal wall the herniation emerges through the external (superficial) inguinal ring.

> 称为凹陷的窝（fossa）可见于前腹壁内侧表面下部的褶皱之间。脐的外侧褶（lateral umbilical fold）外侧为外侧腹股沟窝（fossa inguinalis lateralis），其对应于深腹股沟环。位于内侧褶与外侧褶之间的为中腹股沟窝（fossa inguinalis medialis），对应于浅腹股沟环。膀胱上窝（fossa supravesicalis）位于内侧脐褶与中脐褶之间。内脏可能通过这些窝突出（疝），经过腹壁后，疝内容物通过外（浅）腹股沟环突出。

#### 35.1.4 **THE INGUINAL CANAL**

> 35.1.4 腹股沟管

The inguinal canal *(canalis inguinalis)* (Figs 301-307) is a passage on the lower part of the abdominal wall. It contains the spermatic cord in the male and the round ligament of the uterus in the female. The canal runs obliquely. From the superficial inguinal ring above the anterior part of the superior ramus of the pubic bone it passes laterally, upwards and slightly backwards to the deep inguinal ring located 1-1.5 cm above the medial part of the inguinal ligament. The canal is 4-5 cm long.

> 腹股沟管（canalis inguinalis）（图301-307）是腹壁下部的一个通道。男性腹股沟管内通过精索，女性则通过子宫圆韧带。该管呈斜行方向。从耻骨联合上部前缘的浅层腹股沟环开始，腹股沟管向侧方、上方及略向后方向延伸，最终到达位于腹股沟韧带中点上方1-1.5 cm处的深层腹股沟环。腹股带的长度约为4-5 cm。

The walls of the inguinal canal are as follows: (a) the anterior wall formed by the aponeurosis of the external oblique muscle; (b) the posterior wall formed by the transversalis fascia; (c) the inferior wall formed by the reflected part of the inguinal ligament; (d) the superior wall formed by the lower borders of the internal oblique and transversus abdominis muscles.

> 腹股沟管的壁如下：(a) 前壁由腹外斜肌的腱膜形成；(b) 后壁由腹横筋膜形成；(c) 下壁由腹股沟韧带的反射部分形成；(d) 上壁由腹内斜肌和腹横肌的下缘形成。

The superficial (external) inguinal ring *(anulus inguinalis superficialis)* is an oval opening **(2.5-3** x 1-2.5 cm) above the pubic bone. It is bounded anteriorly and inferiorly, respectively, by the superior and inferior crura of the inguinal ligament *(cms mediate* ct *cms lateralc),* laterally by the intercrural fibres *(fibrae intercrurales),*  and medially and downwards by the reflected part of the inguinal ligament *(ligamentum rejlexum)* (Figs 303, 304).

> 表层（外侧）腹股沟环（anulus inguinalis superficialis）是一个椭圆形的开口（2.5-3 cm × 1-2.5 cm），位于耻骨上方。其前方和下方分别由腹股沟韧带的上脚和下脚（cms mediate ct cms lateralc）界定，外侧由股间纤维（fibrae intercrurales）构成，内侧和下方则由腹股沟韧带的反折部（ligamentum reflexum）构成（图303，图304）。

The opening transmits the spermatic cord in males and the round ligament of the uterus in females. The opening can be examined: the entrance into the inguinal canal can be felt by pushing the skin on the scrotum upwards and laterally with the little finger. Normally only the tip of the little finger passes through the opening; a larger opening is interpreted as dilation of the superficial inguinal ring.

> 该孔在男性中通过输精管，在女性中通过子宫圆韧带。该孔可进行检查：通过将小指向上及向侧方推压阴囊皮肤，可感觉到腹股沟管的入口。正常情况下，仅有小指的尖端通过该孔；若孔较大，则被解释为浅层腹股沟环的扩张。

The deep (internal) inguinal ring *(anulus inguinalisprofundus)* is a funnel-like depression of the transversalis fascia bounded medially by the interfoveolar ligament *(ligamentum interfovcolare)*  (Fig. 305). Medially of this ligament the posterior wall of the inguinal canal is reinforced by the fibres of the inferior border of the aponeurosis of the transversus abdominis muscle which, curving downwards arc attached to the pubic tubercle and crest to form the conjoint tendon *(falx inguinalis* s. *tendo conjunctive)* (Figs 305, 307). Vessels (inferior epigastric artery and veins), to which the lateral umbilical fold corresponds, run medially of the deep inguinal ring; this circumstance must be borne in mind when the deep inguinal ring has to be cut in incarcerated hernia.

> 深（内）腹股沟环（anulus inguinalis profundus）是腹横筋膜的一个漏斗状凹陷，其内侧由腹股沟管的内侧韧带（ligamentum interfoveolare）界定（图305）。该韧带内侧，腹股沟管的后壁由腹横肌腱膜下缘的纤维加强，这些纤维向下弯曲，附着于耻骨结节和耻骨嵴，形成联合腱（腹股沟镰 s. 联合腱）（图305、307）。腹壁下动脉和静脉（对应于外侧脐襞），位于深腹股沟环的内侧；在处理嵌顿性疝时，必须注意这一情况，因为需要切开深腹股沟环。

![](_page_324_Picture_2.jpeg)

298. *Muscles of posterior thoracic and abdominal wall;* inner aspect

> 胸后壁及腹后壁肌肉；内侧方面

![](_page_325_Figure_2.jpeg)

299. *Muscles of the back and abdomen (Y2).*  (Horizontal section through second lumbar vertebra.)

> 背部和腹部肌肉（Y2）。 （横断层经第二腰椎。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_326_Picture_2.jpeg)

B-在弓状线以上
C-在弓状线以下

![](_page_327_Picture_2.jpeg)

301. *Inguinal canal (canalis inguinalis) of a male;* anterior aspect *(<sup>l</sup> /2).*

> 男性腹股沟管（canalis inguinalis）；前外侧（<sup>l</sup>/2）。

![](_page_328_Picture_2.jpeg)

302. *Inguinal canal (canalis inguinalis) of a female;* anterior aspect (%).

> 女性腹股沟管（canalis inguinalis）；前侧（anterior aspect）.%

![](_page_329_Picture_2.jpeg)
