# MUSCLES OF THE UPPER LIMB

> 上肢肌肉

## 1 *Musculi membri superioris*

> 1 上肢肌群

## 2 **REGIONS OF THE UPPER LIMB**

> 2 上肢分部

The following regions of the upper limb *(regiones membri superims,* (Figs 309, 310, 319) are distinguished.

> 上肢的以下区域（regiones membri superii，见图309、310、319）有所区别。

- 1. The deltoid region *(regio deltoidea)* corresponds to the position of the deltoid muscle.
- 2. The upper arm *(brackium)* has an anterior brachial region *(regio brachii anterior)* corresponding to the outlines of the biceps brachii muscle and a posterior brachial region *(regio brachii posterior)* corresponding to the outlines of the triceps brachii muscle (Figs 330, 331,340).
- 3. The elbow *(cubitus)* in which are distinguished an anterior cubital region *(regio cubiti anterior)* with the cubital fossa *(fossa cubi-Ulis)* and a posterior cubital region *(regio cubiti posterior).* 
  - 4. The forearm *(antebrachium)* with an anterior *(regio antebrachii*

> deltoid region (regio deltoidea) 对应于三角肌的位置。  
上臂 (brachium) 具有前臂区 (regio brachii anterior)，对应于肱二头肌的轮廓，以及后臂区 (regio brachii posterior)，对应于肱三头肌的轮廓 (图 330、331、340)。  
肘部 (cubitus) 区分出前肘区 (regio cubiti anterior) 包含肘窝 (fossa cubiti) 和后肘区 (regio cubiti posterior)。  
前臂 (antebrachium) 具有前侧区 (reg. antebrachii anterior) 和后侧区 (reg. antebrachii posterior)。

*anterior)* and a posterior antebrachial region *(regio antebrachii posterior).*

> 前侧前臂区域（regio antebrachii anterior）和后侧前臂区域（regio antebrachii posterior）。

- 5. The wrist *(carpus)* in which an anterior carpal region *(regio carpalis anterior)* and a posterior carpal region *(regio carpalis posterior)* are distinguished.
- 6. The hand *(manus)* which has a palm *(palma manus),* on whose medial side is the thenar eminence *(thenar)* and on the lateral side the hypothenar eminence *(hypothenar),* and a back *(dorsum manus* s. *regio dorsi manus)* which corresponds to the dorsal surface of the carpus and metacarpus.
- 7. The fingers *(digiti manus)* in which arc distinguished palmar surfaces *(fades digitales ventrales palmares)* and dorsal surfaces *(fades digitales dorsales).*

> 腕部（腕骨）可分为前腕区（前腕区）和后腕区（后腕区）。  
手部（手）具有掌面（手掌），其内侧为拇指隆起（拇指肌隆起），外侧为小指侧隆起（小指侧肌隆起），并具有手背（手背区），其对应腕骨和掌骨的背侧表面。  
手指（手指）可区分掌面（手指掌面）和背侧表面（手指背侧表面）。

## 3 MUSCLES **OF THE UPPER LIMB**

> 3 上肢肌肉

The muscles of the upper limb *(musculi membri superioris)* are divided into two groups according to their topographic and anatomic features. One group consists of the muscles of the shoulder girdle *(musculi cinguli membri superioris)* and the other is made up of the muscles of the free upper limb *(musculi partis liberae membri supe-* *rioris).* The muscles of the last-named group are divided in turn into the muscles of the upper arm *(musculi brachii),* the muscles of the forearm *(musculi antebrachii),* and the muscles of the hand *(musculi manus).*

> 上肢的肌肉（musculi membri superioris）根据其解剖和位置特征分为两组。一组为肩带肌（musculi cinguli membri superioris），另一组为自由上肢的肌肉（musculi partis liberae membri superioris）。后者又进一步分为上臂肌（musculi brachii）、前臂肌（musculi antebrachii）和手肌（musculi manus）。

## 4 MUSCLES OF THE SHOULDER GIRDLE

> 4 肩胛带肌肉

Thc following are the muscles of the shoulder girdle (see also *Muscles of the Back* and *Muscles of the Chest):*

> 以下为肩带肌（另见背肌和胸肌）：

- (1) the deltoid muscle *(musculus deltoideus);*
- (2) the supraspinatus muscle *(musculus supraspinatus);*
- (3) the infraspinatus muscle *(musculus infraspinatus);*
- (4) the teres minor muscle *(musculus teres minor);*

> (1) 三角肌（三角肌）；  
(2) 喙肩韧带（肩胛下肌）；  
(3) 肩胛下肌（肩胛下肌）；  
(4) 小圆肌（小圆肌）；

- (5) the teres major muscle *(musculus teres major)',*
- (6) the subscapularis muscle *(musculus subscapularis).*
- 1. The deltoid muscle *(musculus deltoideus)* (Fig. 313) covers the shoulder joint. It is thick and triangular with the base facing upwards and the apex downwards. The muscle is made up of large muscle fibres converging fan-wise at the apex. It arises from the

> (5) 大圆肌（musculus teres major）  
(6) 小圆肌（musculus subscapularis）  

三角肌（musculus deltoideus）（图313）覆盖肩关节。该肌肉厚而呈三角形，底面朝上，尖端朝下。该肌肉由许多粗大的肌纤维组成，呈扇形向尖端汇聚。其起始点位于 /no_think

![](_page_335_Picture_2.jpeg)

308. *Outlines of the muscles on the anterior surface of right upper limb.*

> 右上肢前侧肌肉的概述。

![](_page_336_Picture_2.jpeg)

309. *Regions of upper limb;* anterior aspect.

> 上肢区域；前面部位

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_337_Picture_2.jpeg)

310. *Regions of upper limb.*

> 上肢区域

clavicle and scapula and is inserted into the deltoid tuberosily of the humerus. A large subdeltoid bursa *(bursa subddtoidea)* is lodged between the inferior surface of the muscle and the greater tuberosity of the humerus.

> 锁骨和肩胛骨相连，并插入肱骨的三角肌粗隆处。一个较大的肩胛下滑囊（bursa subdeltoida）位于肌肉下表面与肱骨大结节之间。

Action: pulls the upper arm forwards and pronates it slightly, abducts the arm to the horizontal level, pulls the limb back, supinating it slightly.

> 动作：向前牵拉上臂并使其轻微旋前，将上肢上举至水平位，将肢体向后牵拉并使其轻微旋后。

Blood supply: the posterior circumflex humeral, acromiothoracic, and profunda brachii arteries.

> 血供：旋肩后动脉、锁骨胸廓动脉和肱深动脉。

Inucrvatiou: the circumflex nerve (C^-CG).

> Inucrvatiou: the circumflex nerve (C^-CG).

[!note]- 术语说明  
"Inucrvatiou" 可能为拼写错误，正确术语应为 "Innervation"，意为“支配”或“神经支配”。  
“Circumflex nerve” 通常译作“旋肩胛神经”，即“Circumflex scapular nerve”，在解剖学中属于臂丛神经的分支，支配肩胛骨的运动。  
“C^-CG” 可能为解剖学中的简写，例如“C5-C7”（C5至C7脊神经），但此处未明确，建议根据具体上下文确认。

2. The supraspinatus muscle *(museulus supraspinatus)* (see Fig. 322) is trihedral and occupies the whole supraspinous fossa from whose walls it arises. The muscular fibres converge to form a narrower part of the muscle, stretch laterally, pass under the acromion, and are inserted into the facet on top of the greater tuberosity of the humerus. The end tendon of the muscle is fused with the posterior surface of the shoulder joint capsule and on contraction of the muscle pulls the capsule away thus preventing its incarceration.

> 冈上肌（m. supraspinatus）（见图322）呈三棱形，占据整个冈上窝，并从其壁上起始。肌纤维汇聚形成肌体较狭窄的部分，向侧方延伸，穿过肩胛骨喙突下方，插入肱骨大结节顶部的关节面。该肌的肌腱末端与肩关节囊的后表面融合，当肌收缩时，可将关节囊拉离，从而防止其嵌顿。

Action: abducts the arm.

> 动作：外展上肢。

Blood supply: the suprascapular and circumflex scapular arteries.

> 血供：肩胛上动脉和肩胛颈动脉。

Innervation: the suprascapular nerve (Cg-Gt).

> 支配：肩胛上神经（C5-Gt）。[!note]- 术语说明 “suprascapular nerve” 通常译作“肩胛上神经”，为臂丛神经的分支，主要分布于肩胛骨和肩关节。

3. The infraspinatus muscle *(museulus infraspinatus)* (see Fig. 322) is triangular, flat, and fills the infraspinatus fossa completely. Its lateral part is covered by the deltoid muscle, medial part by the (rapezius muscle, and inferior parts by the latissiraus dorsi and the teres major muscles. In the middle it is covered by its own fascia. The infraspinatus muscle arises from the entire surface of the infraspinatus fossa and the posterior surface of the scapula, leaving the external border and inferior angle free.

> 肩胛下肌（m. infraspinatus）（见图322）呈三角形、扁平状，完全填充肩胛下窝。其外侧部分被三角肌覆盖，内侧部分被斜方肌覆盖，下部则被背阔肌和大圆肌覆盖。中部则被其自身的筋膜覆盖。肩胛下肌起自肩胛下窝的整个表面及肩胛骨的后面，仅肩胛骨的外侧缘和下角处裸露。

The muscle is directed laterally and its fibres converge to form

> 该肌肉呈横向走行，其肌纤维向中心汇聚形成

a small short tendon which is inserted into the middle facet of the greater tuberosity of the humerus. At the insertion is the bursa of the intraspinatus muscle *(bursa subtendinca musculi infraspinati).*

> 一条短小的肌腱，附着于肱骨大结节中部的关节面。在附着处有小圆肌滑囊（小圆肌滑囊，即肌腱滑囊，musculi infraspinati bursa subtendinca）。

Action: pulls the raised limb to the back and rotates the arm laterally.

> 动作：将抬起的肢体拉向背后，并使上肢外旋。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_338_Picture_4.jpeg)

311. *Lines of skin incisions on upper limb*  (most suitable for exposure of muscles during dissection).

> 上肢皮肤切口线（最适用于解剖过程中暴露肌肉）。

Blood supply: the circumflex scapular and suprascapular arteries.

> 血供：肩胛上动脉和肩胛下动脉。

Innervation: the suprascapular nerve (C5-C6).

> 支配：肩胛上神经（C5-C6）。

4. The teres minor muscle *(musculus teres minor)* (see Fig. 322) is elongated, slightly rounded (on cross section) and its fibres are arranged parallel to one another.

> 小圆肌（musculus teres minor）（见图322）呈细长状，横断面略呈圆形，其肌纤维彼此平行排列。

The superior border of the muscle is in contact with the infraspinatus muscle; the posterior part is covered by the teres major and the anterior by the deltoid muscles. The teres minor muscle arises from the lateral border of the scapula and occupies a narrow area on it extending from below the infraglenoid tubercle to the inferior angle of the scapula. Passing laterally, the muscle is continuous with a short and rather strong tendon which is fused with the posterior surface of the shoulder joint capsule and inserted into the inferior facet of the greater tubcrosity of the humerus.

> 该肌的上缘与肩胛下肌相接触；其后部被大圆肌覆盖，前部则被三角肌覆盖。小圆肌起自肩胛骨的外侧缘，占据肩胛骨上自肩胛下窝上方至肩胛骨下角之间的一狭窄区域。肌纤维向外侧延伸，形成一条短而有力的肌腱，该肌腱与肩关节囊的后表面融合，并插入肱骨大结节的下关节面。

Action: supinates the upper arm and pulls it slightly to the back; draws out the capsule of the shoulder joint.

> 动作：使上臂旋后，并稍向后牵拉；牵拉肩关节囊。

Blood supply: the circumflex scapular artery.

> 血供：旋肩胛动脉。

Innervation: the circumflex nerve (C5).

> 支配神经：旋肩胛神经（C5）[!note]- 术语说明
“Circumflex nerve” 在此处指“旋肩胛神经”，是颈丛的分支，主要支配肩胛区域的肌肉。

5. The teres major muscle *(musculus teres major)* (see Fig. 322) is flat and elongated with the fibres running first downwards and then parallel to its length. Its posterior part is covered by the latissimus dorsi muscle, the lateral part by the long head of the triceps brachii muscle and the deltoid muscle, and the middle part by a fine fascia connected to the fascia of the latissimus dorsi muscle.

> 大圆肌（musculus teres major）（见图322）呈扁平状并延长，其肌纤维最初向下走行，随后平行于肌的长度。其后部被背阔肌覆盖，外侧部被肱三头肌长头和三角肌覆盖，中部则被一层细薄的筋膜覆盖，该筋膜与背阔肌的筋膜相连。

The teres major muscle arises from the lateral border of the inferior angle of the scapula and fascia of the fnfraspinatus muscle and runs laterally to be inserted into llic crest of the lesser tuberosity of the humerus. The bursa of the teres major muscle *(bursa subtendinea muscult teretis majoris)* is lodged at the insertion.

> 大圆肌起源于肩胛骨下角的外侧缘及小圆肌筋膜，并向外侧延伸，插入至肱骨小结节的嵴部。大圆肌滑囊（bursa subtendinea musculi teretis majoris）位于其插入处。

Action: pronates and pulls the upper arm back thus drawing it to the trunk.

> 动作：使上臂旋前并将其向后拉，从而将上臂拉向躯干。

Blood supply: the subscapular artery.

> 血供：肩胛下动脉。

Innervation: the subscapular nerve (Ci-C;).

> 支配：肩胛下神经（C5-C7）。

6. The subscapularis muscle *(musculus subscapularis)* (Fig. 314) fills the subscapular fossa completely. It is Hat, triangular and made up of muscle fibres which are separated by fascial layers. The base of the triangle is parallel to the medial scapular border, while the apex is formed by the converging muscle fibres and faces laterally towards the humerus. Two layers are distinguished in the muscle, superficial and deep. The superficial fibres arise from the costal surface of the scapula, the deep fibres originate from the subscapular fascia which is attached to the borders of the subscapular fossa. Running laterally the muscle is continuous with a small tendon which is fused with the anterior surface of the shoulder joint capsule (which the contracting muscle draws out) and is inserted into the lesser luberosity of the humerus and its crest. At the insertion of the tendon is a small subscapular bursa *{bursa subtendinea musculi subscapularis)* which communicates with the cavity of the shoulder joint.

> 斜方肌（musculus subscapularis）（图314）完全填充肩胛下窝。该肌呈扁平三角形，由被筋膜层分隔的肌纤维组成。三角形的底边与肩胛骨内侧缘平行，而顶点由会聚的肌纤维形成，朝向外侧指向肱骨。该肌可分为浅层和深层两部分。浅层肌纤维起自肩胛骨的肋面，深层肌纤维起自附着于肩胛下窝边缘的肩胛下筋膜。肌纤维向外侧延伸时，与一小块肌腱相连，该肌腱与肩关节囊的前表面融合（收缩的肌肉可将此囊拉出），并附着于肱骨小结节及其嵴。在肌腱附着处存在一个小的肩胛下滑囊（bursa subtendinea musculi subscapularis），该滑囊与肩关节腔相通。

Action: pronates the arm and helps in its adduction to the trunk.

> 动作：使前臂旋前，并协助前臂向躯干靠拢。

Blood supply: the subscapular artery.

> 血供：肩胛下动脉。

Innervation: the subscapular nerve (C5-C7).

> 支配神经：肩胛下神经（C5-C7）。

![](_page_339_Picture_0.jpeg)

312. *Muscles and fasciae of right upper limb;* anterior aspect

> 右上肢肌肉与筋膜；前侧 aspect

(The skin and subcutaneous fat arc removed.)

> （皮肤及皮下脂肪被切除。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_340_Picture_2.jpeg)

313. *Muscles of right upper limb;* lateral aspect (J4).

> 右上肢肌肉；外侧方面（J4）

![](_page_341_Figure_2.jpeg)

314. *Muscles of right shoulder girdle and arm;* anterior aspect (%).

> 右肩带及上肢肌肉；前侧（%）。

## 5 MUSCLES OF THE FREE UPPER LIMB

> 5 自由上肢的肌肉

#### 5.1.1 MUSCLES O F TH E UPPER ARM

> 5.1.1 上臂肌肉

and posterior groups. Flexors (the biceps brachii, eoracobrachialis, group, and brachialis muscles) are mainly related to the first group, and

> 以及后群肌肉。屈肌（肱二头肌、肱二头肌长头、肱肌）主要与第一群相关。

The muscles of the upper arm are separated into the anterior extensors (the triceps brachii and anconeus muscle) to the second

> 上臂肌肉可分为前群伸肌（肱三头肌和尺骨骨间肌）等。

#### 5.1.2 T HE ANTERIOR GROU P OF MUSCLES OF TH E UPPER ARM

> 5.1.2 上臂前群肌肉

1. The biceps brachii muscle *(musculus biceps brachii)* (Figs 312-314) has two heads and is rounded and spindle-shaped. It occupies the anterior region of the upper ami and the bend of the elbow and lies directly under the skin.

> 肱二头肌（musculus biceps brachii）（图312-314）有两个头，呈圆润的纺锤形。它占据上臂前部及肘窝区域，并位于皮肤之下。

The long head *(eaput longum)* is located latcraly. It arises by a long tendon from the supragtenoid tubercle of the scapula, runs o\er the head of the humerus through the cavity of the shoulder joint, lies in the intertubercular groove where it is invested by the intertubercular synovial sheath *(vagina synovialis intertubercularis)*  and is then continuous with a muscular belly.

> 长头（longus）位于外侧。它由一条长的肌腱起源于肩胛骨的冈上结节，经肩关节腔越过肱骨头，位于大结节和小结节之间的沟内，被大结节与小结节之间的滑膜鞘（intertubercular synovial sheath，vagina synovialis intertubercularis）包裹，最后与肌腹相连。

The short head *(caput breve)* occupies a medial position. It takes origin by a wide tendon from the apex of the coracoid process of (he scapula, passes downwards and is also continuous as a muscular belly.

> 短头（caput breve）位于内侧位置。它由一片宽的肌腱起始，起始于肩胛骨喙突的顶端，向下延伸，并作为一个肌腹连续存在。

The two heads are united to form a long fleshy belly which, on reaching the cubital fossa, becomes narrower and continues as a strong tendon which is inserted into the tuberosity on the radius.

> 两头合并形成一条长而肥厚的肌腹，当其到达肘窝时变细，并继续成为一条强壮的肌腱，最终附着于桡骨上的骨突。

Some of the fibres separate from the proximal end of the tendon as a thin sheet; this is the bicipital aponeurosis *(aponcurosis musculi bicipitis brachii* s. *lacertus fibrosus).* To each side of the biceps brachii muscle on the upper arm run vertically and almost symmetrically two grooves called the medial and lateral bicipital grooves *(sulcus bidpitalis medialis* et *sulcus bicipitalis lateralis).*

> 部分纤维从肌腱的近端分离，形成一层薄片，称为肱二头肌腱膜（肱二头肌腱膜，即斜方韧带）。在上臂肱二头肌的两侧，垂直且几乎对称地各有一条沟槽，称为内侧肱二头肌沟和外侧肱二头肌沟（肱二头肌沟内侧沟，肱二头肌沟外侧沟）。

Action: flexes the limb at the elbow joint and supinatcs the forearm; the long head helps in abduction and the short head in adduction of the limb.

> 作用：在肘关节处屈曲肢体，并使前臂旋前；长头协助上肢外展，短头协助上肢内收。

Blond supply: muscular branches n! the axil la r\ artcn, and braihial artery.

> Blonde supply: 肌支供应腋动脉和肱动脉。

Inncrvation: the muscutocutaneous nerve (C^-Ct).

> 支配：肌皮神经（C5-C7）[!note]- 术语说明
“Muscutocutaneous nerve” 通常译作“肌皮神经”，是臂部的神经之一，起自臂丛外侧束，主要支配肱二头肌和肱桡肌，并分布于前臂的皮肤。

2. The eoracobrachialis muscle *(musculus eoracobrachialis)*  (Fig. 315) is flat and covered entirely by the short head of the biceps brachii muscle. It takes origin from the apex of the coracoid process and is inserted below the middle of the medial surface of the humerus on the medial lip of the bicipital groove. Some of its fibres are also inserted into the medial intennuscular septum of the arm. At the origin of the muscle lies the bursa of the eoracobrachialis muscle *(bursa musculi eoracobrachialis).*

> 前锯肌（musculus serratus anterior）（图315）呈扁平状，完全被肱二头肌短头覆盖。其起始点位于喙突尖端，肌腱插入至肱骨内侧面上部的内侧唇部，即肱二头肌沟的内侧缘。部分肌纤维还插入至上臂的内侧筋膜隔。前锯肌的起始处有前锯肌滑囊（bursa musculi serrati anterioris）。

Action: raises and adducts the arm.

> 动作：抬举并内收上肢。

Blood supply: anterior and posterior circumflex humeral arteries.

> 血供：前、后旋肱动脉。

Innervation: the musculocutaneous nerve (C<sup>6</sup> -C;).

> 支配神经：肌皮神经（C<sup>6</sup> -C;）。

3. The brachialis muscle *(musculus brachialis)* (Fig. 315) is quite broad, fleshy, and spindle-shaped and lies under the biceps brachii muscle on the anterior surface of the lower half of the upper arm. It arises from the lateral and anterior surfaces of the distal half of the humerus, embracing in a horseshoe manner the insertion of the deltoid muscle, and also from the lateral and medial intennuscular septa of the ann. It then bridges the elbow joint, fuses with its capsule, and is inserted into the tuberosity of the ulna.

> 肱二头肌（musculus brachialis）（图315）呈较宽、肥厚、纺锤形，位于上臂下部前侧的肱二头肌深面。它起自肱骨远端的外侧和前侧表面，以马蹄形包裹三角肌的止点，同时也起自臂部的外侧和内侧筋膜隔。随后，该肌跨越肘关节，与关节囊融合，并止于尺骨粗隆。

Action: flexes the forearm and stretches the capsule of the elbow joint.

> 动作：屈前臂，并牵拉肘关节囊。

Blood supply: the ulnar collateral arteries and the muscular branches of the brachial and radial recurrent arteries.

> 血供：尺侧副动脉及肱动脉和桡动脉返支的肌支。

Innervation: the musculocutaneous nerve (Cs-C<sup>6</sup> ).

> 支配神经：肌皮神经（C<sub>5</sub>-C<sub>6</sub>）。

#### 5.1.3 T HE POSTERIOR GROU P O F MUSCLES OE IIIK ITl'KK ARM

> 5.1.3 后群肌肉（上肢）

1, The triceps brachii muscle *(musculus triceps brachii)* (Fig. 322) is large and long and stretches for the whole distance of the posterior surface of the arm from the scapula to the olecranon. It has three heads, a long, a lateral, and a medial head. At the origin they are covered by the deltoid muscle.

> 1. 三角肌（deltoid muscle）覆盖的肱三头肌（triceps brachii muscle，musculus triceps brachii）（图322）是一个大而长的肌肉，沿上臂后侧从肩胛骨延伸至尺骨鹰嘴的整个距离。该肌肉有三个头，即长头、外侧头和内侧头。在起始处，这三个头均被三角肌覆盖。

The long head *(caput longum)* arises by a wide tendon from the infraglenoid tubercle of the scapula, passes downwards in the space between the teres minor and major muscles, and is next and medial to the lateral head.

> 长头（caput longum）由肩胛骨的下冈突发出一个宽阔的肌腱，向下穿过小圆肌和大圆肌之间的间隙，位于外侧头的下方和内侧。

The lateral head *(caput laterale)* takes origin from the posterior surface of the humerus above the spiral groove and from the medial and lateral intennuscular septa and is directed medially and downwards.

> 肱骨的外侧头（caput laterale）起自肱骨螺旋沟上方的后侧表面，以及 medial 和 lateral 间隔筋膜，并向内下方延伸。

The medial head *(caput mediate)* is covered by the lateral and partly by the long heads. It arises from the posterior surface of the humerus below the spiral groove and from the medial and lateral intennuscular septa.

> 内侧头（caput mediate）被外侧头部分覆盖。其起始于肱骨螺旋沟下方的肱骨后表面，以及内侧和外侧肌间隔。

The three heads meet to form a strong spindle-shaped belly which is continuous downwards with a strong tendon inserted into the olecranon. Some of the deep fibres of the medial head intertwine with the capsule of the elbow joint.

> 三头肌的三个头汇合形成一个强壮的纺锤形肌腹，向下延续为一条强健的肌腱，插入尺骨鹰嘴。部分内侧头的深部肌纤维与肘关节囊交织在一起。

Action: contraction of the long head moves the arm backwards

> 动作：长头收缩使上肢向后移动

![](_page_343_Picture_0.jpeg)

315. *Muscles of right shoulder girdle and arm;* anterior aspect (% (The subscapularis and biceps brachii muscles are partly removed.)

> 右肩带及上肢肌肉；前侧（（肩胛下肌和肱二头肌部分被去除。）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_344_Picture_2.jpeg)

316. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles on right scapula;* anterior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右肩胛骨上肌肉的起始点和止点；前侧（示意图）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_345_Picture_2.jpeg)

317. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles on right hu merus;* anterior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右侧肱骨上肌肉起始与附着点；前侧（示意图）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_346_Picture_2.jpeg)

318. *Outlines of muscles of right upper limb;* posterior aspect.

> 右上肢肌肉概要；背面观

and adducts it; the whole muscle helps in extension of the forearm at the elbow.

> 并使其内收；整块肌肉有助于在肘关节处伸展前臂。

Blood supply: the posterior circumflex humeral, profunda brachii, and ulnar collateral arteries.

> 血供：旋肱后动脉、肱深动脉和尺侧副动脉。

Innervatioii: radial nerve (C7-C<sup>8</sup> ).

> 支配神经：桡神经（C7-C<sup>8</sup>）。

2. The anconeus muscle *(musculus anconeus)* {Fig. 321) is small and pyramidal in shape. It is as if a continuation of the medial head of the triceps brachii muscle. Its apex takes origin from the lateral epicondyle of the humerus and the lateral ligament of the elbow, while the base, which consists of fibres radiating fan-wise from the apex, is inserted into the posterior surface of the olccranon and fuses with the capsule of the elbow joint.

> 尺骨肌（musculus anconeus）{图321}呈小而锥形。其形态如同肱三头肌内侧头的延续。其尖端起自肱骨的外上髁和肘关节的外侧副韧带，而由尖端向四周放射状分布的肌束构成的基部，则附着于尺骨鹰嘴的后表面，并与肘关节囊融合。

Action: extends the forearm at the elbow joint and at the same time draws away its capsule.

> 动作：在肘关节处伸展前臂，同时牵拉其关节囊。

Blood supply: the interosseous recurrent artery.

> 血供：骨间返支动脉。

Innervatioii: the radial nerve (C;-Cg).

> 支配神经：桡神经（C5-T1）。[!note]- 术语说明 “radial nerve” 通常译作“桡神经”，是上肢的主要神经之一，负责前臂外侧皮肤感觉及伸腕、伸指肌群的运动。

#### 5.1.4 MUSCLES O F TH E FOREARM

> 5.1.4 前臂肌肉

The muscles of the forearm *(musculi antebrachii)* are divided into three groups according to their position: anterior, lateral (radial), and posterior. The muscles of the anterior and posterior groups are arranged in layers.

> 前臂的肌肉（antebrachii musculi）根据其位置分为三组：前组、外侧组（桡侧）和后组。前组和后组的肌肉呈层状排列。

There are four layers in the anterior group.

> 前组共有四层。

#### 5.1.5 First (Superficial) Layer

> 5.1.5 第一层（浅层）

- 1. The pronator teres muscle *(musculus pronator teres).*
- 2. The flexor carpi radialis muscle *(musculus flexor carpi radia-Us).* 
  - 3. The palmaris longus muscle *(musculus palmaris longus).*
  - 4. The flexor carpi ulnaris muscle *(musculus flexor carpi ulnaris).*

> 前臂屈肌群包括以下肌肉：

旋前圆肌（musculus pronator teres）。
桡侧腕屈肌（musculus flexor carpi radialis）。
掌长肌（musculus palmaris longus）。
尺侧腕屈肌（musculus flexor carpi ulnaris）。

#### 5.1.6 Second Layer

> 5.1.6 第二层

The flexor digitorum superficialis muscle *(musculus flexor digitorum superficialis).*

> 指浅屈肌（肌 flexor digitorum superficialis）

#### 5.1.7 Third Layer

> 5.1.7 第三层

- 1. The flexor digitorum profundus muscle *(musculus flexor digitorum profundus).*
- 2. The flexor pollicis longus muscle *(musculus flexor pollicis longus).*

> 指深屈肌（flexor digitorum profundus）。  
拇长屈肌（flexor pollicis longus）。

#### 5.1.8 Fourth Layer

> 5.1.8 第四层

The pronator quadratus muscle *(musculus pronator quadratus).*  The lateral (radial) group includes the following muscles.

> 前锯肌（musculus pronator quadratus）。外侧（桡侧）组包括以下肌肉。

- 1. The brachioradialis muscle *(musculus brachioradialis).*
- 2. The extensor carpi radialis longus muscle *(musculus extensor carpi radialis longus).*
- 3. The extensor carpi radialis brevis muscle *(musculus extensor carpi radialis brevis).* The muscles of the posterior group lie in two layers.

> 桡侧屈腕肌（musculus brachioradialis）。  
桡侧伸腕长肌（musculus extensor carpi radialis longus）。  
桡侧伸腕短肌（musculus extensor carpi radialis brevis）。  
后群肌肉分为两层。

![](_page_347_Picture_27.jpeg)

319. *Regions of upper limb;* posterior aspect.

> 上肢各区域；背面

## 6 Superficial Layer

> 6 表层结构

- 1. The extensor carpi ulnaris muscle *(musculus extensor carpi ulnaris).* 
  - 2. The extensor digitorum muscle *(musculus extensor digitorum).*
- 3. The extensor digiti minimi muscle *(musculus extensor digiti minimi).*

> 伸肌腕尺侧肌（extensor carpi ulnaris muscle）  
伸肌指总肌（extensor digitorum muscle）  
小指伸肌（extensor digiti minimi muscle）

## 7 Deep Layer

> 7 深层结构

- 1. The supinator muscle *(musculus supinator).*
- 2. The abductor pollicis longus muscle *(musculus abductor pollicis longus),*
- 3. The extensor pollicis brevis muscle *(musculus extensor pollicis brevis).*
- 4. The extensor pollicis longus muscle *(musculus extensor pollicis longus),* 
  - 5. The extensor iudicis muscle *(musculus extensor indicis).*

> 旋后肌（musculus supinator）  
拇长展肌（musculus abductor pollicis longus）  
拇短伸肌（musculus extensor pollicis brevis）  
拇长伸肌（musculus extensor pollicis longus）  
指伸肌（musculus extensor indicis）

#### 7.1.1 T HE ANTERIOR GROU P OF MUSCLES OF TH E FOREARM

> 7.1.1 前臂前群肌

## 8 First (Superficial) Layer

> 8 第一（浅层）层

1. The pronator teres muscle *(musculus pronator teres)* (Fig. 333) is thick and the shortest in this layer. It arises by two heads. The larger, humeral head *kaput humerale)* arises from the medial epicondyle of the humerus, medial interniuscular septum, and antebrachial fascia; the smaller, ulnar head *(caput ulnare)* lakes origin from the medial edge of the tuberosity of the ulna. The two heads form a belly which is slightly flattened from front to back and is continuous with a narrow tendon. The muscle stretches obliquely and laterally to be inserted into the middle third oi the lateral surface of the radius.

> 前臂屈肌层中的旋前圆肌（musculus pronator teres）（图333）是最厚且最短的肌肉。它由两个头组成。较大的头，即肱头（caput humerale），起自肱骨内上髁、内侧肌间隔及前臂筋膜；较小的头，即尺头（caput ulnare），起自尺骨粗隆的内侧缘。这两个头汇合形成一个肌腹，其前后方向略呈扁平状，并与一条较细的肌腱相连。该肌腱斜向并偏向外侧，附着于桡骨外侧表面的中段。

Action: pmnales the forearm and helps in its flexion at ihe elbow joint.

> 动作：使前臂内收，并协助在肘关节处前臂屈曲。

Blood supply: muscular branches of the brachial, ulnar 3nd radial arteries.

> 血供：肱动脉、尺动脉和桡动脉的肌支。

Innovation: the median nerve (C<sup>h</sup> -C;).

> 创新：正中神经（C<sup>h</sup> -C;）

2. The flexor carpi radialis muscle *(musculus flexor carpi radialis)*  is bipennaie, flat, and long. It lies laterally to all the forearm flexors. Proximally it is covered by the aponeurosis of the biceps brachii muscle and the palmaris longus muscle; the remaining, larger, part is covered only by fascia and skin. The muscle arises from the medial humeral cpicondyle, the interniuscular septa, and the antebrachial fascia, runs downwards, passes under the flexor retinaculum, and is inserted into the base of the palmar surface of the second (third) melacarpal bone.

> 桡侧屈肌（musculus flexor carpi radialis）呈双羽状、扁平且较长。该肌位于前臂所有屈肌的外侧。近侧部分被肱二头肌腱膜和掌长肌腱膜覆盖；其余较大的部分仅被筋膜和皮肤覆盖。该肌起自肱骨内上髁、肌间隔和前臂筋膜，向下走行，经屈肌支持带下方，最终插入第二（或第三）掌骨的掌面基部。

Action: flexes the hand at the wrist and pronates it.

> 动作：屈腕并使前臂旋前。

Blood supply: muscular branches of the radial artery.

> 供血：桡动脉的肌支。

Inncrvation: the median nerve [C<sup>6</sup> -C7 (C<sup>8</sup> )].

> 神经支配：正中神经 [C6 - C7 (C8)]。

3. The palmar longus muscle *(musculus palmaris longus)*  (Fig. 330) has a short spindle-shaped belly and a very long tendon. It lies directly under the skin medial to the flexor carpi radialis muscle. It takes origin from the medial humeral epicondyle, the in-

> 尺侧腕屈肌（musculus palmaris longus）（图330）具有一个短而纺锤形的肌腹和一条非常长的肌腱。该肌位于桡侧腕屈肌的内侧，直接位于皮肤之下。其起始点为尺骨鹰嘴，以及肱骨内上髁。

![](_page_348_Picture_23.jpeg)

320. *Lines of skin incisions on upper limb*  (most suitable for exposure of muscles in dissection).

> 上肢皮肤切口线（最适用于解剖时暴露肌肉）。

termuscular septum, and the antcbrachiaj fascia, passes to the palm and continues as the wide palmar aponeurosis.

> 肌间隔和前臂筋膜延伸至手掌，并继续形成宽阔的掌腱膜。

Action: tenses ihe palmar aponeurosis and helps in flexion of the hand.

> 作用：紧张掌腱膜，协助手部屈曲。

Blood supply: muscular branches of the radial artery.

> 血供：桡动脉的肌支。

Iniicrvation: the median nerve [(C7) C8].

> 支配：正中神经 [(C7) C8]。

4. The flexor carpi ulnaris muscle *(musculus flexor carpi ulnaris)*  (Fig. 331) occupies the medial border of the forearm. It has a long fleshy belly and a rather thick tendon. It arises by two heads, by the humeral head *(caput kumerale)* from the medial epicondyle of the humerns and the intermuscular seplum, and by the ulnar head *(caput ulnare)* from the olecraiion, the two upper thirds of the dorsal surface and fascia of the forearm. Running downwards, the tendon passes under the flexor retinaculum to be inserted into the pisiform bone. Some of the fibres are continuous with the pisometacarpal and pisohamate ligaments which are inserted into the hamate and fifth metacarpal bones.

> 尺侧腕屈肌（musculus flexor carpi ulnaris）（图331）占据前臂的 medial 边缘。该肌具有一个较长的肌腹和相对较厚的肌腱。其起始处分为两个头：肱头（caput humerale）起自肱骨内上髁和肌间隔；尺头（caput ulnare）起自尺骨茎突，以及前臂背侧上2/3部分和筋膜。肌腱向下走行，穿过屈肌支持带，最终附着于豌豆骨。部分肌纤维与豌豆骨-掌骨关节韧带（pisometacarpal ligament）和豌豆骨-钩骨韧带（pisohamate ligament）相连续，这些韧带分别附着于钩骨和第五掌骨。

Action: flexes the hand and helps to adduct it.

> 动作：屈腕并协助腕关节内收。

Blood supply: the superior ulnar collateral, supratrochlear brachial, and ulnar arteries.

> 血供：尺侧上副动脉、尺骨头上动脉和尺动脉。

Innovation: the ulnar nerve (C<sup>8</sup> , Th,}.

> 创新：尺神经（C<sup>8</sup>，Th）

#### 8.1.1 Second Layer

> 8.1.1 第二层

1. The flexor digitorum sublimis muscle *(musculus flexor digitorum superficial)* (Fig. 331) is covered in front by the palmaris longus and flexor carpi radialis muscles which leave grooves on it. The muscle itself takes origin by two heads. One is called the humeroulnar head *(caput kumeroulnare);* it is long and narrow and arises from the medial epicondyle of the humerus and the coronoid process of the ulna. The other is the radial head *(caput radiale)* which is wide and short and arises from the proximal palmar surface of the radius. Th e two heads join to form a common belly which separates into four long tendons. These tendons pass over to the hand and run in the carpal tunnel to be inserted into the bases of the middle phalanges of the fingers. At the level of the proximal phalanges each tendon splits into two and therefore has two points of insertion on the edges of the base of the middle phalanges.

> 屈指浅肌（flexor digitorum sublimis，也称屈指浅头肌，flexor digitorum superficialis）（图331）前面被掌长肌和桡侧腕屈肌覆盖，这两块肌肉在其表面形成沟槽。该肌本身起源于两个头。其中一个称为肱骨尺骨头（caput humeroulnare），呈细长形，起自肱骨内上髁和尺骨冠突。另一个称为桡骨头（caput radiale），呈宽短形，起自桡骨近端掌面。这两个头融合形成一个共同的肌腹，之后分为四条长的肌腱。这些肌腱经腕部进入手掌，穿过腕管，最终插入手指中节指骨的基底部。在近节指骨水平，每条肌腱又分为两条，因此每条肌腱在中节指骨基底部的两侧各有一个插入点。

Action: flexes the middle phalanges of the index, middle, ring, and little fingers.

> 动作：屈曲示指、中指、环指和小指的中节指骨。

Blood supply: the radial and ulnar arteries. In nervation: the median nerve (C<sup>7</sup> -C<sup>8</sup> , Th,).

> 血供：桡动脉和尺动脉。神经支配：正中神经（C<sup>7</sup> -C<sup>8</sup>，Th）。

1. The flexor digitorum profundus muscle *(musculus flexor dig-*

> 指深屈肌（musculus flexor digitorum profundus）

Third Layer

> 第三层

*itorum profundus)* (Fig. 332) is a strongly developed flat and wide belly which springs from the proximal half of the anterior ulnar surface and the interosseous membrane. It passes downwards and gives place to four tendons which run under the flexor retinaculum and into the carpal tunnel with the tendons of the flexor digitorum profundus muscle lying above them. Then each tendon of the flexor digitorum profundus muscle passes between the slips of the flexor digitorum sublimis tendons to be inserted into the bases of the distal phalanges of all fingers except for the thumb. The tendons of the flexor digitorum sublimis and profundus are enclosed in a common synovia! sheath *(vagina synovialis communis musculiflexorum digitorum manus).* The sheaths for the tendons of the index, middle, and ring fingers originate at the level of the metacarpal heads and pass to the distal phalanges separately from the common sheath. Only the sheath for the tendon of the little finger is connected with the common sheath,

> （尺侧腕屈肌）（图332）是一个发育良好、扁平而宽阔的肌腹，起自前臂尺侧近端半部和骨间膜。该肌向下走行，逐渐分为四条肌腱，这些肌腱位于屈肌支持带下方，并进入腕管，其中屈指深肌的肌腱位于其上方。随后，每条屈指深肌的肌腱在屈指浅肌腱的滑车上穿行，最终插入除拇指外所有手指末节指骨基底部。屈指浅肌和深肌的肌腱被共同的滑膜鞘（手部屈肌腱共同滑膜鞘，vagina synovialis communis musculiflexorum digitorum manus）包裹。指长肌腱的滑膜鞘起自掌骨头部水平，并从共同鞘中分别延伸至各手指末节。只有小指的肌腱鞘与共同鞘相连。

Action: flexes the distal phalanges of all fingers except for the thumb.

> 动作：屈曲除拇指外所有手指的远节指骨。

Blood supply: muscular branches of the ulnar artery.

> 血供：尺动脉的肌支。

Innervation: ulnar and median nerves (C<sup>6</sup> -C<sup>8</sup> , Th|).

> 支配神经：尺神经和正中神经（C<sup>6</sup> -C<sup>8</sup>，Th|）。

2. The flexor pollicis longus muscle *(musculus flexor pollicis Iongus)* (Fig. 332) is long, unipennate, and lies on the lateral border of the forearm. It arises from the upper two thirds of the anterior radial surface and the interosseous membrane and from the medial epicondyle of the humerus. The muscle is continuous with a long tendon which, passing downwards, lies in the carpal tunnel; it is then invested by the synovial sheath of the flexor pollicis longus tendon *(vagina tendinis musculi flexoris pollicis longi)* and is inserted into the base of the distal phalanx of the thumb.

> 屈指长肌（musculus flexor pollicis longus）（图332）是一条细长的、单羽状的肌肉，位于前臂的外侧缘。其起始点位于尺骨前缘的上三分之二、骨间膜以及肱骨内上髁。该肌肉与一条细长的肌腱相连，肌腱向下走行于腕管内；随后被屈指长肌肌腱的滑膜鞘（vagina tendinis musculi flexoris pollicis longi）包裹，并最终插入拇指远节指骨基底部。

Action: flexes the distal phalanx of the thumb.

> 动作：屈曲拇指的远节指骨。

Blond supply: IIIUM ular brant hes <>i the la.lial. ulnar, and anterior interosseous arteries.

> Blond supply: 桡动脉、尺动脉和前臂内侧动脉供应。

Innervation: the median nerve (Ce-C8).

> 支配神经：正中神经（C₆-C₈）

#### 8.1.2 Fourth Layer

> 8.1.2 第四层

The pronator quadratus muscle *(musculus pronator quadratus)*  (Fig. 333) is a thin quadrangular plate formed of transverse muscle fibres stretching directly on the interosseous membrane. It takes origin from the distal part of the palmar surface of the ulna and is inserted into the palmar surface of the radius on the same level.

> 旋前圆肌（musculus pronator quadratus）（图333）是由横行肌纤维构成的薄而呈四方形的板状肌，直接附着于骨间膜上。该肌起自尺骨掌侧远端部分，止于桡骨掌侧同一水平处。

Action: pronates the forearm.

> 动作：使前臂旋前。

Blood supply: the anterior interosseous artery.

> 供血：前骨间动脉。

Innervation: the median nerve (Cs-Cg).

> 支配神经：正中神经（C₅-T₁）。

#### 8.1.3 i Hh LATERAL (RADIAL) (iROLP OF MUSCLES OFTHE FOREARM

> 8.1.3 i Hh 侧方（桡侧）（前臂肌肉的旋前/旋后）

1. The brachioradialis muscle *(musculus brachioradialis)*  (Fig. 336) is spindle-shaped and occupies the extreme lateral position. Slightly below its middle the muscle gives place to a long tendon. The muscle arises from the lateral border of the humerus slightly above the lateral epicondyle and from the lateral intermuscular septum of the upper arm and runs downwards to be inserted

> 肱桡肌（musculus brachioradialis）（图336）呈纺锤形，位于极端外侧。在肌肉中部稍下方，肌肉变形成一条长的肌腱。该肌起自肱骨的外侧缘，位于外上髁稍上方，以及上臂的外侧肌间隔，向下延伸并最终插入到桡骨茎突。

into the lateral surface of the radius proximal to the styloid process.

> 进入尺骨远端的桡骨侧，距桡骨茎突近端处。

Action: flexes the limb at the elbow joint and helps both to pronate and to supinate the radius.

> 动作：使前臂在肘关节处屈曲，并协助桡骨进行旋前和旋后。

Blood supply: the anterior descending branch of the profunda brachii artery and radial recurrent arteries.

> 血供：肱深动脉的前降支和桡动脉返支。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_350_Picture_2.jpeg)

321. *Muscles of right shoulder girdle and arm;* lateral view.

> 右肩带和上肢肌肉；侧视图。

![](_page_351_Picture_2.jpeg)

322. *Muscles of right shoulder girdle and arm;* posterior aspect (%).

> 右肩带及上肢肌肉；后侧（%）

(The deltoid muscle is partly removed.)

> （三角肌部分被切除。）

![](_page_352_Figure_2.jpeg)

323. *Muscles of right shoulder girdle and arm;* posterior aspect (%).

> 右肩带及上肢肌肉；后侧（%）

![](_page_353_Figure_2.jpeg)

324. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles and joint capsules on the right scapula;* posterior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右侧肩胛骨上肌肉和关节囊的起始点和附着点；后侧（示意图）。

Innovation: the radial nerve [C<sup>5</sup> -C6 (C<sup>7</sup> )].

> 创新：桡神经 [C<sup>5</sup> -C6 (C<sup>7</sup> )]。

2. The extensor carpi radialis longus muscle *(musculus extensor carpi radialis longus)* (Fig- 336) is spindle-shaped with a narrow tendon which is much longer than Us belly. A small portion of the upper part of the muscle is covered by the brachioradialis muscle; in the distal part its tendon is crossed by the abductor pollicis longus and extensor pollicis brevis muscles which run downwards and obliquely. The muscle takes origin from the lateral epicondyle and the lateral intermuscular septum of the upper arm, passes downwards and gives place to a tendon which runs under the extensor rctinaculum and is inserted into the base of the dorsal surface of the second metacarpal bone.

> 桡侧伸腕长肌（musculus extensor carpi radialis longus）（图336）呈纺锤形，其肌腱较细长，远比肌腹长。该肌上部的小部分被肱桡肌覆盖；在远端部分，其肌腱被拇长展肌和拇短伸肌跨越，这两块肌肉向下斜行。该肌起自上臂外侧髁和上臂外侧肌间隔，向下延伸，形成肌腱，该肌腱位于伸腕膜下方，并插入第二掌骨背侧基部。

Action: flexes the limb at the elbow joint, extends the hand at the wrist joint and helps in its abduction.

> 动作：在肘关节处屈曲前臂，在腕关节处伸展手掌，并协助手掌外展。

Blood supply: the radial collateral (profunda brachii) and recurrent arteries.

> 血供：桡侧副动脉（肱深动脉）和返支动脉。

Innervation: the radial nerve (C5-C7).

> 支配神经：桡神经（C5-C7）。

3. The extensor carpi radialis brevis muscle *(musculus extensor carpi radialis brevis)* (Fig. 337) is slightly covered by the extensor carpi radialis longus muscle proximally; distally it is crossed by the abductor pollicis longus and extensor pollicis brevis muscles. The extensor carpi radialis brevis muscle arises from the lateral humeral epicondyle and the collateral and annular radial ligaments. It runs downwards and is continuous with a tendon which passes next to the extensor carpi radialis longus tendon in the synovial sheath of the tendons of the radial extensors of the wrist *(vagina tendinum musculorum extensorum carpi radialium)* and is inserted into the base oi the third metacarpal bone.

> 桡侧腕短伸肌（musculus extensor carpi radialis brevis）（图337）在近端被桡侧腕长伸肌所覆盖；在远端则被拇长展肌和拇短伸肌跨越。该肌起自肱骨外上髁、侧副韧带和环状韧带。它向下走行，并与一条肌腱连续，该肌腱位于腕部桡侧伸肌群肌腱的滑膜鞘（vagina tendinum musculorum extensorum carpi radialium）内，毗邻桡侧腕长伸肌肌腱，最终止于第三掌骨基底。

Action: extends the hand at the wrist joint and abducts it a little.

> 动作：伸展手腕关节并略微外展手。

Blood supply: the branches of the profunda brachii artery and the recurrent radial artery.

> 血供：肱深动脉的分支和桡动脉返支。

Innervation: the radial nerve [(C5) Cg-C;].

> 支配神经：桡神经 [(C5) Cg-C;]。

#### 8.1.4 T H E POSTERIOR GROU P OF MUSCLES OF THE FOREARM

> 8.1.4 前臂后群肌肉

#### 8.1.5 The Superficial Layer

> 8.1.5 浅层结构

1. The extensor carpi ulnaris muscle *(musculus extensor carpi ulnaris)* (Fig. 337) has a long spindle-shaped belly and lies on the medial border of the dorsal surface of the forearm. It arises from the lateral epicondyle of the humerus, posterior border of the ulna, and the capsule of the elbow joint and is inserted into the base of the dorsal surface of the fifth metacarpal bone by a short but strong tendon which is invested by a synovial sheath of the exten-

> 伸肌腕尺侧肌（musculus extensor carpi ulnaris）（图337）具有一个细长的梭形肌腹，位于前臂背侧的内侧边。该肌起自肱骨的外上髁、尺骨的后缘以及肘关节囊，并通过一条短而强壮的肌腱止于第五掌骨背侧基部。该肌腱被伸肌鞘所包裹。

![](_page_354_Picture_15.jpeg)

325. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles, ligaments, and joint capsules on right scapula;* superior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右侧肩胛骨上部（示意图）肌肉、韧带和关节囊的起始点和附着点。

![](_page_355_Picture_2.jpeg)

326. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles, ligaments, and joint capsules on right humerus;* posterior and lateral aspects (schematical representation).

> 右肱骨上肌肉、韧带和关节囊的起始点和附着点；后侧和外侧方面（示意图）。

sor carpi ulnaris tendon *(vagina tendinis musculi cxtensoris carpi ulnaris).*

> 尺侧腕伸肌腱（尺侧腕伸肌腱鞘）

Action: abducts the hand to the ulnar side and extends it at the wrist joint.

> 动作：将手 abducted 至尺侧，并在腕关节处伸展。

Blood supply: the posterior interosseous artery. Iniiervation: the radial nerve [(C<sup>6</sup> ) C7-C<sup>8</sup> ].

> 血供：后骨间动脉。神经支配：桡神经 [(C<sup>6</sup>) C7-C<sup>8</sup>]。

2. The extensor digitorum muscle *(musculus extensor digitorum)*  (Fig. 337) has a spindle-shaped belly and, according to the direction of the muscular bundles, it is bipemiate. It is directly under the skin nearer to the lateral border of the dorsal surface of the forearm and borders upon the extensor carpi ulnaris and the extensor digiti minimi muscles on the ulnar side and upon the extensor carpi radialis longus and brevis muscles on the radial side.

> 伸肌总腱（musculus extensor digitorum）（图337）呈纺锤形，根据肌束的方向，其可分为两部分。该肌位于前臂背侧的外侧缘附近，紧贴于皮肤之下，其尺侧毗邻尺侧腕伸肌和小指伸肌，桡侧毗邻桡侧腕长伸肌和桡侧腕短伸肌。

The muscle takes origin from the lateral epicondyle of the humerus, the capsule of the elbow joint, and the antebrachial fascia. At the middle of its length the belly separates into four tendons which, after passing under the extensor retinaculum, are enclosed together with the extensor indicis tendon into a common

> 该肌起源于肱骨桡侧髁、肘关节囊及前臂筋膜。在肌腹中部，肌腹分为四条肌腱，这些肌腱在经过伸肌支持带下方后，与指伸肌腱一起被包裹于共同的

synovial sheath of (he extensor digilorum and extensor indicis tendons *(vagina tendinum musculorum extensoris digitorum* et *extensoris indicts)*  stretching approximately to the middl e of the metacarpal bones.

> (伸指肌腱和指伸肌腱的)腱鞘 (vagina tendinum musculorum extensoris digitorum et extensoris indicis) 延伸至掌骨中部附近。

On the hand the tendon s are joined together by fine inconstant intertendinous connections *(connexus inter lendinei);* at th e base of the proximal phalanges of the index, middle , ring, and little fingers each tendon ends in a tendinous expansion which fuses with the capsule of the metacarpophalangea l joint. Th e tendinous expansions separate into three slips, the lateral two are inserted into the base of the distal phalanx and the middl e on e into the base of the middle phalanx.

> 手部的肌腱通过细小而不恒定的腱间连接（connexus inter tendinei）相互连接；在食指、中指、无名指和小指近节指骨基底部，每根肌腱末端膨大形成腱性膨大，与指骨间关节的关节囊融合。腱性膨大分开为三束，两侧的两束附着于远节指骨基底部，中间的一束附着于中节指骨基底部。

Action: extends the fingers an d assists in extension of the han d at the wrist.

> 作用：伸展手指，并协助在腕关节处伸展手。

Blood supply: the posterior inlerosseous artery.

> 血供：后骨间动脉。

Inncrvation: the radial nerve (C<sup>6</sup> - C<sup>e</sup> ).

> 神经支配：桡神经（C<sup>6</sup> - C<sup>8</sup>）[!note]- 术语说明
“C<sup>6</sup> - C<sup>8</sup>” 表示颈椎第6至第8节，这是桡神经的神经根来源。

3. Th e extensor digiti minimi muscle *(musculus extensor digiti minimi)* (Fig. 337) is a small spindle-shaped belly lying directly under the skin in the lower half of the dorsal surface of the forearm between the extensor carpi ulnaris and extensor digitorum muscles. It takes origin from the lateral epicondyl e of the huiuerus, an-

> 伸肌小指肌（musculus extensor digiti minimi）（图337）是一块小而纺锤形的肌腹，位于前臂背侧下半部，介于尺侧腕伸肌和指伸肌之间，直接位于皮肤下。其起始点为肱骨外上髁，即尺骨鹰嘴的外侧髁。

tcbrachial fascia, and the lateral ligament of the elbow, runs downwards, an d gives place to a tendon which is lodged in the synovial sheath of the extensor digiti minimi tendon *(vagina tendinis musculi extensoris digiti minimi).* O n leaving the sheath the tendon joins the extensor digitorum tendon passing to the little finger and both are inserted into the base of th e distal phalanx.

> 桡侧腕长伸肌腱、臂筋膜以及肘关节外侧韧带向下延伸，并形成一个肌腱，该肌腱位于尺侧腕伸肌腱的滑膜鞘（尺侧腕伸肌腱滑膜鞘）内。当肌腱离开滑膜鞘后，它与延伸至小指的指总伸肌腱相汇合，二者共同附着于远节指骨基底。

Action: extends the little finger.

> 动作：伸展小指。

BloocUsupply: the posterior interosseous artery.

> 血供：尺骨深支动脉。

Innervation: the radial nerve (C<sup>6</sup> - C<sup>8</sup> ).

> 支配神经：桡神经（C<sup>6</sup> - C<sup>8</sup>）。

## 9 T h e Dee p Layer

> 9 深层结构

1. Th e supinator muscl e *(musculus supinator)* (Fig. 338) is a thin rhomboid sheet lying on the latcroposterior surface of the proximal end of the forearm. It arises from the lateral epicondyle of the humerus, the supinator crest of the ulna, and the capsule of the elbow joint, extends obliquely downwards and laterally embracing the uppe r end of the radius, and is inserted into it for a distance from the tuberosity of the radius to the insertion of the pronator ten s muscle.

> 旋前圆肌（musculus supinator）（图338）是一片薄而呈菱形的肌束，位于前臂近端的桡侧后方。它起自肱骨的外上髁、尺骨的旋前嵴以及肘关节囊，斜向下外侧方向延伸，包裹着桡骨的上端，并从桡骨的粗隆至旋前圆肌的附着点处插入桡骨。

Action: causes lateral rotation (supination) of the forearm and helps in extension of the limb at the elbow joint.

> 作用：引起前臂的旋后（外旋）运动，并协助在肘关节处实现肢体的伸展。

Blood supply: the radial recurrent and intcrosseous recurrent arteries.

> 血供：桡侧返动脉和掌侧返动脉。

Innervation: the radial nerve [(C5) C6-C7 (Cg)|.

> 支配神经：桡神经 [(C5) C6-C7 (Cg)]

2. The abductor pollicis longus muscle *(musculus abductor pollicis longus)* (Fig. 338) has a flattened bipennate belly which is continuous with a thin long tendon. It lies in the distal half of the dorsolateral surface of the forearm and is covered at its origin by the extensor carpi radialis brcvis and extensor digitorum muscles, while its lower part is directly under the antebrachial fascia and skin.

> 拇长展肌（musculus abductor pollicis longus）（图338）具有扁平的双羽状肌腹，其肌腹连续于一条细长的肌腱。该肌位于前臂背侧外侧表面的远端半部，其起始部被桡侧腕短伸肌和指伸肌覆盖，而其下部则直接位于前臂筋膜和皮肤之下。

The muscle takes origin from the posterior surface of the radius and ulna and from the interosseous membrane, runs obliquely downwards, with the tendon curving around the radius, and after passing under the extensor rctinaculuni it is inserted into the base of the first metacarpal bone.

> 该肌起自尺骨和桡骨的后表面以及骨间膜，呈斜向下方向行进，肌腱绕过桡骨，经过伸肌支持带下方后，止于第一掌骨基底。

![](_page_362_Picture_8.jpeg)

333. *Muscles of right forearm;* anterior aspect (%), (Fourth layer consisting of the pronator quadratus muscle.)

> 右前臂肌肉；前侧（%），（第四层包括屈肌总成肌。）

![](_page_363_Picture_2.jpeg)

334. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles and joint capsules on the bones of the right forearm;* anterior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右前臂骨上肌肉和关节囊的起始点和附着点；前侧（示意图）。

(The interosseous membrane is intact.)

> （骨间膜完整。）

Action : abducts the thum b and assists i n abductin g the hand. Blood supply: the posterior and anterior interosseous arteries. Inncrvaiion : the radial nerve [C <sup>6</sup> - C ; (Cg)] .

> 作用：外展拇指，并协助手部外展。血供：骨间后动脉和骨间前动脉。神经支配：桡神经 [C6-C8；(C7)]。

3. The extensor pollicis brevis muscle *(musculus extensor pollicis brevis)* {Fig. 338) is on the lateral border of the lower dorsal surface of the forearm, ll arises from the interosseous membrane, the dorsal surface of the radius, and the ulnar crest (interosseous border) and runs obliquely downwards next to the abductor pollicis longus tendon.

> 伸肌短肌（musculus extensor pollicis brevis）{图338} 位于前臂下背侧的外侧缘，起自骨间膜、桡骨的背侧表面及尺骨骨嵴（骨间缘），肌束斜向下走行，位于桡侧腕长伸肌腱的旁边。

The tendons of the two muscles are invested in the synovial sheath of the tendons of the abductor pollicis longus and extensor pollicis brevis muscles *(vagina tendinum musculorum abductoris longi*

> 两肌的肌腱被包绕在桡侧腕长伸肌和桡侧腕短伸肌肌腱的滑膜鞘内（vagina tendinum musculorum abductoris longi pollicis brevis）。

> 右前臂肌肉和筋膜；后侧（%）

el *cxtensoris brevis polliris).* After passing under the extensor retinaeulum the muscle is inserted into the base of the dorsal surface of the proximal phalanx of the thumb.

> 尺侧腕伸肌（extensor carpi ulnaris）的短头（extensor carpi ulnaris brevis）。肌腱在通过伸腕韧带（extensor retinaculum）之后，插入拇指近节指骨背侧基部。

Action: extends and slightly abducts the proximal phalanx of the thumb.

> 动作：伸展并轻微外展拇指近节指骨。

Blood supply: the posterior and anterior interosseous arteries. Inncrvation: the radial nerve [Cfi-C7 (Cg)J.

> 血供：深筋膜后动脉和深筋膜前动脉。神经支配：桡神经 [C5-T1 (C7)]。

4. The extensor pollicis longus muscle *(musculus extensor pollicis longus)* (Fig. 338) has a spindle-shaped belly and a long tendon. It lies next to the extensor pollicis brevis muscle and arises from the interosseous membrane and the interosseous border and posterior surface of the ulna, runs downwards, and gives place to a tendon which is invested in the synovia) sheath of the extensor pollicis longus tendon *(vagina tendinis musculi extensoris pollicis longij.* The

> 伸肌长肌（musculus extensor pollicis longus）（图338）具有纺锤形肌腹和一条长的肌腱。它位于伸肌短肌（extensor pollicis brevis）的旁边，起自骨间膜及尺骨骨间缘和后表面，向下走行，并形成一条肌腱，该肌腱被伸肌长肌肌腱鞘（vagina tendinis musculi extensoris pollicis longi）包裹。

![](_page_368_Picture_6.jpeg)

339. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles and joint capsules on bones of right forearm;* posterior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右前臂骨上肌肉和关节囊的起始点和附着点；后侧（示意图）。

(The interosseous membrane is intact.)

> （骨间膜完整。）

> 右前臂肌肉和筋膜 (%n)- (前臂中部的横断面)

tendon curves around the first metacarpal bone , emerges ont o its dorsal surface, and extends to the base of the distal phalanx to be inserted into it.

> 肌腱绕过第一掌骨，出现在其背侧表面，并延伸至远端指骨基底，最终插入其中。

Action: extends the thum b and abducts it partly.

> 动作：伸展拇指并部分外展。

Blood supply: the posterior and anterior interosseous arteries. Innervalion: the radial nerve |(Cs) C <sup>7</sup> - C <sup>8</sup> ] .

> 供血：后骨间动脉和前骨间动脉。神经支配：桡神经 [Cs C<sup>7</sup> - C<sup>8</sup>]。

5. Th e extensor indicis muscl e *(musculus extensor indicis)*  (Fig. 338) has a narrow, long, an d spindle-shaped belly lying on the lower dorsal surface of the forearm and is covered by th e ex-

> 伸肌腱（extensor indicis musculus）（图338）具有一个狭长纺锤形的肌腹，位于前臂下侧背表面，并被浅层筋膜覆盖。

tensor digitorum muscle. Sometime s it is absent. Th e muscle arises from the lower third of the dorsal surface of the ulna, and ends as a tendon which passes unde r th e extensor retinaculum and togethe r with the extensor digitorum tendon runs through the synovial sheath and extends to the dorsal surface of the index finger to be inserted into its tendinous expansion.

> 桡侧腕屈肌。有时该肌可能缺失。该肌起自尺骨背侧下三分之一处，终止于一条肌腱，该肌腱经手背伸肌腱鞘（伸肌支持带）下方走行，并与伸指肌腱共同穿行于滑膜鞘内，延伸至拇指背侧，最终插入指浅屈肌腱的腱性扩张部。

Action: extends the index finger.

> 动作：伸展示指。

Blood supply: the posterior and anterior interosseous arteries. Innervation: th e radial nerve |(C<sup>6</sup> ) C <sup>7</sup> - C <sup>8</sup> ] .

> 血供：后骨间动脉和前骨间动脉。神经支配：桡神经 [C<sup>6</sup> - C<sup>7</sup> - C<sup>8</sup>]。

#### 9.1.1 MUSCLE S O F TH E HAN D

> 9.1.1 手部肌肉

cation into two groups, on e formed of the muscles of th e palma r eminence , and muscles of th e middl e grou p arc distinguished in surface and the othe r consisting of muscles of the dorsal surface. the group on the palma r surface.

> 将手部肌肉分为两组，一组由掌侧隆起部的肌肉组成，另一组则由背侧表面的肌肉组成。掌侧组的肌肉在体表可辨识，而背侧组的肌肉则位于另一侧。

T h e muscles of the han d are subdivided according to their lo- Th e muscles of the thena r eminence , muscles of the hypothena r

> 手部肌肉根据其位置分为以下几组：手背肌群、手掌肌群、小鱼际肌群、大鱼际肌群。

- 1. The abductor poilicis brevis muscle *(musculus abductorpollieis* 1. The palmaris brevis muscle *(musculus palmaris brevis).*

> 10 手掌外侧肌（Thenar muscles）/手掌内侧肌（Hypothenar muscles）

- *breois).* 2. The abductor digiti minimi muscle *(musculus abductor digiti*

#### 10.1.1 Muscles of the Middle Group

> 10.1.1 中组肌肉

- 1. The lumbrical muscles *(musculi lumbricales).*
- 2. The palmar interossei muscles *(musculi interossei palmares).*

#### 10.1.2 MUSCLES OF TH E PALMAR SURFACE

> 10.1.2 掌侧肌群

#### 10.1.3 Muscles of the Thenar

> 10.1.3 拇展肌群

1. The abductor poilicis brevis muscle *(musculus abductor poilicis brevis)* (Fig. 341) is on the radial (lateral) surface of the thenar directly under the skin. It arises from the tendon of the abductor poilicis longus muscle, antebrachial fascia, tubercle of the scaphoid, and flexor retinaculum and is inserted into the radial surface of the base of the proximal phalanx of the thumb. Its tendon usually lodges a sesamoid bone.

> 拇短展肌（musculus abductor pollicis brevis）（图341）位于手掌桡侧（外侧）皮下，直接在大鱼际处。该肌起自拇长展肌腱、前臂深筋膜、舟骨粗隆以及掌长肌腱膜，并止于拇指近节指骨的桡侧表面。其肌腱通常内含一块籽骨。

Action: abducts the thumb and sets it in mild opposition, helps in flexion of the proximal phalanx.

> 动作：外展拇指并使其呈轻度对掌位，辅助近节指骨的屈曲。

- . Blood supply: superficial palmar branch of radial artery. Innervation: the median nerve (Cg-C?).
- 2. The flexor poilicis brevis muscle *(musculus flexor poilicis brevis)*  (Fig. 341) lies medially of the abductor poilicis brevis muscle and also directly under the skin. It arises from the flexor retinaculum, the trapezium, trapezoid, and capitate bones, and the base of the first rnctacarpal bone. The muscle fibres run distally and are inserted radially: the superficial fibres *(caput superficiale)* are inserted into the radial sesamoid bone, the deep fibres *(caput profundum)* are inserted into both sesamoid bones of the mctacarpophalaugeal joint of the thumb.

> 血供：桡动脉的浅层掌侧支。神经支配：正中神经（C₆–C₈）。

尺侧屈肌（musculus flexor pollicis brevis）（图341）位于外展拇短肌（musculus abductor pollicis brevis）的内侧，并且直接位于皮肤下方。该肌起自屈肌支持带（flexor retinaculum）、舟骨（trapezium）、月骨（trapezoid）、头骨（capitate）以及第一腕掌关节的基底部。肌纤维向远端延伸，并向桡侧插入：浅层纤维（caput superficiale）插入桡侧籽骨（radial sesamoid bone），深层纤维（caput profundum）插入拇指掌指关节的两个籽骨（sesamoid bones of the metacarpophalangeal joint of the thumb）。

Action: flexes the proximal phalanx of the thumb.

> 动作：屈曲拇指近节指骨。

Blood supply: superficial palmar branch of radial artery, deep palmar arch.

> 血供：桡动脉浅层掌支，掌深弓。

[nncrvation: the superficial fibres—the median nerve (C<sup>6</sup> -C<sup>7</sup> ), deep—the ulnar nerve (Cg-Thi).

3. The opponens poilicis muscle *(musculus opponens poilicis)*  (Fig. 342) is shaped like a thin triangular sheet and lies under the abductor poilicis brevis muscle. It arises from the crest of the trapezium and the flexor retinaculum and is inserted into the radial border of the first metacarpal bone.

> 对掌肌（musculus opponens pollicis）（图342）呈薄三角形，位于拇短展肌的深面。其起自舟骨的嵴和屈肌腱鞘，止于第一掌骨的桡侧边。

Action: opposes the thumb in relation to the little finger.

> 动作：使拇指相对于小指相反。

Blood supply: superficial palmar branch of radial artery, deep palmar arch.

> 血供：桡动脉浅层掌支，掌深弓。

Innervation: the median nerve (Cfe-C;).

> 支配神经：正中神经（C₅-T₁）。

4. The adductor poilicis muscle *(musculus adductor poilicis)*

> 加压肌（musculus adductor poilicis）[!note]- 术语说明  
“adductor poilicis” 是拉丁语，意为“加压肌”，是手部肌肉之一，主要功能是辅助拇指的屈曲和对掌运动。在中文医学文献中，通常译作“加压肌”。

(Fig. 343) is the deepest in the thenar group. It arises by two heads whose fibres are directed one towards the other at an angle. The oblique head *(caput obliquum)* takes origin from the radiate carpal ligament, the capitate bone, and the palmar surface of the second and third metacarpal bones; the transverse head *(caput transversum)*  arises from the palmar surface of the third metacarpal and the heads of the second and third metacarpal bones. The muscle bundles converge at an angle to be inserted into the base of the proximal phalanx of the thumb, the ulnar sesamoid bone, and the capsule of the metacarpophalangeal joint.

> （图343）是鱼际肌群中最深的肌。它由两束肌束组成，其纤维呈夹角方向彼此相向。斜形头（caput obliquum）起自腕横韧带、钩骨和第二、第三掌骨的掌面；横形头（caput transversum）起自第三掌骨的掌面以及第二、第三掌骨的骨头部。肌束呈夹角方向汇聚，最终插入拇指近节指骨基底、尺侧籽骨以及掌骨指骨关节囊。

Action: adducts the thumb and assists in flexing the proximal phalanx.

> 动作：使拇指内收，并辅助近节指骨屈曲。

Blood supply: superficial and deep palmar arches.

> 血供：掌浅弓和掌深弓。

Innervation: the ulnar nerve (Cs).

> 支配神经：尺神经（C8-T1）。

#### 10.1.4 Muscles of the Hypothenar

> 10.1.4 小鱼际肌群

1. The palmaris brevis muscle *(musculus palmans brevis)* (see Fig. 330) is a thin plate of parallel fibres. It takes origin from the ulnar border of the palmar aponeurosis and the flexor retinaculum and is inserted into the skin of the hypothenar.

> 尺侧腕屈肌（musculus palmaris brevis）（见图330）是一片薄而平行的肌纤维。它起自掌腱膜的尺侧缘和屈肌鞘，并插入到小鱼际皮肤。

Action: tenses the palmar aponeurosis thus forming folds on the skin of the hypothenar.

> 动作：使掌筋膜紧张，从而在小鱼际皮肤形成褶皱。

Blood supply: the ulnar artery.

> 血供：尺动脉。

Innervation: the ulnar nerve [(C7), C<sup>s</sup> , Th|].

> 支配神经：尺神经 [(C7), C<sup>s</sup> , Th|]。

2. The abductor digiti minimi muscle *(musculus abductor digiti minimi)* (Fig. 341) occupies the extreme medial position in this group of muscles and lies directly under the skin and partly under the palmaris brevis muscle. It arises from the pisiform bone, the tendon of the flexor carpi ulnaris muscle, and the flexor retinaculum and is inserted into the ulnar side of the base of the proximal phalanx of the little finger.

> 尺骨肌（musculus abductor digiti minimi）（图341）位于该组肌肉中最内侧的位置，直接位于皮肤下，并部分位于手部短肌（palmaris brevis）之下。其起始点为豌豆骨、尺侧腕屈肌腱以及屈肌支持带，止于小指近节指骨基底的尺侧。

Action: abducts the little linger and assists in flexion of its proximal phalanx.

> 动作：使小指外展，并协助其近节指骨的屈曲。

Blood supply; deep branch of the ulnar artery.

> 血供；尺动脉的深支。

Innervation: the ulnar nerve [(C<sup>7</sup> ), C<sup>8</sup> , Th | |.

> 支配神经：尺神经 [(C<sup>7</sup>)，C<sup>8</sup>，Th]

3. The flexor digiti minimi brevis muscle *(musculus flexor digiti*

> 尺侧屈肌（肌 flexor digiti minimi brevis）（musculus flexor digiti minimi brevis）

> 11 右手肌肉；掌面 {%)

(The proximal and part of the middle phalanx of the middle finger are removed; the extensor digitorum tendon is exposed.)

![](_page_373_Picture_2.jpeg)

> 右手肌肉；掌面（%）

*minimi breois)* (see Fig. 341) is small and flattened; it lies lateral to the abductor digiti minimi muscle and its upper part is covered by the palmaris brevis muscle and skin. The muscle arises from the hook of the hamate bone and the flexor retinaculum, runs distally, and is inserted into the base of the proximal phalanx of the little linger.

> （见图341）该肌（adductor digiti minimi brevis）体积小且扁平；它位于小指展肌的外侧，其上部被小指短屈肌和皮肤覆盖。该肌起自钩骨钩和屈肌腱鞘，向下延伸，最终附着于小指近节指骨基底。

Action: Ilexes the proximal phalanx of the little finger and helps in its adduction.

> 动作：使小指近节指骨屈曲，并协助其内收。

Blood supply: deep branch of the ulnar artery.

> 血供：尺动脉的深支。

Innervation: the ulnar nerve (C<sup>7</sup> -C<sup>8</sup> ).

> 支配神经：尺神经（C<sup>7</sup> - C<sup>8</sup>）。

4. The opponens digiti minimi muscle *(musculus opponens digiti minimi)* (Fig. 341) is medial to the Ilexor digiti minimi brevis muscle which covers its lateral border. The muscle takes origin from the hook of the hamate bone and the Ilexor retinaculum and is inserted into the ulnar side of the fifth metacarpal bone.

> 对小指的肌（musculus opponens digiti minimi）（图341）位于小指短屈肌（musculus brevis flexor digiti minimi）的内侧，后者覆盖其外侧边缘。该肌起自钩骨钩和小指屈肌腱鞘，止于第五掌骨的尺侧。

Action: draws the little finger to oppose the thumb (opposition).

> 动作：将小指向拇指方向屈曲（对掌动作）。

Blood supply: deep branch of the ulnar artery.

> 血供：尺动脉的深支。

Innervation: the ulnar nerve (C<sup>7</sup> -C<sup>8</sup> ).

> 支配神经：尺神经（C<sup>7</sup> -C<sup>8</sup>）。

#### 11.1.1 The Middle Group

> 11.1.1 中组

1. The lumbrical muscles *(musculi lumbricaUs)* (Fig. 341), four in number, are small and spindle-shaped. Each arises from the radial border of the corresponding flexor digitorum profundus tendon and is inserted into the dorsal surface of the base of the proximal phalanx of the index, middle, ring, and little fingers to intertwine with the dorsal aponeurosis on the radial side of these fingers.

> 蚓状肌（musculi lumbricales）（图341），共有四块，体积较小，呈梭形。每块肌起自对应指深屈肌腱的桡侧缘，止于拇指、食指、中指、环指和小指近节指骨基底部的背侧表面，与这些手指的桡侧背腱膜交织在一起。

Action: flex the proximal phalanx and extend the middle and distal phalanges of the four fingers.

> 动作：屈曲近节指骨，伸展四指的中节和末节指骨。

Blood supply: superficial palmar arch.

> 血供：浅表掌弓。

Innervation: first and second muscles—the median nerve, third and fourth muscles—the ulnar nerve (C<sup>8</sup> , Th,).

> 支配神经：第一、二块肌肉——正中神经；第三、四块肌肉——尺神经（C<sup>8</sup>，Th）。

2. The palmar interossei muscles *(musculi interossei palmares)*  (Fig. 344) are three spindle-shaped muscle fibres lodged in the interosseous spaces between the metacarpal bones. The first muscle lies on the radial part of the palm; it arises from the ulnar side of the second metacarpal bone and is inserted into the ulnar side of the mctacarpophalangcal joint of the index finger and into its dorsal aponeurosis. The second and third interossei muscles are on the ulnar half of the palm; arising on the radial side of the fourth and fifth metacarpal bones they are inserted into the radial side of the capsules of the metacarpophalangeal joints of the ring and little fingers.

> 掌内侧肌（musculi interossei palmares）（图344）是三束纺锤形的肌纤维，位于掌骨之间的骨间间隙内。第一块肌位于手掌的桡侧，起自第二掌骨的尺侧，止于示指掌指关节的尺侧及其背侧腱膜。第二和第三块掌内侧肌位于手掌的尺侧半，起自第四和第五掌骨的桡侧，止于环指和小指掌指关节囊的桡侧。

Action: flex the proximal and extend the middle and distal phalanges of the index, ring, and little fingers; adduct these fingers to the middle finger.

> 动作：屈曲示指、环指和小指的近节指骨，伸展中节和远节指骨；将这些手指向中指靠拢。

Blood supply: deep palmar arch.

> 血供：深部掌弓。

Innervation: the ulnar nerve (C«, Th)).

> 支配神经：尺神经（C8，Th1）。[!note]- 术语说明 “ulnar nerve” 通常译作“尺神经”，是上肢的主要神经之一，主要支配手部小指侧和环指侧的皮肤及肌肉。

## 12 MUSCLES OF TH E DORSAL SURFACE

> 12 背部肌肉

The dorsal interossei muscles *(musculi interossei dorsala)*  (Fig. 349), four in number, are spindle-shaped and bipennate and lie in the interosseous spaces on the dorsal surface of the hand. Each arises by two heads from the adjacent sides of the bases of two adjacent metacarpal bones; the first and second muscles are inserted into the radial side of the index and middle fingers, while the third and fourth muscles are inserted into the ulnar side of the middle and ring fingers.

> 背侧骨间肌（musculi interossei dorsalia）（图349），共有四块，呈纺锤形，双羽状肌，位于手背的骨间间隙内。每块肌起自相邻两块掌骨基底部的相邻侧，形成两个头；第一和第二块肌止于拇指和食指的桡侧，而第三和第四块肌则止于食指和环指的尺侧。

Action: the two muscles on the radial side pull the proximal phalanges of the index and middle fingers towards the thumb; the two muscles on the ulnar side pull the middle and ring fingers towards the little finger. In addition, all four muscles assist in flexing the proximal and extending the middle and distal phalanges of the index, middle, ring, and little fingers.

> 动作：尺侧的两块肌肉将示指和中指的近节指骨向拇指方向牵拉；桡侧的两块肌肉将中指和环指的近节指骨向小指方向牵拉。此外，这四块肌肉还协助屈曲示指、中指、环指和小指的近节指骨，并伸展中节和远节指骨。

Blood supply: deep palmar arch.

> 血液供应：深部掌侧弓。

Innervation: the ulnar nerve (Cg, Thj).

> 支配神经：尺神经（C8，T1）。

## 13 FASCIAE OF THE UPPER LIMB

> 13 上肢筋膜 /no_think

The fasciae covering the upper limb differ characteristically in thickness along their distance. In some places the fascial layers form clearly defined sheaths and line fossa, canals, and other structures of various size.

> 上肢的筋膜在不同部位的厚度存在显著差异。在某些区域，筋膜层形成明确界定的鞘状结构，包裹沟、窝、管等不同大小的解剖结构。

#### 13.1.1 FASCIAE OF TH E SHOULDER GIRDLE

> 13.1.1 肩带筋膜

The following fasciae are distinguished in the region of the shoulder girdle (see Figs 285, 312, 321, 327): (a) the deltoid fascia consisting of a weaker superficial layer and a stronger deep layer. The superficial layer covers the outer surface of the deltoid muscle and at the anterior border of the muscle is continuous with the pectoral fascia. The deep layer invests the deltoid muscle, which it separates from the muscles of the shoulder girdle (the infraspinatus and teres minor) and the capsule of the shoulder joint, and is continuous with the fascia covering the triceps brachii muscle; (b) the supraspinous fascia which is rather thick and stretches on the edges of the supraspinous fossa to cover the supraspinatus muscle; (c) the infraspinous fascia which is attached to the edges of the infraspinous fossa and blends with the deep layer of the deltoid muscle fascia to form a sheath for the infraspinatus and teres minor muscles; (d) the subscapular fascia which is thin and hardly detectable and is attached to the edges of the subscapular fossa to cover the subscapularis muscle.

> 肩胛带区域的筋膜可区分出以下几种（见图285、312、321、327）：  
(a) 肩袖筋膜，包括一层较薄弱的浅层和一层较坚韧的深层。浅层覆盖肩胛三角肌的外侧表面，在三角肌前缘与胸大肌筋膜连续。深层包裹三角肌，将其与肩胛带肌肉（冈下肌和小圆肌）以及肩关节囊分隔开，并与覆盖肱三头肌的筋膜连续；  
(b) 肩胛上筋膜，其较厚，覆盖于肩胛上沟边缘，覆盖肩胛上肌；  
(c) 肩胛下筋膜，附着于肩胛下沟边缘，并与三角肌深层筋膜融合，形成包裹冈下肌和小圆肌的鞘膜；  
(d) 胸背筋膜，其较薄且难以察觉，附着于胸背沟边缘，覆盖胸大肌。

The axillary fascia (fascia axillaris) is a relatively thick sheet covering the axillary fossa inferiorly; it has a series of openings transmitting the nerves and blood and lymph vessels. It is unnoticeably continuous superiorly with the fascia of the deltoid muscle, inferiorly with the brachial fascia and posteriorly with the fascia covering the latissimus dorsi and teres major muscles.

> 腋鞘（fascia axillaris）是一层相对较厚的膜，覆盖在腋窝的下方；其上有多个孔隙，允许神经和血 vessels 与淋巴 vessels 通过。其上方与三角肌的筋膜无明显分界，下方与臂筋膜相延续，后方则与覆盖背阔肌和大圆肌的筋膜相连。

#### 13.1.2 FASCIAE OF THE ARM

> 13.1.2 上肢筋膜

The brachial fascia (fascia brachii) is clearly defined and is thickest in the middle third of the upper arm and below the deltoid muscle. Two frontally arranged intermuscular septa, lateral

> 臂部深筋膜（brachial fascia，fascia brachii）界限清楚，在上臂中部及三角肌下方最厚。有两个从前到后的肌间隔，分别位于臂前侧和后侧。

and medial, are present between the flexors and extensors in the lower half of the arm; they form fascial sheaths for these groups of muscles and serve for insertion of some parts of the arm and fore-

> 并且位于内侧，存在于前臂下部屈肌群与伸肌群之间；它们形成这些肌肉群的筋膜鞘，并为前臂和前臂部分的附着提供支持。

![](_page_375_Picture_8.jpeg)

344. Muscles of right hand; palmar surface (\%). (Interossei muscles.)

> 右手肌肉；掌面（%）。(骨间肌。)

ann muscles. The lateral intermuscular septum of the upper arm *(septum intermusculare braekii laterale)* arises from the brachial fascia covering the lateral surface of the upper ami and passes deeper to be attached to the lateral border of the humerus for a distance from the deltoid tubcrosity to the lateral epicondyle; it separates the lateral and medial heads of the triceps muscle from the brachialis and brachioradialis muscles. The medial intermuscular septum of the upper arm *(septum intermusculare braekii mediate)* is

> 臂部的肌肉。上臂的外侧肌间隔（septum intermusculare brachii laterale）起自覆盖上臂外侧表面的臂部深筋膜，向深部延伸，附着于肱骨外侧缘，从三角肌粗隆延伸至肱骨外上髁；该间隔将肱三头肌的外侧头与内侧头同肱二头肌和肱桡肌分隔开。上臂的内侧肌间隔（septum intermusculare brachii mediale）是...

stronger; it arises from ihe brachial Fascia and is on the medial surface of the upper arm where it is attached to the medial border of the humerus for the distance between the distal end of the coracobrachialis muscle and the medial epicondyle. The medial septum separates the medial head of the triceps muscle from the brachialis and pronator teres muscles. In some parts the brachial fascia is pierced by nerves and blood vessels.

> 更强；它起源于臂鞘（brachial fascia），位于上臂内侧表面，从喙肱肌远端至尺骨鹰嘴之间的范围内附着于肱骨内侧缘。肱二头肌内侧隔将肱三头肌内侧头与肱二头肌及旋前圆肌分隔开。在某些部位，臂鞘被神经和血管穿通。

![](_page_376_Figure_4.jpeg)

345. *Tendons of flexors and extensor of index finger.*

> 屈肌腱和伸肌腱 of 拇指。

![](_page_377_Picture_2.jpeg)

346. *Synovial sheaths of tendons (vaginae synoviales tendinum) of right hand;*  palmar surface (%).

> 右手肌腱滑膜鞘（tendinum vaginae synoviales）；掌面（%）。

(Staining material is injected into **the** sheath.)

> （染色剂注入鞘内。）

#### 13.1.3 FASCIAE O F TH E FOREARM

> 13.1.3 前臂筋膜

The antebrachial fascia *(fascia antebrackii)* (see Figs 329, 335) is a continuation of the brachial fascia. It is thickest in the region of ihe elbow joint from where arise some of the muscles of the foream). For its whole distance the fascia gives off many septa penetrating between separate groups of muscles and forming fascial sheaths for them. Over the whole circumference of the forearm the antebrachial fascia is closely fused with the superficial muscles. Superiorly it blends with a fibrous sheet, the bicipital aponeurosis; infcriorly it fonns well defined transversely running bands embracing the wrist joint (Fig. 341).

> 前臂筋膜（antebrachial fascia，fascia antebrackii）（见图329、335）是臂筋膜的延续。其在肘关节区域最厚，此处是前臂肌肉群的一些肌肉的起始处。在全长范围内，筋膜发出许多隔膜，穿行于不同的肌肉群之间，形成包裹这些肌肉的筋膜鞘。在整个前臂周围，前臂筋膜与浅层肌肉紧密融合。上方与肱二头肌腱膜（bicipital aponeurosis）融合；下方则形成清晰的横行带，环绕腕关节（图341）。

The fascial septa and bones of the foreann and the interosseous membrane form three seats for muscles in the upper half of the forearm: lateral, posterior, and anterior. The lateral seat lodges

> 前臂的筋膜隔、骨和骨间膜在前臂上半部形成三个肌群附着区：外侧、后侧和前侧。外侧附着区容纳...

the brachioradialis and extensor carpi radialis muscles; the posterior (extensor) scat is occupied by the extensor digitorum, extensor digiti minimi, extensor carpi ulnaris, anconeus, and supinator muscles. The anterior seat, which is separated into a superficial and deep parts by a fascial sheet, lodges the group of the anterior forearm muscles with the flexor digitorum profundus and flexor pollicis longus muscles lying in the deep part and the pronator teres, flexor carpi radialis, flexor digitorum superficialis, palmaris longus, and flexor carpi ulnaris muscles in the superficial part. In the lower half of the forearm the fascial seats are the same in number but are smaller because they surround tendons extending from the muscles and not the muscles themselves.

> 桡侧腕长伸肌和指浅屈肌；后侧（伸肌）筋膜鞘内包含指深屈肌、小指伸肌、尺侧腕伸肌、肱三头肌和旋后肌。前侧筋膜鞘被一层筋膜膜分隔为浅层和深层，深层内包含屈指深肌和拇长屈肌，浅层内则包含旋前圆韧带、桡侧腕屈肌、指浅屈肌、掌长肌和尺侧腕屈肌。在前臂的下部，筋膜鞘的数量相同，但体积较小，因为它们围绕着从肌肉延伸出的肌腱，而非肌肉本身。

![](_page_378_Figure_6.jpeg)

347. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles on bones of right hand;* palmar surface (schematical representation).

> 右手骨上的肌肉起始点和止点位置；掌面（示意图）。

![](_page_379_Picture_2.jpeg)

348. Muscles of right hand; dorsal surface (3/4).

> 右手肌肉；背侧（3/4）

![](_page_380_Picture_2.jpeg)

349. *Muscles of right hand;* dorsal surface (%).

> 右手肌肉；背侧表面（%）

[The extensor tendons of digits (except for the thumb) are removed, the canals are opened.]

![](_page_381_Figure_2.jpeg)

350. *Synovial sheaths of tendons (vaginae synoviales tendinum) on right hand;* dorsal surface (%).

> 右手肌腱滑膜鞘（tendinum synoviae vaginae）；背侧表面（%）。

#### 13.1.4 FASCIAE O F TH E HAND

> 13.1.4 手部筋膜

The fasciae of ihc hand *(fasciae menus)* (see Figs 330, 335) are direct continuations of the antebrachial fascia.

> 手部筋膜（fasciae manus）（见图330、335）是前臂筋膜的直接延续。

Two fasciae, superficial and deep, are distinguished on the palmar surface of the hand. The superficial fascia is a thin sheet covering the muscles of the thenar and hypothenar. In the central parts of the palm it thickens markedly and is continuous with the palmar aponeurosis *(aponeurosis palmaris).* The aponeurosis is triangular, its base faces the fingers and the apex faces the forearm and blends with the flexor retinaculum. In the region of the apex the tendon of the palmaris longus muscle is inserted into the aponeurosis in which its fibres diverge fan-wise to reach the bases of the fingers where they are grouped into larger bands.

> 手掌的掌面可区分出浅层和深层两层筋膜。浅层筋膜是一层薄的膜，覆盖于拇指侧和小指侧的肌肉上。在手掌中央部分，该筋膜明显增厚，并与掌腱膜（palmar aponeurosis，掌腱膜）连续。掌腱膜呈三角形，其底面朝向手指，顶点朝向前臂，并与屈肌支持带（flexor retinaculum）相延续。在顶点区域，掌长肌的肌腱插入掌腱膜，并在其内纤维呈扇形分散，最终到达手指基部，聚合成较大的束状结构。

The palmar aponeurosis contains besides the longitudinal bands also superficial transverse ligaments *(fasciculi transveTsi),* particularly clearly defined at the base of ihc intcrdigital spaces (Fig. 343).

> 掌腱膜除包含纵行束外，还包含表浅的横行韧带（transverse fasciculi），这些横行韧带在指间蹼（interdigital spaces）底部尤为明显（图343）。

The deep fascia of the hand, which is called the palmar interosseous fascia, is a relatively thin sheet of loose alveolar tissue covering the palmar interossei muscles. The tendons ol the flexor digitorum muscles, vessels, and nerves lie between the deep fascia and the palmar aponeurosis.

> 手的深筋膜称为掌中隔筋膜，是一层相对较薄的疏松蜂窝组织，覆盖在掌中隔肌上。屈指肌腱、血管和神经位于深筋膜与掌腱膜之间。

The superficial and the deep fascia blend on the sides to form a space in which the flexor tendons and the lumbrical muscles pass.

> 浅层筋膜和深层筋膜在两侧融合，形成一个空间，屈肌腱和蚓状肌通过此空间。

![](_page_382_Picture_8.jpeg)

351. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles on bones of right hand;* dorsal aspect (schematical representation).

> 右手骨肌起始与附着点；手背方面（示意图）。

The palmar fascia of the fingers forms fibrous flexor shealhs of the ringers *(vaginaeJibrosae digitorum manus)* in which the digitorum fiexor tendons stretch. These sheaths are lined with a synovial membrane and their walls are strengthened by ligaments. The best dcveloped among these sheaths is the annular part of the fibrous flexor sheath *(pars anularis vaginae Jibrosae).* Collateral ligaments *(Itgamenta eollateralia)* are also present here.

> 手指的掌侧筋膜形成纤维性屈肌鞘（vaginae fibrosae digitorum manus），屈肌腱在此鞘内滑动。这些鞘内衬有滑膜膜，其壁由韧带加强。这些鞘中发育最完善的是纤维性屈肌鞘的环状部（pars anularis vaginae fibrosae）。此处还存在侧副韧带（ligamenta collateralia）。

#### 13.1.5 SYNOVIAL SHEATHS OF MUSCLE TENDONS O F TH E HAND

> 13.1.5 手部肌腱滑膜鞘

On the palmar surface are five synovial sheaths of the flexor tendons of fingers *(vaginae synoviales digitorum manus)* (Figs 346, 350) which are isolated from one another. The largest, the common synovial sheath of the flexor tendons *(vagina synovialis communis musculorum jlexorum digitorum manus)* is lodged in the carpal tunnel and contains the tendons of the flexor digitorum sublimis and profundus muscles emerging onto the hand. This sheath is also connected with the sheath of the little finger which contains the flexor tendons extending to this finger.

> 在掌面有五条手指屈肌腱的滑膜鞘（指滑膜鞘，vaginae synoviales digitorum manus）（图346、350），它们彼此分离。其中最大的一条是屈肌腱的共同滑膜鞘（屈肌共同滑膜鞘，vagina synovialis communis musculorum flexorum digitorum manus），位于腕管内，包含屈指浅肌和深肌的肌腱，这些肌腱从手掌发出。该滑膜鞘还与小指的滑膜鞘相连，后者包含延伸至小指的屈肌腱。

Three sheaths of an identical type are on the palmar surface of the index, middle, and ring lingers. They arise on the level of the metacarpophalangcal joints and reach the base of the distal phalanges.

> 示指、中指和环指的掌面各有相同类型的三束筋膜鞘。这些筋膜鞘起始于掌骨-指骨关节水平，延伸至远节指骨基底部。

The sheaths contain the tendons of the flexor digitorum sublimis and llexor digitorum profundus muscles.

> 鞘内包含屈指浅肌和屈指深肌的肌腱。

There is a separate synovial sheath of the flexor pollicis longus tendon *(vagina tendinis muscult jlexoris pollicis longi).* It is lodged in the carpal tunnel lateral to the common synovial sheath of the

> 屈肌长腱（flexor pollicis longus tendon）有一个独立的滑膜鞘（vagina tendinis musculi flexoris pollicis longi）。它位于共同滑膜鞘的桡侧，处于腕管内。

flexor tendons and runs to the thumb to be inserted into base of the distal phalanx.

> 屈肌腱并延伸至拇指，最终插入远节指骨基底部。

On the dorsal surface of the hand the dorsal fascia of the hand *(fascia dorsalis manus)* covering the dorsal interossei muscles contributes to the formation of the synovial sheaths.

> 手背的背侧手筋膜（fascia dorsalis manus）覆盖手背内侧肌（dorsal interossei muscles），参与形成滑膜鞘。

Six synovial sheaths are located on the dorsal surface of the hand (Fig. 350). Each contains tendons of certain muscles stretching on the dorsal surface of the forearm. The sheaths are located under the extensor rctinaculum where the tendons pass from the forearm to the hand. Counting from the radial side, the first sheath contains the tendons of the abductor pollicis longus and the extensor pollicis brevis muscles; the second sheath lodges the tendons of the extensor carpi radialis muscles; the third invests the tendon of the extensor pollicis longus muscle; the fourth contains the tendon of the extensor digitorum and extensor incidis muscles; the fifth lodges the tendon of the extensor digiti minimi muscle, and the sixth sheath contains the tendon of the extensor carpi ulnaris muscle.

> 手背侧面上有六条滑膜鞘（图350）。每条鞘内包含一些在前臂背侧延伸的肌肉腱。这些鞘位于伸肌支持带（extensor retinaculum）下方，是肌腱从前臂向手部过渡的路径。从桡侧开始依次为：第一条鞘包含拇长展肌和拇短伸肌的肌腱；第二条鞘容纳桡侧腕长伸肌的肌腱；第三条鞘包裹拇长伸肌的肌腱；第四条鞘包含指伸肌和小指伸肌的肌腱；第五条鞘容纳小指伸肌的肌腱；第六条鞘包含尺侧腕伸肌的肌腱。

#### 13.1.6 T HE AXILLARY FOSSA

> 13.1.6 腋窝窝（腋窝）

The axillary fossa, or armpit *(fossa axillaris)* (see Fig. 312) is a depression between the lateral surface of the thoracic wall and the medial surface of the upper arm. It is clearly defined in maximum abduction of the upper arm.

> 腋窝（腋窝，fossa axillaris）（见图312）是位于胸壁外侧表面与上臂内侧表面之间的凹陷区域。在上臂最大程度外展时，腋窝的边界尤为清晰。

With removal of the skin covering the fossa, the underlying fascia and the loose fatty tissue, a large axillary cavity *(cavum axiltare)* is exposed which rather resembles in shape a four-sided pyramid whose apex faces upwards and the base downwards. The base of the pyramid is also the lower aperture of the axillary cavity. The upper aperture of the axillary cavity forms in the region of the apex.

> 去除覆盖腋窝的皮肤后，可见其下方的筋膜和疏松脂肪组织，暴露出一个较大的腋窝腔（cavum axillare），其形状更像一个四面体，其顶点朝上，底面朝下。该四面体的底面同时也是腋窝腔的下口。腋窝腔的上口则形成于四面体的顶点区域。

Four walls limiting the axillary fossa are distinguished: medial, lateral, anterior, and posterior. The medial wall is formed by the scrratus anterior muscle; the lateral by the coracobrachialis muscle and the short head of the biceps brachii muscle; the anterior wall is formed by the pectoralis major and minor muscles, and the posterior wall is formed by the subscapularis, teres major, and latissimus dorsi muscles.

> 腋窝的四壁可区分：内侧壁、外侧壁、前壁和后壁。内侧壁由胸大肌前部形成；外侧壁由喙肱肌和肱二头肌短头形成；前壁由胸大肌和胸小肌形成；后壁由肩胛下肌、大圆肌和背阔肌形成。

When the arm is abducted another two openings are seen in the axillary fossa which are formed by the passage of the long head of the triceps brachii muscle between the teres major and teres minor muscles. A three-sided opening *(foramen trilaterum)* is bounded by the medial border of the long head laterally, by the teres minor muscle superiorly, and by the teres major muscle inferiorly. Laterally of the long head of the triceps brachii muscle is a four-sided opening *(foramen auadrilaterum)* whose medial side is the lateral surface of the long head of the triceps brachii muscle, the upper side is the teres minor muscle (from the posterior aspect) or the subscapularis muscle (from the anterior aspect), the lower side is the teres major muscle, and the lateral side is the humcrus. The axillary fossa is filled with loose fatty tissue containing many vessels, lymph nodes, and nerves.

> 当上肢外展时，在腋窝处还可看到另外两个孔隙，这些孔隙是由三角肌和小圆肌之间的臂三头肌长头通过所形成。一个三边孔（trilaterum foramen）由臂三头肌长头的内侧边界、小圆肌的上方以及大圆肌的下方所围成。臂三头肌长头的外侧为一个四边孔（quadrilaterum foramen），其内侧为臂三头肌长头的外侧面，上方为小圆肌（从后方观察）或肩胛下肌（从前方观察），下方为大圆肌，外侧为肱骨。腋窝内填充着疏松的脂肪组织，内含许多血管、淋巴结和神经。

#### 13.1.7 T H E CUBITAL FOSSA

> 13.1.7 肘窝

The cubital fossa *(fossa cubitalis)* (see Fig. 314) is in the anterior cubital region *(regio cubiti anterior).* The fossa proper is seen only when the skin and the fatty tissue filling the fossa are removed.

> 肘窝（cubital fossa，fossa cubitalis）（见图314）位于前臂肘部区域（regio cubiti anterior）。只有当去除皮肤及填充肘窝内的脂肪组织后，才能看到真正的肘窝结构。

The cubital fossa is bounded by the brachialis muscle superi-

> 肘窝由肱二头肌和肱肌构成其上界。

orly, by the pronator teres muscle medially, and by the brachioradialis muscle laterally. Superficial and deep vessels and nerves pass in it.

> 其内侧由旋前圆肌覆盖，外侧由桡侧腕长伸肌覆盖。浅层和深层的血管及神经穿过其中。

# MUSCLES OF THE LOWER LIMB

> 下肢肌肉

## 1 *Musculi membri inferioris*

> 1 下肢肌肉

## 2 REGIONS OF THE LOWER LIMB

> 2 下肢的两个区域

The following are the regions of the lower limb *(regiones membri inferioris)* (Figs 353, 365).

> 以下为下肢的区域（regiones membri inferioris）（见图353、365）。

- 1. The gluteal region *(regio glutea)* is continuous with the posterior femoral region. Its upper boundary is formed by the iliac crest, the lower boundary is the fold of the buttock *(sulots glutens* s. *plica glutea).* 
  - 2. The femoral regions:
- (a) the anterior femoral region *(regio femoris anterior)* corresponds to the location of the quadriceps femoris and sartorius muscles. The lower boundary line passes 4 cm above the patella;
- (b) the posterior femoral region *(regio femoris posterior)* corresponds to the space bounded superiorly by the fold of the buttock and inferiorly by a transverse line drawn 3-4 cm above the base of the patella.
  - 3. The regions of the knee:
- (a) the anterior region of the knee *(regio genus anterior)* is on the anterior, lateral, and medial surfaces of the knee. It includes the patellar region which corresponds to the contours of the patella and the femoral condyles;

> 臀区（regio glutea）与股后区连续。其上界由髂嵴构成，下界为臀褶（sulcus gluteus s. plica glutea）。

股区：
(a) 股前区（regio femoris anterior）对应股四头肌和缝匠肌所在的位置。其下界线位于髌骨上方4 cm处；
(b) 股后区（regio femoris posterior）对应于上界为臀褶、下界为自髌骨基底上方3-4 cm处作一横线所围成的区域。

膝部区域：
(a) 膝前区（reg. genus anterior）位于膝关节的前、外侧和内侧表面。该区包括髌骨区，对应于髌骨的轮廓及股骨髁的形态；

- (b) the posterior region of the knee *(regio genus posterior)* is on the posterior surface of the knee. It includes the popliteal fossa *(fossa poplitea).* 
  - 4. The crural regions:
- (a) the anterior crural region *(regio crurus anterior)* extends from the tibial tuberosity to the level of the base of the malleoli and occupies the anterior surface of the leg;
- (b) the posterior crural region *(regio cruris posterior)* including the calf which is the most protruding upper part of this region.
  - 5. The regions of the foot:
- (a) the dorsum of the foot *(dorsum pedis)* is on the dorsal and lateral and medial surfaces of the foot and extends from the bend of the ankle joint to the proximal phalanges of the toes;
- (b) the region of the sole of the foot *(planta pedis)* is on the plantar surface of the foot and stretches from the distal areas of the posterior surface of the calcaneum to the proximal phalanges of the toes;
- (c) the calcanean region *(regio caUanea)* corresponds lo the posterior surface of the calcaneum.

> (b) 膝后区（regio genus posterior）位于膝关节的后侧。该区包括腘窝（fossa poplitea）。  
小腿区域：  
(a) 小腿前区（regio cruris anterior）从胫骨粗隆延伸至踝骨基底部水平，占据小腿的前侧表面；  
(b) 小腿后区（regio cruris posterior）包括腓肠肌，是该区最突出的上部。  
足部区域：  
(a) 足背（dorsum pedis）位于足的背侧、外侧和内侧表面，从踝关节的弯曲处延伸至趾骨近端；  
(b) 足底区（planta pedis）位于足的跖侧表面，从跟骨后侧的远端延伸至趾骨近端；  
(c) 跟骨区（regio calcanea）对应跟骨的后侧表面。

## 3 MUSCLES OF THE LOWER LIMB

> 3 下肢肌肉

features, namely the muscles of the hip joint and the muscles of leg, and the muscles of the foot (Figs 352-401).

> 特征包括髋关节肌肉、腿部肌肉以及足部肌肉（图352-401）。

The muscles of the lower limbs *(musculi membri inferioris)* are di- the free lower limb. The muscles of the last-named group arc in vided into two groups according to their topographo-anatomical turn subdivided into the muscles of the thigh, the muscles of the

> 下肢的肌肉（musculi membri inferioris）可分为两组，分别位于自由下肢的不同部位。最后一组肌肉又进一步分为股肌群和小腿肌群。
