352. *Outlines of muscles of right lower limb;* anterior aspect

> 右下肢肌肉概要；前面观

![](_page_386_Picture_2.jpeg)

353. *Regions and lines of skin incisions on lower limb.*

> 下肢皮肤切口区域及切口线。

(Blue line—area boundaries; red **line — skin** incisions most suitable for exposure of muscles in dissection.)

> （蓝线—区域边界；红线—最适合暴露肌肉的皮肤切口。）

## 4 MUSCLE S **O F TH E HI P JOIN T**

> 4 髋关节肌肉

The muscles of the hip joint are grouped into internal and external muscles.

> 髋关节的肌肉可分为内肌群和外肌群。

#### 4.1.1 The Internal Group of Muscles of the Hip Joinl

> 4.1.1 髋关节内肌群

- 1. The psoas major muscle *(musculus psoas major).*
- 2. The psoas minor muscle *(musculus psoas minor).*
- 3. The iliacus muscle *(musculus iliacus)*
- 4. The iliopsoas muscle *(musculus iliopsoas).*
- 5. The obturator internus muscle *(musculus obturatorius interna).*
- 6. The piriformis muscle *(musculus pirijormis).*
- 7. The coccygeus muscle *(musculus coccygeus).*

> 腰大肌（musculus psoas major）  
腰小肌（musculus psoas minor）  
髂肌（musculus iliacus）  
髂腰肌（musculus iliopsoas）  
内收肌（musculus obturatorius internus）  
梨状肌（musculus piriformis）  
尾骨肌（musculus coccygeus）

#### 4.1.2 **The** External Group of Muscles of the Hip Joint

> 4.1.2 髋关节外肌群

- 1. The gluteus maximus muscle *(musculus gluteus maximus).*
- 2. The gluteus medius muscle *(musculus gluteus medius).*
- 3. The gluteus minimus muscle *(musculus gluteus minimus).*
- 4. The quadratus femoris muscle *(musculus guadratus femoris),*
- 5. The gemellus superior muscle *(musculus gemellus superior).*
- 6. The gemellus inferior muscle *(musculus gemellus inferior).*
- *nus).*  7. The obturator externus muscle *(musculus obturatorius exter- •* 
  - 8. The tensor fasciae lalac muscle *(musculus tensor fasciae latae).*

> 臀大肌（musculus gluteus maximus）  
臀中肌（musculus gluteus medius）  
臀小肌（musculus gluteus minimus）  
股方肌（musculus quadratus femoris）  
上孖肌（musculus gemellus superior）  
下孖肌（musculus gemell, inferior）  
闭孔外肌（musculus obturatorius externus）  
阔筋膜张肌（musculus tensor fasciae latae）

## 5 T H E INTERNAL GROU P OF MUSCLES OF TH E HIP JOIN T

> 髋关节内侧肌群 /no_think

- L The psoas major muscle *(musculus psoas major)* (see Fig. 297) is long and spindle-shaped. It takes origin by five slips from the lateral surface of the bodies of the twelfth thoracic and upper four lumbar vertebrae and the respective intervertebral cartilages. Slips which are located deeper arise from the transverse processes of all lumbar vertebrae. Becoming slightly narrower, the muscle runs downwards and a little laterally and fuses with the fibres of the iliacus muscle to form a common iliopsoas muscle.
- 2- The psoas minor muscle *(musculus psoas minor)* (see Fig. 297) is inconstant, thin, and spindle-shaped. It lies on the anterior surface of the psoas major muscle. It arises from the lateral surface of the bodies of the twelfth thoracic and first lumbar vertebrae and stretches downwards; its tendon is continuous with the fascia iliaca and is inserted together with it into the pectineal line and the iliopubic eminence.

> L 腰大肌（musculus psoas major）（见图297）呈细长纺锤形。它起自第十二胸椎和上四节腰椎椎体的外侧表面，以及相应的椎间软骨。位于深层的肌束则起自所有腰椎的横突。腰大肌逐渐变细，向下并向外侧延伸，与髂肌纤维融合形成共同的髂腰肌。
2- 腰小肌（musculus psoa minor）（见图297）变异较大，呈细长纺锤形。它位于腰大肌的前表面。起自第十二胸椎和第一腰椎椎体的外侧表面，向下延伸；其肌腱连续于髂筋膜，并与之一起附着于耻骨梳和髂耻隆起。[!note]- 术语说明
“psoas minor” 通常译作“腰小肌”，是腰方肌的一部分，有时可缺失或变异。

Action: tenses the fascia iliaca.

> 作用：紧张髂筋膜。

Blood supply: the lumbar arteries.

> 血供：腰动脉。

Innovation: muscular branches of the lumbar plexus (L,-L^).

> 创新：腰丛的肌支（L1-L4）

3. The iliacus muscle *(musculus iliacus)* (sec Fig. 297) fills the iliac fossa completely and arises from its walls, ll resembles a triangle in shape with the apex facing downwards.

> 髂肌（musculus iliacus）（见图297）完全填充髂窝，其起始点位于髂窝的壁上。髂肌形状呈三角形，尖端朝下。[!note]- 术语说明 “髂肌” 是标准的中文医学术语，对应拉丁学名“musculus iliacus”，在解剖学中常用于描述该肌肉的名称。

The fibres forming the muscle converge fan-wise towards the arcuate line and blend with those of the psoas major to form the iliopsoas muscle.

> 形成该肌肉的纤维呈扇形汇聚至弓状线，并与腰大肌纤维融合，形成髂腰肌。

4. The iliopsoas muscle *(musculus iliopsoas)* (see Fig. 297) forms from fusion of the distal muscle fibres of the iliacus muscle and the psoas major muscle. It emerges from the pelvic cavity through ihe lacuna musculomm and runs downwards on the anterior surface of the hip joint to be inserted by a thin short tendon into the lesser trochantcr of the femur; the bursa of the psoas major tendon *(bursa ileopectinea)* is lodged between the capsule of the hip joint and the tendon and often communicates with the cavity of the **hip**  joint.

> 髂腰肌（musculus iliopsoas）（见图297）由髂肌和腰大肌的远端肌纤维融合形成。它从骨盆腔通过肌管（lacuna musculomm）穿出，沿髋关节前表面下行，以一条细短的肌腱附着于股骨小转子；腰大肌肌腱的滑囊（bursa ileopectinea）位于髋关节囊与肌腱之间，通常与髋关节腔相通。

Action: flexes the hip joint and rotates the thigh medially. When the thigh is fixed the muscle flexes the trunk forwards.

> 动作：屈髋关节并使大腿内旋。当大腿固定时，该肌可使躯干向前屈曲。

Blood supply: the iliolumbar and the deep circumflex iliac arteries.

> 血供：髂腰动脉和深髂腹下动脉。

Innervation: the muscular branches of the lumbar plexus

> 支配：腰丛的肌肉支

5. The obturator internus muscle *(musculus obturatorius internus)*  (Fig. 360) is flattened and its-muscular fibres are directed slightly fan-wise. It takes origin by a wide part from the inner surface of the hip bone around the obturator membrane and from its inner surface. A small cleft between the bands of the muscle and the obturator groove of the pubic bone is transformed into the obturator canal *(canalis obturatorius)* transmitting vessels and nerves. Converging, the muscle fibres are directed laterally, pass over the lesser sciatic notch almost at a right angle, leave the pelvic cavity through the lesser sciatic foramen, and are inserted by a short strong tendon into the trochanteric fossa. Where the bands pass over the lesser sciatic notch lies the bursa of the obturator internus muscle *(bursa ischiadica musculi obturatorii interni).*

> 闭孔内肌（musculus obturatorius internus）（图360）呈扁平状，其肌纤维呈轻微扇形排列。该肌起自髋骨内侧面上围绕闭孔膜及其内侧表面的广泛区域。肌束与闭孔之间的小裂隙转变为闭孔管（canalis obturatorius），闭孔管内通过血管和神经。肌纤维向侧方汇聚，经过小骨盆出口处的闭孔小切迹，几乎呈直角方向穿过骨盆腔，经闭孔小孔离开骨盆腔，最终以一条短而强健的肌腱插入大转子窝。闭孔内肌的肌束经过闭孔小切迹处为闭孔内肌滑囊（bursa ischiadica musculi obturatorii interni）。

The obturator interims muscle is divided topographically into two parts, one larger, extending to the exit from the pelvic cavity and called the intrapelvic part, and the other, smaller, tendinous part stretching under the gluteus maximus muscle and called the extrapelvic part.

> 闭孔内肌可按解剖位置分为两部分，一部分较大，延伸至骨盆腔出口，称为盆内部；另一部分较小，呈肌腱样结构，位于臀大肌下方，称为盆外部。

Action: supinates the thigh.

> 动作：使大腿外旋。

Blood supply: the inferior glutcal, obturator, and internal pudendal arteries.

> 供血：臀下动脉、闭孔动脉和阴部内动脉。

Innervation: muscular branches of the sacral plexus [L\*-!^; SrS<sup>2</sup> (S<sup>3</sup> )].

> 支配神经：骶丛的肌肉支 [L\*-!^; SrS<sup>2</sup> (S<sup>3</sup> )]。

6. The piriformis muscle *(musculus piriformis)* (Fig. 357) is shaped like a flat isosceles triangle whose base arises from the anterior surface of the sacrum lateral to the anterior sacral foramina, between the second and fourth foramina. Converging, the muscle fibres are directed laterally and emerge from the cavity of the true pelvis through the greater sciatic foramen; the muscle then gives place to a narrow and short tendon which is inserted into the apex of the greater trochanter. At the place of the insertion is the synovial bursa of the piriformis muscle *(bursa musculi piriformis).* When passing through the greater sciatic foramen the muscle fails to fill it completely but leaves small slits along the upper and lower borders which transmit vessels and nerves. The slit formed along the upper border of the piriformis muscle is called the suprapiriformis foramen and that formed along the lower border is the infrapiriformis foramen.

> 梨状肌（musculus piriformis）（图357）呈扁平等腰三角形，其底面起自骶骨前表面，位于前骶孔的外侧，介于第二和第四骶孔之间。肌纤维向两侧汇聚，向外延伸，通过真骨盆的腔体，经大 sciatic 管（greater sciatic foramen）出骨盆；随后肌转变为一条细短的肌腱，插入至大转子的顶点。在肌腱附着处有梨状肌滑膜囊（bursa musculi piriformis）。当梨状肌通过大 sciatic 管时，不能完全填充该孔，而在其上、下缘留有小的裂隙，这些裂隙可让血管和神经通过。梨状肌上缘形成的裂隙称为梨状肌上孔（suprapiriformis foramen），下缘形成的裂隙称为梨状肌下孔（infrapiriformis foramen）。

Action: supinates the thigh and assists in its abduction.

> 动作：使大腿旋后，并协助其外展。

![](_page_388_Picture_0.jpeg)

354. *Muscles and fasciae of right thigh;* anterior aspect (%). (Skin and subcutaneous layer are removed.)

> 右大腿的肌肉和筋膜；前侧（%）。（皮肤及皮下层已去除。）

Blood supply: the superior and inferior gluteal arteries. Innervation: muscular branches of the sacral plexus [S,-Ss(Ss)J.

> 血供：臀上动脉和臀下动脉。神经支配：骶丛的肌支 [S1-S5]。

7. Th e coccygeus muscle *(musculus coccygeus)* (Figs 360, 361) is a thin sheet with a relatively small number of muscle fibres. Arising from the ischial spine, it passes on the medial side of the sacrospinous ligament and is inserted into the lateral surface of the lower two sacral and upper two or three coccygeal vertebrae.

> 尾骨肌（musculus coccygeus）（图360、361）是一片较薄的肌肉，肌纤维数量相对较少。它起自坐骨大孔，沿骶棘韧带的内侧走行，最终附着于下两节骶骨和上两至三节尾骨椎体的外侧表面。

Action: in man the muscle is rudimentary; on contraction it contributes to strengthening the pelvic walls.

> 作用：在人类中，该肌肉呈原始状态；收缩时有助于加强骨盆壁。

Blood supply: muscular branches of the internal pudendal artery.

> 供血：阴部内动脉的肌支。

Innervation: muscular branches of the pudendal nerve.

> 支配：阴部神经的肌支。

![](_page_389_Picture_2.jpeg)

355. *Muscles of right hip joint and thigh;* anterior aspect *(Y4).*

> 右侧髋关节和大腿肌群；前面（Y4）

![](_page_390_Picture_2.jpeg)

356. *Muscles of right hip joint and thigh;* anterior aspect (%).

> 右侧髋关节和大腿肌群；前面（%）

(The rectus femoris and sartorius muscles and part of the iliopsoas muscle are removed.)

> （股直肌、缝匠肌及部分髂腰肌被切除。）

![](_page_391_Picture_2.jpeg)

357. *Muscles of right hip joint and thigh;* anterior aspect (%).

> 右侧髋关节和大腿肌群；前面（%）

![](_page_392_Picture_2.jpeg)

358. *Muscles of right hip joint and thigh;* anterior aspect (14)-

> 右侧髋关节和大腿肌群；前侧（14）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_393_Picture_2.jpeg)

359. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles and articular capsules on right thigh;* anterior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右侧大腿肌肉和关节囊的起始与附着部位；前侧（示意图）。

#### 5.1.1 T H E EXTERNAL GROUP OF MUSCLES OF TH E HIP JOIN T

> 5.1.1 髋关节外侧肌群

1. The gluteus inaximus muscle *(musadus gluteus maximus)* resembles a rhombus in shape. It is formed of large fibres and is strong, flat, and 2-3 cm thick. It covers the greater trochanter and lhe other muse les i>( this group. The muscle arises from the posterior part of the external surface of the iliac bone to the back of the posterior gluteal line, from the lateral borders of the sacrum and coccyx, and from the sacrotubcrous ligament. The muscle fibres stretch obliquely downwards and laterally and the upper ones are inserted into the fascia lata which is continuous with the iliotibial tract, while the lower fibres are inserted into the gluteal tuberosity of the femur. The trochanteric bursa of the gluteus maximus muscle *(bursa trochanterica muscuii glutei maximi)* is lodged here between the greater trochanter and the muscle.

> 臀大肌（musculus gluteus maximus）在形状上呈菱形。它由粗大的肌纤维组成，肌质强而扁平，厚度约为2-3厘米。它覆盖股骨大转子以及该组其他肌肉。该肌起自髂骨外侧面的后部，至臀大肌线下方的背部；起自骶骨和尾骨的外侧缘，以及骶结节韧带。肌纤维斜向下外方向延伸，其中上部纤维插入阔筋膜，阔筋膜与髂胫束相连；下部纤维则插入股骨大转子。臀大肌的转子滑囊（bursa trochanterica musculi glutei maximi）位于该肌与股骨大转子之间。

Action: brings the trunk to an erect position when it is bent forwards, extends the thigh, and tenses the fascia lata of the thigh.

> 作用：当躯干前屈时，使躯干恢复直立位置；伸展大腿，并紧张大腿的阔筋膜张肌筋膜。

Blood supply: the superior and inferior gluteal, medial circumflex, and profunda femoris (perforating artery prima) arteries.

> 血供：臀上动脉、臀下动脉、股深动脉（穿通动脉初支）及旋股内侧动脉。

Innervation: inferior gluteal nerve (plexus sacralis) (L\$, Si-S2).

> 支配神经：臀下神经（骶丛，L5-S2）。

2. The gluteus medius muscle *(muscutus gluteus medius)*  (Fig. 369) is under the gluteus maximus. It resembles a triangle in shape. The muscle is thick and consists of two layers, superficial and deep. The muscle fibres run fan-wise; they arise widely from the external surface of the ala of the ilium between the anterior gluteal line in front, the iliac crest above, and the posterior gluteal line below. Then all the muscle fibres converge to form a strong common tendon which is inserted into the apex of the greater trochanter; the trochanteric bursa of the gluteus medius muscle *(bursa trochanterica muscuii glutei medit)* is lodged here.

> 臀中肌（musculus gluteus medius）（图369）位于臀大肌的深层。其形态呈三角形。该肌较厚，由浅层和深层两层组成。肌纤维呈扇形排列，其起点广泛分布于髂骨翼的外侧表面，位于前方的臀前线、上方的髂嵴和下方的臀后线之间。随后，所有肌纤维汇聚形成一条强健的共同肌腱，插入到大转子的顶端；臀中肌的转子滑囊（bursa trochanterica musculi glutei medii）即位于此处。

Action: abducts the thigh, with the anterior fibres rotating it medially and the posterior fibres rotating it laterally; assists in bringing erect the trunk when it is bent forwards.

> 动作：使大腿外展，前部纤维使其内旋，后部纤维使其外旋；当躯干前屈时，协助将躯干竖起。

Blood supply: the superior gluteal and lateral circumflex arteries.

> 血供：上臀动脉和臀中动脉。

Innervation: the superior gluteal nerve (sacral plexus) (L1-L5, **s,).**

> 支配神经：臀上神经（骶丛）（L1-L5，s）。

3. The gluteus minimus muscle *(muscutus gluteus minimus)*  (Fig. 369) resembles the gluteus medius in shape but is much thinner across, and is completely covered by it. The muscle arises from the external surface of the ilium between the anterior and inferior gluteal lines. The muscle fibres then converge to be continuous with a tendon which is inserted into the anterior border ol the greater trochanter. The trochanteric bursa of the gluteus minimus muscle *(bursa trochanterica muscuii glutei minimi)* lies here.

> 臀小肌（musculus gluteus minimus）（图369）在形状上与臀中肌相似，但其横截面要薄得多，并完全被臀中肌覆盖。该肌起自髂骨的外侧面，位于前下臀线之间。肌纤维随后汇聚成腱，附着于大转子的前缘。臀小肌的转子滑囊（bursa trochanterica musculi glutei minimi）即位于此处。

Action: similar to that of the gluteus medius muscle, it abducts the limb and contributes to bringing the trunk to an erect position when it is bent.

> 作用：与臀中肌类似，可使肢体外展，并在躯干前屈时协助将躯干恢复至直立位置。

Blood supply: the superior gluteal and lateral circumflex arteries.

> 血供：上臀动脉和臀中动脉。

Innervation: the superior gluteal nerve (plexus sacralis) (L|-L^, S,).

> 支配：臀上神经（骶丛）（L4-L5，S1）。

4. The quadratus femoris muscle *(musculus quadratus femoris)*  (Fig. 370) has the appearance of a relatively thick rectangle which is covered by the gluteus maximus muscle posteriorly. It takes origin from the lateral surface of the ischial tuberosity and is inserted into the trochanteric crest and reaches the greater trochantcr.

> 股方肌（musculus quadratus femoris）（图370）呈相对较厚的矩形外观，其后方被臀大肌覆盖。该肌起自坐骨结节的外侧表面，止于大转子嵴并到达大转子。

Action: rotates the thigh laterally.

> 动作：使大腿外旋。

Blood supply: the inferior gluteal, medial circumflex, and obturator arteries.

> 血供：臀下动脉、股方肌动脉和闭孔动脉。

Innovation: the sciatic nerve (sacral plexus) (L4-L5, S|).

> 创新：坐骨神经（骶丛）（L4-L5，S1）。

5. The gemellus superior muscle *(musculus gemellus superior)*  (Fig. 371) is a small slip arising from the ischial spine; it is inserted into the trochanteric fossa. The muscle adjoins the superior border of the obturator inlernus tendon after it emerges from the pelvic cavitv.

> 股方肌上部（musculus gemellus superior）（图371）是一个小的肌束，起自坐骨棘；其肌腱插入大转子窝。该肌在从骨盆腔内发出后，邻近闭孔内肌腱的上缘。

Action: rotates the thigh laterally.

> 动作：使大腿外旋。

Blood supply: the inferior gluteal and internal pudendal arteries.

> 供血：臀下动脉和阴部内动脉。

Innervation: branches of the sacral plexus (L^-L^, S)).

> 支配神经：骶丛的分支（L^1^-L^4^，S^1^-S^4^）[!note]- 术语说明
“Sacral plexus” 通常译作“骶丛”，是腰骶部重要的神经丛，由腰神经和骶神经的前支组成。

6. The gemellus inferior muscle *(musculus gemellus inferior)*  (Fig. 371) resembles the gemellus superior muscle in shape and lies below the tendon of the obturator interims muscle. It arises from the ischial tuberosity and is inserted into the trochanteric fossa.

> 股方肌下部（musculus gemellus inferior）（图371）在形态上与股方肌上部相似，位于闭孔内肌腱的下方。其起自坐骨结节，止于大转子窝。

Action: rotates the thigh laterally.

> 动作：使大腿外旋。

Blood supply and innervation are the same as in the case of the gemellus superior muscle.

> 血供和神经支配与上孖肌的情况相同。

7. The obturator externus muscle *(musculus obturatorius externus)* (see Fig. 297) is shaped like an irregular triangle. It arises by its widest part from the obturator membrane and the bony edge of the obturator foramen, after which the muscle fibres converge fan-wise and are continuous with a tendon lying on the posterior surface of the capsule of the hip joint. The muscle is inserted into the trochanteric fossa next to the obturator internus muscle.

> 外旋肌（musculus obturatorius externus）（见图297）呈不规则三角形。该肌由其最宽部分起始于闭孔膜及闭孔的骨性边缘，随后肌纤维呈扇形汇聚，并与位于髋关节囊后表面的腱相连。该肌插入至闭孔内肌（obturator internus muscle）附近的大转子窝。

Action: rotates the thigh laterally.

> 动作：使大腿外旋。

Blood supply: the obturator and lateral circumflex arteries.

> 血供：闭孔动脉和旋髂动脉。

Innervation: the obturator nerve (lumbar plexus) KL2), U-U)J:

> 支配神经：阴部神经（腰丛） KL2)，U-U)J:

8. The tensor fasciae latae muscle *(musculus tensor fasciae latae)*  (Fig. 355) is flat and slightly elongated. It lies on the auterolateral surface of the pelvis and its distal end blends with the fascia lata femoris. The muscle arises from the outer lip of the iliac crest closer to the anterior superior iliac spine. The muscle fibres are directed vertically downwards to be continuous with the iliotibial tract.

> 股薄肌（musculus tensor fasciae latae）（图355）呈扁平状且略呈延长。它位于骨盆的外侧缘表面，其远端与股外侧筋膜（fascia lata femoris）相融合。该肌起自髂嵴的外侧缘，靠近前上髂棘处。肌纤维垂直向下延伸，与髂胫束（iliotibial tract）连续。

Action: tenses the fascia lata and helps in flexion of the thigh. Blood supply: the superior gluteal and lateral circumflex arteries.

> 作用：紧张阔筋膜，协助大腿屈曲。血供：臀上动脉和臀中动脉。

Innervation: the superior gluteal nerve (sacral plexus) (L4-I4, S,)-

> 支配：臀上神经（骶丛）（L4-I4，S，）

## 6 MUSCLES OF THE FREE LOWER LIMB

> 6 自由下肢的肌肉

The muscles of the free lower limb are divided into the muscles of the thigh, the muscles of the leg, and the muscles of the foot.

> 下肢的自由部分肌肉可分为股部肌肉、腿部肌肉和足部肌肉。

#### 6.1.1 MUSCLES OF TH E THIG H

> 6.1.1 大腿肌肉

The muscles of the thigh *(musculi femoris)* form an anterior, medial, and lateral groups. Extensors are predominantly related to the first, adductors to the second, and flexors to the third group.

> 大腿的肌肉（股肌）可分为前群、内侧群和外侧群。伸肌主要与第一群相关，加压肌（加压肌）主要与第二群相关，屈肌主要与第三群相关。

- 1. The gracilis muscle *(musculus gracilis).*
- 2. The adductor longus muscle *(musculus adductor longus).*

> gracilis 肌（ gracilis 肌）  
 adductor longus 肌（ adductor longus 肌）

The Medial Group

> 内侧组

- 3. The adductor brevis muscle *(musculus adductor brevis).*
- 4. The adductor magnus muscle *(musculus adductor magnus).*
- 5. The pectineus muscle *(musculus pectineus).*

> 股薄肌（musculus adductor brevis）。  
股大肌（musculus adductor magnus）。  
耻骨肌（musculus pectineus）。

#### 6.1.2 The Anterior Group

> 6.1.2 前组

- 1. The sartorius muscle *(musculus sartorius).*
- 2. The quadriceps femoris muscle *(musculus quadriceps femoris).*
- 3. The articularis genus muscle *(musculus articuUiris genus).*

> 股四头肌（musculus quadriceps femoris）。  
缝匠肌（musculus sartorius）。  
股关节肌（musculus articularis genus）。  

[!note]- 术语说明  
“articularis genus” 是拉丁语，意为“关节相关的”，在解剖学中通常译作“关节肌”，此处指与股关节相关的肌肉。

#### 6.1.3 The Posterior Group

> 6.1.3 后组

- 1. The semitendinosus muscle *(musculus semitendinosus).*
- 2. The semimembranosus muscle *(musculus semimembranosus).*
- 3. The biceps femoris muscle *(musculus biceps femoris).*

> 半腱肌（musculus semitendinosus）。  
半膜肌（musculus semimembranosus）。  
股二头肌（musculus biceps femoris）。

## 7 T HE ANTERIOR GROUP OF MUSCLES OF TH E THIG H

> 7 前组 thigh 肌肉

1. The sartorius muscle *(musculus sartorius)* (Fig. 355) is a straplike and longest muscle in the human body. Lying on the anterior surface of the thigh, it descends spirally, passing to the medial surface, and then curving around the back of the medial epicondyle passes over to the anteromedial surface of the leg. The muscle arises from the anterior superior iliac spine, passes obliquely downwards, and ends as a flat tendon which is inserted into the tubercle of the tibia; some fibres blend with the fascia of the upper part of the leg.

> 股四头肌（musculus quadriceps femoris）（图355）是人体中最长的扁带状肌肉。该肌位于大腿前侧，呈螺旋状向下延伸，经过大腿内侧，绕过内侧髁的后方，再转向小腿的前内侧。该肌起自髂前上棘，斜向下行，最终以扁平的肌腱止于胫骨粗隆；部分肌纤维与小腿上部的筋膜相融合。

Action: flexes the thigh and leg, rotating the thigh laterally and the leg medially thus assisting in crossing the legs.

> 动作：屈曲大腿和小腿，使大腿外旋、小腿内旋，从而协助交叉双腿。

Blood supply: the lateral circumflex and superior genicular arteries and muscular branches of the femoral artery.

> 供血：旋腓动脉、膝上动脉及股动脉的肌支。

Innervation: the femoral nerve (lumbar plexus) (L^-Ls).

> 支配神经：股神经（腰丛）（L1-Ls）。

![](_page_395_Picture_2.jpeg)

**360.** Muscles of right hip joint and thigh  $(\frac{1}{4})$ .

> 右侧髋关节和大腿的肌肉

(The internal muscles of the hip joint, the anterior and medial groups of thigh muscles.)

> （髋关节内侧肌群，大腿前群和内侧群肌肉）

![](_page_396_Picture_2.jpeg)

361. *Muscles of right hip joint and thigh;* medial aspect **00-**

> 右侧髋关节及大腿肌；内侧方面 00-

2. The quadriceps femoris muscle *(musculus quadriceps femoris)*  (Figs 355-359) occupies the anterolateral surface of the thigh and its lower parts extend to the lateral surface. Each of its four heads arises independently, but on reaching the knee they form a common tendon which passes on the anterior surface of the patella and is inserted into the tubercle of the tibia.

> 股四头肌（musculus quadriceps femoris）（图355-359）占据大腿的前外侧表面，其下部延伸至大腿外侧。该肌由四个头组成，每个头独立起源于大腿，但在到达膝关节时，四个头合并形成一个共同的肌腱，该肌腱经过髌骨的前面，并插入胫骨的粗隆。

A. The rectus femoris muscle *(musculus rectus femoris)* is the longest head and occupies the anterior surface of the thigh. It takes origin by a fine tendon from the anterior inferior iliac spine and superior border of the acetabulum and then passes downwards to be continuous with a narrow tendon which fuses with the base and anterior surface of the patella. On reaching the tibia the ten-

> A. 股直肌（musculus rectus femoris）是股四头肌中较长的一头，占据大腿前侧表面。它起自髂前下棘和髋臼上缘的一条细腱，然后向下延伸，与一条较窄的腱连续，该腱与髌骨基底和前表面融合。当该腱到达胫骨时，...

![](_page_397_Figure_4.jpeg)

362. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles and articular capsule on right hip bone;* inner aspect (schematical representation).

> 右侧髋骨上肌肉起始点和附着点以及关节囊的附着部位；内侧方面（示意图）。

don of the muscle is inserted into the tibial tubercle. Below the patella the tendon is called the ligamentum patellae.

> 肌肉的止点插入胫骨粗隆。在髌骨下方，肌腱称为髌韧带。

B. The vastus medialis muscle *(musculus vastus medialis)* occupies the anteromedial surface of the lower half <»f the thigh. The muscle fibres forming it are directed obliquely downwards and anteriorly. In front it is partly covered by the reclus muscle. The vastus medialis muscle arises from the medial lip of the Hnea aspera and runs downwards to be continuous with a wide tendon which partly blends with the common tendon together with the rectus femoris muscle and is partly inserted into the medial border of the patella to fonn the medial retinaculum of the patella.

> B. 股四头肌的内侧头（musculus vastus medialis）占据大腿下部的前内侧表面。构成该肌的肌纤维呈斜向下前方方向。其前方部分被股薄肌所覆盖。股四头肌的内侧头起自股骨粗隆的内侧缘，向下延伸并与一个宽阔的肌腱相连，该肌腱部分与股直肌的共同肌腱融合，部分则附着于髌骨的内侧缘，形成髌骨的内侧滑膜皱襞。

C. The vastus lateraHs muscle *(musculus vastus lateralis)* occu-

> C. 外侧股四头肌（musculus vastus lateralis）位于

![](_page_398_Picture_6.jpeg)

363. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles, ligaments, and articular capsules on right femur;* posterior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右股骨上肌肉、韧带和关节囊的起始点和附着点；后侧（示意图）。

![](_page_399_Picture_2.jpeg)

364. *Outlines of muscles of right lower limb;* posterior aspect-

> 右下肢肌肉概要；后侧方面

![](_page_400_Picture_2.jpeg)

365. *Regions and skin incisions on lower limb.*

> 下肢区域及皮肤切口

(Blue line—area boundaries; red line —skin incisions most suitable for exposure of muscles in dissection.)

> （蓝线—区域边界；红线—最适合暴露肌肉的皮肤切口）

![](_page_401_Picture_2.jpeg)

366. *Muscles and fasciae of right hip joint and thigh;* posterior aspect (14).

> 右侧髋关节及大腿的肌肉和筋膜；后侧（14）

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_402_Picture_2.jpeg)

367. *Muscles and fasciae of right hip joint and thigh;*  posterior aspect (%).

> 右侧髋关节及大腿的肌肉和筋膜；后侧（%）。

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_403_Picture_2.jpeg)

368. Muscles and fasciae of right hip joint and thigh; lateral aspect  $(\frac{1}{4})$ .

> 右侧髋关节及大腿的肌肉和筋膜；外侧方面

![](books/sinelnikov/pic/_page_404_Picture_2.jpeg)

369. *Muscles of hip joint;* posterior aspect (%),

> 髋关节肌肉；后侧（%）

pies almost the entire anterolateral surface of the thigh. It is partly covered by the tensor fasciae laiac muscle in the upper part and by the rectus femoris muscle in front. The muscle libres forming it are directed downwards and forwards.

> 股四头肌几乎覆盖大腿的整个前外侧表面。其上部被阔筋膜张肌部分覆盖，前面则被股直肌覆盖。构成该肌的肌纤维呈向下前方走行。

The muscle arises from the greater irochanter, the intcrlrochanteric line, and the lateral lip of the linea aspera. It runs downwards and ends as a wide tendon part of which fuses with the rectus femoris tendon to form a common tendon and the other part is inserted into the lateral border of the patella to form the lateral retinaculum of the patella.

> 该肌起自大转子、粗隆间线及股骨粗线的外侧唇。肌束向下走行，终末形成一宽腱，其中一部分与股直肌腱融合形成共同腱，另一部分则插入髌骨的外侧缘，形成髌骨外侧支持带。

D. The vastus intermedius muscle *(musculus vastus intermcdixisj*  is on the anterior surface of the thigh between the vastus medialis and vastus latcralis muscles and directly under the rectus femoris muscle. It is the weakest among all the other heads. The vastus intermedius muscle takes origin from the anterior surface of the femur, starting from the intertrochanteric line, runs downwards and gives place (almost in the middle of its length) to a wide tendon which fuses distally with the tendon of the rectus femoris muscle to form the common tendon of the quadriceps muscle.

> D. 股中间肌（musculus vastus intermedius）位于大腿前侧，介于股直肌与股外侧肌之间，位于股直肌的深面。它是所有股四头肌头中最为薄弱的一块。股中间肌起自股骨的前面，起始于大转子线，向下延伸，并在其长度的近中部处形成一个宽阔的肌腱，该肌腱在远端与股直肌的肌腱融合，形成股四头肌的共同肌腱。

The four heads forming the quadriceps femoris muscle are inserted into various areas of the patella and the following bursae are found at the sites of insertion (see Fig. 227): (a) the subcutaneous prepatellar bursa *fbursa subcutanea prtpattllaris)* lying in the subcutaneous fat in front of the patella; (b) the suprapatellar bursa *(bursa suprapatcllaris)* lodged under the quadriceps femoris tendon above the patella; (c) the subcutaneous infrapatellar bursa *(bursa subcutanea infrapatellaris)* lying in front of the ligamentum patellae; (d) the deep infrapatellar bursa *(bursa infrapatellaris profunda)*  lodged at the insertion of the ligainentuui patellae into the tubercle of the tibia, and some other bursae.

> 构成股四头肌的四条肌腱分别插入髌骨的不同区域，以下是在这些插入部位所见的滑囊（见图227）：  
(a) 皮下髌前滑囊（bursa subcutanea prepatellaris），位于髌骨前方的皮下脂肪层中；  
(b) 髌上滑囊（bursa suprapatellaris），位于髌骨上方股四头肌腱下方；  
(c) 皮下髌下滑囊（bursa subcutanea infrapatellaris），位于髌韧带前方；  
(d) 深部髌下滑囊（bursa infrapatellaris profunda），位于髌韧带附着于胫骨粗隆处；此外还有其他一些滑囊。  

[!note]- 术语说明  
“Ligamentum patellae” 通常译作“髌韧带”，是连接髌骨与胫骨的韧带。

Some of these bursae may communicate with the cavity of the knee joint.

> 这些滑膜囊中的某些可能与膝关节腔相通。

Action: contraction of all the heads of the quadriceps femoris

> 动作：股四头肌所有头肌的收缩

muscle extends the leg at the knee joint; the rectus femoris muscle flexes the hip joint.

> 肌肉在膝关节处伸展腿部；股四头肌在髋关节处屈曲。

Blood supply: lateral circumflex and profunda femoris arteries. Innervation: femoral nerve (lumbar plexus) (L^-L-t)-

> 血供：外侧膝上动脉和深部股动脉。神经支配：股神经（腰丛）（L1-L4）

3. The articularis genus muscle *(musculus articularis genus)* (see Figs 225, 359) is a flat sheet of several clearly defined muscle fibres. It is on the anterior surface of the thigh under the vastus intermedius muscle. It takes origin from the anterior surface of the lower third of the femur and runs downwards to be inserted into the anterior surface and sides of the capsule of the knee joint.

> 关节囊肌（musculus articularis genus）（见图225、359）是由数条清晰界定的肌纤维组成的扁平肌片。该肌位于股四头肌中间头的深面，处于大腿前侧。其起始点位于股骨下三分之一的前侧表面，向下延伸，最终附着于膝关节囊的前侧及侧面。

Action: tenses the capsule of the knee joint.

> 作用：使膝关节囊紧张。

Blood supply: lateral circumflex artery and perforating branches of the profunda femoris artery.

> 血供：股深动脉的外侧圆韧带动脉及穿支动脉。

Innervation: the femoral nerve.

> 支配神经：股神经。

#### 7.1.1 llil . MEDIAL GROUP OF MUSCLES OF THE THIGH

> 7.1.1 股内侧肌群

1. The gracilis muscle *(musculus gracilis)* (Fig. 360) is long and slightly flattened. It lies under the skin and occupies the extreme medial position in this group of muscles. It arises from the anterior surface of the pubic bone, passes downwards, and gives place to a thin tendon which curves behind the medial epicondyle of the femur and is inserted into the tubercle of the tibia. Before reaching the site of its insertion the gracilis tendon blends with the tendons of the sartorius and semitendinosus muscles and the crural fascia lo form a superficial 'goose's foot' *(pes anserinus superficialis).*  Here is also the anserine bursa *(bursa anserina cruris).*

> gracilis 肌（musculus gracilis）（图360）呈细长形，略扁平。它位于皮下，占据该肌群中最内侧的位置。该肌起自耻骨的前表面，向下延伸，并逐渐变为一条细长的肌腱，该肌腱绕过股骨内侧髁后方，最终附着于胫骨的粗隆。在到达附着点之前， gracilis 肌腱与缝匠肌和半腱肌的肌腱以及小腿深筋膜融合，形成一个表浅的“鹅足”（pes anserinus superficialis）。此处还有鹅足滑囊（bursa anserina cruris）。

Action: adducts the thigh and also helps in flexing the leg at the knee joint while rotating the limb laterally.

> 动作：使大腿内收，同时在膝关节处帮助屈曲小腿，并使肢体外旋。

Blood supply: external pudendal, obturator, and profunda femoris arteries.

> 供血：阴囊动脉、闭孔动脉和股深动脉。

Innervation: anterior branch of the obturator nerve (L^-L,).

> 支配神经：闭孔神经前支（L^2^-L^4^）

2. The adductor longus muscle *(musculus adductor longus)*  (Fig. 3.56) is flat and resembles a triangle in shape. It lies on the anteromedial surface of the thigh.

> 股薄肌（musculus adductor longus）（图3.56）呈扁平状，形状类似三角形。它位于大腿的前内侧表面。

The muscle arises by a short strong tendon from the pubic bone below the pubic tubercle lateral of the gracilis muscle. Then gradually expanding it runs downwards and is inserted into the middle third of the medial lip of the linea aspera.

> 该肌由耻骨体下方、 gracilis 肌外侧的耻骨结节下方的一条短而强健的肌腱起始。随后逐渐扩大，向下延伸，最终插入至股骨粗线内侧唇的中段。

Action: adducts the thigh, assists in its flexion at the hip joint and lateral rotation.

> 动作：使大腿内收，协助髋关节处大腿屈曲及外旋。

Blood supply: external pudendal, obturator, and profunda femoris arteries.

> 供血：阴囊动脉、闭孔动脉和股深动脉。

Innervation: anterior branch of obturator nerve (L2-L3).

> 支配神经：阴部神经前支（L2-L3）。

3. The adductor brevis muscle *(musculus adductor brevis)*  (Fig. 357) is triangular and lies under the adductor longus muscle. It arises on the anterior surface of the inferior ramus of the pubis lateral of the gracilis muscle. Running downwards and laterally, it expands slightly and is inserted into the upper third of the medial lip of the linea aspera.

> 股薄肌（musculus adductor brevis）（图357）呈三角形，位于长收肌的深面。其起始点位于耻骨下支的前表面，位于股薄肌的外侧。肌束向下并向外侧延伸，稍有扩张，最终插入股粗隆内侧唇的上三分之一处。

Action: adducts the thigh and assists in its flexion at the hip joint and lateral rotation.

> 动作：使大腿内收，并协助在髋关节处大腿屈曲和外旋。

Blood supply: the obturator and perforating arteries. Innervation: anterior branch of the obturator nerve (L^-L,).

> 血供： obturator 动脉和 perforating 动脉。神经支配： obturator 神经的前支（L2-L4）。

4. The adductor magnus muscle *(musculus adductor magnusj*  (Fig. 358) is broad, thick, and the largest in this group. It lies under the adductor longus and adductor brevis muscles lateral of the gracilis muscle. The adductor magnus arises by a strong short tendon from the inferior ramus of the pubis and the ramus of the ischium for a distance to the ischial tuberosity; the muscle fibres then diverge fan-wise downwards and laterally and are inserted by a broad tendon into the medial lip of the linea aspera on the femur for its whole length. Some of the distal muscle fibres end in a thin tendon which is inserted into the medial epicondyle of the femur.

> 大收肌（musculus adductor magnus）（图358）宽厚，是该组肌肉中最大的一块。它位于 gracilis 肌的外侧，处于大收肌（adductor longus）和短收肌（adductor brevis）的下方。大收肌由一条强而短的腱起源于耻骨下支和坐骨支，延伸至坐骨结节区域；随后，肌纤维向下及外侧呈扇形分开，并以一条宽腱附着于股骨粗线内侧唇的整个长度。部分远端肌纤维终止于一条细腱，该腱附着于股骨内侧髁。

Action: adducts the thigh, rotating it slightly laterally.

> 动作：使大腿内收，并略微向侧旋转。

Blood supply: the obturator and perforating arteries.

> 血供： obturator动脉和perforating动脉。

Innervation: posterior branch of the obturator nerve (L5-L3) and branches of the sciatic nerve (L^L\*).

> 支配神经：闭孔神经后支（L5-L3）及坐骨神经分支（L^L\*）。[!note]- 术语说明 “L^L\*” 可能为原文中排版错误，建议核实具体神经节段，通常坐骨神经主要由L4-L5和S1-S3神经根组成。

5. The adductor minimus muscle *(musculus adductor minimus)*  (Figs 370, 371) is as if part of the upper fibres of the adductor magnus muscle, h lakes origin from the anterior surface of the inferior ramus of the pubis and the ramus of the ischium and is inserted into the medial lip of the linea aspera on the femur. It is triangular and lies to the front of the adductor brevis muscle; it borders upon the obturatorius externus and quadratus femoris muscles above and the adductor magnus muscle below.

> 股薄肌（musculus adductor minimus）（图370、371）看起来像是股大肌上部纤维的一部分，起自耻骨下支的前表面及坐骨支，止于股骨粗线的内侧唇。该肌呈三角形，位于股薄肌的前方；其上方邻近外旋肌和股方肌，下方邻近股大肌。

Action: flexes the thigh at the hip joint, adducts and rotates it laterally.

> 动作：在髋关节处屈曲大腿，使大腿内收并外旋。

Blood supply: obturator and perforating arteries.

> 供血：耻骨孔动脉和穿通动脉。

Innervation: posterior branch of the obturator nerve (L3-L4).

> 支配神经：闭孔神经后支（L3-L4）。

6. The pectincus muscle *(musculus pectineus)* (Fig. 356) is flat and almost quadrangular. It borders upon the iliopsoas muscle laterally and the adductor longus muscle medially. A small depression forms between the iliopsoas and the pectineus.

> 股薄肌（musculus pectineus）（图356）呈扁平状，近似四边形。其外侧毗邻髂腰肌，内侧毗邻长收肌。髂腰肌与股薄肌之间形成一个小凹陷。

The muscle arises from the superior ramus and pecten of the

> 该肌起自椎体上关节突和椎体前缘。

pubis, extends downwards and slightly laterally, and is inserted into the spiral line.

> 耻骨，向下并稍向侧方延伸，插入螺旋线。

Action: flexes and adducts the thigh, rotating it slightly laterally.

> 动作：屈曲并内收大腿，使其略向外侧旋转。

*Blood* supply: the obturator, external pudendal, and profunda femoris arteries.

> 供血：阴部内动脉、阴囊外动脉和股深动脉。

Innervation: branches of the femoral nerves and inconstantly branches ol the obturator nerve (L,-1.,;.

> 支配神经：股神经的分支，以及不恒定的闭孔神经分支（L2-L4）

## 8 III!, mv i I ■<!<>< (JKOL.T OK MUSCLES OK THE THIG H

> 8 III!，mv i I ■<!<>< (JKOL.T OK MUSCLES OK THE THIG H

1. The semitendinosus muscle *(musculus semitendinosus)*  {Fig. 367) is long and thin and lies closer to the medial border of the posterior surface of the thigh. Its lateral margin borders upon the biceps femoris muscle, the medial upon the semimembranosus muscle. The proximal end is covered by the gluteus maximus muscle. Often the muscle is interrupted in the middle by a tendinous intersection *(interscctio tendmea).* The muscle arises from the ischial tuberosity, runs downwards, and is continuous with a long tendon which bends around the medial femoral epicondyle and stretches on the anteromedial surface of the tibia to be inserted into its tubercle. Some of the end fibres of the tendon blend with the fascia of the leg and thus contribute to the formation of the superficial 'goose's foot' (Fig. 360).

> 股二头肌（musculus biceps femoris）位于大腿后侧的内侧边界附近，呈细长形。其外侧缘与股二头肌相邻，内侧缘则与半膜肌相邻。其近端被臀大肌覆盖。该肌常在中部被一条腱性交界（intersphincter tendineus）中断。该肌起自坐骨结节，向下延伸，并与一条长的肌腱相连，该肌腱绕过股骨内上髁，延伸至胫骨前内侧表面，最终附着于胫骨粗隆。部分肌腱的终末纤维与小腿的筋膜融合，从而参与形成浅层的“鹅足”（Fig. 360）。

Action: extends the thigh at the hip joint, flexes the leg at the knee joint and slightly rotates it medially, assists in bringing the trunk to an erect position.

> 作用：在髋关节处伸展大腿，在膝关节处屈曲小腿并略向内旋转，协助将躯干恢复至直立位置。

Blood supply: the perforating arteries.

> 血供：穿通动脉。

Inncrvation: branches of the tibial nerve [L\*-L\$; *S\* (S2)].

> 神经支配：胫神经的分支 [L4-L5; S2 (S2)]。

2. The semimembranosus muscle *(musculus semimembranosus)*  (Fig. 367) lies on the medial border of the posterior surface of the thigh. Its lateral margin is covered by the semitendinosus muscle which leaves a mark here in the form of a wide longitudinal groove. The medial margin of the muscle is free. The muscle arises by a flat strong tendon from the ischial luberosity. It passes downwards and is continuous with a flat tendon which gradually narrows, becomes rounded and after curving around the medial epicondyle runs to the anteromedial surface of the tibia. Here the tendon becomes wider, separating into three bands to form the deep 'goose's foot' *fpes anserinus profundus)* (Fig. 382). The medial band lies horizontally and ends on the medial condyle of the tibia; the middle band also stretches to the medial condyle and is continuous with the fascia covering the popliteus muscle; the lateral

> 半膜肌（musculus semimembranosus）（图367）位于大腿后侧的内侧边界。其外侧缘被半腱肌覆盖，在此处留下一条宽而纵向的沟槽。半膜肌的内侧缘是自由的。该肌由坐骨结节发出一条扁平而强韧的肌腱。肌腱向下延伸，逐渐变细，呈圆形，并绕过内侧髁，最终到达胫骨前内侧表面。此处肌腱变宽，分叉为三条束，形成深部“鹅足”（deep anserine, fpes anserinus profundus）（图382）。内侧束水平走行，终止于胫骨内侧髁；中束也延伸至胫骨内侧髁，并与覆盖腘肌的筋膜相连续；外侧束则……

band reaches the capsule of the knee joint and is continuous with the oblique posterior ligament of the knee.

> 束体到达膝关节囊，并与膝关节斜后韧带连续。

The bursa of the semimembranosus tendon *(bursa musculi semimembranosus)* forms where the tendon separates into bands.

> 半膜肌肌腱滑囊（bursa musculi semimembranosus）形成于肌腱分叉为束状结构的部位。

Action: extends the thigh at the hip joint, flexes the leg at the knee joint and rotates it medially.

> 作用：在髋关节处伸展大腿，在膝关节处屈曲小腿并使其向内旋转。

Blood supply: medial circumflex, perforating, and popliteal arteries.

> 血供：内侧旋支动脉、穿通支动脉和腘动脉。

Innervation: the tibial nerve (L4-L5; S|).

> 支配神经：胫神经（L4-L5；S1）。

3. The biceps femoris muscle *(musculus biceps femoris)* (Fig. 368) stretches on the lateral border of the posterior surface of the thigh. It has two heads, long and short, which fuse to form a single common belly. The long head *(caput longum)* arises from the ischial luberosity by a small flat tendon; the short head *(caput breve)* takes origin from the lateral lip of the linea aspera for the length of the distal half of the femur. At the origin of the long head is the upper bursa of the biceps femoris muscle *(bursa musculi bicipitis femons superior).* On fusion, both heads form a strong belly which passes downwards and gives place to a long narrow tendon: after curving around the back of the lateral epicondyle the tendon is inserted into the head of the fibula. Some bands pass horizontally to be inserted into the edge of the superior articular surface of the tibia, others run downwards and blend with the crural fascia. Between the tendon of the muscle and the lateral ligament of the knee is lodged the lower bursa of the biceps femoris muscle *(bursa subtendinea musculi bicipitis femoris inferior).*

> 股二头肌（musculus biceps femoris）（图368）位于大腿后侧的外侧边界处。其具有两个头，即长头和短头，二者在下方融合形成一个共同的肌腹。长头（caput longum）由坐骨结节处的一条小而扁平的腱起始；短头（caput breve）则起自股骨粗隆的外侧唇，起始范围为股骨远侧半段。在长头起始处有股二头肌上滑膜囊（bursa musculi bicipitis femoris superior）。当两个头融合后，形成一个强健的肌腹，向下延伸并逐渐变为一条细长的腱：该腱在绕过腓骨小头后方时弯曲，最终插入腓骨头。一些肌腱束水平延伸并附着于胫骨上关节面的边缘，另一些则向下延伸并与小腿深筋膜融合。股二头肌腱与膝关节外侧副韧带之间存在股二头肌下滑膜囊（bursa subtendinea musculi bicipitis femoris inferior）。

Action: extends the thigh at the hip joint, flexes the leg at the knee joint rotating it laterally.

> 动作：在髋关节处伸展大腿，在膝关节处屈曲小腿并使其外旋。

Blood supply: medial circumflex, perforating, and popliteal arleries.

> 供血： medial circumflex 动脉、 perforating 动脉和 popliteal 动脉。

Innervation: the long head—tibial and sciatic nerves (S1-S2), the short head—common pcroneal nerve (L4-L4; S[).

> 支配神经：长头——胫神经和坐骨神经（S1-S2），短头——腓浅神经（L4；S1）

#### 8.1.1 MUSCLES O F TH E LEG

> 8.1.1 腿部肌肉

The muscles of the leg *fmusculi cruris)* form three groups: lateral, anterior, and posterior; the posterior group has two layers, superficial and deep. The lateral group is composed predominantly of flexors and pronators of the foot and the anterior group—of extensors of the foot; the posterior group is mostly formed of flexors and supinators of the foot.

> 下肢肌肉（musculi cruris）可分为三组：外侧群、前群和后群；后群又分为浅层和深层。外侧群主要由足部屈肌和旋前肌组成；前群主要由足部伸肌组成；后群主要由足部屈肌和旋后肌组成。

## 10 T H E LATERAL GROUP OF MUSCLES OF TH E LEG

> 10 腿部外侧肌群

anterior head arising from the head of the fibula, the lateral con- curves around the lateral malleotus posteriorly, passes on the la-

> 前部头起源于腓骨头，外侧部分向后绕过外踝，然后位于外踝的外侧面上方。

1. The peroneus longus muscle *(musculus peroneus [fibularisj Ion-* dyle of the tibia, and the fascia cruris, and a posterior head arising *gus)* (Fig. 379) is on the lateral surface of the leg. Its upper part lies from the upper parts of the lateral surface of the fibula. Between directly on the fibula, while (he lower part covers the peroneus bre- the two heads is the superior musculo-fibular canal. Stretching vis muscle. The peroneus longus muscle arises by two heads: an downwards, the muscle is continuous wilh a long tendon which

> 腓骨长肌（musculus peroneus longus）（图379）位于小腿的外侧。其上部起自腓骨外侧面上部，下部则覆盖腓骨短肌。在两条头之间为上肌纤维骨管。腓骨长肌起自两头：一个起自腓骨的外侧面上部，另一个起自腓骨的外侧面上部，而下部则覆盖腓骨短肌。在两条头之间为上肌纤维骨管。腓骨长肌向下延伸，形成一条长的肌腱，与腓骨短肌连续。

![](_page_409_Picture_14.jpeg)

372. *Muscles and fasciae of right thigh* (J/3). (Transverse section through the middle of the thigh.)

> 右大腿的肌肉和筋膜（J/3）。（大腿中部的横断面。）

teral surface of the calcancum, over lo the sole under the peroneal tubercle, fits into the groove for the tendons ol the peroneus muscles, and crosses the solo obliquely to be inserted into the tubercle ol the tirsi mrtatarsal Ixmc, ihc base "I the second mctatarsal bone and (he medial cuneiform bone.

> 跟骨外侧表面，位于外踝突下方的足底，适配于腓骨肌腱的沟槽，斜穿足底，最终插入第一跖骨粗隆，同时附着于第二跖骨基底部和内侧骨丘。

Action: accomplishes plantar flexion of the foot and lowers its medial border.

> 作用：实现足部跖屈，并降低其内侧缘。

Blood supply: the lateral inferior genicular, peroneal, and anterior tibial arteries.

> 血供：外侧下膝动脉、腓动脉和前胫动脉。

Innervation: superficial peroneal nerve (musculocutancous nerve of lower limb) [(L^) L5; S|].

> 支配神经：腓浅神经（下肢肌皮神经）[(L^) L5; S|]。

2. The peroneus brevis muscle *(musculus peroneus [fibularisf brevis)* {Fig. 379) is long, thin, and lies directly on the lateral surface ol the fibula under the peroneus longus muscle. It arises from the lower half of the lateral surface of the fibula and the intermuscular

> 腓骨短肌（musculus peroneus brevis）{图379} 长而细，位于腓骨外侧面上方的腓骨长肌之下。其起始点为腓骨外侧面上半部及肌间隔。

septa of the leg and extends downwards next to the peroneus longus tendon. After curving around the lateral malleolus posteriorly it passes forwards on the lateral surface of the calcaneum and is inserted into the tubercle of the fifth mctatarsal bone.

> 小腿的隔膜向下延伸，位于腓骨长肌腱的外侧。在绕过外踝后方后，它向前行于跟骨的外侧面，并插入第五跖骨的结节。

Action: causes plantar flexion of the foot and raises its lateral border.

> 作用：引起足部跖屈，并抬高其外侧缘。

Blood supply: peroneal and anterior tibial arteries.

> 血供：腓动脉和胫前动脉。

Innervation: superficial peroneal nerve (musculocutaneous nerve of lower limb) [(L4) L\$; Sj).

> 支配神经：浅层腓神经（下肢肌皮神经）[(L4) L\$; Sj)

On passing behind the lateral malleolus, the tendons of both peroneal muscles are invested in a common synovial sheath of the peroneal tendons *(vagina synovialis musculorum peroneorum [fibulariumj communis).* Distally this sheath separates to form a separate sheath for each tendon.

> 在跨越外踝后方时，腓肌的肌腱被包裹在一个共同的腓肌腱滑膜鞘（vagina synovialis musculorum peroneorum [fibularium] communis）内。在远端，该滑膜鞘分开，形成分别包裹每条肌腱的独立滑膜鞘。

![](_page_410_Picture_12.jpeg)

373. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles and ligaments on right pelvic bones and femur;* superior aspect (schematical representation).

> 右侧骨盆骨和股骨上肌肉和韧带的起始点和附着点；上部（示意图）。

![](_page_411_Picture_2.jpeg)

374. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles, ligaments, and articular capsules on right hip bone;* outer aspect (scheniatical representation).

> 右侧髋骨上肌肉、韧带和关节囊的起始点和附着点；外侧方面（坐骨区示意图）。

## 11 Till- ANTERIOR (iROLT OF MUSCLES OI I HE LEG

> 11 腿部肌肉的前侧（前群）

1. The tibialis anterior muscle *(musculus tibialis anterior)*  (Figs 376, 379) is long and narrow and lies superficially occupying the extreme medial position in relation to the other muscles of this group. Its medial border adjoins the anterior border of the tibia, while its lateral border adjoins the extensor digitorurn longus muscle proximally and the extensor hallucis longus muscle distally. The tibialis anterior muscle arises by its broadest part from the lateral tibial surface (beginning from the lateral condyle) and the interosseous membrane. In the lower third of the leg it is continuous with a long flat tendon which is lodged in a canal under the inferior extensor retinaculum and extends first to the medial border of the foot and then to the plantar surface on which it is inserted into the medial cuneiform bone and the base of the first metatarsal bone. The small bursa of the tibialis anterior tendon *(bursa subtendinea musculi tibialis anterioris)* can be found at the site of the insertion.

> 胫骨前肌（musculus tibialis anterior）（图376、379）呈细长形，位于浅层，占据该肌群中其他肌肉的最内侧位置。其内侧边界与胫骨前缘相接，外侧边界则在近端与趾长伸肌相接，在远端与拇长伸肌相接。胫骨前肌起自胫骨外侧面（自外侧髁开始）和骨间膜的最宽处。在小腿下1/3段，该肌延续为一条长而扁平的肌腱，位于下肢伸肌支持带下方的通道内，肌腱首先延伸至足的内侧缘，再延伸至足底，最终附着于内侧楔骨和第一跖骨基底。胫骨前肌肌腱的小囊（胫骨前肌腱滑囊，bursa subtendinea musculi tibialis anterioris）位于其附着部位。

Action: accomplishes dorsal flexion of the foot and raises its medial border.

> 作用：完成足背屈并抬高其内侧缘。

Blood supply: anterior tibial artery.

> 供血：前胫动脉。

Innervation: deep peroneal (anterior tibial) nerve (L4--L5; Si).

> 支配神经：深支腓神经（前胫神经）（L4--L5；足太阳膀胱经）。

2. The extensor digitorurn longus muscle *(musculus extensor digitorurn longus)* (Fig. 376) lies lateral of the tibialis anterior muscle. The extensor hallucis longus tendon passes between these two muscles in the lower third of the leg. The extensor digitorurn muscle arises from the upper third of the tibia, the head and anterior border of the fibula, the interosscous membrane, the anterior intermuscular septum, and the crural fascia. It is then directed downwards, narrows gradually, and gives place to a narrow and long tendon which passes in the lateral canal under the inferior cxlcnsor retinaculum. Before entering the canal it separates into live thin tendons which pass to the dorsal surface of the fool; four of them arc inserted into the phalanges of the lateral four toes. At the site of insertion each tendon separates into three slips, the middle one terminating on the base of the middle phalanx and the two collateral slips are inserted into the base of the distal phalanx. The fifth small tendon is inserted into the base of the fifth metatarsal bone. This tendon is often fused with an inconstant peroneus tertius muscle *(musculus peroneus tertius, s.jibularis tertius)* which arises Iron\* the lower third of the fibula and the interosseous membrane and is also inserted into the base of the fifth metatarsal bone.

> 伸肌总腱（musculus extensor digitorum longus）（图376）位于胫骨前肌的外侧。伸拇长肌腱在小腿下部的三分之一处，穿过这两块肌肉之间。伸肌总腱起自胫骨上部三分之一、腓骨的头部和前缘、骨间膜、前肌间隔以及胫骨筋膜。随后它向下走行，逐渐变细，形成一条细长的肌腱，经由外侧沟，在下肢外侧筋膜下通过。在进入外侧沟之前，该肌腱分为五条细长的肌腱，分别走向足背。其中四条肌腱附着于外侧四趾的指骨上，每条肌腱在附着点处又分为三束，中间的一束附着于中节指骨的基底部，两侧的束则附着于远节指骨的基底部。第五条细小的肌腱则附着于第五跖骨基底部。这条肌腱常与一个不恒定的腓骨短肌（musculus peroneus tertius, s. fibularis tertius）融合，该肌起自腓骨下部三分之一和骨间膜，并同样附着于第五跖骨基底部。

Action: extends the lateral four toes, accomplishes dorsal flexion of the foot, and together with the peroneus tertius muscle raises (pronates) its lateral border.

> 作用：伸展外侧四趾，完成足背屈，并与趾长伸肌共同抬高（足外翻）足的外侧缘。

Blood supply: anterior tibial artery.

> 血供：前胫动脉。

Innervation: deep peroneal (anterior tibial) nerve.

> 支配神经：深支腓神经（前骨胫神经）。

3. The extensor hallucis longus muscle *(musculus extensor hallucis longus)* {Fig. 377) lies between the tibialis anterior and the extensor digitorurn longus muscles which cover its upper two thirds. The muscle arises from the medial surface of the middle and lower thirds of the fibula and the interosseous membrane and passes downwards lo be continuous with a narrow long tendon which fits into the middle canal and passes under the inferior extensor retinaculum to the great toe to be inserted into its distal phalanx. Some of the fibres fuse with ihe base of the proximal phalanx.

> 伸肌长肌（musculus extensor hallucis longus）{图377}位于胫骨前肌与趾长伸肌之间，覆盖其上部的三分之二。该肌起自腓骨中下三分之一的内侧表面及骨间膜，向下延伸并与一条细长的腱连续，该腱进入中间滑膜鞘，并在下肢伸肌支持带下方延伸至大脚趾，最终附着于其远端指骨。部分肌纤维与近端指骨基底融合。

Action: extends the great toe, assists in dorsal flexion of the foot, raising (supinating) its medial border.

> 作用：伸展大脚趾，协助足背屈，抬高（外翻）足的内侧缘。

Blood supply: ihe anterior tibial artery.

> 血供：前胫动脉

Innervation: ihe deep peroneal (anterior tibial) nerve.

> 支配神经：深层腓深神经（前骨胫神经）。

#### 11.1.1 [III. I'OslERIQ R GRO t P OF MUSCLES OF TH E LEG

> 11.1.1 [III. 小腿肌肉群的分组]

#### 11.1.2 Superficial Layer

> 11.1.2 浅层

E The triceps surae muscle *(musculus triceps surae)* (Figs 380, 381) is made up of the gastrocnemius muscle lying superficially and the soleus muscle located in front of it closer to the leg bones.

> E 腘绳肌（musculus triceps surae）（图380、381）由表浅的腓肠肌和位于其前方、更靠近腿骨的比目鱼肌组成。

A. The gastrocnemius muscle *(musculus gastrocnemius)*  (Fig. 380) consists of two strong fleshy heads, medial *(caput mediale)* and lateral *(caput laterale).*

> A. 腘肌（musculus gastrocnemius）（图380）由两个强壮的肌头组成，分别为内侧头（caput mediale）和外侧头（caput laterale）。

The stronger medial head arises from the popliteal surface of the lemui above the medial condyle, the lateral head arises symmetrically but at a slightly lower level above the lateral condyle. Both heads at their origin form the inferior border of the popliteal fossa. Fjitending downwards, they unite approximately in the middle of the leg and are then continuous with a tendon.

> 更强壮的内侧头起源于胫骨内侧髁上方的腘面，外侧头则对称地起源于胫骨外侧髁上方稍低的位置。两头在起始处共同构成腘窝的下边界。向下延伸，它们在小腿中部附近汇合，并与肌腱连续。

B. The soleus muscle *(musculus soleus)* (Fig. 381) is flat and covered by the gastrocnemius muscle. It arises from the head and upper third of the shaft of the fibula as well as from the soleal line and middle third of the shaft of the libia. Some of the muscle fibres arise from the tendinous arch of the soleus muscle (stretched between the leg bones). Passing downwards, the muscle is continuous with a tendon which fuses with the gastrocnemius tendon to

> B. 胫骨后肌（musculus soleus）（图381）呈扁平状，被腓肠肌覆盖。其起始点位于腓骨的头及上部三分之一的骨干，以及跟骨的跟骨结节和中部三分之一的骨干。部分肌纤维起自胫骨后肌的肌腱弓（位于下肢骨之间张紧的肌腱）。该肌向下延续为一肌腱，与腓肠肌肌腱融合，形成跟腱。

form a strong *tendo calcaneus (Achillis)* in the lower third oi the leg; the tendon is inserted into the posterior surface of ihe calcaneum. The bursa of the tendo calcaneus *(bursa tendin'is calcanei* s. *Achillis)*  is found at the insertion.

> 形成小腿下1/3部的强健跟腱（Achillis）；该肌腱附着于跟骨的后表面。跟腱滑囊（跟腱滑囊，bursa tendin'is calcanei s. Achillis）位于其附着处。

Action: the triceps surae muscle flexes the leg ai the knee joint, accomplishes plantar flexion of the foot, raises the heel. When the foot is steadied the muscle pulls the leg and thigh to the back.

> 动作：腓肠肌使膝关节屈曲，完成足跖屈，抬高足跟。当足部稳定时，该肌将腿和大腿拉向后方。

Blood supply: ihe posterior tibial and peroneal arteries.

> 血供：胫后动脉和腓动脉。

Innervation: the tibial (medial popliteal) nerve (L^-L^; Si-S-j).

> 支配神经：胫神经（内侧腘神经）（L₄₋₅；Si-S₃）。

2. The plantaris muscle *(musculus plantaris)* (Fig. 381) is rudimentary and often absent. Its muscular belly is spindle-shaped, short, and arises from the lateral femoral condyle and the posterior wall of the knee joint capsule. Il extends downwards and slightly medially and ends in a long, narrow tendon lying between the gastrocnemius and soleus muscles. In the lower third of the leg it usually fuses with the tendo calcaneus, but in some cases it is inserted into the calcaneum independently and its fibres intertwine with those of the plantar aponeurosis.

> 跖肌（musculus plantaris）（图381）通常是原始的，甚至常常缺失。其肌腹呈纺锤形，较短，起始于股骨外侧髁和膝关节囊的后壁。该肌向下并略向内延伸，最终形成一条细长的肌腱，位于腓肠肌和比目鱼肌之间。在小腿的下1/3段，它通常与跟腱融合，但在某些情况下，它可独立地附着于跟骨，并且其肌纤维与足底筋膜的纤维交织在一起。

Action: tenses the capsule of the knee joint.

> 动作：使膝关节囊紧张。

Blood supply: the popliteal artery.

> 血供：腘动脉。

Innervation: ihe tibial (medial popliteal) nerve (l^-L\*; Si).

> 支配神经：胫神经（内侧腘窝神经）（L4-L5；Si）。[!note]- 术语说明
“tibial (medial popliteal) nerve” 通常译作“胫神经（内侧腘窝神经）”，是坐骨神经的分支之一，负责小腿前侧和内侧的皮肤感觉及肌肉运动。

![](_page_413_Picture_2.jpeg)

375. *Muscles and fasciae of right leg and foot;* anterior aspect

> 右下肢及足部肌肉与筋膜；前面观

![](_page_414_Picture_2.jpeg)

376. *Muscles of right leg and foot;* anterior aspect

> 右下肢和足部肌肉；前面观

#### 11.1.3 Deep Layer

> 11.1.3 深层结构

1. The popliteus muscle *(musculus popliteus)* {Fig. 383) is Hat, short, and lies directly on the posterior surface of the capsule of the knee joint. It arises from the lateral femoral condyle and the arcuate ligament of the knee. It is directed downwards, becomes slightly wider, and is inserted into the posterior surface of the tibia above the soleal line.

> 腘肌（musculus popliteus）{图383}呈扁平、短小状，位于膝关节囊的后侧表面。其起始于股骨外侧髁和膝关节的弓状韧带。肌束向下走行，逐渐增宽，并插入至腓肠肌线以上胫骨的后侧表面。

Action: ilexes the knee and rotates the leg medially at the same time, pulling at the capsule of the knee joint.

> 动作：伸展膝关节并同时使小腿向内旋转，牵拉膝关节囊。

Blood supply: the popliteal artery.

> 血供：腘动脉

Innervation: the tibial (medial popliteal) nerve (L5; S1-S2).

> 支配神经：胫神经（内侧腘神经）（L5；S1-S2）。

2. The flexor digitorum longus muscle *(musculus jlexor digitorum longus)* (Fig. 382) occupies the extreme medial position in this group of muscles; it lies on the posterior surface of the tibia. The muscle arises from the middle third of the posterior surface of the tibia and from the deep layer of the crural fascia. It stretches downwards and ends in a long tendon which curves around the back of the medial malleolus under the flexor retinaculum. It then p.isscs to ilu sole in whi< h ii is directed obliquely and laterally and separates into Four tendons passing to the lateral four toes to be inserted into the bases of the distal phalanges. Before insertion each tendon perforates the tendon of the flexor digitorum brevis muscle.

> 屈肌长头肌（musculus flexor digitorum longus）（图382）在这一组肌肉中占据最内侧的位置；它位于胫骨的后侧表面。该肌起自胫骨后侧表面的中部区域以及深筋膜的深层。肌束向下延伸，终止于一条长的肌腱，该肌腱绕过内踝后方，在屈肌腱膜下方弯曲。随后，该肌腱进入足底，在此肌腱呈斜向内侧方向走行，并分成四条肌腱，分别连接至外侧四个脚趾的远节趾骨基底。在插入前，每条肌腱均穿行于屈肌短头肌的肌腱中。

Action: flexes the distal phalanges of the lateral four toes, assists in plantar flexion of the foot by raising (supinating) its medial border.

> 作用：屈曲外侧四个脚趾的远端指骨，通过提升（外旋）足底的内侧缘，协助足跖屈。

Blood supply: the posterior tibial arlcry.

> 血供：胫后动脉

Innervation: the tibial (medial popliteal) nerve (L\$; S|-S<sup>2</sup> ).

> 支配神经：胫神经（内侧腘神经）（L4~S2）。

3. The flexor hallucis longus muscle *(musculusJlexor kallucis lon-*

> 𧿹长屈肌（musculus flexor hallucis longus）

*gus)* (Fig. 382) occupies the extreme lateral position on the posterior surface and covers partly the tibialis posterior muscle.

> （图382）股四头肌（quadriceps femoris）位于后表面的最外侧位置，并部分覆盖胫骨后肌。

It arises from the lower two thirds of the fibula, the interosseous membrane, and the posterior intermuscular septum of the leg. The muscle is directed downwards to be continuous with a long tendon which passes under the flexor retinaculum and onto the sole in the groove between the talus and calcaneum.

> 其起源于腓骨的下三分之二、骨间膜以及小腿的后筋膜隔。该肌向下延伸，形成一条长腱，经足底筋膜弓下方，穿过距骨与跟骨之间的沟槽，最终附着于足底。

Here the tendon stretches under the flexor digitorum longus tendon and sends it some of the fibrous bands. After that it runs forwards and is inserted into the base of the distal phalanx of the great toe.

> 此处的肌腱在趾长屈肌腱下方延伸，并将其部分纤维束传递过去。随后，它向前行进，并插入到大脚趾远端指骨基底部。

Action: flexes the great toe and also assists in flexion of the latter four toes through the fibrous bands added to the flexor digitorum longus tendon; accomplishes plantar flexion and lateral rotation of the foot.

> 动作：屈曲大脚趾，并通过加附于屈指深肌腱的纤维束帮助屈曲后四个脚趾；完成足部跖屈和外翻动作。

Blood supply: the peroneal artery.

> 供血：腓动脉

Innervation: the tibial (medial popliteal) nerve (L^; Sj-S2). .

> 支配神经：胫神经（内侧腘神经）（L4-S2）。

4. The tibialis posterior muscle *(musculus tibialis posterior)*  (Fig. 383) lies between the flexor digitorum longus and flexor hallucis longus muscles directly on the interosseous membrane.

> 胫骨后肌（musculus tibialis posterior）（见图383）位于趾长屈肌和拇长屈肌之间，直接附着于骨间膜上。

It arises from the interosseous membrane and from the adjoining borders of the tibia and fibula. The muscle runs downwards and ends in a long tendon which, on passing in a separate canal under the flexor retinaculum, curves around the back of the medial malleolus and passes over to the sole to be inserted into the tuberosity of the navicular and into the medial, intermediate, and lateral cuneiform bones.

> 它起源于骨间膜以及胫骨和腓骨的相邻缘。该肌向下走行，最终形成一条长的肌腱。该肌腱经由一个独立的通道，在屈肌支持带下方通过，绕过内侧踝骨的后方，跨越足底，最终附着于舟骨的骨突以及内侧、中间和外侧楔骨上。

Action: accomplishes plantar flexion of the foot and rotates il laterally (supinates) at the same time.

> 动作：实现足部跖屈，并同时使足部外翻（足弓抬高）。

Blood supply: the posterior tibial and peroneal arteries.

> 血供：胫后动脉和腓动脉。

Innervation: the libial (medial popliteal) nerve (L\$; S,-S2).

> 支配神经：胫神经（L4-S2）。

#### 11.1.4 MUSCLES OF TH E FOOT

> 11.1.4 足部肌肉

The muscles of the foot *(muscuii pedis)* are separated into the muscles of the dorsal surface of the foot and those of the plantar surface of the foot.

> 足部的肌肉（足肌）可分为足背肌和足底肌。

The muscles of the dorsum of the foot are mainly extensors, the muscles of the sole are mainly flexors.

> 足背的肌肉主要是伸肌，足底的肌肉主要是屈肌。

#### 11.1.5 Muscles of the Dorsal Surface

> 11.1.5 背部肌肉

- 1. Th e extensor digitorum brevis muscle *(musculus extensor digitorum brevis),*
- 2. The extensor hallucis brevis muscle *(musculus extensor hallucis brevis).*

> 𧿹展肌（musculus extensor hallucis brevis）、展肌（musculus extensor digitorum brevis）。

#### 11.1.6 Muscles of the Plantar Surface

> 11.1.6 足底肌群

The muscles of the sole form the following three groups: (a) the muscles of the eminence of the great toe, or the muscles of the medial plantar eminence; (b) the muscles of the eminence of the little toe, or the muscles of the lateral plantar eminence; (c) the

> 足底肌群可分为以下三组：(a) 大脚趾隆起处的肌肉，或称内侧足底隆起处的肌肉；(b) 小脚趾隆起处的肌肉，或称外侧足底隆起处的肌肉；(c)

plantar muscles proper, or the muscles of the median plantar eminence.

> 足底固有肌，或称中足底隆起处的肌肉。

#### 11.1.7 Muscles of the Eminence of the Great Toe

> 11.1.7 大脚趾隆起部的肌肉

- 1. The abductor hallucis muscle *(musculus abductor kallucis).*
- 2. The flexor hallucis brevis muscle *(musculus jlexor kallucis brevis).* 
  - 3. The adductor hallucis muscle *(musculus adductor kallucis).*

> 𧿹展肌（musculus abductor hallucis）  
𧿹短屈肌（musculus flexor hallucis brevis）  
𧿹收肌（musculus adductor hallucis）

## 12 Muscles of the Eminence of the Little Toe

> 12 小趾隆起部肌肉

- 1. The abductor digiti minimi muscle *(musculus abductor digiti minimi).*
- 2. The flexor digiti minimi brevis muscle *(musculus jlexor digiti minimi brevis).*
- 3. The opponens digiti minimi muscle *(musculus opponens digiti minimi).*

> 蚓状肌（musculus abductor digiti minimi）。  
骨间肌（musculus flexor digiti minimi brevis）。  
小指对掌肌（musculus opponens digiti minimi）。

#### 12.1.1 Muscles of the Median Eminence

> 12.1.1 中线隆起部的肌肉

- 1. The flexor digitorum brevis muscle *(musculus jlexor digitorum brevis).* 
  - 2. The quadratus planlac (flexor accessorius) muscle *(musculus*

> 屈肌浅头肌（flexor digitorum brevis）  
足母肌（quadratus plantae，辅助屈肌）肌（musculus）

*quadratus planlac [musculus jlexor accessonusj).*

> quadratus planca [musculus flexor accessorius]

- 3. The lumbrical muscles *(musculi lumbrkaUs).*
- 4. The plantar interossei muscles *(musculi interossei plantares).*
- 5. The dorsal interossei muscles *(musculi interossei dorsalesj.*

足底外侧肌（musculi interossei plantares）  
足背外侧肌（musculi interossei dorsales）

#### 12.1.2 MUSCLES OF TH E DORSAL SURFACE
> 12.1.2 背部表面的肌肉

1. The extensor digitorum brevis muscle *(musculus extensor digitorum brevis)* (Fig. 389) is flat and lies directly on the dorsal surface ol the foot. It arises from the upper and lateral surfaces of the anterior part ol the calcaneus and runs forwards to end in lour narrow tendons. The distal ends of these tendons fuse with the extensor digitorum longus tendons and are inserted into the base of the proximal phalanges of the lateral four toes and take part in the formation of the dorsal tendinous expansion. A tendon to the little toe is sometimes absent.

> 趾长伸肌（musculus extensor digitorum brevis）（图389）呈扁平状，位于足背表面。它起自跟骨前部的上方和外侧表面，向前延伸，终止于四个细长的肌腱。这些肌腱的远端与趾长伸肌肌腱融合，并附着于外侧四个脚趾近节趾骨基底，参与构成足背腱膜扩张部。有时，通往小趾的肌腱可能缺失。

Action: extends the lateral four toes and at the same time pulls them laterally.

> 动作：伸展外侧四趾，同时将它们向侧方牵拉。

Blood supply: the larsal artery and the perforating branch of the peroneal artery.

> 血供：胫骨动脉和腓动脉的穿支。

Innervation: the deep peroneal (anterior tibial) nerve (L1-L5; **s.).**

> 支配神经：深腓神经（前骨胫神经）（L1-L5；s.）

2. The extensor hallucis brevis muscle *(musculus extensor hallucis brevis)* (Fig. 389) lies medially of the extensor digitorum brevis muscle. It arises from the upper surface of the anterior part of the calcaneus, runs forwards and medially, and ends in a tendon which is inserted into the base of the proximal phalanx of the great toe. The distal end of the tendon fuses with the extensor hallucis longus tendon and contributes to the formation of the dorsal tendinous expansion.

> 展拇短肌（musculus extensor hallucis brevis）（图389）位于展趾短肌的内侧。它起自跟骨前部的上面，向前内侧方向走行，并终止于一条肌腱，该肌腱插入大脚趾近节趾骨基底部。肌腱的远端与展拇长肌腱融合，并参与形成足背腱膜扩张部。

Action: extends the great toe.

> 动作：伸展大脚趾。

Blood supply: the tarsal artery and the perforating branch of the peroneal artery.

> 血供：距动脉和腓动脉的穿通支。

Innervation: the deep peroneal (anterior tibial) nerve (L,-!^; **s,).**

> 支配神经：深支腓神经（前骨胫神经）（L4–S2）。

> 右下肢肌肉和筋膜（%）

{Transverse section through middle of leg.)

> （大腿中部的横断面）

385. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles, ligaments, and articular capsules on bones of right leg;* posterior aspect (schematical representation). (The interosseous membrane is left intact.)
