386. Sites of origin and attachment of muscles, ligaments, and articular capsules on the right tibia; medial surface (schematical representation).

> 右胫骨的肌肉、韧带和关节囊的起始点和附着点；内侧表面（示意图）。

#### 12.1.3 MUSCLES OF TH E PLANTAR SURFACE 足底肌群

## 13 *Muscles of the Eminence of the Great Toe*
 大脚趾隆起部的肌肉

1. The abductor hallucis muscle *(musculus abductor kallucis)*  (Fig. 387) lies superficially and occupies the extreme medial position in this group of muscles. It arises from the flexor retinaculum, the medial tubercle of the calcaneum, and the plantar surface of the navicular bone. It is directed forwards and ends in a tendon which fuses with the flexor hallucis brevis tendon and is inserted into the medial sesamoid bone and base of the proximal phalanx of the great toe.

> 展拇肌（musculus abductor hallucis）（图387）位于表层，处于该肌群的最内侧位置。它起自足底筋膜、跟骨内侧突以及舟骨的跖面。该肌向前走行，最终形成肌腱，与展拇短肌肌腱融合，并插入至内侧籽骨及大脚趾近节趾骨基底部。

Action: flexes and abducts the great toe and strengthens the medial part of the arch of the foot.

> 作用：屈曲并外展大脚趾，并加强足底内侧弓部。

Blood supply: the medial plantar artery.

> 血供：内侧足底动脉。

Innervation: the medial plantar nerve (L\$; Si).

> 支配神经： medial plantar nerve (L5; Si)。

2. The flexor hallucis brevis muscle *(musculus Jlexor kallucis brevis)* (Fig. 395) lies directly on the first metatarsal bone and is slightly shorter than the abductor hallucis muscle which covers it partly. It arises from the medial cuneiform bone, the plantar surface of the navicular bone, the tibialis posterior tendon, and the long plantar ligament. The tendon of the muscle together with the adductor hallucis tendon is inserted into the lateral and medial sesamoid bones and the base of the proximal phalanx of the great toe, separating thus into two distal tendons, each being related respectively to the lateral and medial heads of the muscle.

> 𧿹屈肌（musculus flexor hallucis brevis）（图395）位于第一跖骨上，其长度略短于覆盖它的𧿹外展肌。该肌起自内侧楔骨、舟骨的跖面、胫骨后肌腱以及足底长韧带。该肌腱与𧿹收肌腱一起插入至𧿹籽骨的内侧和外侧以及大脚趾近节趾骨基底，从而分成两条远端肌腱，分别与肌的内侧头和外侧头相对应。

Action: flexes the great toe. 动作：屈大脚趾。

Blood supply: the medial plantar artery and the plantar arch. Innervation: lateral head —the lateral plantar nerve (S,-S2), medial head —the medial plantar nerve (L\$-S2).

> 血供：内侧足底动脉和足底弓。神经支配：外侧头——外侧足底神经（S1-S2），内侧头——内侧足底神经（L5-S2）。

3. The adductor hallucis muscle *(musculus adductor kallucis)*  (Fig. 365) lies deeply, directly on the metatarsal bones, and is covered by the flexor digitorum longus and flexor digitorum brevis muscles. It arises by two heads, transverse and oblique.

> 趾收肌（adductor hallucis muscle，musculus adductor hallucis）（图365）位于深处，直接位于跖骨上，并被趾深屈肌（flexor digitorum longus）和趾短屈肌（flexor digitorum brevis）覆盖。该肌由两个头组成，分别为横头和斜头。

The transverse head *(caput transversum)* arises from the plantar surface of the capsules of the third, fourth, and fifth metatarsophalangcal joints, the distal ends of the lateral four metatarsal bones, the plantar aponeurosis (septum laterale), and from the transverse ligaments of the heads of the metatarsal bones. The oblique head *(caput obliquum)* is stronger and arises from the plantar surface of the cuboid and lateral cuneiform bones, the base of the four lateral metatarsal bones, the long plantar ligament, and from the plantar sheath of the peroneus longus muscle. Both heads are continuous with a common tendon which is inserted into the lateral sesamoid bone and the base of the proximal phalanx of the great toe.

> 横头（caput transversum）起自第三、第四、第五跖趾关节囊的足底面，外侧四块跖骨的远端，足底筋膜（ septum laterale），以及跖骨头的横韧带。斜头（caput obliquum）较粗大，起自骰骨和外侧楔骨的足底面，外侧四块跖骨的基底部，长足底韧带，以及腓骨长肌的足底鞘。两个头共同形成一条连续的肌腱，插入到外侧籽骨和大脚趾近节趾骨基底部。

Action: adducts and flexes the great toe.

> 动作：使大脚趾内收并屈曲。

Blood supply: the plantar and dorsal metatarsal arteries; the perforating branch of the arcuate artery.

> 血供：足底和足背的跖骨动脉；弓状动脉的穿支。

Innervation: the lateral plantar nerve (Si-Sj).
> 支配神经：外侧足底神经（SI-SJ）。

#### 13.1.1 *Muscles of the Eminence of the Little Toe* 小趾隆起部肌肉

1. The abductor digiti minimi muscle of the foot *(musculus abductor digiti minimi)* (see Fig. 393) lies laterally of all ihe muscles of this group directly under the plantar aponeurosis. It arises from the lateral and medial tubercles of the calcaneum and from the plantar aponeurosis. Extending forwards, it is continuous with a short tendon which is inserted into the lateral side of the base of the proximal phalanx of the little toe.

> 足部的趾小屈肌（musculus abductor digiti minimi）（见图393）位于该组所有肌肉的外侧，直接位于足底筋膜的下方。该肌起自跟骨的外侧和内侧骨突以及足底筋膜。其肌腱向前延伸，与一条短小的肌腱相连，该肌腱插入小趾近节趾骨基底部的外侧。

Action: abducts and flexes the proximal phalanx of the little toe.

> 动作：使小趾近节趾骨外展并屈曲。

Blood supply: the lateral plantar artery.

> 血供：外侧跖动脉。

Innervation: the lateral plantar nerve (Si-S2).

> 支配神经：外侧足底神经（SI-S2）

2. The flexor digili minimi brevis muscle *(musculus Jlexor digiti minimi brevis)* (see Fig. 395) is medial to the abductor digiti minimi muscle of the foot and partly covered by it. It arises from the fifth metatarsal bone, the long plantar ligament, and the plantar shcuili of the peroneus longus muscle, runs forwards, and ends in a tendon which fuses with the tendon of the abductor digiti minimi muscle to be inserted into the base of the proximal phalanx of the little toe.

> 屈肌腱短小肌（musculus flexor digiti minimi brevis）（见图395）位于足部外展小趾肌（abductor digiti minimi muscle）的内侧，并部分被其覆盖。该肌起自第五跖骨、足底长韧带以及腓骨长肌的足底筋膜，向前行进，最终形成肌腱，与外展小趾肌的肌腱融合，共同插入小趾近节趾骨基底部。

Action: flexes the proximal phalanx of the little toe.

> 动作：使小趾近节趾骨屈曲。

Blood supply: the lateral plantar artery.

> 血供：外侧足底动脉。

Innervation: the lateral plantar nerve (S,-S2).

> 支配神经：足底外侧神经（S1-S2）。[!note]- 术语说明 “Lateral plantar nerve” 通常译作“足底外侧神经”，是足底皮肤和肌肉的支配神经之一，起源于胫神经。

3. The opponens digiti minimi muscle *(musculus opponens digiti minimi)* (Figs 395, 396) is very often absent. It arises together with the flexor digiti minimi brevis muscle from the long plantar ligament and from the sheath of the peroneus longus muscle and is inserted into the lateral border of the fifth metatarsal bone.

> 小指对掌肌（musculus opponens digiti minimi）（图395、396）非常常见缺失。它与小指短屈肌（musculus flexor digiti minimi brevis）一起起源于足底长韧带（long plantar ligament）和腓骨长肌肌鞘（sheath of the peroneus longus muscle），并插入至第五跖骨的外侧缘。

Action: adducts and opposes the fifth metatarsal bone; together with the flexor digit! minimi brevis muscle strengthens the lateral part of the arch of the foot.

> 作用：使第五跖骨内收并对抗；与屈肌腱鞘短肌共同作用，加强足弓的外侧部分。

Blood supply: the lateral plantar artery.

> 血供：外侧足底动脉。

Innervation: the lateral plantar nerve (Sj-S?).

> 支配神经：外侧足底神经（Sj-S?）

#### 13.1.2 *Muscles of tke Median Eminence*

> 13.1.2 中脑导水管周围肌群

1. The flexor digitorum brevis muscle *(musculus jlexor digitorum brevis)* (Fig. 393) occupies the medial position on the foot under the plantar aponeurosis. It arises by a short strong tendon from the medial tubercle of the calcaneum and the plantar aponeurosis. Running forwards, the muscular belly ends in four tendons which are lodged in the synovia! canals with the flexor digitorum longus tendons. In the region of the proximal phalanges of the lateral four toes each of the four flexor digitorum brevis tendons separates into two slips to be inserted into the base of the middle phalanges of these toes. The flexor digitorum longus tendon passes between the slips.

> 𧿹展肌（flexor digitorum brevis）（图393）位于足底，处于足底筋膜的内侧。它由一条短而强健的肌腱起源于跟骨的内侧骨突和足底筋膜。肌腱向前延伸，其肌腹末端分为四条肌腱，这些肌腱位于滑膜鞘管内，并与𧿹长屈肌腱共同存在。在足部外侧四个脚趾近节趾骨区域，每条𧿹展肌腱均分为两束，分别插入相应脚趾中节趾骨基底部。𧿹长屈肌腱则位于这两束肌腱之间。

Action: flexes the middle phalanges of the lateral four toes.

> 动作：屈曲外侧四个脚趾的中节趾骨。

Blood supply: the posterior tibial and lateral and medial plantar arteries.

> 血供：胫后动脉及足底外侧动脉和足底内侧动脉。

Innervation: the medial plantar nerve (L^; S().

> 支配：内侧足底神经（L5；S1）

2. The flexor digitorum accessorius muscle *(musculus quadratus plantae* s. *musculus flexor accessorius)* (Fig. 394) is almost quadrangular and lies under the flexor digitorum brevis muscle. It arises from the inferior and medial surfaces of the posterior part of the calca-

> 屈肌外侧头肌（肌腱滑膜囊，或称屈肌辅助肌）（图394）近似四边形，位于屈肌短头肌的深面。其起自距骨后部的下内侧表面。

ncum by two separate heads which fuse to form a common belly. Running forwards, the muscle narrows slightly and is inserted into the lateral border of the flexor digitorum longus tendon at the point of its division into separate tendons.

> 该肌由两个独立的头组成，二者融合形成一个共同的肌腹。肌纤维向前延伸时略有变细，并插入到屈指深肌腱的外侧缘，位于该肌腱分成独立肌腱的分叉点处。

Action: together with the flexor digitorum longus muscle flexes the distal phalanges and lends the traction of this muscle a straight direction.

> 作用：与趾长屈肌共同作用，屈曲远端指骨并使该肌的牵引方向保持直线。

Blood supply: the lateral plantar artery.

> 血供：外侧足底动脉。

Innervation: the lateral plantar nerve (S|-S<sup>z</sup> ).

> 支配：外侧足底神经（S<sub>1</sub>-S<sub>2</sub>）。

3. The lumbrical muscles *(musculi lumbricales)* (Fig. 394) are thin, short, and four in number. They lie between the flexor digitorum longus tendons, are covered by the flexor digitorum brevis muscle, and come in contact with the interossei muscles in the depth of the sole. Each lumbrical muscle arises from the respective flexor digitorum longus tendon, the lateral three arising by two heads and the first muscle by a single head. They run forwards and in the region of the metatarsophalangcal joints curve around the medial surface of the lateral four toes, and pass over to their dorsal surface to be inserted into their dorsal tendinous expansion. In some cases the lumbrical muscles are inserted into the joint capsules and even stretch to the distal phalanges. Synovial bursae of

> 蚓状肌（musculi lumbricales）（图394）为薄而短的肌肉，共有四块。它们位于屈指长肌腱之间，被屈指短肌覆盖，并在足底深部与骨间肌接触。每块蚓状肌均起自相应的屈指长肌腱，其中外侧的三块肌起自两头，而第一块肌则起自一头。这些肌肉向前行进，在跖趾关节区域弯曲环绕外侧四趾的内侧表面，并越过至其背侧表面，最终插入至背侧肌腱扩张部。在某些情况下，蚓状肌可插入关节囊，甚至延伸至远端指骨。滑膜囊……

the lumbrical muscles are lodged between these muscles and the deep transverse ligament of the sole.

> 蚓状肌位于这些肌肉与足底深横韧带之间。

Action: flex the proximal phalanges of the lateral four toes extending al the same time their middle and distal phalanges.

> 动作：屈曲外侧四个脚趾的近节趾骨，同时伸展它们的中节趾骨和远节趾骨。

Blood supply: the lateral and medial plantar arteries.

> 血供：外侧足底动脉和内侧足底动脉。

Innervation: the medial and lateral plantar nerves (L5; Si-Sj).

> 支配： medial 和 lateral 足底神经（L5；Si-Sj）。  
[!note]- 术语说明  
“medial plantar nerve” 通常译作“内侧足底神经”，“lateral plantar nerve” 通常译作“外侧足底神经”，二者均为足底神经的分支，分别支配足底内、外侧的皮肤和肌肉。

4. The plantar interossei muscles *(musculi interossei plantares)*  (Fig. 396) are narrow, short, and three in number. They lie in the spaces between the second and third, the third and fourth, and the fourth and fifth toes. Each muscle arises from the medial surfaces of the third, fourth, and fifth metatarsal bones and are inserted into the base of the proximal phalanx and are partly continuous with the dorsal tendinous expansion.

> 足底内侧肌（musculi interossei plantares）（图396）呈细长形，共有三块。它们位于第二与第三、第三与第四、第四与第五趾之间的间隙中。每块肌肉起自第三、第四、第五跖骨的内侧表面，肌腱插入近节趾骨基底部，并与足背腱膜的扩大部分部分连续。

Action: flex the proximal phalanges and extend the middle and distal phalanges of the third, fourth, and fifth toes and also adduct these toes towards the second toe.

> 动作：屈曲第三、第四、第五趾的近节趾骨，伸展其中节和远节趾骨，并将这些趾向第二趾方向收拢。

Blood supply: the plantar arch and the plantar metatarsal arteries.

> 血供：足底弓和足底跖骨动脉。

Innervation: the lateral plantar nerve (S1-S2).

> 支配神经：外侧足底神经（S1-S2）。

5. The dorsal interossei muscles *(musculi interossei donates)*  (Fig. 390) resemble the plantar muscles in shape. They are four in

> 背侧骨间肌（musculi interossei dorsales）（图390）在形态上类似于足底肌。它们共有四块。

![](_page_427_Picture_16.jpeg)

387. *Muscles and fasciae of right foot;* medial aspect (J4).

> 右足肌肉和筋膜；内侧方面（J4）

number and fill all ihe interosseous spaces on the dorsal surface. Each muscle arises from ihe opposing surfaces of two adjacent [iDci.ii.irs.il b](http://iDci.ii.irs.il)ones. They pass forwards, and arc inserted into the base of the proximal phalanges of the second, third, and fourth loes and into the dorsal tendinous expansion.

> 数清并填满背侧的骨间间隙。每块肌肉起自相邻两块骨的相对面。它们向前行进，并插入到第二、第三和第四趾近节趾骨基底部，以及背侧腱性扩大部分。

Action: the first inlcrossci muscle pulls the second toes medially; the second, third, and fourth muscles displace the second. third, and fourth toes laterally. The four muscles also flex the proximal phalanges and extend the middle and distal phalanges of these toes.

> 动作：第一块跨趾肌将第二趾向内牵拉；第二、第三、第四块肌肉分别将第二、第三、第四趾向外牵拉。这四块肌肉还可使这些趾的近节趾骨屈曲，并伸展其中节和远节趾骨。

Blood supply: the plantar arch and the plantar met alar.sal arteries.

> 血供：足底弓和足底跖侧动脉。

Inncrvation: the lateral plantar nerve (S|-Sj).

> 神经支配：外侧足底神经（S1-S2）

> [!note]- 术语说明
“Lateral plantar nerve” 通常译作“外侧足底神经”，是足底内侧皮神经的分支，主要分布于足底的外侧部分。

## 14 THE SUBSARTORIAL CANAL

> 14 皮下隧道（Subsartorial Canal）

The adductor magnus muscle has openings which transmit blood vessels. The lowest and largest opening is called the opening in the adductor magnus *(hiatus tendineus /addudoriusj),* A little higher is a thick intermuscular layer of fascia bridging the vaslus medialis and the adductor magnus muscles, which is called the lamina vastoadductoria. Between these muscles and the fascial

> 股大收肌有开口，可让血管通过。其中最低且最大的开口称为股大收肌孔（hiatus tendineus adductorius）。稍高处有一层较厚的肌间筋膜，连接股内侧肌和股大收肌，称为大收肌筋膜层（lamina vastoadductoria）。在这些肌肉与筋膜之间，

lamina is a space triangular in cross-section. It is called the subsartorial canal *(canalis addudoriusj* and lodges the femoral artery and vein and the saphenous nerve. The vessels pass from the canal into the popliteal fossa, while the nerve pierces the fascial lamina to appear on the medial surface of the thigh.

> 椎板呈三角形横截面。它被称为股三角（canalis adductorius），容纳股动脉、股静脉和大隐神经。这些血管从该管进入腘窝，而该神经则穿出筋膜层，出现在大腿内侧表面。

## 15 THE POPLITEAL FOSSA 腘窝

The popliteal fossa *(fossa poplitea)* (sec Figs 364, 366, 367) is in the region ol ihe posterior surface of the knee and is rhomboid. It is bounded by the biceps femoris muscle superiorly and laterally, by the semimembranosus muscle superiorly and medially, and by

> 腘窝（fossa poplitea）（参见图364、366、367）位于膝关节后侧区域，呈菱形。其上界和外侧由股二头肌构成，上界和内侧由半膜肌构成，下界由腘肌构成。

both heads of the gaslrocnemius muscle and the plantaris muscle inferiorly; the Iloor of the fossa is formed by the popliteal surface of the femur and the posterior surface of the knee joint capsule.

> 股二头肌两个头和腓肠肌下方；窝的底由股骨腘面和膝关节囊的后表面构成。

## 16 THE CRUROPOPLITEAL CANAL 骨盆管

posterior group on the leg. The proximal end of the canal arises the popliteal fossa.

> 小腿后群肌肉。管的近端起自腘窝。

The cruropopliteal canal *(canalis cruropopliteus)* (it is described from the popliteal fossa. Its opening is bounded anteriorly by the in detail in manuals of topographical anatomy) passes between the popliteus muscle and posteriorly by the tendinous arch of the soanterior surface of the soleus muscle and the deep muscles of the leus muscle. The canal lodges nerves and vessels entering il from

> 腘腓管（canalis cruropopliteus）（该管从腘窝描述而来。其开口前方由腓肠肌前表面和深部肌肉构成，后方由比目鱼肌腱弓构成。该管内容纳着进入腘窝的神经和血管。）

## 17 FASCIAE OF THE LOWER LIMB 下肢筋膜 

#### 17.1.1 FASCIAE OF **THE PELVIS AND THIGH**
> 17.1.1 骨盆与大腿的筋膜

The external surface of ihe pelvis is covered by a fascia which is a continuation of the lumbar fascia *(fascia tkoracolumbalis)* (see Fig. 253). Below ihe outer Up of the iliac crest and the dorsal sacral surface ihe fascia covers the group of gluteus muscles and is continuous downwards with ihe fascia lata of the thigh.

> 骨盆的外侧表面被一层筋膜覆盖，该筋膜是腰筋膜（胸腰筋膜，fascia thoracolumbalis）的延续（见图253）。在髂嵴外侧上方和骶骨背侧表面下方，该筋膜覆盖臀肌群，并向下延续为大腿的阔筋膜（fascia lata）。

The fascia covering the gluteus muximus muscle thickens noticeably in the region of the fenioro-gluteal fold (see Fig. 366). The layer of fascia lining the inner surface of the gluteus maximum muscle covers ihe gluteus medius, pi ri form is, obturalorius interims, and quadratus femoris muscles.

> 覆盖臀大肌的筋膜在臀股褶区域明显增厚（见图366）。覆盖臀大肌内侧表面的筋膜层覆盖着臀中肌、臀小肌、梨状肌和股方肌。

The fascia of the internal surface of ihe pelvis is called the fascia iliaca (see Fig. 297). It arises on the inner lip of the iliac crest and the lateral surfaces of the bodies of the lumbar vertebrae and covers the iliacus and the psoas major and minor muscles.

> 骨盆内侧表面的筋膜称为髂筋膜（见图297）。它起自髂嵴内侧缘及腰椎体的外侧表面，覆盖髂肌和腰大肌及腰小肌。

On reaching the lateral end of the inguinal ligament, the fascia

> 到达腹股沟韧带的外侧端时，筋膜

iliaca fuses with it closely; medially it is separated from the inguinal ligament and covers here ihe iliopsoas muscle, passes over to the pectineus muscle and forms a lining ior the iliopectineal furrow. Bands of the fascia iliaca, which are called the iliopectineal arch *(arcus iliopedincus),* arise from the inferior surface of the inguinal ligament and reach the iliopubic eminence as a result of which laleral and medial spaces form under the ligament. The lateral, larger, space is called the lacuna musculorum and lodges the iliopsoas muscle and the femoral nerve. The medial space is known as the lacuna vasorum and transmits the femoral artery laterally and the femoral vein medially with a lymphatic gland (in some cases) or fatty tissue lodged between them. From the direction of the abdominal cavity this place is covered by the fascia transversalis and the peritoneum and corresponds to the deep femoral ring.

> 髂筋膜与髂骨紧密融合；其内侧与腹股沟韧带分开，并覆盖此处的髂腰肌，越过股薄肌，形成髂股沟凹陷的衬里。髂筋膜的束带称为髂股弓（arcus iliopubicus），起自腹股沟韧带的下表面，并延伸至髂耻隆起，从而在韧带下方形成内侧和外侧两个间隙。外侧较大的间隙称为肌沟（lacuna musculorum），容纳髂腰肌和股神经。内侧间隙称为血管沟（lacuna vasorum），其外侧通过股动脉，内侧通过股静脉，并在两者之间可能有淋巴结（在某些情况下）或脂肪组织。从腹腔方向来看，该区域被腹横筋膜和腹膜覆盖，并对应于深股环。

The fascia lata (see Figs 354, 366) is a thick sheet investing the

> 阔筋膜（见图354、366）是一层较厚的筋膜，包裹着

![](_page_429_Picture_2.jpeg)

388. *Muscles of right foot;* dorsal surface (%).

> 右足肌；背侧面（%）

![](_page_430_Picture_2.jpeg)

389. *Muscles of right foot;* dorsal surface (%). (The extensor digitorum longus and tibialis anterior tendons arc removed.)

> 右足肌肉；背侧表面（%）。（趾长伸肌和胫骨前肌肌腱被移除。）

muscles of the thigh. It is fused with the inguinal ligament in front and above and with the gluteus fascia in back, and is continuous downwards with the crural fascia. On the lateral surface of the thigh the fascia lata is thickest and forms a band called the iliotibial tract (tractus iliotibialis) which arises in the region of the anterior superior iliac spine and stretches to the region of the lateral condyle of the tibia. The proximal part of the tract receives the tensor fasciae latae muscle and some fibres of the gluteus maximus muscle. On the anterior surface of the proximal part of the thigh is a

> 大腿肌肉。它在前方和上方与腹股沟韧带融合，在后方与臀筋膜相连，并向下延续为小腿筋膜。在大腿的外侧，筋膜（fascia lata）最厚，形成一条称为髂胫束（tractus iliotibialis）的带状结构，该束起自骨盆前上棘区域，延伸至胫骨外侧髁区域。髂胫束的近端部分接受臀中肌的张力肌（tensor fasciae latae）和臀大肌的部分肌纤维。在大腿近端的前侧，有一层...

small oval depression of fascia. It is called the saphenous opening (hiatus saphenus) (see Fig. 303). The lateral margin of the depression is thick and called the falciform margin (margo falciformis). The upper part of the margin is attached to the inguinal ligament and is called the superior cornu (cornu superius), the lower part is called the inferior cornu (cornu inferius). The depression, or the oval fossa, itself is covered by a lamina which has many openings and is called the cribriform fascia (fascia cribrosa) (see Fig. 301).

> 小而椭圆形的筋膜凹陷。称为大隐静脉裂孔（hiatus saphenus）（见图303）。凹陷的外侧缘较厚，称为镰状缘（margo falciformis）。该缘的上部附着于腹股沟韧带，称为上角（cornu superius），下部称为下角（cornu inferius）。该凹陷，或称椭圆形窝，本身被一层具有许多孔隙的膜覆盖，称为筛状筋膜（fascia cribrosa）（见图301）。

![](_page_431_Picture_4.jpeg)

390. Muscles of right foot; dorsal surface (1/5). (Interessei muscles.)

> 右足肌肉；背侧（1/5）。（Interessei肌肉。）

![](_page_432_Picture_2.jpeg)

391. *Sites of origin and insertion of muscles on bones of right foot;* dorsal surface (schematical representation).

> 右足骨肌起始与附着点；足背表面（示意图）。

![](_page_433_Picture_2.jpeg)

392. Plantar aponeurosis (aponeurosis plantaris)  $\binom{1}{2}$ .

> 足底筋膜（Plantar aponeurosis）

![](_page_434_Picture_2.jpeg)

393. Muscles of right foot; plantar surface (1/2).

> 右足肌；足底面（1/2）

The fascia lata gives off scpla penetrating deeply between the muscles; a lateral, medial, and posterior septa are distinguished.

> 阔筋膜发出的筋膜层深入肌肉之间，形成一个深部穿行的筋膜鞘；可区分出一个外侧、内侧和后侧隔膜。

The lateral intermuscular septum of the thigh *(septum intermusailarc femoris lateral\*)* is attached to the lateral lip of the linea as- |KT.I <>l the lemur. It separates the anterior group of thigh muscles from the posterior group.

> 大腿的外侧肌间隔（septum intermuscularis femoris laterale）附着于股神经的外侧唇。它将大腿前群肌肉与后群肌肉分隔开。

The medial intermuscular septum of the thigh *(septum intermus-*

> 大腿的内侧肌间隔（septum intermus...）

*cular e femoris mediate)* is attached lo the medial lip of the linea aspera of the femur. It is the boundary between the medial and anterior groups of the thigh muscles.

> 股薄肌（Musculus sartorius）附着于股骨粗线 medial lip（粗线 medial 侧唇）。它是大腿肌肉 medial 组与 anterior 组之间的分界线。

The posterior intermuscular septum is defined less clearly. It is attached, like the medial septum, to the medial lip of the linea aspera. It separates the medial group of muscles from the posterior group.

> 后方肌间隔的定义较为模糊。它与内侧间隔类似，附着于粗隆的内侧缘。它将内侧肌群与后方肌群分开。

![](_page_435_Picture_7.jpeg)

394. *Muscles of right foot;* plantar surface (J4). 右足肌；足底面（J4）

In the upper third of the anterior surface of the femur, in the region of the femoral triangle *(trigonum jtmorale)* which is bounded by the inguinal ligament and the sartorius and the adductor longus muscles, the fascia lata separates into two layers, superficial and deep, the space between which is filled with a large amount of loose fatty tissue with vessels passing and lymphatic glands lodged in it. In the upper part of the femoral triangle the deep layer is

> 在股骨前表面的上三分之一处，位于股三角（trigonum femorale）区域，该区域由腹股沟韧带、缝匠肌和长收肌围成，筋膜（fascia lata）分为浅层和深层，二者之间的间隙充满了大量疏松脂肪组织，其中有血管通过，并有淋巴结嵌入其中。在股三角的上部，深层筋膜

> [!note]- 术语说明
“fascia lata” 通常译作“阔筋膜”，是覆盖大腿前侧的筋膜层。

fused with the pectineal line in the region of the iliopubic eminence. On the lateral side of the femoral triangle the deep layer is continuous with the fascia iliaca covering the iliopsoas muscle, while on the medial side both layers of the fascia lata fuse. The lloor of the triangle is formed by the iliopsoas and the pectine muscles. us

> 与耻骨梳在髂耻隆起区域融合。在股三角的外侧，深层筋膜与覆盖髂腰肌的髂筋膜连续，而在内侧，股筋膜层的两层融合。三角的底由髂腰肌和耻骨肌构成。

![](_page_436_Picture_4.jpeg)

395. *Muscles of right foot;* plantar surface  右足肌肉；足底面

## 18 THE FEMORAL CANAL 股管

The femoral canal *(canalis femoralis)* (see Figs 301-307) docs not exist under normal conditions. It forms only with the occurrence of a femoral hernia, i.e. in protrusion of the abdominal organs (an intestinal loop, omentum, etc.) under the inguinal ligament in the lacuna vasorum. Thus, there is only the deep femoral ring *(anulus femoralis profundus)* normally. It is closed by an area of the transversalis fascia in the form of the femoral septum *(septum femorale)* whose surface facing the abdominal cavity is lined with the parietal peritoneum. The deep femoral ring is bounded by the pectincal part of the inguinal ligament medially, by the femoral

> 股管（canalis femoralis）（见图301-307）在正常情况下并不存在。它仅在发生股疝时形成，即腹腔器官（如肠袢、大网膜等）通过腹股沟韧带下方的血管裂孔突出时形成。因此，在正常情况下仅有深股环（anulus femoralis profundus）。深股环由腹横筋膜形成，呈股隔（septum femorale）状，其面向腹腔的一面被壁腹膜覆盖。深股环的内侧由腹股沟韧带的耻骨部构成，外侧由股动脉的外侧壁构成，上方由腔隙韧带构成，下方则由股筋膜构成。

vein laterally, by the inguinal ligament superiorly and anteriorly, and by the pectineal ligament interiorly and posteriorly.

> 静脉位于外侧，其上前方由腹股沟韧带覆盖，内后方则由耻骨韧带覆盖。

The deep femoral ring itself is filled by loose fatty tissue or a large lymph gland.

> 股深环本身被疏松的脂肪组织或较大的淋巴结填充。

When a femoral hernia forms, the femoral septum bulges out, pushes the- lymph gland aside, thus forming a space which the protruding viscera enter and then descend between the superficial and deep layers of the fascia lata. This space produced between the fascial layers is actually the cavity of the femoral canal whose anterior wall is the inguinal ligament and the superior cornu of the falci-

> 当发生股疝时，股隔向外膨出，将淋巴结推开，从而形成一个空间，突出的内脏器官进入该空间，并在阔筋膜浅层与深层之间向下延伸。在筋膜层之间形成的这个空间实际上就是股管腔，其前壁为腹股沟韧带和镰状韧带的上角。

![](_page_437_Picture_7.jpeg)

396. *Muscles of right foot;* plantar surface (%). (Intcrossei muscles.)

> 右足肌；足底面（%）。（趾交叉肌。）

![](_page_438_Picture_2.jpeg)

397. *Sites of origin and attachment of muscles and ligaments on bones of right foot;* plantar surface (schematical representation).

> 右足骨上肌肉和韧带的起始点和附着点；足底面（示意图）。

![](_page_439_Picture_2.jpeg)

398. *Synovial sheaths of tendons (vaginae synoviales tendinum) on right foot;* dorsal surface *(%).*

> 跟腱鞘（tendinum synovia vaginae）位于右足背侧（%）。

(A coloured mass is administered into the sheath.)

> （将一种有色物质注入鞘内。）

form margin of the fascia lata, the posterior wall is the deep layer of the fascia lata, and the lateral wall is the femoral vein.

> 筋膜层的前缘为阔筋膜的边缘，后壁为阔筋膜的深层，侧壁为股静脉。

On reaching the weakest place in the fascia lata, the hiatus

> 当韧带到达大腿筋膜最薄弱处时，形成 hiatus /no_think

saphenus, the hernial sac distends the cribriform fascia and protrudes under the skin through the hiatus which is as if the external opening of the femoral canal.

> 股疝，疝囊扩张并牵拉筛状筋膜，通过股管的外口突出皮下，犹如股管的外口。

#### 18.1.1 FASCIAE OF THE LEG

> 18.1.1 小腿的筋膜

The fascia of the leg, which is called the crural fascia (fascia cruris) (see Figs 375, 384), is a direct continuation of the fascia lata but is much less conspicuous. It gives off two intermuscular septa, anterior and posterior, which penetrate deeply into the leg to form the fascial beds for the anterior, posterior, and lateral groups of muscles. It should be pointed out that the posterior fascial bed is subdivided by a frontal septum into a superficial and a deep seat. The anterior intermuscular septum (septum intermusculare anterius) separates the anterior group of muscles from the lateral group. The posterior intermuscular septum (septum intermusculare posterius) passes between the lateral and the posterior groups of muscles.

> 小腿的筋膜称为**踘筋膜**（fascia cruris）（见图375、384），是**阔筋膜**的直接延续，但不如后者明显。它发出两个**肌间隔**，即**前肌间隔**和**后肌间隔**，深入小腿内部，形成容纳**前群肌**、**后群肌**和**外侧群肌**的筋膜床。需要指出的是，**后筋膜床**被一个**前隔**分为**浅层**和**深层**。**前肌间隔**（septum intermusculare anterius）将**前群肌**与**外侧群肌**分隔开；**后肌间、隔**（septum intermusculare posterius）则位于**外侧群肌**与**后群肌**之间。

In the lower third of the anterior surface of the leg the crural fascia is poorly developed, as the result of which transverse bands are clearly distinguishable. They form the superior extensor retinaculum (retinaculum musculorum extensorum superius) which is stretched between the anterior border of the tibia and the lateral surface of the fibula.

> 在小腿前侧下1/3处，深筋膜发育不完善，因而横行的筋膜带清晰可辨。这些筋膜带形成浅层伸肌支持带（superior extensor retinaculum，retinaculum musculorum extensorum superius），它位于胫骨前缘与腓骨外侧面之间。

In the lower third in the region of the malleolus the crural fascia forms a thickening called the inferior extensor retinaculum (retinaculum musculorum extensorum inferius) in which one lateral and two medial (superior and inferior) bands are distinguished.

> 在踝骨区域的下三分之一处，小腿深筋膜形成一个增厚部分，称为下肢伸肌支持带（inferior extensor retinaculum，retinaculum musculorum extensorum inferius），在此支持带中可区分出一个外侧束和两个内侧束（上内侧束和下内侧束）。

On the lateral surface of the leg the fascia thickens slightly to

> 在小腿的外侧表面，筋膜略为增厚。

![](_page_440_Picture_10.jpeg)

**399.** Synovial sheaths of tendons (vaginae synoviales tendinum) on right foot; dorsolateral surface  $\binom{1}{2}$ .

> 跟腱滑膜鞘（tendinum synovia vaginae）位于右足背外侧表面。

![](_page_441_Figure_2.jpeg)

**400.** Synovial sheaths of tendons (vaginae synoviales tendinum) on right foot; medial aspect  $\binom{1}{2}$ .

> 跟腱鞘（tendinum synovia vaginae）位于右足内侧方面。

form the superior and inferior peroneal retinacula (retinacula musculorum peroneorum [fibularium] superius et inferius). Together with the bones of the leg and foot these ligaments hold the peroneus longus and brevis muscles in place. The superior retinaculum is stretched between the lateral malleolus and the calcaneus. Some of the bands of the retinaculum are interlaced into the deep layer of the crural fascia. The inferior retinaculum is located on the lateral surface of the calcaneus and forms osteofibrous canals lodging the tendons of the peroneus muscles. In the region of the medial malleolus the crural fascia thickens to form the flexor retinaculum (retinaculum musculorum flexorum) which stretches between the medial malleolus and the calcaneus. It assists in the formation of four separate fibrous canals.

> 形成腓骨上、下筋膜带（peronei musculorum [fibularium] retinacula superius et inferius）。这些筋膜带与小腿和足部的骨共同作用，使腓骨长肌和短肌保持稳定位置。腓骨上筋膜带位于腓骨外踝与跟骨之间，其部分束与小腿深筋膜的深层交织。腓骨下筋膜带位于跟骨的外侧面，并形成容纳腓骨肌腱的骨纤维管。在内踝区域，小腿深筋膜增厚形成屈肌筋膜带（flexorum musculorum retinaculum），其位于内踝与跟骨之间。它协助形成四个独立的纤维管。

Three of these canals transmit tendons: the medial canal transmits the tibialis posterior tendon, the lateral canal the flexor hallucis longus tendon, and the canal located between these two transmits the flexor digitorum longus tendon. The fourth canal lodges the posterior tibial artery and vein and the tibial nerve.

> 这四个通道中有三个传递肌腱：内侧通道传递胫骨后肌腱，外侧通道传递趾长屈肌腱，位于这两者之间的通道传递拇长屈肌腱。第四个通道容纳胫后动脉和静脉以及胫神经。

#### 18.1.2 FASCIAE OF THE FOOT

> 18.1.2 足部筋膜

The fasciae of the foot (fasciae pedis) (see Figs 375, 392) are a direct continuation of the crural fascia. The fascia on the dorsal surface of the foot is thin and attached to some points of the bones. Where there are muscles, the fascia separates into two layers to form sheaths for the superficial muscles of the dorsal surface of the foot. The deep layer of the fascia separates the interossei muscles from the extensors of the toes.

> 足部筋膜（足筋膜）（见图375、392）是小腿筋膜的直接延续。足背表面的筋膜较薄，并附着于骨的某些点上。在肌肉存在的区域，筋膜分为两层，形成包裹足背浅层肌肉的鞘。深层筋膜则将足部骨间肌与趾伸肌群分隔开。

The superficial fascia is thicker on the plantar than on the dorsal surface. The middle part of the plantar fascia is very thick and is made up of longitudinal fibrous bands; it is called the plantar aponeurosis (aponeurosis plantaris). In the distal part the fibrous bands forming the aponeurosis are directed transversely and are called the superficial transverse ligaments (fasciculi transversi). Most of the fibres of the plantar aponeurosis arise from the posterior

> 浅层筋膜在足底比足背更厚。足底筋膜的中部非常厚，由纵向纤维束构成，称为足底腱膜（plantar aponeurosis）。在远端部分，构成腱膜的纤维束呈横向排列，称为浅层横韧带（fasciculi transversi）。足底腱膜的大部分纤维起源于足底的后部。

![](_page_442_Picture_2.jpeg)

**401.** *Synovial sheaths of tendons (vaginae synoviales tendinum) on right foot;*  **plantar surface (%).**

> 跟腱滑膜鞘（tendinum synovia vaginae）；右足跖面（%）。

surface of the calcaneum, run forwards, and separate into five slips according to the number of toes. On the way, the inner surface of the aponeurosis fuses with the flexor digitorum brevis muscle passing here. On the posterior surface of the calcaneum some bands of the aponeurosis arc a continuation of the triceps surac tendon. The outer surface of the plantar aponeurosis is fused with the skin by means of separate connective-tissue bands. The spaces between the bands are filled with fatty tissue.

> 跟骨的表面，肌腱向前走行，并根据脚趾的数量分为五束。在走行过程中，肌腱的内侧表面与经过此处的趾短屈肌腱膜融合。在跟骨的后表面，肌腱膜的一些束呈弓形延续为趾长屈肌腱。足底肌腱膜的外侧表面通过独立的结缔组织束与皮肤相连。这些束之间的间隙填充有脂肪组织。

The deep plantar fascia fuses with the plantar surfaces of the

> 深层足底筋膜与足底面融合

metatarsals to form together with the dorsal fascia of the foot (fused with the dorsal surface of the metatarsals) four intennetatarsal spaces containing the intcrossei muscles.

> 跖骨共同形成足背筋膜（与跖骨背侧表面融合）四个间跖间隙，包含交叉肌。

The plantar aponeurosis and the deep fascia of the sole are joined by means of two longitudinal septa to form three fascial sheaths: medial, lateral, and intermediate. Each sheath contains the respective group of muscles of the plantar surface of the foot.

> 足底筋膜与足底深筋膜通过两条纵向隔膜相连，形成三个筋膜鞘：内侧、外侧和中间鞘。每个筋膜鞘内包含足底相应肌群。

The medial and lateral plantar grooves *(sulcus plantaris medialis*  et *lateralis)* lie on both sides of the middle sheath (Fig. 392).

> medial 和 lateral 足底沟（medialis et lateralis sulcus plantaris）位于中层鞘的两侧（图392）。

#### 18.1.3 SYNOVIAL SHEATHS O F MUSCLE TENDONS ON TH E FOOT

> 18.1.3 足部肌腱滑膜鞘

Synovia) sheaths (Figs 398-401) containing the long tendons of the leg muscles are located in the distal part of the leg and on the foot. Three anterior sheaths lying under the inferior extensor retinaculum are distinguished. The tendon of the libialis anterior muscle lies in the medial sheath, the tendons of the extensor digitorum longus and pcroncus tertius muscles are in the lateral sheath, and the tendon of the extensor hallucis longus muscle occupies the intermediate sheath.

> 滑膜鞘（图398-401）包含腿部肌肉的长腱，位于小腿远端和足部。可分为三个前侧鞘，位于下肢伸肌支持带下方。胫骨前肌的腱位于内侧鞘内，趾长伸肌和胫骨前肌（胫骨前肌的另一部分）的腱位于外侧鞘内，而拇长伸肌的腱则位于中间鞘内。

The common synovial sheath of the peroncal tendons *(vagina synovialis musculorum peroneum [fibulariumj communis)* is located on the lateral surface of the ankle joint under the superior peroneal retinaculum.

> 腓骨肌腱的共同滑膜鞘（vagina synovialis musculorum peroneum [fibularium] communis）位于踝关节外侧面上方的腓骨上韧带下方。

Three separate synovial sheaths are situated on the medial surface of the ankle joint under the flexor retinaculum. The synovial sheath of the tibialis posterior tendon *(vagina synovialis tendinis musculi tibialis posterioris)* lies directly behind the medial malleolus, slightly to the back is the synovia) sheath of the flexor digitorum longus tendon *(vagina tendinis musculi Jlexorum digitorum pedis longi),*  and still further to the back is the synovial sheath of the flexor hallucis longus tendon *(vagina synovialis tendinis musculi Jlexoris hallucis longi).*

> 踝关节内侧面上方的屈肌筋膜鞘下有三个独立的滑膜鞘。胫骨后肌腱的滑膜鞘（vagina synovialis tendinis musculi tibialis posterioris）位于内踝的后方；稍靠后的是趾长屈肌腱的滑膜鞘（vagina tendinis musculi flexorum digitorum pedis longi）；再靠后的是拇长屈肌腱的滑膜鞘（vagina synovialis tendinis musculi flexoris hallucis longi）。

On the plantar surface of the foot the digital synovial sheaths of the tendons of the foot *(vaginae tendinum digitales pedis)* arc fused with the walls of the osteofibrous canals stretching on the plantai surface of the phalanges of the toes. The flexor digitorum tendons are lodged in these canals. The synovial sheath of the extensor hallucis longus tendon *(vagina tendinis musculi extensoris hallucis longus)*  is the longest.

> 足底面的足部肌腱滑膜鞘（足部数字滑膜鞘，vaginae tendinum digitales pedis）与伸展趾骨的骨纤维管的侧壁融合，这些骨纤维管延伸于脚趾骨的底面。屈肌腱位于这些骨纤维管内。伸长拇趾肌腱的滑膜鞘（伸长拇趾肌腱滑膜鞘，vagina tendinis musculi extensoris hallucis longus）是最长的。

# AGE FEATURES OF MUSCLES  肌肉的年龄特征
The number of muscles in the newborn is the same as that in an adult; there are more than 650 of them. But macroscopic and microscopic differences exist which are relative to the mass and size of the muscles, their connection to the bones and skin, and the character of the intermuscular connective tissue. The muscles account for up to 40-45 per cent of the total body mass of a human

> 新生儿的肌肉数量与成人的相同，超过650块。但存在宏观和微观上的差异，这些差异与肌肉的体积和大小、其与骨骼和皮肤的连接方式，以及肌肉间结缔组织的性质有关。肌肉约占人体总体重的40%-45%。

adult and for 20 to 22 per cent of the total body mass of a newborn. This index considerably reduces at the age of 6-8 months (the beginning of the period of eruption of the teeth) and amounts to 16.6 per cent of the total mass, but again increases to 22 per cent by the age of 6 years.

> 成人的脂肪组织约占体重的20%至22%。对于新生儿而言，脂肪组织约占总体重的20%至22%。此指数在6-8个月龄时（乳牙开始萌出的时期）明显下降，约占总体重的16.6%，但在6岁时又回升至22%。

The internal pcrimysium in the newborn is a fine-fibrillar con-
> 新生儿的内环状韧带为细纤维状结构

![](_page_444_Picture_4.jpeg)

401a. *Temporal and masseter muscles (musculus temporalis et musculus masseter) on right side (in the newborn).*

> 401a. 右侧颞肌和咬肌（musculus temporalis et musculus masseter）（新生儿）

![](_page_445_Picture_2.jpeg)

401b. *Diaphragm (diaphragma);* superior aspect *(in the newborn).*

> 401b. 膈（膈肌）；膈的上方（新生儿）

nective lissue. The external perimysium, which lies in contact with the subcutaneous fat, is loose and thus affords the skin a good range of mobility.

> 结缔组织。与皮下脂肪接触的外层筋膜（perimysium）较为松弛，因此为皮肤提供了良好的活动范围。

The organization of the tendinous part of a skeletal muscle is a very important feature with regard to age. Beginning lYmu tin neonatal period, the tendinous component forming the tendon of the muscle grows intensely with age; the existence of this component determines the definite relation of the muscle to the site of its insertion into the bone. This is one of the main factors affecting the function of the muscle.

> 骨骼肌的肌腱部分的组织结构是与年龄密切相关的重要特征。从新生儿期开始，构成肌腱的肌腱成分随着年龄增长而迅速发育；这一成分的存在决定了肌肉与骨质附着点之间的确定关系。这是影响肌肉功能的主要因素之一。

Microscopically, the muscle fibres are slightly thinner in the newborn than in an adult, the nuclei are more spherical, and the transverse striations are less defined.

> 在显微镜下，新生儿的肌纤维比成人的稍细，细胞核更呈球形，横纹的定义也较不清晰。

The muscles of some regions of the body have some specific features. For instance, the superficial fibres of the masseter muscle spread fan-wise in the adult but are almost parallel in the newborn. The masseter muscle forms actively beginning from the period of eruption of the deciduous teeth. The tendon of this muscle is also marked by a certain difference: it is very short in the newborn, but is almost half the length of the muscle in an adult (Fig. 401a).

> 身体某些部位的肌肉具有特定的特征。例如，咬肌的浅层纤维在成人中呈扇形分布，而在新生儿中则几乎呈平行排列。咬肌从乳牙萌出期就开始主动形成。该肌肉的肌腱也存在一定的差异：在新生儿中肌腱非常短，而在成人中肌腱长度几乎达到肌肉长度的一半（图401a）。

The attachment of the temporal muscle is distinguished by to-

> 颞肌的附着点具有明显的差异性。

pographo-anatomical features. In the newborn it is attached to the edge of the squama of the temporal bone, whereas in an adult it occupies the temporal fossa completely and its upper fibres reach the inferior temporal line of the parietal bone (see Fig. 401a).

> 影像解剖特征。在新生儿中，它附着于颞骨鳞部的边缘，而在成人中则完全占据颞窝，其上部纤维可达顶骨下颞线（见图401a）。

Certain changes occur in the position of the diaphragm: under the effect of respiratory movements its height changes in the first place beginning from birth and this process continues with age because it is not only associated with inspiration and expiration but depends on the position of the liver, the extent to which the stomach is filled, and the individual features of the structure of the trunk.

> 在膈的位置上会出现某些变化：在呼吸运动的影响下，膈的高度自出生起就开始发生变化，并且这一过程会随着年龄的增长而持续进行。这是因为膈不仅与吸气和呼气有关，还取决于肝脏的位置、胃部充盈程度以及躯干结构的个体特征。

The connective-tissue bands in the region of the central tendon, nearer to the sternal part of the diaphragm, have a semicircular position with the curvature directed towards the vertebral column (Fig. 401b). After birth the curvature is lost and the bands gradually take a sagittal direction.

> 在中央腱区域，靠近膈肌胸骨部分的结缔组织束呈半圆形排列，其弯曲方向朝向椎骨列（图401b）。出生后，这种弯曲消失，这些束逐渐呈矢状方向排列。

In general, the skeletal muscles of an infant possess all the properties of these muscles of an adult, but the transverse strialions are less defined, the fibres are rather thin, the nuclei are slightly spherical, the tendinous part is less pronounced, the area of muscle insertion is smaller, and there is a difference in the direction of the muscular bands,

> 总体而言，婴儿的骨骼肌具有与成人相同的各种肌性特性，但横纹不明显，肌纤维较细，细胞核略呈球形，肌腱部分不显著，肌腹插入区域较小，且肌束方向存在差异。

> [!note]- 术语说明
“transverse strialions” 为“横纹”的误写，应译为“横纹”，指肌肉细胞中的横纹结构。

glabclla, 62 gomphoses, 177

> glabella, 62 gomphoses, 177

[!note]- 术语说明  
“glabella” 通常译作“鼻根”，是面部解剖结构之一，位于鼻骨与额骨之间。  
“gomphoses” 通常译作“齿槽骨联合”，是骨骼与牙齿之间的连接结构，属于纤维性关节。  
“177” 在此上下文中可能指某种计数或编号，建议结合具体上下文进一步确认。

cthmoidal

> !note]- 术语说明  
“Cthmoidal” 可能是拼写错误或非标准术语。在解剖学中，常见的相关术语为“thyroid”（甲状腺）。若指“cthmoidal”，可能为“cervicothyroid”（颈甲状腺）的误写，或指“thyroid cartilage”（喉软骨）的误拼。建议根据上下文确认具体指代。  

“Cthmoidal” 通常译作“喉软骨”，是喉部的软骨结构之一。
